subject: Deeply concerning.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc
body:
Can't imagine what will happen...

| [ ](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=32b71057d405422d96d42f6424776fb3&_e=GGXGwKtxrCkXTNlyJ90IMWdDGEUpOumP5ls0ugjPzdwnk0pT0jVLO-BMrL6_39OP9A6Cf9N9ZspPgvilUePVcBuTUqk3alKqonjq8DKMa_xUIVBr12kpgNww7ofxxXPjVkvQk6fBpWVr8PsNtWSW_Q2Le0XvCRj5LXL_JJ8E7SksT2MF3i5v1Mb-4VCaJ0tqsjujQId--4o3UlFCXmnFYcjX09K8olv_e8zaohfGuXSReQkA8HWki_vcIMxR6WLQmTkAG7QfFA1-X_KzxiqUXrOHTyogWSMZRmuCEbKD8NI%3D)
---
Friend,

It's Senator Chuck Grassley.

I reached out to you a few months ago talking about the political bias that's seeped into our government.

**A few months later, I 'm sorry to say, it's not gotten better. In fact, it's gotten much, much worse.
**
Integrity, transparency, and fairness have always been the cornerstones of our nation's government. **[However, in 2023, these tenants are long forgotten in the current administration.](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=32b71057d405422d96d42f6424776fb3&_e=GGXGwKtxrCkXTNlyJ90IMWdDGEUpOumP5ls0ugjPzdwnk0pT0jVLO-BMrL6_39OP9A6Cf9N9ZspPgvilUePVcBuTUqk3alKqonjq8DKMa_xUIVBr12kpgNww7ofxxXPjklwkyWDYioFqsSoyYJiIk6EgzTzsOlToSrmc4x316mdG8P4fI_CP2ueboZ99y6w_2RKesT7urTIJs892osYMtM4okoHZsktKbXfS2BkPOVitn7tccXijdnRKoREh6NBFzjEi25J3bo-RqQ-6kA7vqfXEF6IQx39im34SE1KlKKE%3D)**

As a dedicated public servant, I have witnessed firsthand how partisan agendas can undermine the American people's trust. I'm reaching out to you today, seeking your support to help us reclaim our country in the upcoming 2024 elections. We can't afford to miss out on our chance to save this nation once and for all.

With your help, we can make a difference. By contributing, you will actively support the cause to set things right and restore our system of checks and balances in our government. Your contribution gives Republicans a bigger chance of WINNING in 2024.

**Together, we can end the divisive and biased practices that are poisoning the well in Washington.
**
I'm asking you to join forces with me so we can make a real difference.

**[Chip in now to show your support and help us take back our country in 2024. Together, we can build a stronger, fairer, and more transparent government that truly represents the will of the people.](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=32b71057d405422d96d42f6424776fb3&_e=GGXGwKtxrCkXTNlyJ90IMWdDGEUpOumP5ls0ugjPzdwnk0pT0jVLO-BMrL6_39OP9A6Cf9N9ZspPgvilUePVcBuTUqk3alKqonjq8DKMa_xUIVBr12kpgNww7ofxxXPj72l3nvqPFNqlKiz0i8ALQA9Jx_fXd4tIl8enGPjJO5pHOdsKg8hihFVEr95zYHoVt9pAAlkY5FPqYy3AdfFBOYzT3-tYt3VShQwaPOG0Mh72Qlr7y95a6ze0YTFGNG3RzpvkK7JTMV4uS5dzG5EPUnrT1ol1gFcPHMEf2Q7o8UY%3D)
**

| [ ](http://links.davisforin.com/u/click?_t=3e9e6097e33749f890adf7e8c9b24a4e&_m=fc4026b9b1104bbcadddeff154077a60&_e=9TqGkceI4eJZnZ695Fkd6NORE3BXhaJYdT12199HQ1MCYPoe3ro5-ZM2k-g4WTyHbX5U8gz4vbTMn3bl-E0LEJt1akqLT3Hztdxret0sBVAiUJlCSGv4Sf3a_Rp0B4YRV8XQSTIChEBoitJnSSeP7NKOTwPxxsv6hU0Y9woVfccvWx9k1y0yH2aZVlAH7n3I7VXEfilSHmsuxHzEY1PgP4ikzyBHU_QPFqsPRLyrpypiJXFbz-N4uNgCM3CRusN_yhexwKfGyR2VY1ccKJt-YQDbVjhgFuT1l_XsWfenwpWT30EgJC0CAXO3n2G8IqjC)

This is how Democrats operate.

They are so scared President Trump will win another term next year that they are doing absolutely everything they can to take him down.

And if they can do this to President Trump, they can abuse our justice system to come after ANY strong Republican. **[We must fight back!](http://links.davisforin.com/u/click?_t=3e9e6097e33749f890adf7e8c9b24a4e&_m=fc4026b9b1104bbcadddeff154077a60&_e=9TqGkceI4eJZnZ695Fkd6NORE3BXhaJYdT12199HQ1MCYPoe3ro5-ZM2k-g4WTyHbX5U8gz4vbTMn3bl-E0LEJt1akqLT3Hztdxret0sBVAiUJlCSGv4Sf3a_Rp0B4YRV8XQSTIChEBoitJnSSeP7OuCDN01zh-BGaQV3Jit83-LPlQcoAY2zOfSuLHcUW9z5cFCRIO6sb2qomIuuuu7UIkPevoadISsnlMJGtyEfxakv9C0yGGi4AtD2Ir8AMVF6KbvR_60OvuI9BC_PKTXYD0EXRchjaaKQWx9mOixAD-8IkAUtl-gHVPeR3TX7HXp)**

The odds that Donald Trump defeats Joe Biden in next year's election are going up, not down, but he needs all of our support ASAP to get across the finish line.

Hello, Everyone from Rachel Maddow and Chris Hayes to Jen Psaki and Morning Joe can’t stop talking about Adam Frisch’s race against Lauren Boebert. = Here’s why: In 2022, Adam Frisch shocked everyone by coming just 546 votes short of defeating Lauren Boebert. It was the closest race in the entire country. What’s more: He did it in a “Safe Republican” district without one dime of support from the national Democratic party! Now, Adam is running again, and this time, everyone agrees that he can finish the job and defeat Lauren Boebert in 2024. The latest poll shows Adam with a narrow lead – 50% to 48% – but Lauren Boebert’s Super PACs are already on the attack. We need to raise another $50,000 before our fundraising deadline at midnight to counter their lies and hold Boebert accountable, and we cannot afford to fall even one dollar short – not if we want to win. The only way Adam can finally send Boebert packing is if grassroots donors like you give right now:= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = We are about to enter the next phase of this campaign, and your continued support is absolutely critical. We are so eternally grateful for everything you do, Team Frisch ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. name: Robert Lorinser
subject: Cheugy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
Friend,
This generation's lack of trust in our political leaders is troublesome - but easy to understand in a system and an economy that no longer works for everyone.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/366974287_314657487597736_3115883508583835103_n.jpeg]
CONTRIBUTE TO CHANGE [actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Yep, I'm a Boomer, and the other day, one of my younger volunteers jokingly called me "cheugy."
I may try too hard, but I'll embrace that because I'm eager to build a world where the adage is actually true for all generations - that if you work hard, you will prosper, and that involves leadership with empathy.
To manifest the change young people seek in the world, the system needs reform, and your contribution can help us ignite it. [actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
actblue.com/donate/about-bob [actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Friend,
Nearly 20% of Gen-Zers think of moving overseas. They cite a toxic political environment, unaffordable housing, unobtainable education, stress, gun violence, and unreachable medical care as reasons.
American students are carrying almost two trillion dollars in college debt. Two trillion! Additionally, half a million American families are wiped out every year by medical debt.
Millennials aren't having kids, with zero-child families becoming the norm, reaching 35%. When asked why, besides saying they "just don't want to," they cite medical and financial reasons.
In their 30s, Boomers owned 20% of the nation's wealth, while Millennials in their 30s own less than 5%.
Politicians need to look beyond our own identities — if you serve, whether you're 37 or 67, we must legislate with empathy and address issues important to our younger generation.
Once again, America must prove that if you work hard, you will prosper. And, as a Representative in Congress, this "Cheugy Boomer" will proudly do just that.
We must focus on livable wages, strengthening the middle class, reforming medical care, investing in mental healthcare, and making education, housing, and childcare affordable.
Most importantly, we must protect their planet and their rights to ensure a stable foundation that helps young people work hard and succeed.
Let's get to work.
Thank you for your generosity, loyalty, and support.
- Grandpa Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01
CONTRIBUTE [actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/dbsignature.png]
Or send a check to:
"Friends of Dr. Bob"
PO Box 936
Marquette, MI 49855

body:
We’re back with our latest merch release for MALARKEY MONDAY! | | |
---
Peter,

Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. name: Team Pramila
subject: Access to food is a basic human right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Nobody deserves to be hungry.
#
Peter,
As a grassroots campaign, mutual aid is a pillar of our collective work to strengthen our communities. [**That’s why this holiday season, we’re directing our support to Food Lifeline and their mission to end hunger in Washington.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47657?refcode=em20231120-3187&t=1&akid=3187%2E420207%2E4M2dec)
**Access to food is a basic human right, and nobody should go hungry.**
Food Lifeline provides meals to 1.37 million people experiencing food insecurity and hunger. By distributing food through a network of over **350** food banks, shelters, and meal programs, **they are able to provide an equivalent of more than 282,000 meals a day.**
But their work doesn’t stop there, Peter. Through advocacy and on-the-ground organizing, they have worked to shape local, state, and federal policy by partnering with community-based programs and services.
**Together, we can advance a broad social movement to end hunger this holiday season.**[You can click here to learn more about Food Lifeline.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47661?t=2&akid=3187%2E420207%2E4M2dec)
**[Please make a contribution to Food Lifeline today to support their efforts to feed our communities, and strengthen our collective movement to end hunger.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47657?refcode=em20231120-3187&t=3&akid=3187%2E420207%2E4M2dec)[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47657?refcode=em20231120-3187&t=4&akid=3187%2E420207%2E4M2dec)**
Together,
Team Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20231120-3187-footer&t=5&refcode2=3187_420207_4M2dec&akid=3187%2E420207%2E4M2dec)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=6&akid=3187%2E420207%2E4M2dec)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=3187%2E420207%2E4M2dec)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

body:
Josh Hawley made himself vulnerable. Here’s why:
#
Peter — you wanna know why Josh Hawley has the worst approval rating of any Republican U.S. Senator running for re-election in 2024?
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39345?refcode=em20231120-4227&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4227%2E614464%2EVv-aDW)
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39345?refcode=em20231120-4227&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4227%2E614464%2EVv-aDW)**
**He’s led the charge to criminalize abortion.** He even used his position in the U.S. Senate to support _his wife’s_ lawsuit to ban the most commonly used abortion pill that _his donor judge_ ruled in favor of earlier this year.
**He’s betrayed working families.** From voting against investment in industry and job creation here in Missouri, to supporting anti-union “Right-to-Work” laws, Hawley has proved over and over that working families across our state can’t count on him to fight for them in the U.S. Senate.
**He’s shown all of us that he’s just a fraud and a coward.** On January 6, 2021, Hawley showed us who he really is — just a fraud who will raise his fist when he thinks it makes himself look strong, then runs away like a coward the moment things get real. Missourians haven’t forgotten that.
**And now, Josh Hawley is in a neck-and-neck race with Lucas Kunce.** He’s made this race our best chance to defeat a GOP incumbent and flip a U.S. Senate seat in 2024 — and Lucas still has time to take the lead:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39345?refcode=em20231120-4227&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4227%2E614464%2EVv-aDW)

clean_body: Josh Hawley made himself vulnerable. Here’s why: Peter — you wanna know why Josh Hawley has the worst approval rating of any Republican U.S. Senator running for re-election in 2024? He’s led the charge to criminalize abortion. He even used his position in the U.S. Senate to support his wife’s lawsuit to ban the most commonly used abortion pill that his donor judge ruled in favor of earlier this year. He’s betrayed working families. From voting against investment in industry and job creation here in Missouri, to supporting anti-union “Right-to-Work” laws, Hawley has proved over and over that working families across our state can’t count on him to fight for them in the U.S. Senate. He’s shown all of us that he’s just a fraud and a coward. On January 6, 2021, Hawley showed us who he really is — just a fraud who will raise his fist when he thinks it makes himself look strong, then runs away like a coward the moment things get real. Missourians haven’t forgotten that. And now, Josh Hawley is in a neck-and-neck race with Lucas Kunce. He’s made this race our best chance to defeat a GOP incumbent and flip a U.S. Senate seat in 2024 — and Lucas still has time to take the lead: With so much on the line in this election, you have a chance to make a real difference by supporting Lucas Kunce in his race against Josh Hawley. # EXCITING NEWS!
# Dom Jones Endorsed by the
# California Democratic Party
---
| |
---
| | Dear Supporters, We are thrilled to share with you the exciting news that Dom Jones, the dynamic and passionate political candidate, has been officially endorsed by the California Democratic Party! This momentous endorsement was made official at the California Democratic Party Convention, which took place from November 17-19, 2023. The endorsement by the California Democratic Party is a significant recognition of Dom Jones' commitment to representing the people of State Assembly District 72 and working towards progressive change. This endorsement affirms Dom's dedication to democratic values, economic prosperity for the OC coastline, and social equality. With this endorsement, Dom Jones not only gains the support of the California Democratic Party but also joins a monumental network of activists, volunteers, and fellow candidates who are making a positive impact in our community.

name: George Takei
subject: Hey, it’s George Takei
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Adam embodies the principles of democracy and inclusion, and he’s exactly the antidote we need to the toxic authoritarianism that the MAGA Republican Party has embraced.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4528%2E5257348%2EjJnJGh)
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2023_abs_em.uaqk5d&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231120_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4528%2E5257348%2EjJnJGh)
Hello Derek, it’s George Takei. Yes, that George Takei.
I’m not writing to you as an actor, but as a third-generation Californian and an activist who is deeply concerned about the condition of our democracy and our rights.
I’ve dedicated my adult years to politics, from local campaigns to standing against hateful bigots in national leadership. Having experienced deep injustice and prejudice from a young age, I’ve always stood up to bullies and admired others who do the same. Adam Schiff has never backed down from a fight, not against Trump, not against MAGA world, not against anyone trying to tear down our democracy.
I firmly believe that the upcoming election is the most crucial one yet – and that’s why I’m supporting Adam Schiff.
**[I hope you’ll join me by chipping in a contribution of any amount to support Adam’s U.S. Senate campaign today.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2023_abs_em.uaqk5d&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231120_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=4528%2E5257348%2EjJnJGh)**
For years, we’ve seen extremists and charlatans like Matt Gaetz, Kevin McCarthy, Jim Jordan and Marjorie Taylor Greene attempt to seize the reins of power with their MAGA leader Donald Trump’s blessing, and our democratic institutions have suffered dearly.
My father, reflecting on our family’s release from internment during World War II, instilled in us the vital role we all have in protecting our democracy. He saw what happens to people when elected officials are emboldened to act on their bigoted, xenophobic, and racist beliefs.
Adam embodies the principles of democracy and inclusion, and he’s exactly the antidote we need to the toxic authoritarianism that the MAGA Republican Party has embraced. **I proudly stand with Adam and Democrats brave enough to confront racist, xenophobic, and misogynist bullies. And that’s why I’m asking you to join me.**
Adam has stood up to Trump and his MAGA minions again and again. Despite the constant flood of far-right attacks, Adam has remained steadfast in his battle to protect our democracy and ensure our government works for all.
This is why I’m supporting Adam, and you should too.
Campaigns are costly, and the attacks from the far-right will keep coming. As Adam always says, we are the backbone of this grassroots campaign, and we can help fight back against these attacks.
**[So I’m personally asking you, Derek: will you make a contribution of any amount to Adam’s U.S. Senate campaign today so that he can combat the MAGA movement’s attacks, win this election, and lead the fight for progress in the United States Senate?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2023_abs_em.uaqk5d&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231120_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=4528%2E5257348%2EjJnJGh)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

| Hey folks -- John Kennedy here.

I respect you too much to beat around the bush. You're busy. I'm busy. So I'll do you the courtesy of cutting to the chase:

My Republican colleagues over there in the People's House have a very, VERY big deadline coming down the pike, and they sent me a note saying they're falling **DANGEROUSLY** behind their big November goal.

They also made it abundantly clear to me that they'd have a real mess on their hands if they came up short.

_**[So with all due respect, I'm humbly asking you to send in a small contribution before time is officially out. We've only got a few days left for a last-minute surge before the big deadline, so anything you can spare would be a HUGE help.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7169633ae2fb44adb6fa340613d9630a&_e=ypgK7Uu4IiZWuQc2OF3rIjHAkL_OjEIq9OhzEgJixa0-j6tLy7aOdcCMbyH1J6gqI3CQZcETbDdRdBfBoxLN0tH-vEd3ny0GIfagkKVPBoigcjTpki4m5ltdp-wXEzyQfV7_DTXFF243ID0sbErkX57gsoWgFjZ7K1SrvZXfFTr93PN4b5bgRlXwmV3u9eUsYUuce1GUtUhRvOf94wy9b5aEVFVI2Kym50megOpbPA1tWjo2dF3ttaqzkdJhPpEzTeqbJ-OnZoJaSNs8UyU8DrVav_SJqMQ3pZ3VN6NS-zrk95m0R-uaxolFNGbCguAf1CNDHWzQ0WFq8V27__K0wQ7L89J0u2amooqkMw3vNOhGDkd0X7lI-TXIaCvh22GhyXw4fxABfH4zI7mLnaz68A%3D%3D "So with all due respect, I’m humbly asking you to send in a small contribution before time is officially out. Look, this deadline was important before... but now I'm hearing Biden and the Democrat National Committee are unloading 25 million bucks in the most competitive states in the country -- **yep, enough states for a DEMOCRAT SWEEP in the next election.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michigan=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: MIGOP Newsletter November 20, 2023
body:
We have a lot to update you on. | | | |
---
| | |
## Welcome to the MIGOP Newsletter!
Every Monday evening, you will receive new updates, helpful tips, legislative insights and more from the Michigan Republican Party! Want to share this newsletter with a friend? [Simply click here to open this edition in your browser.](https://mailchi.mp/e09023a53e5a/migop-newsletter-november-13-12663368?e=a2af77507c)
---
|
---
### Are You Free?
Join fellow Republicans for events around the state, including [training](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=7d734f3672&e=a2af77507c) for candidates and volunteers — hosted by the Wayne County Republican Committee — [volunteering](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=456cfa1f3c&e=a2af77507c) at the Grand Rapids Gun & Knife Show, and [attending](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=33c8dc2f7e&e=a2af77507c) the annual MIGOP Christmas Party!

For more information about these and other upcoming events, visit the [MIGOP events page](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=57fa2097e6&e=a2af77507c).
|
---
### Our Most Important Issue

The Michigan Republican Party has launched the **Election Security Operations Program** , which has 18 areas of responsibility—each one is essential to ensure the integrity of elections in our state (see diagram below). From poll challenging to cleaning up the voter rolls, volunteers can start helping TODAY as the MIGOP builds and trains a dynamic team of activists for the 2024 election. Hundreds of Republicans have already signed up but _ many more are needed._

On November 7, the MIGOP Election Day Operations (EDO) Team was activated and had the opportunity to test its response to several election incidents. The most significant took place in Inland Township in Benzie County, **_when a lawful challenge was refused regarding concerns that the chain of custody for hundreds of ballots was broken when the substitute clerk allegedly took those ballots home with her._**

Michigan election law requires that voted absentee ballots remain secured inside the clerk’s office.

The Michigan State Police investigated and has filed a report with the county prosecutor, although there has been no indictment to date. Throughout the incident, the EDO Team had regular communication with Michigan Secretary of State officials, MIGOP general counsel, Republican challengers on site, and township election officials.

Since the challenge of the ballots was ultimately rejected by local authorities, **_the Michigan Republican Party has launched an investigation_**.

**NOTE:** This incident reinforces, yet again, the need for constant vigilance of Michigan's elections. The Election Security Operations team at the MIGOP is actively seeking Republican volunteers for its 18 areas of responsibility in securing elections. For more information or to sign up, contact Phil O'Halloran at [phil@migop.org](mailto:phil@migop.org?subject=Election%20Security%20Operations%20Inquiry).
|
---
|
---
|
---
### Good Neighbor Program
Through the MIGOP Good Neighbor Program, you learn the structure of the Republican Party and how it operates. The party is organized at three levels: (1) county, (2) congressional district, and (3) state. Each level has its own officers, committee members, and bylaws. **One important component is the role of a Precinct Delegate when participating in county and state conventions**. The Good Neighbor Program explains conventions and how they work . . . and so much more!

To learn more about the Good Neighbor Program, contact coordinators Ken Beyer (District 4 Chair) and Ann Clark (Wayne County Republican Committee Chair):

* [kenbeyer@protonmail.com](mailto:kenbeyer@protonmail.com?subject=Good%20Neighbor%20Program%20Inquiry)
* [annpatriot@protonmail.com](mailto:annpatriot@protonmail.com?subject=Good%20Neighbor%20Program%20Inquiry)

|
---
### Stay in the Loop on Wolverine State Legislation
**Michigan Legislative and Judicial Update**

* The Michigan legislature is normally in session until early to mid-December, but on November 9, it adjourned early, [triggering](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=91a6e5fb60&e=a2af77507c) a change of date for the presidential primary date from March 2, 2024, to February 27, 2024.

**_Mark your calendars and be sure to contact Phil O'Halloran at phil@migop.org to volunteer to help secure Michigan elections in 2024._**

* Earlier this month, the Michigan Republican Party [announced](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=422738df2c&e=a2af77507c)** ** that Chairwoman Karamo had secured the services of the American Center for Law and Justice (ACLJ) to defend the party's "First Amendment speech and associational rights."

On behalf of the MIGOP, the ACLJ filed an amicus brief to the Michigan Court of Claims regarding the Democrats' attempts to keep President Trump off of the Michigan presidential primary ballot.

**_Great news: the Democrats lost!_**

Last week, Judge James Redford denied a request for "declaratory and injunctive relief," ruling against Secretary of State Jocelyn Benson and the chairman of the Michigan Democrat Party, thus preserving the former president's right to remain on the Michigan ballot.

For more information about this important victory, [read the official MIGOP press release](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=7ffb5e0907&e=a2af77507c).
|
---
### Stay in the Loop on Wolverine State Legislation
A group of Democrat activists upset at the MIGOP victory to keep President Trump on the Michigan presidential primary ballot in February 2024 are [appealing](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=686a4ede22&e=a2af77507c) the decision to the Michigan Supreme Court.
|
---
### Topics of Interest
A [lawsuit](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=38a4ecc027&e=a2af77507c) involving Dominion Voting Systems will proceed to trial and is set to begin January 9, 2024. At issue are vulnerabilities in Dominion's machines necessitating a return to paper ballots. You can read Judge Amy Totenberg's ruling [here](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=1767539173&e=a2af77507c).
|
---
### Get Involved
Connect with your county or district party at [migop.org/about](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=275447be69&e=a2af77507c).

We have an official telegram channel! Check it out: [https://t.me/michiganrepublicanparty](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=47f621a278&e=a2af77507c)

Need to get in touch with us? Send an email to [info@migop.org](mailto:info@migop.org?subject=RE%3A%20Newsletter%2011%2F13).
|
---
| [CLICK: HELP SAVE OUR REPUBLIC](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=e6084fef43&e=a2af77507c "CLICK: HELP SAVE OUR REPUBLIC")
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=b2d0e63b85&e=a2af77507c)
---

---

---
| | [](www.migop.org)
---
|

**Our mailing address is:**
Michigan Republican Party3450 Alpine Ave. NWBox 332Grand Rapids, MI 49544
[Add us to your address book](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/vcard?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=f72dfc23a2)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=f72dfc23a2&e=a2af77507c&c=d30e755a31) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=f72dfc23a2&e=a2af77507c&c=d30e755a31).

The party is organized at three levels: (1) county, (2) congressional district, and (3) state. Each level has its own officers, committee members, and bylaws. One important component is the role of a Precinct Delegate when participating in county and state conventions. The Good Neighbor Program explains conventions and how they work . . . and so much more! To learn more about the Good Neighbor Program, contact coordinators Ken Beyer (District 4 Chair) and Ann Clark (Wayne County Republican Committee Chair): mailto:kenbeyer@protonmail.com?subject=Good%20Neighbor%20Program%20Inquiry mailto:annpatriot@protonmail.com?subject=Good%20Neighbor%20Program%20Inquiry | Stay in the Loop on Wolverine State Legislation Michigan Legislative and Judicial Update The Michigan legislature is normally in session until early to mid-December, but on November 9, it adjourned early, a change of date for the presidential primary date from March 2, 2024, to February 27, 2024. Mark your calendars and be sure to contact Phil O'Halloran at phil@migop.org to volunteer to help secure Michigan elections in 2024. Earlier this month, the Michigan Republican Party that Chairwoman Karamo had secured the services of the American Center for Law and Justice (ACLJ) to defend the party's "First Amendment speech and associational rights." On behalf of the MIGOP, the ACLJ filed an amicus brief to the Michigan Court of Claims regarding the Democrats' attempts to keep President Trump off of the Michigan presidential primary ballot. Great news: the Democrats lost! Last week, Judge James Redford denied a request for "declaratory and injunctive relief," ruling against Secretary of State Jocelyn Benson and the chairman of the Michigan Democrat Party, thus preserving the former president's right to remain on the Michigan ballot. For more information about this important victory, . | Stay in the Loop on Wolverine State Legislation A group of Democrat activists upset at the MIGOP victory to keep President Trump on the Michigan presidential primary ballot in February 2024 are the decision to the Michigan Supreme Court. | Topics of Interest A involving Dominion Voting Systems will proceed to trial and is set to begin January 9, 2024. At issue are vulnerabilities in Dominion's machines necessitating a return to paper ballots. You can read Judge Amy Totenberg's ruling . | Get Involved Connect with your county or district party at . We have an official telegram channel! Check it out: Need to get in touch with us? Send an email to mailto:info@migop.org?subject=RE%3A%20Newsletter%2011%2F13. | | "CLICK: HELP SAVE OUR REPUBLIC" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | www.migop.org | | Copyright © 2023 Michigan Republican Party, All rights reserved.

subject: Here’s what sets us apart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:

Hi folks— Jon Tester and Sherrod Brown here. We’re reaching out today because we’re in the middle of the two most competitive Senate campaigns, and we need your help to win. We’re not the typical politicians you’d expect to see every day in the Senate. One of us is a seven-fingered dirt farmer. The other has been called disheveled, wrinkled, and rumpled. Neither of us are winning any best dressed awards anytime soon. But the thing that _really_ sets us apart? We’ll work with anyone to get the job done for our constituents. And we’ll always stand up to the special interests in Washington to help folks back home. But we’re facing the toughest reelection fight of our careers. Election experts are calling us the most vulnerable Democratic senators, and Mitch McConnell and his cronies are planning to unleash hundreds of millions of dollars to try and defeat us. We’ve got a lot of work to do between now and Election Day. **So we’re launching the Big Sky Buckeye Fund with a goal of raising _$500,000_ in the next 48 hours** to build up our resources and fight back against the millions that’ll be thrown our way. [**Ready to roll up your sleeves and get to work? Become a founding donor of our Big Sky Buckeye Fund by splitting a contribution between our campaigns and Martin Heinrich’s today. Your support will help us meet our goal, build our resources, and keep fighting for the hardworking people of Montana and Ohio in the Senate.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73722320/439431099/1142781002?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20231120_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Yjg2MzY1OC0wYzg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=82Kfv3HsOx8xLROjssV0wdgF6W91IRqv7LZIHh0KzpA=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will immediately be split between Jon Tester, Sherrod Brown and Martin Heinrich:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73722321/439431100/1142781002?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20231120_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Yjg2MzY1OC0wYzg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=82Kfv3HsOx8xLROjssV0wdgF6W91IRqv7LZIHh0KzpA=)

| | Peter, have you seen this headline about our competitive U.S. Senate race?
### **_Cook Political Report:_**
**Momentum Meets Money in Maryland Democratic Primary**
There’s a lot to unpack in this article, so let’s get into it: **We’ll start with the good news...** Political experts all agree that Angela has the support and momentum to be the frontrunner in this race. Just check out this quote:
### _“Alsobrooks has a historic resume and enough notable endorsements to span the Chesapeake Bay Bridge...”_
**But here’s the not-so-good news:** Political experts are concerned that her grassroots campaign might not be enough to win, because her self-funding multi-millionaire opponent still has the financial edge. The truth is, Peter, it doesn’t matter how many millions Angela’s opponent spends; he just can’t buy the kind of momentum we’ve built. We know she’s the clear frontrunner in this race. Now, we just need your help to level the score on the fundraising front. **Your support will show political experts, pundits, and voters alike that Angela has the resources AND the momentum to win this race.** **That’s why we’re asking:[Will you rush a grassroots donation of $25 or more right away? Hello...

This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend.

But I have to be honest with you -- no matter how weary I am about opening up.

**Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you 'll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything.**

My name is Jim Banks. If you haven't heard of me, I'm an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress.

I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls.

**Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate.**

Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily.

[**That 's why I'm reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8203fab2695946eba6498f3040eeca4d&_e=2CvfcIoiDpy9w221IIDQQOvhXXecQB28NnwCVPLt1JxkSqSJLxPTW3UOxIyd-W-bfJ8bUtgsLXGWedsQw51gBgxD03Wjh6GUFTfGji8c2g17tpqEuwC3Oskii7S8z61h0NSUzE2K-qGlVp3oQ_Oh8xgiKbtHt0Okig87gZ09IoRghFCt0SHBR8AN6MA5hGB5ME53-RMtxOnxR15cQvIYvM5cX-Wg1KhTrvMLhlsowPJebUbLMuH7KHXeN1zfXG-HxgzIZI3YbmmH5ohGFowQJmlBvH-TOdrZdqiM8JZL-kIOKoAYUK17oyEWDRIn_nQTxIXWQX5klf4GnarXuYRRYaauVnf3GNunQzAkHpZmgx_MdTzGpR7KqcjVsDa-uusU)
The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don't realize that I've been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative.

I'm not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there's no way I can make it on my own.

The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride.

[**So please help me out this one time, Friend:**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8203fab2695946eba6498f3040eeca4d&_e=2CvfcIoiDpy9w221IIDQQOvhXXecQB28NnwCVPLt1JxkSqSJLxPTW3UOxIyd-W-bfJ8bUtgsLXGWedsQw51gBgxD03Wjh6GUFTfGji8c2g17tpqEuwC3Oskii7S8z61h0NSUzE2K-qGlVp3oQ_Oh8xgiKbtHt0Okig87gZ09IoRghFCt0SHBR8AN6MA5hGB5ME53-RMtxOnxR15cQvIYvM5cX-Wg1KhTrvMLhlsowPIRCIzD6t7Q6mgJdwXFDldAKzO5r6MWf__3U1rZHZbyh-e_YLnrXDLGwJMOeNXbiO67Asxy2IeH3aJSke17z4Ne-ntN4hV-PVgpprAcp35_G3dY9djPHWPRquiLTizwJIlNN1ThYtB634nYzDvVxnZt)

clean_body: Friend... | . Hello... This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend. But I have to be honest with you -- no matter how weary I am about opening up. Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you 'll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything. My name is Jim Banks. If you haven't heard of me, I'm an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress. I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls. Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate. Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily. The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don't realize that I've been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative. I'm not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there's no way I can make it on my own. The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride. | Friend, I'm not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That's why I'm being so candid with you today. I'm not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals. I intend to make you proud. God Bless, Jim Banks Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Anthony D'Esposito
subject: We need to take decisive action
body:
Peter,

As a New Yorker, you're undoubtedly aware of the rising costs, deteriorating public safety, and increasing tax burdens we face.

Unfortunately, these challenges are exacerbated by the Biden administration's failure to secure our borders and the sanctuary policies of Gov. Kathy Hochul.

Help me fight back. [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=link&utm_campaign=We+Need+To+Take+Decisive+Action+Email]

DONATE NOW → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=first+button&utm_campaign=We+Need+To+Take+Decisive+Action+Email]

Since the beginning of President Biden's tenure, approximately 1.6 million migrants have entered the U.S. without being captured by law enforcement.

Alarmingly, 146 individuals on the federal terrorist watch list were stopped at the U.S.-Mexico border just this year. It's troubling to think how many more might have slipped through undetected.

New York, offering sanctuary and a guaranteed right to shelter, has become a prime destination for these migrants, with over 110,000 arriving since April 2022.

HELP ME FIGHT → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=second+button&utm_campaign=We+Need+To+Take+Decisive+Action+Email]

The influx of migrants is placing a significant financial strain on NYC, with Mayor Adams recently announcing a 5% budget cut across all city agencies to support migrant aid. This situation diverts funds from essential services and programs, impacting every New Yorker.

I am diligently working at the federal level to provide solutions to these challenges. Earlier this year, I was proud to be part of the team that passed H.R. 2, the Secure the Border Act of 2023, in the House. This legislation aims to strengthen border security, combat the exploitation and trafficking of unaccompanied children, and provide additional support to Customs and Border Protection.

As your representative, I am committed to standing with you against the chaotic effects of these misguided policies. I firmly believe in the American Dream and the welcoming spirit of our nation, but our current immigration system is undermining these values. We need to take decisive action to correct these failures.

To continue this vital work, I need your support.

Chip in $10, $25, $50, $100, or ANY AMOUNT. Your donation will empower me to fight for effective immigration policies and safeguard the well-being of our community. [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=link&utm_campaign=We+Need+To+Take+Decisive+Action+Email]

CHIP IN $10 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=10&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=We+Need+To+Take+Decisive+Action+Email] CHIP IN $25 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=25&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=We+Need+To+Take+Decisive+Action+Email] CHIP IN $50 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=50&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=We+Need+To+Take+Decisive+Action+Email] CHIP IN $100 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=100&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=We+Need+To+Take+Decisive+Action+Email] CHIP IN $250 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=250&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=We+Need+To+Take+Decisive+Action+Email] ANY AMOUNT → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=other+button&utm_campaign=We+Need+To+Take+Decisive+Action+Email]

Together, we can ensure that New York remains a safe and prosperous state for all its residents.

Thank you for your consideration and support in this crucial endeavor.

Sincerely,

Anthony

name: Jon Tester & Sherrod Brown
subject: Not your typical politicians
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Become a Founding Donor today
Hi Peter—
Jon Tester and Sherrod Brown here. We’re reaching out today because we’re in the middle of some of the most competitive Senate campaigns, along with our friend Bob Casey, and we need your help to win.
We’re not the typical politicians you’d expect to see every day in the Senate. One of us is a seven-fingered dirt farmer. The other has been called disheveled, wrinkled, and rumpled. Neither of us are winning any best dressed awards anytime soon.
But the thing that _really_ sets us apart? We’ll work with anyone to get the job done for our constituents. And we’ll always stand up to the special interests in Washington to help folks back home.
But we’re facing the toughest reelection fight of our careers, and Bob is too. Election experts are calling us the most vulnerable Democratic senators, and Mitch McConnell and his cronies are planning to unleash hundreds of millions of dollars to try and defeat us.
We’ve got a lot of work to do between now and Election Day. **So we’re launching the Big Sky Buckeye Fund with a goal of raising**** _$500,000_****in the next 48 hours** to build up our resources and fight back against the millions that’ll be thrown our way.
**[Ready to roll up your sleeves and get to work? Become a founding donor of our Big Sky Buckeye Fund by splitting a contribution between our campaigns and Bob Casey today. Your support will help us meet our goal, build our resources, and keep fighting for the hardworking people of Montana, Ohio, and Pennsylvania in the Senate.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231120-2?refcode=em20231120&refcode2=1184_552475_5EdmSF&akid=1184%2E552475%2E5EdmSF)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231120-2?refcode=em20231120&refcode2=1184_552475_5EdmSF&akid=1184%2E552475%2E5EdmSF)**
Thanks for having our backs. We won’t let you down.
—Jon Tester & Sherrod Brown

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=1184%2E552475%2E5EdmSF)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=1184%2E552475%2E5EdmSF)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

clean_body: | Hey there, I know you’re getting ready for Thanksgiving later this week, so I’ll jump right in. Our team still needs to raise another $18k this month to hit our goal for November and with the holidays coming, we don’t have long to do it. Will you chip in $20 to help? | | = I talked to you before about Speaker Johnson’s typo—in an email, he said “I refuse to put people over politics”. To me that one mistake tells you everything you need to know. The House GOP majority is dysfunctional and chooses to play petty politics with our lives everyday. We deserve better.= Can I count on you to help? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = I have always been clear every day I’m serving as your representative: I will work with anyone, putting politics aside, for the benefit of the families of KS-03. Putting people over politics is what we were elected to do. Now, we need to prove our supporters are with us by hitting every goal and winning in 2024. = Thank you, Sharice * | = | Click here to from Sharice Davids' email list. Friend,
A Democrat in Congress – who takes credit for impeaching me – just declared on national TV that _**“[President Trump] has to be ELIMINATED.”**_
He’s now trying to walk back the statement, claiming that he misspoke.
But it wasn’t a mistake. His only mistake was letting the TRUTH slip on live TV.
Every single Washington Democrat is panicking over our incredible polling numbers. They know I’d dominate Crooked Joe in a LANDSLIDE... _barring some illegal act of Election Interference._
And after an FBI raid, 4 wrongful arrests and indictments, and even a mugshot failed to break us, they will now take DRASTIC MEASURES to try and “eliminate” me.
So far, we have prevailed against every single attack that’s come our way and emerged stronger than ever before – and I owe it all to our grassroots donors like YOU who have peacefully defended our movement.
From the bottom of my heart, I want to THANK YOU for defending our movement.
But truth be told, our _NATION_ thanks you... Because you aren’t just defending our movement. You are defending the very fabric of our Republic that is being ripped to pieces by the Radical Left.
And now, our nation needs you once again as Democrats accidentally revealed that they’re plotting to “ELIMINATE” the leading candidate for the White House and the leading voice of the hardworking patriots of our country.

name: Navigating Uncertainty (by Vikram Mansharamani)
subject: Travel Tales: Canada, UAE, and Brazil
body:
How my wandering and wondering leads to insights

# [Travel Tales: Canada, UAE, and Brazil](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=138997691&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM4OTk3NjkxLCJpYXQiOjE3MDA1MzIwNzMsImV4cCI6MTcwMzEyNDA3MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.dgUO9K-dEbMJdeul2AttNuMOSQ-kHeWErBHQCW25qi4)

| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=138997691&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM4OTk3NjkxLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTcwMDUzMjA3MywiZXhwIjoxNzAzMTI0MDczLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTY2MTk5OSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.MRa-v9pgJmE1XW0B4J9XzdbmUGUH69r4gw6BUexo_a0&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=138997691&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM4OTk3NjkxLCJpYXQiOjE3MDA1MzIwNzMsImV4cCI6MTcwMzEyNDA3MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.dgUO9K-dEbMJdeul2AttNuMOSQ-kHeWErBHQCW25qi4&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=138997691&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM4OTk3NjkxLCJpYXQiOjE3MDA1MzIwNzMsImV4cCI6MTcwMzEyNDA3MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.dgUO9K-dEbMJdeul2AttNuMOSQ-kHeWErBHQCW25qi4)

| | [](https://substack..T0bBv63UHciAdIhAjoBNjWGq6H6mQIle1QekLSTjW-c?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/mansharamani/p/travel-tales-canada-uae-and-brazil?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store)
---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2df6596d-52c0-433d-9099-e8499fdb2ef7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
As a speaker who's often introduced as a global trend-watcher and analyst, it's not unusual for me to get asked questions about geopolitical or geo-economic developments. What do I think is going to happen with China and Taiwan? What are my thoughts on cryptocurrencies? How will electrification mandates impact the emerging markets? Will the US economy enter a recession next year?
But every now and then, I'm asked about my approach to making sense of the world (rather than my thoughts about what is currently happening). I love these questions as they provide an opportunity for me to describe the process I use to generate insights. Recently, I was asked a question that was more specific: "What's it like to be Vikram?" The question threw me as I don't really think about what it's like to be me...I just am. I incoherently answered by saying it was hectic, that I read broadly, and that I ask lots of questions. It clearly wasn't satisfying as one young professional chimed in with a request: "I know there's no formula for being a generalist, but I'd really love it if you could write a piece about a day in the life of Vikram!"
Then, a few days ago, I was complaining to a friend about my intense travels over the past few weeks and she asked a very pointed question: "So what exactly do you do on your trips?" Coincidentally, at lunch this weekend, my kids asked what I did on my last trip. I answered with a question, asking if they knew what I do while I'm on the road. They shrugged before responding "give speeches, have fancy dinners?"
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/713094ca-7a10-4a11-944c-9628a2a9da1c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
To answer my family as well as those who are curious, I sat down to describe a day in my life. Except when I tried to write up such a piece, it was bluntly obvious there is no "typical" day in my life. So, I decided instead to share highlights from three international trips I have taken since I wrote "[4 Continents, 5 Weeks, and 6 Countries](https://substack.com/redirect/35a2ac1e-46c3-4d7f-9494-bd22513e0bb8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" in September. Some of the following details may seem random, but that's actually part of my process. I collect lots of dots by immersing wherever I go and while some prove useless, others are essential tiles that form a trend-revealing mosaic.
### **Montreal (Canada)**
In late September, I was invited to participate in [WhiteHaven Day, an investment symposium hosted by the investment group's innovative founder Tommy Baltzis](https://substack.com/redirect/0ddd1a3b-34ae-4728-a306-36fc5f6541ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Tommy and I have known each other for years and he's been a supporter of my work, distributing hundreds of copies of my books to friends and clients.
I was honored to attend and share some of my thoughts about the world we're in and more importantly, my admiration for the work he's done at WhiteHaven to democratize access to alternative investments. And like me, [the WhiteHaven motto of "Challenge Everything" is more than a saying, it's a way of being](https://substack.com/redirect/35f09ce5-df87-4148-b62c-e6c700207ad4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Tommy and his team have created structures that allow everyday savers to make investments in hotels, film and TV projects, mortgages, structured credit, and alternative energy and power solutions, for instance.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..QwWkll8NU9V24DRqLd6vkyrBrcNxVOYufJLDe17ppC4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=138997691)
How did I get there? I drove myself from Lincoln, NH to Montreal. It was a beautiful drive that led north, through Vermont briefly and into Canada. The border crossing was efficient, and the whole trip took around 3 hours (I timed my departure to avoid Montreal rush hour!). I stayed in Old Montreal and joined a few other Whitehaven fans for dinner that evening at [The Keg Steakhouse and Bar](https://substack.com/redirect/cc180249-b230-4e2e-b245-9b2663c75b79?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
The next day I worked at the hotel on a presentation I was scheduled to give to a potential consulting client, and spent a few hours at the WhiteHaven investment symposium, during which [I made some comments and also signed books for dozens of attendees](https://substack.com/redirect/bd4b51c6-4a6b-407c-95e8-ee9822f759f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). (Interestingly, Whitehaven has invested in [The FashionHero TV series](https://substack.com/redirect/76940885-6937-49b4-8355-543b8d834700?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) hosted by [AJ McLean of the Backstreet Boys](https://substack.com/redirect/faa40f68-343b-4780-9c6e-80c0fb92852b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)).
Signing Books at WhiteHaven Day, Montreal, Canada
I took an afternoon break to meet Mathieu St-Jean, a friend who I've know for more than a decade who I had originally met when he ran a part of the investment arm of Canadian National Railway. He suggested we meet at [Crew Collective & Cafe which was located in the original headquarters of the Royal Bank of Canada](https://substack.com/redirect/d08d1a37-3812-426d-89ab-5c2c3a2d8ad0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). (Incidentally, for those that know of my fascination with skyscrapers as a bubble indicator, you'll find it interesting that the Royal Bank Tower was the tallest structure in the British Empire at the time it was built in 1928...on the eve of the Great Depression!). Not only did we have a _great_ coffee, but we also compared notes on the political dynamics in our respective countries, the implications for financial markets, and how to think about best serving our nations. Mathieu is an astute observer of the world and I always feel like I learn when I chat with him.
That evening, I joined Tommy and the Whitehaven team in Old Montreal for dinner and drinks. It was an enjoyable evening filled with great conversation, live music, and wonderful food.
The next morning I drove home, stopping at the border to chat with US Customs and Border Protection agents about the security of the border and challenges they've faced in the area. They noted the Buffalo NY area was the preferred destination for illegal crossings but that they were increasing in the Vermont and New Hampshire areas as well. For the rest of my ride home, I listened to Bloomberg radio and got caught up on the latest global economic data.
**So What?**
As a result of this trip, I started thinking about a few different topics:
* My visit to the Royal Bank tower reminded me to re-visit [the relationship I had written about between skyscrapers and financial bubbles](https://substack.com/redirect/49243ec5-6bec-4969-8cba-367a55d39d4a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). As I discussed in Boombustology and in Forbes, [construction of the world's tallest skyscrapers tended to telegraph forthcoming financial or economic troubles](https://substack.com/redirect/2f03461e-f808-46d8-b2e3-0a8175690214?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). So when I returned home, I did some quick research that revealed the [Burj Khalifa continues to hold the title of world tallest free-standing structure](https://substack.com/redirect/3c4fa237-3a1b-40c2-b502-ae0674cd0c92?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [there doesn't appear to be any contenders to take the title in the next five years](https://substack.com/redirect/a21f30f3-5e9a-40ad-9d72-d31e2af55815?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). With that said, [almost all of the world's tallest skyscrapers under construction are being built in China](https://substack.com/redirect/0d642e2f-883f-4ca0-bdda-f806bda5db2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Was this another warning sign of economic weakness in the world's second largest economy?
* My discussion with the border agents really got me thinking about the northern border of the United States. With all the attention focused on the southern border and the flow of migrants into America, perhaps the northern border deserved more attention? I looked quickly and found [America's Northern Border Strategy](https://substack.com/redirect/9a5dd953-c800-4742-a39c-ab9db65c99e2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) hadn't been updated since 2018 and promised myself I'd dig further into the issue.

[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..QwWkll8NU9V24DRqLd6vkyrBrcNxVOYufJLDe17ppC4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=138997691)
### **Abu Dhabi and Dubai (UAE)**
In mid October, shortly after the Hamas terrorists attacks on Israel, I boarded an evening flight from Boston's Logan Airport to Dubai in the United Arab Emirates. For those that have never flown on [Emirates Airlines](https://substack.com/redirect/5d62975f-b871-4b51-b65f-63c353a337ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), it's a real treat. The service was great, the food fabulous, and the lie flat seat was actually comfortable enough for me to sleep for five or so of the twelve hour flight. Interestingly, the flight path passed through Ukrainian, Iraqi, and Iranian airspace before crossing the Persian Gulf to land in the UAE. ([While aboard, I read an article about Emirates once getting fined for flying in Iranian airspace as a codeshare flight that had partnered with JetBlue...but that's another topic!](https://substack.com/redirect/2e1a0190-798c-466f-8c0b-daede0c707ec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)) Upon landing, I traveled the 90 minutes or so to Abu Dhabi by car, before checking into a hotel located on the Corniche.
I had planned to meet some investors from a venture capital firm I was advising for the weekend, but the war in Israel had disrupted their plans. The result, I was given a much-needed day and a half to recover from the international travel and the 9 hour time difference. I was up for most of the night writing my weekly piece and then slept for half of the day. I stayed in the hotel for all my meals and literally didn't leave the property. It was a struggle to beat the jet lag, and I broke down in the afternoon and reached for the gummy bears that were in the room. But because I have allergies to dairy and gluten, I always read ingredients (some gummy bears have gluten). Unfortunately, food labeling laws in the UAE are not as stringent as they are in the United States, Europe or Canada.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a356eaff-f776-4f2f-ae90-becb5a229e0b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The next day I had breakfast with former clients and was scheduled to meet with senior government officials. Unfortunately, [the arrival of US Secretary of State Anthony Blinken](https://substack.com/redirect/4fd7bfb4-c3dd-49da-874d-b01f5cedea43?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) took precedence and I instead spent the afternoon prepping for the meetings with potential investors that I was now going to be doing solo rather than with the investment team I had come to assist.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..QwWkll8NU9V24DRqLd6vkyrBrcNxVOYufJLDe17ppC4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=138997691)
The remainder of the trip was filled with meetings and attending sessions of a conference about complex risks (artificial intelligence, geostrategic competition, etc.) that was taking place while I was in town. I met with professionals who were advising the wealthiest families on the planet how to invest their capital, officials who were responsible for designing and implementing the UAE's space policy, and a member of the Prime Minister's staff.
One of the most enjoyable parts of the trip, however, was my discovery of camel milk ice cream and camel milk chocolate! (As someone with a dairy allergy -- and camel milk is safe for those of us allergic to cow milk proteins -- this was a heavenly treat!)
A real highlight of the trip was having dinner with my friend Murad Ansari whom I've known for almost 20 years but unfortunately see far too rarely. Murray is originally from Pakistan but has spent 15 years or so working in Saudi Arabia and the UAE. He's a brilliant analyst and always has great insights. We caught up on global affairs, his thoughts on financial markets, and how Dubai had changed since the pandemic. We had dinner at [Nammos, a fancy schmancy Greek restaurant that was filled with beautiful people and had amazing food (and a stunning price tag)](https://substack.com/redirect/d8129513-f269-4e6a-bd03-a2adc5e1becb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
When I noted how expensive the bill was, Murad shared that [some restaurants in the UAE now have minimum required spending of US$2500 or more per person to reserve a table](https://substack.com/redirect/0460e623-c6dd-4769-95b2-61935363a477?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)! Apparently, the global hedge fund community had figured out that the location and time zone allowed easy connections and communication with almost every region on the planet. (This was obvious in the number of expensive cars visible at every parking lot!)
Having watched the news about the escalating tensions between Iran and the western world, I had trouble sleeping on my flight home as I watched the flightpath tracking my plane as it entered Iranian airspace, and proceeded towards Tehran before it turned towards Iraq. I couldn't help but think of [the movie Argo ](https://substack.com/redirect/e2b91c34-366c-49fc-9610-a06bd3e2483f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)as [I ordered a cocktail once we left Iranian airspace](https://substack.com/redirect/5d610043-c140-49da-b6b3-32f5c167e735?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
**So What?**
As a result of this trip, I started thinking about a few different topics:
* If the world really does bifurcate into two global economic ecosystems, as I believe is starting to happen right now, what does that mean for the air travel industry? Will [geopolitics be an increasingly important consideration for route selection](https://substack.com/redirect/dddcad7d-a314-4bea-b60a-e8d111b394ac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)? And will this additional friction pressure prices as only certain carriers are able to fly over certain countries?
* Perhaps because I was so excited about the camel milk, I could not stop thinking about [the future of food](https://substack.com/redirect/74e71a62-4163-4d77-83ea-ee6737e23412?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and specifically protein. How was the planet going to feed its surging population? [As diets shifted and more and more of the world began increasing their consumption of animal protein and fresh dairy, what would the implications be for the agricultural value chain](https://substack.com/redirect/74e71a62-4163-4d77-83ea-ee6737e23412?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)? [Would fish consumption boom as the carbon footprint of livestock was highlighted](https://substack.com/redirect/142b299f-0539-4592-97b0-8e1abf6abaa6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)?

[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..QwWkll8NU9V24DRqLd6vkyrBrcNxVOYufJLDe17ppC4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=138997691)
### **Sao Paolo (Brazil)**
After attending a board meeting in Florida, I headed off to Sao Paolo, Brazil to speak at a large gathering of senior Latin American steel executives in mid November. Because of an overbooked schedule, I had to fly into Brazil the morning of my talk, something that I try desperately to avoid.
I've been in some nasty traffic in my life (Lagos Nigeria was perhaps the worst!) and had heard warnings about Sao Paolo at rush hour. The schedule was so tight that the conference organizers arranged for helicopter transfer from the international airport to the conference venue.
The trip was smooth and efficient and I'm pleased to report I was on stage on time, with the side benefit of having obtained a unique perspective of Latin America's most populous city. My talk was about the rapidly escalating US China war and how countries in Latin America would likely be forced to pick sides. It was controversial and led to some heated conversations among folks during coffee breaks, but I think it spurred some necessary reflection.
Because of the redeye flight that was not nearly as comfortable as the Emirates flight, I spent the afternoon napping. I awoke in time to meet a journalist for a coffee (he was as interested in American politics as I was in Brazilian politics!) before heading to join the conference organizers for drinks and a reception. That evening I spent some time with steel industry executives from Brazil, Mexico, Colombia, the Dominican Republic, and Argentina.
The next day was spent meeting with industry executives as well as visiting with venture capitalists and family office executives in Sao Paolo. I had four meetings and then squeezed in a quick caipirinha with my hosts at a local boteco before heading back to the airport. 36 hours after landing in the country, I was again heading through passport control and boarded my flight soon thereafter.
**So What?**
As a result of this trip, I started thinking about a few different topics:
* Many of us regularly complain about traffic, but what are the true economic implications of having so many people stuck in cars and unproductive? Surely the return on infrastructure investment would be enormous in cities such as Sao Paolo that face debilitating bottlenecks. While it's impossible to fully analyze, surely providing traffic relief would improve mental health, increase a society's productivity, and likely improve the economy's efficiency, right? So why don't governments prioritize these investments? Is it because of the short-term cost and disruption and the fact that the returns take time?
* I was thrilled to meet with some prominent venture capitalists and investors in Sao Paolo. I couldn't help but think about the global distribution of talent and new innovative ideas. Surely there were entrepreneurs and inventors everywhere, but the lack of seed capital or initial funding might prevent most of this talent from ever seeing their ideas impact the world. How much better might our world be if venture capital and a culture of risk-taking entrepreneurship spread around the world? What new ideas might emerge?

### Wandering and Wondering
For those that have followed my work for a while, you'll know that I deeply believe in a generalist approach to navigating uncertainty. I am convinced that **each perspective is limited, biased and incomplete** and **the** **only hope we have to understand the dynamics driving our world today is to triangulate using many lenses**.
As you can tell from a few of my most recent trips, I wander between industries, functions, geographies and topics. Along the way I collect all sorts of data that may prove useful, but also may be worthless. I think about what I observe and try to constantly incorporate my findings into an ever-evolving worldview. I also find this approach of **wandering and wondering** to be fulfilling, interesting, informative, and fun way to generate insights.
The future is uncertain, and it's hard to predict it with any accuracy. But I'm going to predict something that I'm pretty certain will happen. I am staying here in New Hampshire this week! I plan to celebrate Thanksgiving at home in the White Mountains with family and friends and wish my American friends the very best for a happy, relaxing, and stress-free Thanksgiving holiday!
