How my wandering and wondering leads to insights | | | Nov 21 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- As a speaker who's often introduced as a global trend-watcher and analyst, it's not unusual for me to get asked questions about geopolitical or geo-economic developments. What do I think is going to happen with China and Taiwan? What are my thoughts on cryptocurrencies? How will electrification mandates impact the emerging markets? Will the US economy enter a recession next year? But every now and then, I'm asked about my approach to making sense of the world (rather than my thoughts about what is currently happening). I love these questions as they provide an opportunity for me to describe the process I use to generate insights. Recently, I was asked a question that was more specific: "What's it like to be Vikram?" The question threw me as I don't really think about what it's like to be me...I just am. I incoherently answered by saying it was hectic, that I read broadly, and that I ask lots of questions. It clearly wasn't satisfying as one young professional chimed in with a request: "I know there's no formula for being a generalist, but I'd really love it if you could write a piece about a day in the life of Vikram!" Then, a few days ago, I was complaining to a friend about my intense travels over the past few weeks and she asked a very pointed question: "So what exactly do you do on your trips?" Coincidentally, at lunch this weekend, my kids asked what I did on my last trip. I answered with a question, asking if they knew what I do while I'm on the road. They shrugged before responding "give speeches, have fancy dinners?" | | ---|---|--- To answer my family as well as those who are curious, I sat down to describe a day in my life. Except when I tried to write up such a piece, it was bluntly obvious there is no "typical" day in my life. So, I decided instead to share highlights from three international trips I have taken since I wrote "" in September. Some of the following details may seem random, but that's actually part of my process. I collect lots of dots by immersing wherever I go and while some prove useless, others are essential tiles that form a trend-revealing mosaic. Montreal (Canada) In late September, I was invited to participate in . Tommy and I have known each other for years and he's been a supporter of my work, distributing hundreds of copies of my books to friends and clients. I was honored to attend and share some of my thoughts about the world we're in and more importantly, my admiration for the work he's done at WhiteHaven to democratize access to alternative investments. And like me, . Tommy and his team have created structures that allow everyday savers to make investments in hotels, film and TV projects, mortgages, structured credit, and alternative energy and power solutions, for instance. How did I get there? I drove myself from Lincoln, NH to Montreal. It was a beautiful drive that led north, through Vermont briefly and into Canada. The border crossing was efficient, and the whole trip took around 3 hours (I timed my departure to avoid Montreal rush hour!). I stayed in Old Montreal and joined a few other Whitehaven fans for dinner that evening at . The next day I worked at the hotel on a presentation I was scheduled to give to a potential consulting client, and spent a few hours at the WhiteHaven investment symposium, during which . (Interestingly, Whitehaven has invested in hosted by ). Signing Books at WhiteHaven Day, Montreal, Canada I took an afternoon break to meet Mathieu St-Jean, a friend who I've know for more than a decade who I had originally met when he ran a part of the investment arm of Canadian National Railway. He suggested we meet at . (Incidentally, for those that know of my fascination with skyscrapers as a bubble indicator, you'll find it interesting that the Royal Bank Tower was the tallest structure in the British Empire at the time it was built in 1928...on the eve of the Great Depression!). Not only did we have a great coffee, but we also compared notes on the political dynamics in our respective countries, the implications for financial markets, and how to think about best serving our nations. Mathieu is an astute observer of the world and I always feel like I learn when I chat with him. That evening, I joined Tommy and the Whitehaven team in Old Montreal for dinner and drinks. It was an enjoyable evening filled with great conversation, live music, and wonderful food. The next morning I drove home, stopping at the border to chat with US Customs and Border Protection agents about the security of the border and challenges they've faced in the area. They noted the Buffalo NY area was the preferred destination for illegal crossings but that they were increasing in the Vermont and New Hampshire areas as well. For the rest of my ride home, I listened to Bloomberg radio and got caught up on the latest global economic data. So What? As a result of this trip, I started thinking about a few different topics: My visit to the Royal Bank tower reminded me to re-visit . As I discussed in Boombustology and in Forbes, . So when I returned home, I did some quick research that revealed the and . With that said, . Was this another warning sign of economic weakness in the world's second largest economy? My discussion with the border agents really got me thinking about the northern border of the United States. With all the attention focused on the southern border and the flow of migrants into America, perhaps the northern border deserved more attention? I looked quickly and found hadn't been updated since 2018 and promised myself I'd dig further into the issue. Abu Dhabi and Dubai (UAE) In mid October, shortly after the Hamas terrorists attacks on Israel, I boarded an evening flight from Boston's Logan Airport to Dubai in the United Arab Emirates. For those that have never flown on , it's a real treat. The service was great, the food fabulous, and the lie flat seat was actually comfortable enough for me to sleep for five or so of the twelve hour flight. Interestingly, the flight path passed through Ukrainian, Iraqi, and Iranian airspace before crossing the Persian Gulf to land in the UAE. () Upon landing, I traveled the 90 minutes or so to Abu Dhabi by car, before checking into a hotel located on the Corniche. I had planned to meet some investors from a venture capital firm I was advising for the weekend, but the war in Israel had disrupted their plans. The result, I was given a much-needed day and a half to recover from the international travel and the 9 hour time difference. I was up for most of the night writing my weekly piece and then slept for half of the day. I stayed in the hotel for all my meals and literally didn't leave the property. It was a struggle to beat the jet lag, and I broke down in the afternoon and reached for the gummy bears that were in the room. But because I have allergies to dairy and gluten, I always read ingredients (some gummy bears have gluten). Unfortunately, food labeling laws in the UAE are not as stringent as they are in the United States, Europe or Canada. | | ---|---|--- The next day I had breakfast with former clients and was scheduled to meet with senior government officials. Unfortunately, took precedence and I instead spent the afternoon prepping for the meetings with potential investors that I was now going to be doing solo rather than with the investment team I had come to assist. The remainder of the trip was filled with meetings and attending sessions of a conference about complex risks (artificial intelligence, geostrategic competition, etc.) that was taking place while I was in town. I met with professionals who were advising the wealthiest families on the planet how to invest their capital, officials who were responsible for designing and implementing the UAE's space policy, and a member of the Prime Minister's staff. One of the most enjoyable parts of the trip, however, was my discovery of camel milk ice cream and camel milk chocolate! (As someone with a dairy allergy -- and camel milk is safe for those of us allergic to cow milk proteins -- this was a heavenly treat!) A real highlight of the trip was having dinner with my friend Murad Ansari whom I've known for almost 20 years but unfortunately see far too rarely. Murray is originally from Pakistan but has spent 15 years or so working in Saudi Arabia and the UAE. He's a brilliant analyst and always has great insights. We caught up on global affairs, his thoughts on financial markets, and how Dubai had changed since the pandemic. We had dinner at . When I noted how expensive the bill was, Murad shared that ! Apparently, the global hedge fund community had figured out that the location and time zone allowed easy connections and communication with almost every region on the planet. (This was obvious in the number of expensive cars visible at every parking lot!) Having watched the news about the escalating tensions between Iran and the western world, I had trouble sleeping on my flight home as I watched the flightpath tracking my plane as it entered Iranian airspace, and proceeded towards Tehran before it turned towards Iraq. I couldn't help but think of . So What? As a result of this trip, I started thinking about a few different topics: If the world really does bifurcate into two global economic ecosystems, as I believe is starting to happen right now, what does that mean for the air travel industry? Will ? And will this additional friction pressure prices as only certain carriers are able to fly over certain countries? Perhaps because I was so excited about the camel milk, I could not stop thinking about and specifically protein. How was the planet going to feed its surging population? ? ? Sao Paolo (Brazil) After attending a board meeting in Florida, I headed off to Sao Paolo, Brazil to speak at a large gathering of senior Latin American steel executives in mid November. Because of an overbooked schedule, I had to fly into Brazil the morning of my talk, something that I try desperately to avoid. Fellow American,

As Speaker of the House, I work _**FOR**_ the people.

When I ran for this position, I made a promise to release the footage from January 6th, so Americans could see for themselves what happened that day, _rather than the opinions of the partisan January 6 Committee._ **And I am delivering on that promise.**

So, I applaud the decision to **release the footage on a public website available for ANYONE to view.**

#

Friends, Nikki ran for Congress to fight for working families in IL-13 and across the country. And since coming to Congress earlier this year, she’s done exactly that by pushing past the partisan games to: 🛣️ Bring over $20 million back to our district to improve our roads and bridges 🧑🔧 Expand access to good-paying jobs for veterans after they return home 🏥 Fight for high-quality, affordable health care for working families 🚰 Secure the appointment of an EPA Coordinator to lead our response to the drinking water crisis impacting residents in Cahokia Heights 🚜 Protect our farmers by bolstering crop insurance programs, and investing in rural development initiatives **We can’t afford to lose a workhorse like Nikki in Congress.** While she’s busy fighting her heart out for the people of Central and Southern Illinois, it’s our job to fight just as hard to protect her seat — and with _two_ right-wing opponents already in the race, we’re going to need all hands on deck to get the job done. **[So, please rush in a donation before our November 30 fundraising deadline to ensure we name: Jon Tester & Sherrod Brown
subject: Not your typical politicians
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Become a Founding Donor today |
#
Hi folks — Jon Tester and Sherrod Brown here. We’re reaching out today because we’re in the middle of the two most competitive Senate campaigns, and we need your help to win. We’re not the typical politicians you’d expect to see every day in the Senate. One of us is a seven-fingered dirt farmer. The other has been called disheveled, wrinkled, and rumpled. Neither of us are winning any best dressed awards anytime soon. But the thing that _really_ sets us apart? We’ll work with anyone to get the job done for our constituents. And we’ll always stand up to the special interests in Washington to help folks back home. But we’re facing the toughest reelection fight of our careers. Election experts are calling us the most vulnerable Democratic senators, and Mitch McConnell and his cronies are planning to unleash hundreds of millions of dollars to try and defeat us. We’ve got a lot of work to do between now and Election Day. **So we’re launching the Big Sky Buckeye Fund with a goal of raising _$500,000_ in the next 48 hours** to build up our resources and fight back against the millions that’ll be thrown our way. **[Ready to roll up your sleeves and get to work? Become a founding donor of our Big Sky Buckeye Fund by splitting a contribution between our campaigns and Tina Smith's today. Your support will help us meet our goal, build our resources, and keep fighting for the hardworking people of Montana and Ohio in the Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73722794/439435038/-1118967062?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20231120_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDU3ZTVkNC0xMzg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=suUXLbqWzJ06u5jSJ8_cgBX9MNfwj0nszb3NSngkiB4=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Jon Tester, Sherrod Brown, and Tina Smith will go through immediately:_ | | [SPLIT $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73722795/439435039/-1118967062?express_lane=true&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20231120_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDU3ZTVkNC0xMzg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=suUXLbqWzJ06u5jSJ8_cgBX9MNfwj0nszb3NSngkiB4=)

clean_body: Become a Founding Donor today | Hi folks — Jon Tester and Sherrod Brown here. We’re reaching out today because we’re in the middle of the two most competitive Senate campaigns, and we need your help to win. We’re not the typical politicians you’d expect to see every day in the Senate. One of us is a seven-fingered dirt farmer. The other has been called disheveled, wrinkled, and rumpled. Neither of us are winning any best dressed awards anytime soon. But the thing that really sets us apart? We’ll work with anyone to get the job done for our constituents. And we’ll always stand up to the special interests in Washington to help folks back home. But we’re facing the toughest reelection fight of our careers. Election experts are calling us the most vulnerable Democratic senators, and Mitch McConnell and his cronies are planning to unleash hundreds of millions of dollars to try and defeat us. We’ve got a lot of work to do between now and Election Day. So we’re launching the Big Sky Buckeye Fund with a goal of raising $500,000 in the next 48 hours to build up our resources and fight back against the millions that’ll be thrown our way. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Jon Tester, Sherrod Brown, and Tina Smith will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for having our backs. We won’t let you down. —Jon Tester & Sherrod Brown Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

It has been a little over a month since we moved to our new facility and the progress has been GREAT!
**Here are the upcoming projects to look for:**
**Auditorium**
-TV's to be added throughout the auditorium for the purpose of lyrics & Bible verses
-More lighting in auditorium
**Lobby**
-New ceiling & flooring
**Restrooms**
-The men of Sheridan know what needs to be removed and replaced...
**Kids & Youth**
-Both nursery's will be complete and youth room will be updated with new carpet and layout
These are the updates that we plan to complete here in the near future.
We are doing this entire renovation on a cash basis.
Thank you for your generosity that has accomplished so much and please consider continuing to partner with us so we can get the job done!

Fellow American,

As Speaker of the House, I work _**FOR**_ the people.

When I ran for this position, I made a promise to release the footage from January 6th, so Americans could see for themselves what happened that day, _rather than the opinions of the partisan January 6 Committee._ **And I am delivering on that promise.**

So, I applaud the decision to **release the footage on a public website available for ANYONE to view.**

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

| Peter,

As Commissioner of Public Lands, I brought folks together to tackle some of our state's biggest issues, like preventing and preparing for wildfires and taking on the climate crisis.

**Now, I am thrilled to announce my run for Washington's 6th Congressional District** , taking my vision for bold, progressive action to the other Washington to keep fighting for families across our state and country.

body:
Our Nation Needs Warriors | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2ae6fce567b7/general-mike-flynn-endorses-my-campaign?e=54a81bd33c)
---
| | [ ](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=29589bcbef&e=54a81bd33c)
---
| | Our fight for America's future just gained a powerful ally—General Michael Flynn has officially endorsed our campaign for Congress in Southern Nevada! 🇺🇸

In a resounding call for strength and change, General Flynn, a distinguished military leader and former National Security Advisor, has thrown his support behind our mission to take on the establishment and drain the swamp in Washington DC. He knows, as I do, that the battle for our nation's core values isn't just on foreign soil—it's within the very halls of our capital, where the swamp creatures prioritize personal gain over the interests of the American people. ****
General Flynn's endorsement is more than a stamp of approval; it's a rallying cry for all patriots to join the fight. Together, we can steer our nation back on course and ensure a brighter future for all Americans.

I am deeply honored by General Flynn's endorsement, and I pledge to stand firm against the swamp, championing the principles that made America great. Your support is crucial to our success, and I am grateful for every patriot who joins us in this battle.

[Let's make America proud!](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=21291fe29a&e=54a81bd33c)

clean_body: Our Nation Needs Warriors | | | | | | | Our fight for America's future just gained a powerful ally—General Michael Flynn has officially endorsed our campaign for Congress in Southern Nevada! 🇺🇸 In a resounding call for strength and change, General Flynn, a distinguished military leader and former National Security Advisor, has thrown his support behind our mission to take on the establishment and drain the swamp in Washington DC. He knows, as I do, that the battle for our nation's core values isn't just on foreign soil—it's within the very halls of our capital, where the swamp creatures prioritize personal gain over the interests of the American people. ** General Flynn's endorsement is more than a stamp of approval; it's a rallying cry for all patriots to join the fight. Together, we can steer our nation back on course and ensure a brighter future for all Americans. I am deeply honored by General Flynn's endorsement, and I pledge to stand firm against the swamp, championing the principles that made America great. Your support is crucial to our success, and I am grateful for every patriot who joins us in this battle. | For Nevada, | | Elizabeth Helgelien Candidate for U.S. Congress, NV-3 | | | "Paid for by Elizabeth for Nevada" | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2023 Elizabeth for Nevada, All rights reserved.

subject: The pro-Hamas mobs have gotten entirely out of control
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Reps. Rashida Tlaib and Ilhan Omar are fanning the flames of chaos, encouraging pro-Hamas protestors in their mob violence. | Peter -

**A Pro-Hamas mob stormed the DNC, trying to break in and find any Member of Congress who stands with Israel for some horrendous retribution.**

Thankfully, Capitol Police stymied the mob and prevented them from breaking down the doors to gain entry to the building.

But the issue remains: these mobs are popping up on college campuses, city halls, and now at the DNC. Nobody is safe from the rage of the mob, and we must defeat the radical Democrats who are fanning the flames of chaos with their dangerous rhetoric.

**Ilhan Omar and Rashida Tlaib continuously make comments disparaging Israel and denying the right of the Israelis to defend themselves from this horrible terrorist aggression.** To make it worse, they echo terrorists' calls of “from the river to the sea,” which is a direct call for violence against Israelis that argues for the elimination of Israel altogether and the murder of all Jewish people therein.

We can’t sit idly by as two terrorist sympathizers remain in Congress. We must fight back before their dangerous rhetoric has dire consequences. [**So please stand with me to support Israel and condemn the dangerous and violent rhetoric used by Rashida Tlaib and Ilhan Omar.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=21642a697bd54a7db9b902c053d917ef&_e=G5BbPXtb2K_rDaxtnFt-SPV0lFoN0SoJzboyrEGCS2eVc4_e0nit2jY8Oj6ZSjhso5i7bPNQVCPzt3VW_v4htB5nQVENe1cbcXOVevqeXTjeeZnr3I9IajRfwA5fsjfYRk-oKmNMHtOBYRerY0yhzR3tYbd6FgVknL3Me27AviipiPucQfmCvigcGHEBRoSueQrwSWW1qdMlDmZAAJ5eiV1XAb9PvvW3q0_byCZSTTsSn5Be5TkPsPEILeRcuqSMMN3_k7WGgYX3A0ssw6xGLf6HV9bzFSsHOvpSKBT3hft9YqXq4lJMAdH8ISyHPTP8BEJULyQYM923DDwtN9aa8P1ueBtgfsfRlXJBFr21qFUMtATio4AU34KzpRHB-ZSDQlzwsAyYGIX3Er5KucJsMeEqTrFQE4lyvzuUtgHJpzG59-aJiY-SyOH1oJyfjPrh)

Because this is not some aberration or mistake, neither of these two Members misspoke. They both have long histories of using the phrase “from the river to the sea” and similar expressions championed by blood-thirsty terrorists.

**So, we must hold them accountable and expose the truth about their records of violent rhetoric to the voters.** But we need your help to make it happen because it will be costly to get ads up on the radio waves, TV, and the web that hold these two dangerous Members accountable for their violent rhetoric.

No election is worth siding with terrorists to win. Plain and simple. We must hold these two irresponsible members accountable for their words and defeat them in their re-election campaigns. We can’t do it without your support.

[**So please stand with us to support Israel and condemn the dangerous, violent rhetoric used by Rashida Tlaib and Ilhan Omar by offering your most generous gift of $10, $25, $50, or even more to support our Republican campaign to expand the Majority.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=21642a697bd54a7db9b902c053d917ef&_e=G5BbPXtb2K_rDaxtnFt-SPV0lFoN0SoJzboyrEGCS2eVc4_e0nit2jY8Oj6ZSjhso5i7bPNQVCPzt3VW_v4htB5nQVENe1cbcXOVevqeXTjeeZnr3I9IajRfwA5fsjfYRk-oKmNMHtOBYRerY0yhzR3tYbd6FgVknL3Me27AviipiPucQfmCvigcGHEBRoSueQrwSWW1qdMlDmZAAJ5eiV1XAb9PvvW3q0_byCZSTTsSn5Be5TkPsPEILeRcuqSMMN3_k7WGgYX3A0ssw6xGLX_1IJlJh_akGOzH5ZUVv7ThUXzlWDF89s51fqSfVnairsaKrLKGEMP6NyVaXCXfnUmmcJew4lnPXh7H9Nfvg6PaW08ksm2w3H3DzVTx8-tLPIMvcE3kDweX_CumNFTfFGvmnNMyoQzr4cxR82Aya0W-zs5-M4JhDuT9xUBofm6I)

Senate Republicans

name: Trump News HQ
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read

| | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztlnqgs6g1bfbaqvdek17qk3robntiom2o75ncc0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clhm0o74c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za4kskdfd7mnprvvljco060vfk2b21h1po3fjf78_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clhm0o74c1h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z24dqfvis3p4i4r24phoe0fb8go7lnioadubcttg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clhm0o74c1h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1ijsbnjuu0o2qi7svshbaus8gbqkh8a3cl5he10_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clhm0o74c1h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Trump Train News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjtgphtar9rc0ar9ro1qn241eh8l0qtpul1oehko_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8p34sjhm4pb246h22sh2s8i6eo30clhm0o74c1h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjp4qe007ifmvc3t6kkl9hrrtpdto5hf5t7ivtjg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clhm0o74c1h2bs)_

body:
2 tickets, airfare, and hotel accommodations included

| | Friend,

The fourth presidential debate is **SOON**. Would you like to join me there?

The RNC wants to give you and a guest the chance to attend, which is why I’m reaching out.

**[Chip in any amount here and you’ll be entered for a chance to win (2) free tickets to the fourth presidential debate, airfare for two, and hotel accommodations.](http://trk.secureandprosper._c2M9UFJlbnRhbE5IJnJlY3VycmluZz10cnVlJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09cGVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDIzMTEyMV93aGF0LWFyZS15b3UtZG9pbmctY29udGVzdF9hYWRwX2FhZSJ9/gw9XlqdwR-PuGYM4rS-iIA)**

_**BUT, one thing that would make the upcoming debate even better is knowing YOU will be in the crowd cheering me on, Friend!**_

name: Pro Life Update
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions

| This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztvbdrl6o8qfqfn9cdlmrq2kag63so1isocecieo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clhm2ob2cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zdobolhtof44sabgtgurlaoden5rkq4s179s24v0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clhm2ob2cjh2bs)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfknsk1irv297fsec355qpgtc6lqgu45apoii6hg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clhm2ob2cjh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgt24irvk4j8ctc79gdk7cmpo9gjr0na8dkjhc0o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clhm2ob2cjh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pro Life Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbr15ajrut63okkdbocngkkmpi9rv4bek5q5u538_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clhm2ob2cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp34cjie6oj4s8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhhrcj11ig2irkd2gokmlbb956legg8rcons5kl0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clhm2ob2cjh2bs)_

name: Speaker Alert
subject: You won’t always agree with him but know this.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JASON SMITH FOR CONGRESS
body:
Speaker Johnson fighting for every one of us against the radical left.

name: Emily Hall
subject: Your invitation to impact lives through prayer
body:
I’m excited to introduce you to our latest resource: "Impacting Lostness Through Prayer Calendar"

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36702%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HpH9ZPkAB2MN06jGIiNynA&sysid=1)
---
Dear Fellow Believer,

I’m sure I’m not only speaking for myself when I say that sometimes it’s easy to forget to pray -- especially for those we don’t see on a daily basis.

In fact, praying for the lost across the globe can sometimes be overwhelming. Where do we start?

That’s why I’m excited to introduce you to our latest resource: "Impacting Lostness Through Prayer Calendar" -- an 18-month prayer calendar crafted to empower you to pray for the least reached across the globe.

This calendar isn't just a piece of paper; it's a remarkable tool that:
* Enables you to impact the lives of individuals and communities who are in need of hearing the life-changing gospel;
* Allows you to develop a greater sense of empathy and humility for those who are lost;
* Structures a disciplined habit of prayer that can extend throughout a lifetime!

[ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36703%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BC%2fgEMbJntQl%2fc8FWg5w%2fQ&sysid=1) Through this calendar, you'll receive a prayer prompt each month, guiding your prayers for those longing to hear the message of hope and salvation.

To receive your free copy of this powerful prayer tool, simply click on the link below to request it. We'll take care of the rest and mail the calendar to your doorstep.

Click on this link to secure your copy: [https://welcome.imb.org/prayercalendar23.html](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36704%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=F2luhWLbnnqsfYN3yMbsDg&sysid=1)

Thank you for partnering with us in this essential mission of spreading hope and love to those who need it the most. Your involvement is crucial in making a lasting impact on lostness through prayer.

With heartfelt gratitude,

name: American Action News
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0s5aj48a8tdth6rupsddsi3hce3qtif3sgnohk8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clhm2ob1c5h2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1ovft61qo6ap4gq8k0vkce7m8bt908c2b4ce448_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clhm2ob1c5h2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhe4npucuh96sk5khqvg4racjvu4lcgcg69tj5ao_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clhm2ob1c5h2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq762nnvs90m7cvkdp9d4orv81eacjplisa2nlt0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clhm2ob1c5h2bs)

name: GOP Presidential
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions

| This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqaiofggq9vad67jv7dtv0kielu3jbst42ab9s1o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clhm2ob1c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf8ce3ksmuq7i004g0v82q3l8gslni7p9lr00k98_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clhm2ob1c5h2bs)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zslniqn5dkulmivn61gieg3hosjkcugm204o11d8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clhm2ob1c5h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjc89l6md0d6dv1db6lcpdk3gpv6ckkmtc7jpmsg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clhm2ob1c5h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

GOP Presidential
---

name: Senate Republicans
subject: We warned you that Senate Republicans were in trouble
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Fundraising is so important

Friend,

_**[FIRST,](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2kjv8drgq48a30pvrg6ukv89b48ed0td8u44hr8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clhm2ob2cjh2bs)**__**[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z61merng06qvhcik73ov8svlep5vtqesktin5l3o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clhm2ob2cjh2bs)**_we warned you that Senate Republicans were in trouble unless grassroots conservatives in your state started stepping up.

_**[THEN,](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zij390s623q3agute89cpbihffkhvem0utipqakg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clhm2ob2cjh2bs)**_ our pleas for help were IGNORED, and we missed our crucial mid-month fundraising goal.

_**[NOW,](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrg6hc15vvdbv7q0ushrp3qssh1pocjhvs8la6a8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clhm2ob2cjh2bs)**_ we're falling into a deeper and deeper hole with each passing day.

subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd3hlltaeroc4r6hprgqvu6pbh5uv3i8ke944npg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clhm2ob2cjh2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq3g0ujhbpc6sv7mm864r2ettk30p33ujocihomo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clhm2ob2cjh2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpcn98ehumv5p2rokkg3k52lqsapjhvblcaj6cfg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clhm2ob2cjh2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z554msb4k8ogdgpf38917rqhl06o734taekrkdu8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clhm2ob2cjh2bs)

name: ICYMI News
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions

| This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqcbg0nf91r2pjr08ft5vdmi0j2e55u0j01pfjv0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clhm2ob2cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrq5nu6u5428hnfsogkvo3vdb3dr8u75c38jp8fo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clhm2ob2cjh2bs)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z30til9geo6t2o0nrpin60olddidte6tdhjf6lu8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clhm2ob2cjh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z42apftp0vqiisdq9iksg19im59dqg05j6bjufno_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clhm2ob2cjh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

ICYMI News
---

name: Your America
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36711%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4g%2b%2biQQtFPRsx6BmAAwOsA&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” **
Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36712%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=F0uw7j5fpYN0gqjVFSmWlg&sysid=1)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36713%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xnnP9kPOh%2bKS4ePUCCSLoA&sysid=1)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Your America News

body:

Your Life In A Crisis
**This Pocket-Sized "Power Plant" Sold Out in Less
Than 48 Hours - Now It's Finally Back in Stock** [**Tested by former Navy SEAL: See it in action!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674170%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nzmTM3cnvpuL9GCPoZWnSQ&sysid=1) [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674171%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OuZZkPI%2fj2ysypQ8XTQFkQ&sysid=1) [**People are buying these in 4 packs - Learn More**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674172%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NGJHGKTDO7l6xlunvTt0nA&sysid=1) Oh no. We slapped our foreheads. We had just released the Patriot Power Cell. And the response was so strong, we couldn't believe it. The launch went WAY better than expected. We sold out completely in a matter of hours. The second time, we doubled our inventory thinking that would be enough to meet demand. And then... poof! GONE! Our inventory manager was asking... _**"Why were customers getting these 2... 4... or even 12 units at a time? Were they holiday gifts? Or just incredibly useful?"**_ Since then, the Patriot Power Cell has become one of our best-selling products of all time. Wow! And after making as many as we can, we think we finally have enough to meet demand... at least for now. That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**Tested by Former Navy SEAL:
A Pocket Power Plant That's
Weather-Resistant, Has An Ultra
Bright LED Flashlight And
Charges 2 Devices At Once!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674173%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xsLHJQxJa%2b%2f%2fJWbro0fnDA&sysid=1) [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674171%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OuZZkPI%2fj2ysypQ8XTQFkQ&sysid=1) | | **Melanie D.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. They work so well, I bought eight more to give to my kids and friends for Christmas. I work outdoors a lot, so I take mine along to plug in my cell phone. They also have a flashlight on them, which comes in real handy. This is a good buy, you won't regret it.
---|---
| **Shirley C.** I'm very happy with the 4Patriots products. I've gotten the Power Cell, which is fantastic to charge my cell phone anywhere. It's rechargeable and I'm very happy with all of the 4Patriots products. And I'm very happy with Frank Bates, he's very truthful, honest and helps others in need. I really appreciate his products and his emails that I get. I'm really, really happy. I would recommend his products and him to anyone. Thank you so much.
---|---
| **Wing C.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. I know they will come in handy. Because I know people with their cell phone, saying "oh I have no battery left." And you know what? They're getting it for Christmas. That's what I'm doing for them. We live here in New York, things are quite ample here at this time, ya know. But for emergencies like that - to have your cell phone, your contact to the outside world - it's important. Thank you very much, Frank.
---|---
| **Richard G.** It's a great item for me on weekends out in the country, the swimming pool, wherever else I don't have electricity available. Oftentimes people have come out to the pool, for example, and brought their power adapter to keep their cell phones or laptops or whatever charged up. They wound up losing them. With the Power Cell, it works great to recharge in the shade and I highly recommend it. Thank you very much.
---|---
[**Click here to see it in action!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674174%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rzsgUur6867jvUpsI3LZmw&sysid=1)

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Would you like to be flown out to my next debate?
body:
As one of my supporters, I want to make sure you have a chance to enter the RNC's debate contest!

| |
---
| | | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36720%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=J%2bajKuUesiQkwpvOLctkZQ&sysid=1)
---

Friend,

Would you like to join me on _December 6_ for the fourth presidential debate?

---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36720%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=J%2bajKuUesiQkwpvOLctkZQ&sysid=1)
---
| | [ENTER HERE](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36721%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lpRVchmoOcAFnoLo4On4Aw&sysid=1)
---

As one of my supporters, I want to make sure you have a chance to enter the RNC's debate contest!

**[All you have to do is chip in a donation of any amount today and you will be entered for a chance to win:](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36722%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FX1WMd%2bUtAvJ9ypk3G%2fL5Q&sysid=1 "All you have to do is chip
in a donation of any amount today and you will be entered for a chance to
win:")**

→ TWO free tickets to the fourth presidential debate.
→ Airfare for two.
→ Hotel accommodations.

---
| | [ENTER HERE](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36721%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lpRVchmoOcAFnoLo4On4Aw&sysid=1)
---

I would love for you to witness the fourth presidential debate in person, take part in history, and make memories that will last a lifetime.

**[I'm urging you to take advantage of this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36723%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JiOzsnLyxJyfAZBi9yM3GA&sysid=1 "I'm urging you to take
advantage of this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity.")**

Thank you so much for your support. I hope to see you in Tuscaloosa!

---
My very best,
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36720%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=J%2bajKuUesiQkwpvOLctkZQ&sysid=1)
---
Nikki Haley

---
| | [ENTER HERE](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36721%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lpRVchmoOcAFnoLo4On4Aw&sysid=1)
---
| | | | |
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36724%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tfKADqeQN2ZcnrrlpY9mdw&sysid=1 "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36735%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1TAtqhyIshavAtkRU1d3xQ&sysid=1 "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36736%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yflLsaeQujPeehgSdwAj8w&sysid=1 "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States.

I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A.

I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I’m running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor”** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. **And I’ll do it as your next President. **

As President, I’ll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington’s spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America’s future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36737%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Fhqolt5vs2W04gsvsmvjjw&sysid=1 "Will you join me today and
help me save our country?")**

---

"I'm urging you to take advantage of this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity." Thank you so much for your support. I hope to see you in Tuscaloosa! My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States. I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A. I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I’m running for President because we have a country to save! I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor” because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. And I’ll do it as your next President. As President, I’ll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington’s spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America’s future. body:
Power-grabbing Democrats!

### Friend,
### _**TOMORROW**_ , far-left liberal attorneys will be arguing in the Wisconsin Supreme Court that our current legislative maps should be scrapped. After the Democrats spent millions to buy Janet Protasiewicz a seat on our Supreme Court, now they're calling in their chips to have Justice Janet create maps that elect as many Democrats as possible. The far-left is hellbent on seizing power at the cost of a fair democracy, and they aren't even hiding it anymore.
[STOP THE DEMS' POWER GRAB](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xgdutk-didthutlhu-y/)
### Democrats want to re-draw our maps, because they know Biden-Baldwinflation and skyrocketing crime will make it impossible for them to win Wisconsin in 2024, unless they rig the system. That's why they will gerrymander Wisconsin to bring as many deep-blue voters in the cities of Madison and Milwaukee into districts that stretch deep into rural Wisconsin. They want to overpower the voices of conservative Wisconsinites, and they will do whatever it takes. We need your help to _**FIGHT BACK**_.
[TAKE A STAND](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xgdutk-didthutlhu-j/)
### We're doing everything we can to fight the Democrats on this one, but the harsh reality is that they flood in high-dollar donations from their out-of-touch, coastal elite donors at every turn. Without you, our generous grassroots supporters, we can't compete. We need your help. The sanctity of our elections and most sacred institutions depend on it. Will you join the fight, Friend? We need your support, and we need it now.
[SUPPORT REPUBLICANS](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xgdutk-didthutlhu-t/)
### Thank you for your unwavering support in the face of Democrat corruption. It means more than you know.
### -Team WisGOP

name: Blake Dellinger
subject: Fwd: It's That Time - Let's Volunteer for Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
Sending an email follow up to thank all of you who signed up to volunteer between now and the end of the year! If you haven't had a chance yet, please consider signing up for any number of our virtual phone banks or canvasses between now and the end of the year.

We also will be having a virtual phone bank tonight over zoom at 5pm. Would love to see you there! More information at the link below.

**[www.LauraForCongress.org/Volunteer](http://www.lauraforcongress.org/Volunteer)**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Blake Dellinger** <[blake@lauraforcongress.org](mailto:blake@lauraforcongress.org)>
Date: Wed, Nov 15, 2023 at 2:30 PM
Subject: It's That Time - Let's Volunteer for Laura Friedman for Congress
To: Blake Dellinger <[blake@lauraforcongress.org](mailto:blake@lauraforcongress.org)>
Cc: Dre Guttag <[dre@lauraforcongress.org](mailto:dre@lauraforcongress.org)>

Friends,

It's that time! We're fired up and ready to reach out to voters for Laura. Will you join us?

We appreciate that you took the time to sign up to volunteer, now is the time where we can use your help to ensure voters know about Laura and why we need her to represent CA-30 in Congress.

We have plenty of scheduled canvassing and phone banking opportunities between now and the holidays, so please consider signing up for any of the events on the link below.

[**Use this form to****sign up**](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScbj5Ky3M-QbSqh9W1Z-C_F0-PGp7AGdKKkU4KlMmfMXi5vow/viewform) for ongoing volunteer opportunities to reach out to voters and elect Laura Friedman to Congress!

If you want to share with your friends, you can have them sign up anytime at **[www.LauraForCongress.org/Volunteer](http://www.LauraForCongress.org/Volunteer)**.

Here is a description of our current volunteer opportunities.

**Phone Banking**

We will be holding scheduled virtual phone banks over zoom, where you can call CA-30 voters from the comfort of your home.

**Canvassing**

Join Laura in person to knock on doors, meet voters, and hand out campaign material.

If you have any questions, please feel free to email us anytime. We look forward to seeing you on the phones and in the field!

Thank you,
Blake Dellinger
Laura Friedman for Congress

Jesus didn’t attack police or use harsh language. He only shot video to provide for his wife and kids and entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

**But around 7:30 AM on January 20, 2021, between 12 to 20 heavily armed FBI agents raided his home with guns drawn. There was no probable cause, and the search warrant was obtained through lies and even outright fraud.
**
Jesus was forcefully handcuffed, then moved to the FBI building.

His wife asked for the warrant several times but didn’t receive it until after the FBI agents finished searching their home.

Jesus survived rocket attacks and exploding roadside bombs trying to bring freedom to Iraq and Afghanistan. But his freedom gets trampled on right here at home by Biden’s Gestapo DOJ and its FBI!

**What’s more, Jesus recently appeared before District Judge Colleen Kollar-Kotelly in Washington, D.C. and was unjustly sentenced to 8 months in federal prison.

She’s a hardcore leftist whose nomination was opposed by every conservative group in the country. She’s the absolute worst judge I’ve appeared before in 45 years.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!

| Just like last year, an out-of-state millionaire is swooping in to try to buy Pennsylvania’s Senate seat. And just like last year, CNN is rating Pennsylvania one of the closest Senate races in the country. Mitch McConnell and the GOP are going to do everything they can to defeat Bob and flip PA red, because saving our razor-thin Democratic majority could all come down to re-electing Bob Casey. Not only that, but this guy has a massive personal fortune that he could use to self-fund the race – he put $14 MILLION 😧 into his failed run for Senate last year AND he’s got the national Republican establishment standing behind him. [If we’re going to keep the Senate blue, we need to come together to help Bob win this race. We built a people-powered team that made history in 2022 – let’s build something even bigger to win again in 2024.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7aa17d0f-47f9-4ddc-afb8-db7d495d77e8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks to folks like you, _Pennsylvania is represented by TWO Democrats_ in the Senate who are fighting for working families. Appreciate you all!! ❤️ John John Fetterman U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Action PAC PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 | Having trouble viewing this email? | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Tell the DOI to STOP fracking on public lands
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2134398?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Tell the Department of Interior to CANCEL the sale of 6,972 acres of Texas public lands to fossil fuel companies! >>[ ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2134399?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)[_Act now!_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2134399?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** Greedy companies are razing our public lands for profit. Fracking wastewater contaminates community drinking water. Beautiful landscapes and critical wildlife habitats are destroyed to make way for giant metal machines **blasting water and chemicals** into the ground and **cracking the Earth** – **all so a money-hungry CEO can line his pockets.** Now, new lease sales threaten to bring trucks and construction machinery into our wild places to build fracking rigs. **Your message to the Department of Interior before the comment deadline closes is critical for protecting public lands![_Friend, will you help us meet our MIDNIGHT GOAL of 5,281 signatures and tell the DOI to cancel the sale of public lands in Texas before it’s too late?_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2134400?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2134401?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Fracking is good for no one but the companies making money from it. The process destabilizes the ground, sometimes **triggering earthquakes.** Its wastewater can seep into the ground and waterways, sometimes containing **radioactive material!** People exposed to its pollution can suffer from coughing fits, nausea, and even blistering headaches.
The Department of Interior should conserve our precious public lands, not sell them to the highest corporate bidder. It should prioritize people’s health, not boost industry bottom lines. Don’t you agree? [_**Please, Friend, send your message to the Department of Interior and protect public lands from fracking!**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2134402?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2134401?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Nicole Ghio
Fossil Fuels Program Manager,
Friends of the Earth **
|

---
| | | | [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMzI1LWU3ODM0YjQwYTY2NTQ2OThiMmQ0Y2FmMGYxNDgwMjA1IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZWQubGVhZGVyc2hpcGluc3RpdHV0ZS5vcmcvcmdjLTA4MjQyNC8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXJpbGV5X2FwcGVhbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9djItQUVfRkFMUjQ0NDQyIn0/GoqXfO9rbfphgz9ape1rVQ)
Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I’m circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you’d like to give online, here’s a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMzI1LWU3ODM0YjQwYTY2NTQ2OThiMmQ0Y2FmMGYxNDgwMjA1IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZWQubGVhZGVyc2hpcGluc3RpdHV0ZS5vcmcvcmdjLTA4MjQyNC8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXJpbGV5X2FwcGVhbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9djItQUVfRkFMUjQ0NDQyIn0/dYcYvL-IlJHTHnBYMA2HgQ)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity’s show that I’ve partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I’m the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths – that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types – patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left’s cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America’s freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you – that’s when you know you’re saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America’s founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone – because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMzI1LWU3ODM0YjQwYTY2NTQ2OThiMmQ0Y2FmMGYxNDgwMjA1IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZWQubGVhZGVyc2hpcGluc3RpdHV0ZS5vcmcvcmdjLTA4MjQyNC8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXJpbGV5X2FwcGVhbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9djItQUVfRkFMUjQ0NDQyIn0/DuhTg4GW9BhIVP3NnnDgmg)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:

* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women’s identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMzI1LWU3ODM0YjQwYTY2NTQ2OThiMmQ0Y2FmMGYxNDgwMjA1IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjMiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZWQubGVhZGVyc2hpcGluc3RpdHV0ZS5vcmcvcmdjLTA4MjQyNC8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXJpbGV5X2FwcGVhbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9djItQUVfRkFMUjQ0NDQyIn0/x9SJUAyga-ghppyh5hIFZg)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States

---

Faith & Liberty PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMzI1LWU3ODM0YjQwYTY2NTQ2OThiMmQ0Y2FmMGYxNDgwMjA1IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/UpaO4zv1vUty4vXtaY5W7g) to unsubscribe.

body:
Sam Altman, fired Friday as CEO of OpenAI, the company behind ChatGPT, joined Microsoft’s artificial intelligence project Monday, sending shock waves through Silicon Valley and upending ChatGPT’s corporate future.

| | | [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJydjrGOwjAQRL8m7ojWXjsJhYu7gg4aCkrLZ6-JwYlRYpD4eyykk664CmnKN2-GNO_6YeilBGBeByJByKIWIBCQK9hKxWUbgiOUCnvkCEPnGwnkY8lLe8lxLiOF9MwPWlqXJzbqoJzlFVaD66UCua12UATBehS8-2FJj6Xc1ga_GrGr-cdy2pu9jSnO54OdSJeQzW3JqwHccLURaI42FbMSeUNTBfNsXfSVITeSuxrOFn25XyklOzXi21Ow91Tq8V-i_VN7L5YPRl71WWnS)

# TUESDAY, NOVEMBER 21, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** On this date in 1995, the Dow Jones Industrial Average climbed above 5000 for the first time. Today, 28 years later, it opened the week just above 35,000. [See a contemporary report here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FyhCAUAL8GOxzeQ0ALijR2lzalg_A4ycBxo4zm_j5zqVNvsbtft-XmUk6P-6crZFusi_MtnbQAcASOchm6YCMRkuzIghFCGQVGdptdzRgG7UiMcvIRRjCeSMs1rCGaQasuWRQoARBAqEnp3gcTwwo-hKi0w4ENgkJqde-_a3q0jWJ-1ZP23tfSZbu19jyY_GA4M5yv6-qza6nQ8eYMZ7f7LZ10MJyz4z_PwmGaFH-nIy8PrsWo-dHq_uq3VnK32_C8Us7p0IYN4l5cyn-q9v_5bwAAAP__OYNZYw).
