---
## Firing of Top AI Exec Roils Tech Firms
Sam Altman, fired Friday as CEO of OpenAI, the company behind ChatGPT, [joined Microsoft's artificial intelligence](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL_uozAQhJ_GdIvYxQaloLiGLtdeiRZ7HXzynwj7gvL2p6T-daMZafTp-3Pf7hxiyI_fnGRpvmxsW3jJhgiEQOOmO7d4EZKxkwXnYTCzwXnsjgXRsGgvNNnbrM20-10zaeNocpMn04WFBhoRCXEwNzP11s3e7Wid82Zi0koP4kIrZ_-3hNwO8fFdXnL2tqQuLkdrz6rGX4pWRet1Xb3Nu_2MitbPtaIV8ZsVreVfbeKgPCVzgEPYQeUEHFviDK1A_FQp2LPU4luFLBdwgCacwEqBzE5iZKj8rv3RUuzOxT2vEGOo06z08Egc4pet_azqfwAAAP__wmprDw) project Monday, sending shock waves through Silicon Valley and upending ChatGPT's corporate future. Altman's firing stunned the industry. He had become the public face of AI globally, [testifying in Congress](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7Fu7CAQAL8Gd1js2hi_guI1dJc2pbXnXe6IsDkZck7-PrrUqUea0bxflgulnPbbG23iWywLrS09ZQHQCBqHZezYRxGUoRMPzhjrLLihu3t7nUe0Ntp5YhYbp9XNYEa-8oTEw9wljwYHAAQw9p-d-pVd5CuszNFOhKMajXBq5eg_StrbXWL-Lk85-rVsXfb31h5VDf8VBoXhPM-evlKpL6owvNwKg7EKAziFgZLOQixH1ZU2TblttOtDbp-ZmugqOzXpDs-PM-Wc6uTUaG4bpfzba3_v_wQAAP__gT9bAw) in favor of regulating the technology. His hiring was seen as a major coup for Microsoft. By Monday's end, up to [700 OpenAI employees](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFu8yAUBeCnwRsWXIMJA8O_eMu_drQIXJJbYYgMidW3r9ypQ7cjfdLR0fm4rldPmcr9v9_Q9VRXHzq9cZWSg-QwrWqILiECTgM6aYTQRkszDQ8nwjyjvQSVpqStMMJqtCYC-osM1quBHAiYpAQphbZ6HkM0Kd5kiDHp2YNiSmCkXvfxs1LpD0z5q75xH0PdhuwevT8bm_4xWBgsx3GM5RYKHu10Bsvt1ahga78iP5nB0vzGfe6bL_ysbnyjsNdWU-f1icUTr6_Wced7KF6CtkoMu4vPg3KmNhumxH3zlH-W9L-P-Q4AAP__pxVm1A) had signed a letter threatening to quit if the board wasn't replaced. Emmett Shear, former CEO of the video-streaming platform Twitch, was named OpenAI's new interim CEO.
## List: Ranking The Freest States in America
A new report has ranked the freest states in America based on a combination of personal and economic freedoms, with New Hampshire at No. 1 and [New York at No. 50, ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAQgOGnwRsWHMZOBoYu3tK1o4XhiGkwRByJm7ev0rn7N_z6vy7LxcYU8_XT7mhaKIt1LT5xkZKD5KCWofMmIAKqDo2chNCTlpPqNqPceFpPSo5K2UkorVeFcB6dGFYJwUIXDQhQUoKUQp_12Ds_Bb9K533Qo4WBDQJ9bKX23yXmtmFIr_LE2ruyd8lsrd2JqQ8GM4P5OI4-lJ_1QTEj0dswmHf00TKYMx78VeqNu5JbzA8kXm2-oeclI09oqfFQETk125D429OjPvHFaSsHddX4-xFTijRObBDX3cb019H-3_IbAAD__6LJZtc)the least economically free state in the U.S. Florida, South Dakota, Nevada, and Arizona are the top four freest states after New Hampshire. Some score higher on economic freedom and others on personal freedom, but this is the combined ranking of the two metrics. The least-free states include California, New Jersey, and Oregon, primarily because the report views their high taxes and heavy regulations as impeding economic freedom. # **Can fat really be good for my brain?**
Natural fats offer powerful benefits to your body - and your brain.
**Your brain is comprised of about 60 percent fat. ** Because our brain is made up largely of fat, our brains need fat to work well.
In fact, billions of cells rely on fat to operate optimally. Without healthy fat, our brain doesn't function as well. And when our brain is not operating at a high level, well, we all know how that affects the rest of our lives. Fueling your brain with fat, in particular, encourages ketosis, which [provides energy to the brain and helps protect](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuhDAQRL9m6UD2Lra5wkUkRHepIqVExrs-HHEHAuei_H1ElDLNjEYzxdO8X8dryEt-3F7DXXxJ6xhiyU8Zta5R10hjW7FPIihUiddOKeOMdlTNnp0wxShkow04uY671kydKDaMVtkqe1RIWqPWylyMbSK7xJOOzMnYgC20SjiXdW8-1vwos6Tle33K3sT1Xi1-LmU7gF4AB8AhTc0jnGxbKPO5ABx2PqXZ5g1oODID9RfsAO32OQH12CrjCNBGfaY_mPptSHk_Sn1R6uwQqD-dgPpq97x95WXJh3XQqts95OUXp_z_zk8AAAD___ojX9k) against brain degeneration, among other health benefits. By far, the most well-studied type of fat that does this are naturally occurring fats called medium-chain triglycerides... On this date in 1995, the Dow Jones Industrial Average climbed above 5000 for the first time. Today, 28 years later, it opened the week just above 35,000. . Just in case you haven't signed up for The Flyover yet, you can take care of that . Want to keep up with us on Facebook? . Don't miss our sponsor today, ! | Firing of Top AI Exec Roils Tech Firms Sam Altman, fired Friday as CEO of OpenAI, the company behind ChatGPT, project Monday, sending shock waves through Silicon Valley and upending ChatGPT's corporate future. Altman's firing stunned the industry. He had become the public face of AI globally, in favor of regulating the technology. His hiring was seen as a major coup for Microsoft. By Monday's end, up to had signed a letter threatening to quit if the board wasn't replaced. Emmett Shear, former CEO of the video-streaming platform Twitch, was named OpenAI's new interim CEO. List: Ranking The Freest States in America A new report has ranked the freest states in America based on a combination of personal and economic freedoms, with New Hampshire at No. 1 and least economically free state in the U.S. Florida, South Dakota, Nevada, and Arizona are the top four freest states after New Hampshire. Some score higher on economic freedom and others on personal freedom, but this is the combined ranking of the two metrics. The least-free states include California, New Jersey, and Oregon, primarily because the report views their high taxes and heavy regulations as impeding economic freedom. You can see Winter Storms Threaten Holiday Travel Heavy storms could bring large parts of the country this week, impacting travel from the Midwest to New England, as well as potentially "severe thunderstorms" in the South. In New York, Gov. Kathy Hochul to be prepared and warned people to do their Thanksgiving grocery shopping early in the week. Meanwhile, forecasters say the threat of strong tornadoes is growing in the lower Mississippi Valley. The storms will hit the middle of the country today and tomorrow and move to the East Coast Wednesday. For a detailed regional breakdown, for the coming week. Without healthy fat, our brain doesn't function as well. And when our brain is not operating at a high level, well, we all know how that affects the rest of our lives. subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f37573373e2042ff8c5d77abf3872a0f&_e=xrcuICGHRRqiAl2DWkVy04MSfXS62K5YlHlkG2m8YUWcEA9553XBamxpmXDQipsNj_S904SXzm6RjK9IiTfal9QoncElT88TbSVH3CRqI8w6I7Qxuq41JrxonrGviNjS88deKtyBnT0lSQXml-onON1H37d7Yfc4h9DO6pGGkP4cCD8y-Sn1VtYbxpJLRFcP-G3V1mwp8vk5eB3YiTZoiPSM6uYoAyzW5izen-h9mYmxFt8re741K4BTvKWR3B788a7kV5jD9RXyqaD3dLILzVbo2YlR8MaOMU04PBqsUr4_N0iuKsWYCcIkOXJqo9th) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f37573373e2042ff8c5d77abf3872a0f&_e=xrcuICGHRRqiAl2DWkVy04MSfXS62K5YlHlkG2m8YUWcEA9553XBamxpmXDQipsNj_S904SXzm6RjK9IiTfal9QoncElT88TbSVH3CRqI8w6I7Qxuq41JrxonrGviNjS88deKtyBnT0lSQXml-onOEmE-mgwds1cqUAsRVzGrdGyBqEAm9UObmNSqGIXXt-1aqQCMCEoItBy31LrACc8kCRpv72U0PztJgmkVDA37JKt3MqP0uJD_NMnnb0FPYVUBL3PbcGi-C0TUI9YTvpmYCa7-00iZMmQZ2fophGr_0A_Q_-IG_HxSAoMSNmYKN0s) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. body:
I'm excited to introduce you to our latest resource: "Impacting Lostness Through Prayer Calendar"

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fb6801e53a384a9ca953b425864d7fb5&_e=rBshIEUEZKeULTdGUTl2pNPMRVlID8z8CQvj-1-ImLrMLi__H2KKMhfQdGeKlOsa1GQnh9T0VzOwo5fQi14c4CJD8MQEUGVh2Xx-yYTVNJIIuNUQf7T6iUm6auSl9Kaohd8E8PSPn7j3Sf8m6AWwXFcGgEMvvjCPw92XSsT-0uxaueIN22f4vIdIndL-tJhfVYiAzbF9pkaZ72jGIDaFesyn9elReoCc3Qrktf-qB9o4Jc_HmJotgPFtg6m8JQQSbu7MijuLN6vuzpYavgw3gfXPtHG0eHIN1aUh_d712cSeNlEnUURDk-rKCy2Lk5LDU1jKkN1I-Cg98q4IH8Pn7r38N4826Am_fONkp0vejA7tNPmbQWG8PD0ggVFrY-1E)

Dear Fellow Believer,

I'm sure I'm not only speaking for myself when I say that sometimes it's easy to forget to pray -- especially for those we don't see on a daily basis.

In fact, praying for the lost across the globe can sometimes be overwhelming. Where do we start?

That's why I'm excited to introduce you to our latest resource: "Impacting Lostness Through Prayer Calendar" -- an 18-month prayer calendar crafted to empower you to pray for the least reached across the globe.

This calendar isn't just a piece of paper; it's a remarkable tool that:
* Enables you to impact the lives of individuals and communities who are in need of hearing the life-changing gospel;
* Allows you to develop a greater sense of empathy and humility for those who are lost;
* Structures a disciplined habit of prayer that can extend throughout a lifetime!

[ ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fb6801e53a384a9ca953b425864d7fb5&_e=rBshIEUEZKeULTdGUTl2pNPMRVlID8z8CQvj-1-ImLrMLi__H2KKMhfQdGeKlOsa1GQnh9T0VzOwo5fQi14c4CJD8MQEUGVh2Xx-yYTVNJIIuNUQf7T6iUm6auSl9Kaohd8E8PSPn7j3Sf8m6AWwXFcGgEMvvjCPw92XSsT-0uxaueIN22f4vIdIndL-tJhfVYiAzbF9pkaZ72jGIDaFeiUNYX59b-CH8c6MhW_19cjL1htLPTOiUk2KzCNWqgEq9DPXbuDlU5JytaxB4CkKRxd8KGTKHcitcFKLB8GlKJ1wBpY43MhE3mtBnWyEkPLuJFGXU-RgO9pguCPZjAlncafBHT1qeFyZiL0XgzSlCRLk1Ylto8DKJdtVeQisjhYG) Through this calendar, you'll receive a prayer prompt each month, guiding your prayers for those longing to hear the message of hope and salvation.

To receive your free copy of this powerful prayer tool, simply click on the link below to request it. We'll take care of the rest and mail the calendar to your doorstep.

Click on this link to secure your copy: [https://welcome.imb.org/prayercalendar23.html](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fb6801e53a384a9ca953b425864d7fb5&_e=rBshIEUEZKeULTdGUTl2pNPMRVlID8z8CQvj-1-ImLrMLi__H2KKMhfQdGeKlOsa1GQnh9T0VzOwo5fQi14c4CJD8MQEUGVh2Xx-yYTVNJIIuNUQf7T6iUm6auSl9Kaohd8E8PSPn7j3Sf8m6AWwXFcGgEMvvjCPw92XSsT-0uxaueIN22f4vIdIndL-tJhfVYiAzbF9pkaZ72jGIDaFeig8NoYQIENWRxUA-muptw-V0mUsSVM85Q6RQrsa9J7n_WLqQh3r-OhBkxW2v5ibPuc1IIJa_ptaqHSFpfrbngkedAISIrUrtqBFwVlR_t_cU6qIe3SV4Lb0JxZgoug0SQwk3bIuwO2TpbmmEgXoCDRYmWmtyMo4NE7ezjAwcHOL)

Thank you for partnering with us in this essential mission of spreading hope and love to those who need it the most. Your involvement is crucial in making a lasting impact on lostness through prayer.

With heartfelt gratitude,

Emily Hall
Prayer Content Specialist
IMB Prayer Office

Democratic Michigan Gov. Gretchen Whitmer signed a bill Monday that
prohibits individuals convicted of a misdemeanor related to domestic
violence from possessing firearms for at least eight years. The
Michigan legislature implemented bills to institute red flag laws,
more background checks and stricter storage requirements in the last
two years as mass shootings around the U.S. have been on the rise,
according to The Associated Press.

body:
It's Finally Back in Stock

# #1 Solar Gadget Can Save
Your Life In A Crisis
**This Pocket-Sized "Power Plant" Sold Out in Less
Than 48 Hours - Now It's Finally Back in Stock** [**Tested by former Navy SEAL: See it in action!**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=51c51e8b095e4d1e8f4a89c97dadbbd3&_e=jpP6u3Gqzbc1dNkRxN8h08WbXTwjXvl7rbjLX5xg0AfUSOPuZ0qbpMGTTOvHTFvBtinx958Gkd1H-MHqwkq7f7RotPTDAPsq4JO9r9JnL9_LPKffEsjw_Sy3GjcggasmJejygl-94eE2V50ym5Ugp9GrC-pn7KwwCfEC_940RFcQ6ubCja4SoQF0QftCU3Rhzm37_0g77ZBuCNVqBSp05FhB2YyxFTDSnQIhCKFtWSB9pBrQ_Y-nxDaZppp13WChNPKp46Woutqka87o1pphvJjTTlouVY1XPrBFMuzIT7PfiCIxQYT_sMUYxeRZYcG9) [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=51c51e8b095e4d1e8f4a89c97dadbbd3&_e=jpP6u3Gqzbc1dNkRxN8h08WbXTwjXvl7rbjLX5xg0AfUSOPuZ0qbpMGTTOvHTFvBtinx958Gkd1H-MHqwkq7f7RotPTDAPsq4JO9r9JnL9_LPKffEsjw_Sy3GjcggasmJejygl-94eE2V50ym5Ugp7z69JOzkfOhkfSwdfEd3amRWcZcq3YqPFveNZsyedfiTdIgu7UZi9ZjkhLhDQZvAI3-OH1_1B4fP4Nzj2YgV51Ns1cQmiYh4fQOJ7KbYkeqUml3lAjngXXPtYz8tpJePQLVY89y8m1eZKD3Xov10Smcp5d6DVeIf3en-kflCz9V) [**People are buying these in 4 packs - Learn More**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=51c51e8b095e4d1e8f4a89c97dadbbd3&_e=jpP6u3Gqzbc1dNkRxN8h08WbXTwjXvl7rbjLX5xg0AfUSOPuZ0qbpMGTTOvHTFvBtinx958Gkd1H-MHqwkq7f7RotPTDAPsq4JO9r9JnL9_LPKffEsjw_Sy3GjcggasmJejygl-94eE2V50ym5Ugp2L--kN4VgA-a5SEtz1pssnxMrG6bWOyLKpq--B2Uz7YGI8TGGmmxkIF73hQvRsI1Fq7uDciKo4pOWTEWOqG6lFoT6B3T1TLmAQmX4G8MKdWREI3LMveeYirmd5v7d8-ELvvdOpq4JSA2lR5i7r3LrprcvXs4wwFbiktgxagT1K5) Oh no. We slapped our foreheads. We had just released the Patriot Power Cell. And the response was so strong, we couldn't believe it. The launch went WAY better than expected. We sold out completely in a matter of hours. The second time, we doubled our inventory thinking that would be enough to meet demand. And then... poof! GONE! Our inventory manager was asking... _**"Why were customers getting these 2... 4... or even 12 units at a time? Were they holiday gifts? Or just incredibly useful?"**_ Since then, the Patriot Power Cell has become one of our best-selling products of all time. Wow! And after making as many as we can, we think we finally have enough to meet demand... at least for now. That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**Tested by Former Navy SEAL:
A Pocket Power Plant That's
Weather-Resistant, Has An Ultra
Bright LED Flashlight And
Charges 2 Devices At Once!**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=51c51e8b095e4d1e8f4a89c97dadbbd3&_e=jpP6u3Gqzbc1dNkRxN8h08WbXTwjXvl7rbjLX5xg0AfUSOPuZ0qbpMGTTOvHTFvBtinx958Gkd1H-MHqwkq7f7RotPTDAPsq4JO9r9JnL9_LPKffEsjw_Sy3GjcggasmJejygl-94eE2V50ym5Ugp9wYFV-8NKt5UMl35ffYHToVBAHD4F9Si1l2QMg-IKs-f0nKsSm0m1NxXWjNpzhZwmfsPVAXa4GaGIpuengbWSRJtcQSLTkML3ZAWb0bwGfgRi0kEwJ9hMpii4up0yiEbqMitVBItJ8-A-PBYPDB9OeLky1QJVjVMLFkf-q_aTXg) [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=51c51e8b095e4d1e8f4a89c97dadbbd3&_e=jpP6u3Gqzbc1dNkRxN8h08WbXTwjXvl7rbjLX5xg0AfUSOPuZ0qbpMGTTOvHTFvBtinx958Gkd1H-MHqwkq7f7RotPTDAPsq4JO9r9JnL9_LPKffEsjw_Sy3GjcggasmJejygl-94eE2V50ym5Ugp_HMiju4e3Z_K6eadvp0fh4KJYSGTq6GSWbXzHFME3kkvVrCsRzCQ274HE3qqH8_ROI4bIQHy8juJbmWaY12ggF7X4V5GuoP1JWcl4bujzYxLIPlHBUlmdMGFqf3bo0nel0td8fms-pg98ltuYg4yk9M506hUBEkvYC_VNgYWGDX) | | **Melanie D.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. They work so well, I bought eight more to give to my kids and friends for Christmas. I work outdoors a lot, so I take mine along to plug in my cell phone. They also have a flashlight on them, which comes in real handy. This is a good buy, you won't regret it.
---|---
| **Shirley C.** I'm very happy with the 4Patriots products. I've gotten the Power Cell, which is fantastic to charge my cell phone anywhere. It's rechargeable and I'm very happy with all of the 4Patriots products. And I'm very happy with Frank Bates, he's very truthful, honest and helps others in need. I really appreciate his products and his emails that I get. I'm really, really happy. I would recommend his products and him to anyone. Thank you so much.
---|---
| **Wing C.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. I know they will come in handy. Because I know people with their cell phone, saying "oh I have no battery left." And you know what? They're getting it for Christmas. That's what I'm doing for them. We live here in New York, things are quite ample here at this time, ya know. But for emergencies like that - to have your cell phone, your contact to the outside world - it's important. Thank you very much, Frank.
---|---
| **Richard G.** It's a great item for me on weekends out in the country, the swimming pool, wherever else I don't have electricity available. Oftentimes people have come out to the pool, for example, and brought their power adapter to keep their cell phones or laptops or whatever charged up. They wound up losing them. With the Power Cell, it works great to recharge in the shade and I highly recommend it. Thank you very much.
---|---
[**Click here to see it in action!**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=51c51e8b095e4d1e8f4a89c97dadbbd3&_e=jpP6u3Gqzbc1dNkRxN8h08WbXTwjXvl7rbjLX5xg0AfUSOPuZ0qbpMGTTOvHTFvBtinx958Gkd1H-MHqwkq7f7RotPTDAPsq4JO9r9JnL9_LPKffEsjw_Sy3GjcggasmJejygl-94eE2V50ym5Ugp4RP-eJrM22G-iw1cv1eaIZmi9vrDj6GDZ2P4GQfUAPyAuAmT7ekiYHXksy_izpG3DdxdT6XeNYrRByPfMfTDyYOUZPu8LmQuIAMsgQNbxijZdyyyviO1iSZNHuA9rHQkjzg6Xl5GkskwFHcgqkOtbgjISVJi_SLVV2tR3faSsHJ)

name: Emily Hall
subject: Your invitation to impact lives through prayer
body:
I'm excited to introduce you to our latest resource: "Impacting Lostness Through Prayer Calendar"

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9c22076dd6b947bfa56881d045380829&_e=5s8qYcJzoQn3L8TeIDZII6a0EqDu6wgd6RrBhcv7mEfI890qTK4ZOG_ZFNkk3ognJN3cVud1vqvLTLz4ZakjbgKKwt0wJhjgnmL1zX9c5pqJtd8bFNpA8eiwNSbV0EYU57iR-8KDDWVF9amJqwv7VC-vyKodQ9XkQh_W7OObj-FqbKJD9FvpnfAE48Nqn6WE3t6TjyftAAa45hb7KZXH2EX75aQgUJ8CKZX4IBuf1znYAdi51NuJs8Xia7eWd36BK2q1iEgAU0z--ecL-T6UYtzkKnm9RydS9HZUJIanLbUES011p15X1L6RZwgqaKY2fbkujeyqSlEBpbFYixTT8-11gcS6bgo-4kn5meQe36QjEA_DsJXSg5-GxPo1XPq2)
---
Dear Fellow Believer,

I'm sure I'm not only speaking for myself when I say that sometimes it's easy to forget to pray -- especially for those we don't see on a daily basis.

In fact, praying for the lost across the globe can sometimes be overwhelming. Where do we start?

That's why I'm excited to introduce you to our latest resource: "Impacting Lostness Through Prayer Calendar" -- an 18-month prayer calendar crafted to empower you to pray for the least reached across the globe.

This calendar isn't just a piece of paper; it's a remarkable tool that:
* Enables you to impact the lives of individuals and communities who are in need of hearing the life-changing gospel;
* Allows you to develop a greater sense of empathy and humility for those who are lost;
* Structures a disciplined habit of prayer that can extend throughout a lifetime!

clean_body: I'm excited to introduce you to our latest resource: "Impacting Lostness Through Prayer Calendar" | | | Dear Fellow Believer, I'm sure I'm not only speaking for myself when I say that sometimes it's easy to forget to pray -- especially for those we don't see on a daily basis. In fact, praying for the lost across the globe can sometimes be overwhelming. Where do we start? That's why I'm excited to introduce you to our latest resource: "Impacting Lostness Through Prayer Calendar" -- an 18-month prayer calendar crafted to empower you to pray for the least reached across the globe. This calendar isn't just a piece of paper; it's a remarkable tool that: Enables you to impact the lives of individuals and communities who are in need of hearing the life-changing gospel; Allows you to develop a greater sense of empathy and humility for those who are lost; * Structures a disciplined habit of prayer that can extend throughout a lifetime! Through this calendar, you'll receive a prayer prompt each month, guiding your prayers for those longing to hear the message of hope and salvation. To receive your free copy of this powerful prayer tool, simply click on the link below to request it. We'll take care of the rest and mail the calendar to your doorstep. Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c20812971b3837f7b6151331cce6ee1cd47d2c280471315fc3b99e2ced42fbfe258097306fabcbcf6a6db9ecf71bd7541169bce77ccc3834b9d2f0dcafeab66a

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

name: David Horowitz
subject: Barack Obama’s revolution
body:
America is on the brink of destruction.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcurqdsp3gqrrf17nu2lf10vuu7velt5bharr2go_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clge2oj1cdh2bs)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z24k0586qqa4h6npp099pp77s1gr8nulnmcmf6e0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clge2oj1cdh2bs)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z395mahmglvj5bb065ddnoflupc5dqjfi82j8rho_rp22sh2s8i6eo30clge2oj1cdh2bs)**

name: Bob MacGuffie
subject: While Our Enemies are Circling, the Democrats Applaud
body:
Campaign Update
---
| | | | | |
---
|
---
| Campaign Update
---
| |
---
| | |
---
November 21, 2023 Last week business and national leaders and economic ministers with interests in the 21 economies bordering the Pacific Rim met in their annual confab called the APEC Summit. While attendees pursued their usual networking and deal-making, clearly the main events centered around the economic gorilla of the far east - China and its supreme leader, Xi Jinping. Xi met with Joe Biden for a much-publicized half-day meeting. According to his post-meeting press conference, Biden raised China's human rights abuses, detained Americans, resuming military-to-military communications, climate change, and the illicit fentanyl pipeline. Biden characterized the discussions as "some of the most productive discussions we've had." Xi agreed to reopen military communications, promised to look into the fentanyl producers, and make moves toward implementing climate regulations by 2035 - no kidding. Meanwhile China has recently inked the following energy deals: a liquid natural gas deal with Qatar, an oil deal with Iran, and a gas pipeline with Russia. Each to be paid for in currency other than U.S. dollars. As China continues to open two new coal-fired domestic electrical generating plants per week, it's obvious what Xi thinks of climate change and carbon-free energy. He's laughing at our naivete, and propelling China's economy forward with the most cost-effective energy sources he can find. Meanwhile, since Biden stayed awake for the four-hour meeting, Democrats were applauding it as a success, and a significant step forward from their self-admitted catastrophe in Anchorage in 2021. But, as every Biden official and corporate media flak who could find a microphone touted the meeting's success, Xi's real focus and reason for attending APEC was that evening's dinner. Wednesday evening, Xi attended the main event, a dinner with 400 leading U.S. corporate, technology and financial moguls. China's economy is still struggling to emerge from the COVID pandemic it created, so top of Xi's list of needs is the technology and capital his communist regime needs to remain stably in charge of a country of 1.4 billion people. The hi-tech surveillance state that is China, is an imperative for the CCP, a party of just 90 million. A mere seven percent of the population constantly needs every available resource and advantage to keep the remaining 93 percent subservient to its brutal rule. In his ten years as China's president, Xi has established himself as the most murderous dictator since the mid-twentieth century triumvirate of Hitler, Stalin and Mao. Xi entered the dinner to a standing ovation from America's corporate elite - yep, let THAT sink in for a minute. It's not like the "China 2049" plan for global hegemony is a secret - it's been revealed in print for years... if only it would be read (and believed) in the West. It's common knowledge in the past 50 years, that most of our corporate elite seem to hold minimal, if any allegiance to the U.S., so they were predictably panting over China's markets, and access to slave and near-slave labor resources. Though most people recognize China is the source of cheap electronics, clothes and other consumer goods, many U.S. workers are realizing the entire arrangement is disadvantaging average Americans. But where are our political leaders and "representatives," who are supposed to be doing the shrewd calculations about how this impacts us long-term, and protecting the very real interests of America's middle class - yes, the ones who make this country happen every day? In an article last year, I traced how the Chinese [Flipped-the-Script](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rmZ2ykE8jwNai-FfBoT3-am77Q11la_cL0oUdeuLaC5klHjNNDCVZhGhWuqkG7w2yAMa-iQOl6Sky6dzw_eZAaAPkwsXjwERd9z9lyI9jrzNIAD_h7gC2Q9vJRLfWZ8QQAjvjuUnEYSCNOYrTyB0R-W64mCkZbd6Xyp7xJmn37kB8SpB3T1XSEebk3I20cxG3XgrCbPNuRK9C54xmRZafIFHFs1xEiWPbP0G2GLDEPg=&c=xyb6xxcoi0Zr_8p-mCAK6XnPtx5jTB2YzBuiFh7ecfKFldF4zk_i-w==&ch=wHnjCFhdTCD6dwo2THYlT9NjnrxFkHW83-pUnLhNqvM5UdSHGqJxQQ==) on successive American leaders over the past several decades. To any who doubt who holds the leverage, to name just one critical industry, our pharmaceutical industry is currently beholden to the Chinese for the manufacture of our major medicines including our antibiotics. The list is seemingly endless, from defense parts, to EV batteries, to rare earth elements. These critical resources flow to America at the CCP's pleasure. Jim Himes, as CT-4's congressional rep, is supposed to be 'representing' OUR interests. But in the case of our critical and highly sensitive relationship with China, Mr. Himes is instead representing those who gave Xi a standing ovation - after all, THEY are his campaign DONORS. In an effort to protect the zillions the business elite have at stake in China, Himes has been popularizing the term "de-risk," as the ineffective and weak alternative to "de-coupling" our economic relationship with the expanding global hegemon. I called him out on exactly this flawed strategy in my June 27th [Campaign Update](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rmZ2ykE8jwNai-FfBoT3-am77Q11la_cL0oUdeuLaC5klHjNNDCVZiWpKzQmviL_VL-aBPK_a1vGEZNstPqw-F23rpTrD9_wHZsDVfDAUfh2dodnoclyATA1lumpdU2DuVXWtNnqKGI4bECeSpkydA==&c=xyb6xxcoi0Zr_8p-mCAK6XnPtx5jTB2YzBuiFh7ecfKFldF4zk_i-w==&ch=wHnjCFhdTCD6dwo2THYlT9NjnrxFkHW83-pUnLhNqvM5UdSHGqJxQQ==). Yes Mr. Himes - we must 'DE-COUPLE,' and we can start by banning the insidious and subversive Tik-Tok CCP spy-app today! "De-risk" is nothing but a head-fake to enable the continuation of the transfer of middle-class jobs, and economic wealth and security to a self-described enemy of our country - all for the benefit of the political and financial elite. They intend to keep the gravy-train rolling at our expense. And as we can now plainly see, Jim Himes is a key congressional operative in their strategy of our managed-decline. Democrats - there is nothing to applaud about Xi Jinping!
Jim Himes is NO Moderate
The 2024 election will be a referendum on this man's failed 15-year rule.
Solid citizens can donate to retire this man right here: [DONATE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rmZ2ykE8jwNai-FfBoT3-am77Q11la_cL0oUdeuLaC5klHjNNDCVZgZSx81XXldVNbQdJOflHq_7YeiitaxOL2AeJUtN-vDhzAPlA3fH9y5U3lzt68oNDykotpFYeIAsQztKZDW_5TQ_yC70G9ndGSESwyMYJG2R-C6LZ6WeHVBD6DQgWjloxwQN-YZC_w21_tTirkwWAQQ1LdwerSiKPRG4Lw8WffBJluvronMG_sg=&c=xyb6xxcoi0Zr_8p-mCAK6XnPtx5jTB2YzBuiFh7ecfKFldF4zk_i-w==&ch=wHnjCFhdTCD6dwo2THYlT9NjnrxFkHW83-pUnLhNqvM5UdSHGqJxQQ==) It would be deeply appreciated. Please re-circulate this message to any and all who are interested...or should be. Help is on the way,
Bob MacGuffie Candidate for Congress [www.BobMacforCongress.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rmZ2ykE8jwNai-FfBoT3-am77Q11la_cL0oUdeuLaC5klHjNNDCVZuIEDzhrlpbl3IiizxukKCB_bWOiWNWP-JN1uxmC1uQ7lom_sQ3BiDPXTBiPXMJ5uBs_uYwG1PB_rcxTE6vkzOb6nZuqpcZgXRrxQ_LrziYv&c=xyb6xxcoi0Zr_8p-mCAK6XnPtx5jTB2YzBuiFh7ecfKFldF4zk_i-w==&ch=wHnjCFhdTCD6dwo2THYlT9NjnrxFkHW83-pUnLhNqvM5UdSHGqJxQQ==)
---
[DONATE ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rmZ2ykE8jwNai-FfBoT3-am77Q11la_cL0oUdeuLaC5klHjNNDCVZgZSx81XXldVNbQdJOflHq_7YeiitaxOL2AeJUtN-vDhzAPlA3fH9y5U3lzt68oNDykotpFYeIAsQztKZDW_5TQ_yC70G9ndGSESwyMYJG2R-C6LZ6WeHVBD6DQgWjloxwQN-YZC_w21_tTirkwWAQQ1LdwerSiKPRG4Lw8WffBJluvronMG_sg=&c=xyb6xxcoi0Zr_8p-mCAK6XnPtx5jTB2YzBuiFh7ecfKFldF4zk_i-w==&ch=wHnjCFhdTCD6dwo2THYlT9NjnrxFkHW83-pUnLhNqvM5UdSHGqJxQQ==)

I know you’re really busy, and you’ve probably been getting a lot of emails recently asking for money, but this isn’t like those emails. I’m not here to beg for your money. I know times are tough right now. Our leaders continue to make empty promises to the American people about making our nation better and fixing all of the issues plaguing our nation, but they haven’t been following through… → Inflation rates are sky-high → Our borders are wide open → Crime is skyrocketing → Our veterans aren’t getting the care they deserve I know that times are really hard for so many Americans, and your support for my campaign these past few months has meant the world to me. This is why I want to take a moment to truly say THANK YOU for everything you have done. Most politicians don’t even think twice about their grassroots supporters, but I’m not like them. I’m not a career politician, I’m just a Mom, Wife, Veteran, and Nurse Practitioner who ran for Congress to help make a real difference and give Americans the results they deserve. You see, I don’t have mega-million elitist donors filling my warchest or boosting my campaign. I always have and always will fully rely on the support of trusted people like you, Peter. Whether it’s giving a few bucks, joining my team, endorsing my campaign, or giving me your advice, I know that I can always rely on my supporters like you. I promise to keep up my mission on Capitol Hill and provide a better future for our children, and having you with me as we fight to make our dreams a reality means so much to me. All I’m asking today is that you keep up the good work and always have the courage to fight for our country and values! name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2cca016efed54bcf891c3d063878d0a6&_e=dztFYPiF_YhpxvLGaN7AzkjmtUvNCEr3NsPzbk9rmDHI9r0teFOekMbYtyKKQ6W8BnVGzBuI2oDmur6CI_LvER5TbAQAkYmTzzFBhJWvTwiMayLkv5TV2NiT1AsLqE2kxpRXeEXWrdTkccGR6CcXmfj8kvQhlpA2oqcjMapVejEYfeyVnmdzu14QTxPRIJ5iH_9cdZ6G5umCFoy1DhT4HRQkKwfbFt6WzzOR4U4-x29vKL7wcID2m1XjZBVLfcTyHvtDNZOAzGkLGmUM7A3RSxWJB8oCkX154Ui3is9bEdi2A4tjdobinU-P1b4Jcn3_aZeECGj-_VPDQP_NVdrs05ezdljiH6qOnWx_s0Saw3glsV5b-2qwkcYJz9a5jX8I8D8Pl84z3yVMLES4aYhTsaAiZPqWoR7PpUBpN4Q3nOE%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

clean_body: Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight." By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic " Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." Through "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry," you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life. | | Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group. You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. | | | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. # FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Dear Reader, **It wasn 't long ago that The New York Sun, one of my favorite papers, became the exclusive publisher of my columns. ** **In the short time that 's passed, the Sun's mission has become more urgent than ever.****

**It 's been obvious to many of us for some time that journalism in our country has become corrupted.

More dangerous than the ideological implication is the fact that we're left with precious few to hold our country's most powerful institutions to account. Our justice system, law enforcement, universities, major corporations and government agencies have become politicized beyond recognition and act with impunity.

**The Sun is brave and relentless**. Every day it tackles head-on the most important issues facing our country. It truly holds the powerful to account.

It acts as a true newspaper should, in the service of traditional American values and the American people.

The Sun has a long history leading the charge. Its commitment to the finest journalistic standards goes all the way back to its founding in 1833.

The Sun is now growing at a rapid pace, but we're up against some of the world's largest media conglomerates. **To win, we need you to join us**. Every single person counts.

body:
Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b97859b37e054204b47bec9c79ad07ef&_e=TAcVNa4HHawEWsK8bizOkcea0rZusqw26drLEPau8uR8zQAGvS3UUPBFIeQ_XzlvMFIXkf92YTO5OOd65sxGSACS8oBqvj0Zks3JmVcUMgjgc97sjGnXMNRaZsITht6t-4pVRSBHAQdrWDUKAMx_Nrv2sAq3Z4YCEa8O7Hr81RMEQgcKJFiRDDYfAOVSUcq63sbsguowmgNGcl-mz0c9Sum9zgYKuGJcAflTuJ9Fnpp4j3qUDo3Cpe8Hjp3VMeI5XYlG8Vko6Hlp-ahvbqWlAv7ETGJ1oh4SSFIyTPfL3G-MbNmY7jT6Fz0TZzg2trRp) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b97859b37e054204b47bec9c79ad07ef&_e=TAcVNa4HHawEWsK8bizOkcea0rZusqw26drLEPau8uR8zQAGvS3UUPBFIeQ_XzlvMFIXkf92YTO5OOd65sxGSACS8oBqvj0Zks3JmVcUMgjgc97sjGnXMNRaZsITht6t-4pVRSBHAQdrWDUKAMx_NniC9DDQGsbn5rMC2MZiewiZzavzrSM5Gw1S8NuVIFajdTssnYPOJhNpdXFeAs3PwHiDH9DFCwpATN4SJtRwHgwpS9vWIladGOgRIZ-RqPPmCSDRCYfu051YTvLvTGXdsmQeVEPhy9GAYBDjlFD208FXrN0-AcqUEi3eUMKUyXeZ) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b97859b37e054204b47bec9c79ad07ef&_e=TAcVNa4HHawEWsK8bizOkcea0rZusqw26drLEPau8uR8zQAGvS3UUPBFIeQ_XzlvMFIXkf92YTO5OOd65sxGSACS8oBqvj0Zks3JmVcUMgjgc97sjGnXMNRaZsITht6t-4pVRSBHAQdrWDUKAMx_Nh-hUMdM44J_KyDD9MCxJEfhdke1dcR3lf0Mg8SGXnoqh_fI-91i4w1ipecyYX62Td0kQUPLkymwEUAOQuKpwOjNU9FHhk9quHUkThmDjJtFcMwNP6Mqpy2aDNM-kDzbDje0zlWiWyjXdQeti4J6FuLZRtqxD63V1oW-CvLKKxeh). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b97859b37e054204b47bec9c79ad07ef&_e=TAcVNa4HHawEWsK8bizOkcea0rZusqw26drLEPau8uR8zQAGvS3UUPBFIeQ_XzlvMFIXkf92YTO5OOd65sxGSACS8oBqvj0Zks3JmVcUMgjgc97sjGnXMNRaZsITht6t-4pVRSBHAQdrWDUKAMx_Nio4TLcR8o5hjb5Om9MijzqAmpU046wf2GIjXZW1B4GAkntim99vpm-oVvEhv4bRgc9-VU5sLDikLFop33imjiY-r90HQk4IWrT3eT400AQ1jYDQRdc_Za3-kwpPTJD0TparIhaBOXpc7BELhpADXXjurtc9SFpQx2IzWdU64txs)

FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs... FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. And then BOOM! Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out. Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. But that's not why this generator is going viral... National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months! Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, "Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse." Despite this clear and present danger... Our Government is Woefully Unprepared They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator. Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and without gas, fumes or noise. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the . THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever. And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on Fox & Friends... And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now. Demand is surging... "It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE." Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

Maggie Haberman Says She Heard It’s A ‘Possibility’ Tucker Could Be
Trump’s VP Selection

A New York Times reporter said Monday she heard that former President
Donald Trump could pick Tucker Carlson as his running mate for the
2024 election. Political correspondent Maggie Haberman said during an
interview on the Dispatch podcast that Trump was planning to assemble
loyalists for a potential administration should he win the upcoming
presidential election.

Many arrogant, elitist elected officials crushed our way of life during the misguided, unnecessary and deadly lockdowns. Now it’s time to hold them accountable for their actions, ignorance and negligence. The tide is turning, and today is only STEP ONE!

This year’s elections provide a can’t-miss opportunity to support small businesses and families with fiscally responsible policies, restore an education system that puts students and parents over the radical agenda of the NJEA elites, and protect and preserve our civil, economic, and medical liberty.
We believe that our government should serve the people and provide the expected services that we’re paying for! It’s time for government to function as a public service, not a propaganda tool for radicals.
We believe in REDUCING tax burdens on working families AND empowering the skilled trades and small businesses.
We believe our schools should reject Critical Race Theory and the sexualized curricula. It’s time to empower parents and stop the NJEA once and for all.
I hope you’ll join me TODAY as we discuss the results of this year’s critical elections.
If you want to stand with me against the out-of-touch career politicians who are taking New Jersey down the wrong path and help restore Common Sense, you’re in the right place!Please join me during my show tonight, call in to share your thoughts, and watch the results of this year’s elections live as they come in!
Together, we can keep working to restore Common Sense and save New Jersey and America.
Thank you,Bill Spadea

Republican Attorney General Ken Paxton of Texas announced a fraud
probe into Media Matters for America Monday night. Paxton launched the
probe into the left-wing media non-profit after it released a report
Thursday claiming that advertisements for major companies regularly
showed up next to posts from neo-Nazis and white supremacists,

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0995c3d90be745b9977d5437e7f42196&_e=wK9sI1muMHchMuGQ8M6NUTY5haFJSMoOD394ET4juALCSCqSNwoSIrL9ghU7beiyxiukAzDWtk-VO4B4DRUrKSKFvfGWGM74W-yYqE7v9Ovdfgtq6zSRIK-VM91l91GuCQedDlcyXmxpCTBgfDQoaqRgTtibxKQadHnhs_9X8J3mS39VV_FyvS-8ooQB0PzalZDbkfskzxOXClgTg655X09KI1Iuf1FzLGd6vLX_JgUC3pTkwDN_nkZCy37qDJkE7GAQiBfBQ5TKLVcUDhar0Tl682EnYDlsxA3a4hoZCb559nMzYVW7pZPovWyhFNerm3Vxr3tdLXlecJ7sgoRw2RDub4R9JO4NG8sFT3ZB9_3s4zW2qQraLR6cumSoxUVLqqJlNbuwxLDt04isg6_jvSnbnMFs0ooqDYtuXyVCLsQ%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0995c3d90be745b9977d5437e7f42196&_e=wK9sI1muMHchMuGQ8M6NUTY5haFJSMoOD394ET4juALCSCqSNwoSIrL9ghU7beiyxiukAzDWtk-VO4B4DRUrKSKFvfGWGM74W-yYqE7v9Ovdfgtq6zSRIK-VM91l91GuCQedDlcyXmxpCTBgfDQoaqRgTtibxKQadHnhs_9X8J3mS39VV_FyvS-8ooQB0PzalZDbkfskzxOXClgTg655X09KI1Iuf1FzLGd6vLX_JgUC3pTkwDN_nkZCy37qDJkEELBsXfSqAywD2Epq961OogdSgPYqqmTKSXz2foBAn2YJboOY-1VZ9DXCUfxIimd76f6eMhywPNhOQY7JTpfD09g2CVPNp7sDF-c5Qk0zxFW43OFLcAsF4tgxzypiK6cPlswvVDn99_nGarLWsUl47v-_8i6MjdLE913qyhIG_jc%3D)
---
| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0995c3d90be745b9977d5437e7f42196&_e=wK9sI1muMHchMuGQ8M6NUTY5haFJSMoOD394ET4juALCSCqSNwoSIrL9ghU7beiyxiukAzDWtk-VO4B4DRUrKSKFvfGWGM74W-yYqE7v9Ovdfgtq6zSRIK-VM91l91GuCQedDlcyXmxpCTBgfDQoaqRgTtibxKQadHnhs_9X8J3mS39VV_FyvS-8ooQB0PzalZDbkfskzxOXClgTg655X09KI1Iuf1FzLGd6vLX_JgUC3pTkwDN_nkZCy37qDJkEJLQ5M_-RHejP9dIYbaQ3RsdokJMC7sU69jIcqPrLh7Fhasdj5IMJyItfuXorTKfVYm24M3_AiEhtTp2njQZHvaIP_l6SVQ0G6l_WDt1DBPiWxqA8oQkdWDeHAtJf7cxaP2u7VYHlUZg4fx6xvlom5QTknew837KEysAWV3yicUs%3D)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: KEEP THE BIDEN DOJ ACCOUNTABLE
subject: Is Joe Biden rigging the rules?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter, From the persecution of concerned parents to the sham trial of President Trump, our “Department of Justice” doesn’t seem to be concerned with justice at all.

Instead, Joe Biden has rigged it to silence conservatives and take down his political enemies.

There’s a two-tiered justice system: one for America First conservatives and one for Joe Biden’s friends and family.

name: Restore Our Nation
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yc39g2QrZVW7vabO0f6DVw~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yc39g2QrZVW7vabO0f6DVw~~/AARclAA~~~)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yc39g2QrZVW7vabO0f6DVw~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yc39g2QrZVW7vabO0f6DVw~~/AARclAA~~~).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: April Cao
subject: Being a military spouse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
| | | [](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=eec2ff71a15f45139ebf01978081deda&_e=nqkgo_TfBh08288D3F5dKCbD9KYvWVOXUAxcF0HTPE0aoOQOe8X1F2XqIbLWY39LI9LJyRJYIvdf7NdQSJCZ5WQk9MhyngooV5oomrv2F548dA1hY93cTNzM9BSxR3G-e4IkoBDvpG_jPmXxuujgYVsrHQVKnIqMt2LttI6dgWAByEZNXcDkhIXvW9__XoNQRGLHk0fw2xUsqHM5qE1RyiNOwHPkfm2hkFkR8BdIDkC8j_7dQKDUjnKHeLSGlz2hr2kNa-Ic9_3yYEtY5__WzglDiSXK7cxBDcWxokQ4gw0YBemxFm1MNJp8s02N4Ans1Cl7y5Yi_LNMcoQ6nKpZuaq1J7jWWJbgZBjeldhr0Vgqg0an9esvvWSc1wSpXZ6G)
---
| | Peter, Being a military spouse was hard. Hung and I stayed together through two decades of deployments to the Middle East and Africa. I’m not going to lie, it was difficult having a loved one on the front lines in some of the most dangerous places on the planet. But I knew the sacrifices were worth it because he was keeping the enemy at bay so our children would be safe at home. Today, the fight for our children’s future looks a little different. After 25 years, Hung traded his Navy uniform for a polo and jeans. Now, his travels take him across our Commonwealth, not across the world. And instead of taking command on the battlefield, he’s listening to the needs and concerns of Virginia voters. **[Hung is running for U.S. Senate because he sees the radical Left trying to make our sacrifice as a military family be in vain. ](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=eec2ff71a15f45139ebf01978081deda&_e=nqkgo_TfBh08288D3F5dKCbD9KYvWVOXUAxcF0HTPE0aoOQOe8X1F2XqIbLWY39LI9LJyRJYIvdf7NdQSJCZ5WQk9MhyngooV5oomrv2F548dA1hY93cTNzM9BSxR3G-e4IkoBDvpG_jPmXxuujgYVsrHQVKnIqMt2LttI6dgWAByEZNXcDkhIXvW9__XoNQRGLHk0fw2xUsqHM5qE1RyiNOwHPkfm2hkFkR8BdIDkAgNFNmOCNtkOXyz3J5osp8A3-3VSM_1DYEtdDoTKWkdSwvkMCTk1-gONlD9k-CfDWnVkik7HZ2y7QZh9FmmydeKmZDQKmQUt6QO9fFAGSG0H93oU33i_-MQC86nYbcUwNFecnXLRy8HNzRZHZd0w0A)**
---
[**STAND WITH HUNG **](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=eec2ff71a15f45139ebf01978081deda&_e=nqkgo_TfBh08288D3F5dKCbD9KYvWVOXUAxcF0HTPE0aoOQOe8X1F2XqIbLWY39LI9LJyRJYIvdf7NdQSJCZ5WQk9MhyngooV5oomrv2F548dA1hY93cTNzM9BSxR3G-e4IkoBDvpG_jPmXxuujgYVsrHQVKnIqMt2LttI6dgWAByEZNXcDkhIXvW9__XoNQRGLHk0fw2xUsqHM5qE1RyiNOwHPkfm2hkFkR8BdIDkABUm9Q2BT6EjILGvLwp1MhTtRpDPEG_NfiaK6pYD3ofzS4Xxp6PnRQmE2aCxRQ7iUsagwTBCjMLv1vgzvCx5j-x0AYK0FV4AxycwdHKDRFfMm6IG4WjHxpDJh1GewO5S8e89fgybiZ_IUFOnwzDIsP)
---
They’re cheering on the same enemies he fought to protect us from. They’re trying to eradicate free speech and they’re turning our schools into institutions more focused on indoctrination than teaching them to be productive members of society through excellence in math, reading, and writing. Everything Hung, and all of our veterans, fought for is on the line and right now he needs your help. Democrats are doing everything they can to attack him because they know he is the ONLY person who can flip Virginia RED. The Left is prepared to unleash millions on him, and as a newcomer to the political scene, he can’t call on mega-donors with the push of a button. That’s where you come in.
---
Thank You,
---
April Cao

name: Ronna McDaniel
subject: ’m personally counting on you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
I’m pleading for your help. And need your response immediately >>>| | | Peter, I have a personal favor to ask of you. November is notoriously a hard month to fundraise. We’re already starting to see our numbers dip. If our fundraising numbers fall anymore this month, we won’t be able to hit our November fundraising objective. **As we dug further, it became clear that if we miss November’s deadline we won’t have the resources to defeat Joe Biden and the Democrats in 2024.** I’ll be straight with you, we can’t afford to have a slow November. We need to start planning and building the infrastructure necessary to back up our Republican candidates. That’s why I’m coming to you, Peter, with an urgent personal request. **[We’ve gone through the numbers and if just 104 patriots like you step up with a small contribution of $5 or $10 by our mid-month fundraising deadline, we’ll get back on track to hitting our November fundraising target.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7e4318a8a4ec451aa36f3db7d9055a77&_e=RV5pXX6eGeAxZEslJgbOUzjbYcr9TrFik38wfpIZVGkOMjGZbLrS5tWOG-mE1gJ2mphiAkQufjf0bNQ_ifuuCWqq-oF2c2P-lW8ZbsFQ0gpWbhvrpMCZ1_8oe6gOTXEp1tv7FIq48GM6XeGp8bSULiQHybgwkGSiUNL59KQ9URZQYqL-_UsZKEWVSrfQ_GcccU_0kO9_xwn5wrGCTXArf0jOgfRIcfAY1Q8XByPXwzZIO_CBp1MOtenIXHf6VtUixwCypVv4DruMzMVJZyzCBEXc6f7BUAVc6uYTargiVEXVSCaFSEiZ2puZtx9TglCW7iBOMIP8r50rcgfCd6pIeb2AMEhSb3YuPfTCuhuaWzEVZOTL1Q_TH4gemGx-uzQzNljVAUfblHcbuxLGEVMCQKQYnWJ8tGA2VdTao5DKxzegwscXqtJFpds3b2aCFqOjcXvvJYzS0ZmqW3dyHMCv-8Nd6e4kQPhd4EZP5DnWe_w%3D)**
---
[DONATE >>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7e4318a8a4ec451aa36f3db7d9055a77&_e=RV5pXX6eGeAxZEslJgbOUzjbYcr9TrFik38wfpIZVGkOMjGZbLrS5tWOG-mE1gJ2mphiAkQufjf0bNQ_ifuuCWqq-oF2c2P-lW8ZbsFQ0gpWbhvrpMCZ1_8oe6gOTXEp1tv7FIq48GM6XeGp8bSULiQHybgwkGSiUNL59KQ9URZQYqL-_UsZKEWVSrfQ_GcccU_0kO9_xwn5wrGCTXArf0jOgfRIcfAY1Q8XByPXwzZIO_CBp1MOtenIXHf6VtUixwCypVv4DruMzMVJZyzCBEXc6f7BUAVc6uYTargiVEXVSCaFSEiZ2puZtx9TglCW7iBOMIP8r50rcgfCd6pIeehnxFCUDImfh0ZNRN31fBUbu0DRISTywr7_EnmAC2RfUhCwkOMXzbNL5vUekidJTQInZUUvH8CoLzAXQt9GUwyLdAWTWhpQmR3r0zJEeTrJbdeCBO3KaXimGZOE2sB2K-RHeW-t545wCLZGIfYemQE%3D)
---
I can’t emphasize enough how important hitting our mid-month fundraising is. Polls show we have a 50-50 chance to retake the White House in 2024. If we come up short right now, we’re giving the Democrats a significant advantage in that fight. **[So please, I’m personally asking you to be among the 104 patriots who step up and make an urgently needed contribution to put us back on track to securing victory in 2024.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7e4318a8a4ec451aa36f3db7d9055a77&_e=RV5pXX6eGeAxZEslJgbOUzjbYcr9TrFik38wfpIZVGkOMjGZbLrS5tWOG-mE1gJ2mphiAkQufjf0bNQ_ifuuCWqq-oF2c2P-lW8ZbsFQ0gpWbhvrpMCZ1_8oe6gOTXEp1tv7FIq48GM6XeGp8bSULiQHybgwkGSiUNL59KQ9URZQYqL-_UsZKEWVSrfQ_GcccU_0kO9_xwn5wrGCTXArf0jOgfRIcfAY1Q8XByPXwzZIO_CBp1MOtenIXHf6VtUixwCypVv4DruMzMVJZyzCBEXc6f7BUAVc6uYTargiVEXVSCaFSEiZ2puZtx9TglCW7iBOMIP8r50rcgfCd6pIeQsdL2vLL6tRKgYwZDwXxmZbesLRdSPvvHeMeCXyrMqQbV2vkrOk95PwTQVmkE9_X3_WgNcKRGDXQC5_N23nY-2Ei8nJCWIRuGCAZregwIcAn4duBMXdDhyz5jF5hdCeEi8byTLqD69fS7IQNPsUgAY%3D)**
---
[DONATE >>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7e4318a8a4ec451aa36f3db7d9055a77&_e=RV5pXX6eGeAxZEslJgbOUzjbYcr9TrFik38wfpIZVGkOMjGZbLrS5tWOG-mE1gJ2mphiAkQufjf0bNQ_ifuuCWqq-oF2c2P-lW8ZbsFQ0gpWbhvrpMCZ1_8oe6gOTXEp1tv7FIq48GM6XeGp8bSULiQHybgwkGSiUNL59KQ9URZQYqL-_UsZKEWVSrfQ_GcccU_0kO9_xwn5wrGCTXArf0jOgfRIcfAY1Q8XByPXwzZIO_CBp1MOtenIXHf6VtUixwCypVv4DruMzMVJZyzCBEXc6f7BUAVc6uYTargiVEXVSCaFSEiZ2puZtx9TglCW7iBOMIP8r50rcgfCd6pIee6FZJV7fplgSBbooP4ZSe7KR94KbE1wNlQ8HxmYSB6oJvSG_xQYcEaOvNUufiYTB10M1_GpYe2kWk-0AT9Uyrxqzp028cswdX1ddpdQ3M3LacZb1sKo_zykMiA_neFa5iYYxTsUFEobPfNb3e9-cxY%3D)
---
We’ve set an aggressive target, but that’s only because the Democrats have an endless bank account to pump dark money into key battleground states. **[Your $5 or $10 investment will be immediately put to use in building aggressive campaigns in MUST-WIN states. Can I personally count on you?](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7e4318a8a4ec451aa36f3db7d9055a77&_e=RV5pXX6eGeAxZEslJgbOUzjbYcr9TrFik38wfpIZVGkOMjGZbLrS5tWOG-mE1gJ2mphiAkQufjf0bNQ_ifuuCWqq-oF2c2P-lW8ZbsFQ0gpWbhvrpMCZ1_8oe6gOTXEp1tv7FIq48GM6XeGp8bSULiQHybgwkGSiUNL59KQ9URZQYqL-_UsZKEWVSrfQ_GcccU_0kO9_xwn5wrGCTXArf0jOgfRIcfAY1Q8XByPXwzZIO_CBp1MOtenIXHf6VtUixwCypVv4DruMzMVJZyzCBEXc6f7BUAVc6uYTargiVEXVSCaFSEiZ2puZtx9TglCW7iBOMIP8r50rcgfCd6pIeeFhoA8heWMiKTZ0U0dF2rwR7ltiOyGPaMlRBMieuRZjoOkpOOGgCo-IdSUmrY_OCSCjwcHyGF4XIShUbo4igIchhUrre0XhFmWOuAcz1JvpO4IC1XhxaSbDOU18HB97RKuhDbq54uMWqd_GwZkwb9g%3D)** Thank you and God bless,

clean_body: I’m pleading for your help. And need your response immediately >>>| | | Peter, I have a personal favor to ask of you. November is notoriously a hard month to fundraise. We’re already starting to see our numbers dip. If our fundraising numbers fall anymore this month, we won’t be able to hit our November fundraising objective. As we dug further, it became clear that if we miss November’s deadline we won’t have the resources to defeat Joe Biden and the Democrats in 2024. I’ll be straight with you, we can’t afford to have a slow November. We need to start planning and building the infrastructure necessary to back up our Republican candidates. That’s why I’m coming to you, Peter, with an urgent personal request. I can’t emphasize enough how important hitting our mid-month fundraising is. Polls show we have a 50-50 chance to retake the White House in 2024. If we come up short right now, we’re giving the Democrats a significant advantage in that fight. We’ve set an aggressive target, but that’s only because the Democrats have an endless bank account to pump dark money into key battleground states. Thank you and God bless, | | | | | Ronna McDaniel Chairwoman, Republican National Committee Paid for by the Republican National Committee. Not Authorized By Any Candidate Or Candidate's Committee. .

a MAJOR step forward >>>

**BREAKING FROM POLITICO:**
**_Biden administration proposes to close loophole on background checks_**
Friend: President Biden, Sen. Gillibrand and other Democratic leaders are fighting to expand background checks and protect communities nationwide from gun violence. **_But they need grassroots activists like you to stand with them._**
**[Please, will you add your name before 11:59 p.m. tonight to show your support for background checks? We're counting on 10,000 activists to add their names!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73736803/439460827/60479375?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=10&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4585-su-nd&refcode=jtk4585-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTNhZTcxZS03OTg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=47buJrc0Jjmb1aTeV1TNEJUbTeSbIMFBZwVSy5IBPhY=&emci=de413cce-e983-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=b13ae71e-7988-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=7659029)**

Friend, America is in the midst of a gun violence epidemic. There have been over 600 mass shootings in 2023 _alone_. Our children and communities are living in fear of gun assailants and violence every day. **But it doesn't have to be this way.**
There are simple gun safety reforms that _we know_ will curb gun violence and make our communities safer. The vast majority of Americans support basic reforms like expanded background checks.
Gun safety legislation shouldn't be a partisan issue. It's about protecting communities and preventing senseless deaths. But the far-right gun lobby is spending MILLIONS each year to stop commonsense legislation from becoming the law of the land. And each year, the cycle of mass shootings and violence continues.
That's why Democrats are fighting to finally make a change and pass universal background checks! **This would be a major step forward to a safer future — and we're counting on grassroots activists like you to join these Democratic leaders in standing up to the gun lobby.[_Please, will you add your name before midnight tonight to show your support for expanded background checks?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73736805/439460854/60479375?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=10&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4585-su-nd&refcode=jtk4585-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTNhZTcxZS03OTg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=47buJrc0Jjmb1aTeV1TNEJUbTeSbIMFBZwVSy5IBPhY=&emci=de413cce-e983-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=b13ae71e-7988-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=7659029)**

As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73736808/439460860/1575385346?code=jtk4585-su-nd&refcode=jtk4585-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTNhZTcxZS03OTg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=47buJrc0Jjmb1aTeV1TNEJUbTeSbIMFBZwVSy5IBPhY=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73736809/439460861/1575385346?code=jtk4585-su-nd&refcode=jtk4585-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTNhZTcxZS03OTg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=47buJrc0Jjmb1aTeV1TNEJUbTeSbIMFBZwVSy5IBPhY=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand
