clean_body: a MAJOR step forward >>> | | | BREAKING FROM POLITICO: Biden administration proposes to close loophole on background checks Friend: President Biden, Sen. Gillibrand and other Democratic leaders are fighting to expand background checks and protect communities nationwide from gun violence. But they need grassroots activists like you to stand with them. | | Friend, America is in the midst of a gun violence epidemic. There have been over 600 mass shootings in 2023 alone. Our children and communities are living in fear of gun assailants and violence every day. But it doesn't have to be this way. There are simple gun safety reforms that we know will curb gun violence and make our communities safer. The vast majority of Americans support basic reforms like expanded background checks. Gun safety legislation shouldn't be a partisan issue. It's about protecting communities and preventing senseless deaths. But the far-right gun lobby is spending MILLIONS each year to stop commonsense legislation from becoming the law of the land. And each year, the cycle of mass shootings and violence continues. That's why Democrats are fighting to finally make a change and pass universal background checks! This would be a major step forward to a safer future — and we're counting on grassroots activists like you to join these Democratic leaders in standing up to the gun lobby. | | | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairman=20Eric=20Underwood?=
subject: ☕Coffee w/ the Chairman
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
Short & Sweet(ner) | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ne.gop/n41kepo7ku-12663945?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=0500686021&e=25844e23a8)
---
| |
#### Good Morning Republicans,

I am often told (mostly by my children of ages 6-16) that I talk too much. This verbal diatribe of thought and opinion MIGHT, just maybe, translate over into the written form as well. So, for this week, I will endeavor to be brief and begin a transition into the 2024 Political and Legislative Vision and our ability for success. Over the last several "Coffee" emails, I've tried to broaden the context of politics outside of the typical narratives concerning the Republican Party of Nebraska. I believe you can't show a new vision without context and truth. Truth hurts sometimes and can be painful to grow through. Although some in our party may never come to this belief of my intentions, I will continually strive to build a bridge for all members to feel welcomed. I envision this bridge...with our [Constitution](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=20b8a937a5&e=25844e23a8) as the framework, our [Platform Values](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=5b2062a5a5&e=25844e23a8) as the planks on which we stand, and the stability is grounded in a firm foundation of our Faith in the Word. I am amazingly blessed by those who already stand on this bridge and even more so...the Party, the membership of this Party...the People, are blessed by the talents of so many like-minded servant leaders who volunteer their time.

We remember that the [NEGOP Constitution](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=9078db39bf&e=25844e23a8) lays out that membership is Republicans _who desire to support the objectives of the Party_. The **objectives of our Party is the maintenance the government of, by, and for the people and to further our principles** (within the communities). I have found that our greatest challenge in finding __**stability**__ as a party is understanding and communicating our [principles](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=7b6c90d1e4&e=25844e23a8). Our second challenge is seeing the necessity to increase _**healthy conversations**_ around the implementation of the principles and NOT which one is of greatest priority. It makes absolutely NO SENSE to me that the entire leadership of the party (from NEGOP elected leaders to elected officials) don't come TOGETHER and coordinate TOGETHER our implementation of our SHARED values. **What the HECK is holding us back?!?** I hear the message of "compromise" **ALL** the time and goes something like..."Can't we agree on 80% of the values or agree 85% of the time?" However, what follows is never _**pro-active** EXAMPLES_ of what the 80%-85% represents so we can all be on the same playbook. **We REACT with frustration and disappointment to the 15%-20% failed implementation of our SHARED values when ALL LEADERS are not _invited_ to have input.** AND, to be absolutely blunt, how can we ever show stability when our standards shift 20% of the time based on whichever way the political winds shift?!? Political personalities are impacting our effectiveness and our Values suffer (along with the good people of Nebraska who have entrusted leaders by ELECTING them). We RARELY examine, discuss, communicate and promote the EXACT values of the party. What EXACTLY is the WRITTEN and DOCUMENTED [Platform Value](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=1ce878a1fd&e=25844e23a8) that we disagree on?

I believe the Republican Party has THREE inherent categorical sets of principles: [Social, Fiscal, & Governmental](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=8ff246b7c4&e=25844e23a8). Some of our values blend between the categories, such as the government responsibility to fix and maintain roads, comes under infrastructure but must also be done with a mindset of fiscal responsibility. Education can fall under the **Governmental responsibility** that is supposed to be accomplished in the most **Fiscally responsible** way utilizing tax payers dollars, AND focuses on the BASICS of educating our youth to be **productive members of society** , not socially/emotionally indoctrinating or explicitly providing sexual intercourse training. _Sarcastic Side note: I can't imagine how society procreated and baby boomed over the last bazillion years without public school systems incorporating that into the education curriculum._🤔 What concerns me is that we, as a Party, divide based upon some **subjective balance** with the Social Values such as Pro-Life, or gender trends, or Safe Spaces, or Public School curriculum's, to AVOID losing an election. Meaning, we must compromise our Social Values...which equates to our morals, in order to WIN an election and have the opportunities to prioritize our Fiscal or Governmental Values...which often times equate to money and profit.

This is where the people of the Party have to make their stand. If we (and I mean ALL, when I say WE) don't have a collective conversation about our principles, articulate them passionately but with a common sense context, then our opposition will control that narrative. **It's time to be an unapologetic REPUBLICAN!** It's time to be an educated and proactive _[Constitutional](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=7456744843&e=25844e23a8) and [Platform](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=2654cd5f93&e=25844e23a8) Republican_ (CPR). As a CPR, you will breathe life into our message and the voters will believe again in the party as a WHOLE. Yes, we at some point have to become WHOLE again. Built on a stable foundation of strong county parties creating engagement opportunities for Values and CPR's to connect to the local constituents. The best avenue for communication is the county events, gatherings, meetings, fundraisers and most importantly and EFFECTIVELY at the door of the Nebraska voter. Because then the connection with the Voter revolves around THEM and THEIR needs and not us PROJECTING onto them a palm card worth of potentially unfulfilled political promises.

We represent the Nebraska 'Good Life'.
We represent life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.
We represent the light of Christ which is what the hurting and hopeless need now.

The NEGOP has achievable goals to connect our [Values](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=9f952e7a5e&e=25844e23a8) to Voters. The **2024 Voter Involvement Plan** is a program designed to engage and involve Republican voters with our CPR candidates. Not all areas will be accomplished and some have a greater level of impact...but we have to begin now. **This takes ALL of us to make it achievable!** Begin now by making the choice to run for political office...your state and county party are READY to provide you the resources to win.
Begin now by seeking others to run in local races for school board, educational service units, power/utility boards, natural resource districts, city councils, or county seats.
Begin now by taking your organizational or financial skills to a candidate and become a Campaign Manager or Event Planner/Treasurer.
Whatever you do...DON'T wait for someone else. You are who God is calling to make a difference.

[900 DEMOCRATS](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=340fa5af76&e=25844e23a8) are controlling your school systems, your taxing authorities, your electric boards, your higher education like UNL and Community Colleges...these LOCAL races are WINNABLE by YOU! You can no longer wait for legislation or federal or presidential change TO change your local politics. Local changes LOCAL...you or someone you know is meant for a time such as this.
[](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=ccae487c52&e=25844e23a8)
To the extent I can, I will endeavor to connect County Party's and Candidates to you through my coffee emails. Please see below for upcoming county events or candidate announcements.

Maybe I should start doing a Word Count?😆🤔

The truth shall set us free.

With much blessings,
---
|
---
| –Chairman Underwood
---
|
---
|

Any county's endorsement of candidates at any time are NOT subsequent endorsements by the governing bodies of the NEGOP. The order of content is based on first come and attempted to maintain chronological order to the upcoming week's events.}_

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0dfd7efc324345a68f0c0e900bd62436&_e=wgrq2w_JUe0r1V2V7k1mHmOY6ei7XcvwpXQHbU4p_m_8W97hjhfDsFQ2UItroupUND9717HFXaHovlaUUu-aT5kx8ACxlL1Hzy1-1Gkq301HQhIeT8r7XqUzfx6nr9hn8OTA9Xc8GgW_rAF62WoMpfOOsgJjPydt-er-cADPDkQIdchJwlIevBoVBpROA5VbZq2nqASNohuL1pTSRuwC0B-D4nk_m_kh-Rx-2JOI56FC2x9dntGvdD38Q99-FNGTHK-I8hOWdbJHU6CaoU-T_Yq6y88ER7oYMY3j49iVzOfDEDfNvpKtxKM7xaVtZpohsD3ppVIZgiN8GGe3DQlo5pwKXRsWysfCIq2zMNDg5KFUMVlcdsiIYePDupv6oJBLJRXb96u6NucJZoT6X4A7z58bNK--8yqdJr7vccdd6e0%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0dfd7efc324345a68f0c0e900bd62436&_e=wgrq2w_JUe0r1V2V7k1mHmOY6ei7XcvwpXQHbU4p_m_8W97hjhfDsFQ2UItroupUND9717HFXaHovlaUUu-aT5kx8ACxlL1Hzy1-1Gkq301HQhIeT8r7XqUzfx6nr9hn8OTA9Xc8GgW_rAF62WoMpfOOsgJjPydt-er-cADPDkQIdchJwlIevBoVBpROA5VbZq2nqASNohuL1pTSRuwC0B-D4nk_m_kh-Rx-2JOI56FC2x9dntGvdD38Q99-FNGTfQBKjnqkVjRHzpjGRTZ-92QvzFv-B1jnRuer9hYv6mHhjg3uChiIlH3XZRhD8VSFGM7u5zSuaBJK0vOVKfbmQPxDYzkg6gz-GGoGfX2lpdiPOzegKydkQllQdjuOUM_hrAXsrZy8YgYGpmMVNDnw_fR496LdBsYDnlIPlETOPQc%3D)
---
| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:

clean_body: Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight." By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic " Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." Through "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry," you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life. | | Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group. You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. | | | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

Friend,

Campaign update coming your way!

We opened up an office in Iowa THIS weekend! Some of our on-the-ground team has shipped out to Iowa to finish out this stretch to the Iowa Caucus STRONG and help us go the distance!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=396a0c6c5d26241e22af313f24da411ccfc86e6d0696869b960c5d0c20ac73081e25c74ab3bc8a01dd96463a1461f0d81e93ea22e68e8efe776c89aef1de5659
Help get our new office started with a donation today!

And to make matters even better, as we finish out our 99-county "Full Grassley" tour, we've got a brand-new bus to spread the word and drive the mission! Of course, in Joe Biden's economy, we'll be looking to our team to help fill up the tank...

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=396a0c6c5d26241e22af313f24da411ccfc86e6d0696869b960c5d0c20ac73081e25c74ab3bc8a01dd96463a1461f0d81e93ea22e68e8efe776c89aef1de5659

Chip in for gas! Donate $25!

With just 1 county to go before Ron DeSantis has visited all 99 in Iowa, Team DeSantis members in cities across the state, and just 2 months until the big caucus, we are all systems go.

With your support, no stone will be left unturned!

We need your help to keep up this incredible momentum! As we close in on the biggest day we'll face yet, will you donate what you can?

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=396a0c6c5d26241e39457c5955056d4822c9090c72d427075c2c436a4c436223ee48554977caec64df7d262f491c2c44f046e03d71a700d37beb26a0bec60382

Donate $100

With this momentum, we know even more incredible weeks are coming up. We can't wait to share with you all we're able to accomplish with your support!

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=396a0c6c5d26241ebbfd5b9939656f85550e4360eff051413c9425bf814a422e3019f4f78c959fc01659ba8694991697e4f8d0e034222d6b733087728532205e

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=396a0c6c5d26241e865daf761adb0443e305cf4c22b97a7e182451152fa5235f70895700d0e84d8378e9dbea879fe5a4b4dcdebaafa83d88a0a32161285c7b08
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=396a0c6c5d26241e6ab331d2647a25e198435c5c32f30d7c86b9bf3d4dcd2698322e961d4fda867d88ae7153a61a4a2755dc4996b905b948d19a262e93adcf21
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=396a0c6c5d26241e22af313f24da411ccfc86e6d0696869b960c5d0c20ac73081e25c74ab3bc8a01dd96463a1461f0d81e93ea22e68e8efe776c89aef1de5659

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=396a0c6c5d26241e22af313f24da411ccfc86e6d0696869b960c5d0c20ac73081e25c74ab3bc8a01dd96463a1461f0d81e93ea22e68e8efe776c89aef1de5659

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. name: Jim Gaughran
subject: Reminder: Please Join Us at Foster Restaurant in Sea Cliff, NY on Monday, November 27th
body:
I know you believe, as I do, that America desperately needs reasonable gun safety reform. After my son Scott died saving 31 students in the Parkland High School massacre, I devoted my life to advancing the cause of gun safety in every way I could. I started here at home because I live in New York. Jim Gaughran took up the cause of reasonable gun safety immediately. From his first day as State Senator, Jim was a champion for passing major reforms in our state’s gun laws. Without hesitation, Jim fought hard to make the people of New York safer, and he succeeded.| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73740688/439475820/-899457644?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTk4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjZiODNiNi03ZTg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f1l_1q1UpYlNXhLypbATwURE528q1KgOJZ6Wcbfw6JY=&emci=03069570-7485-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=bf6b83b6-7e88-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=23367709)

Peter — A new poll out of UC Berkeley and the _Los Angeles Times_ shows Republican candidate Steve Garvey gaining ground among voters.

**This is exactly what the CA GOP has dreamed of — their multi-millionaire celebrity candidate is rising in the polls ahead of the all-party jungle primary, with early voting less than 100 days away.** [Rush in a split donation of $15 now between Defeat Republicans and Adam’s campaign to help us respond »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73742487/439482047/1444887750?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_231121_1_1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc4YzhiZGY2LTdmODgtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nfLB9hb6-OqdTqMEGQU6NqLLjqbo11_zn0EyUzAznxg=)

Already, MAGA Republicans have thrown every possible roadblock in Adam’s way.

Kevin McCarthy removed him from his assignment on the House Intelligence Committee.

The MAGA majority censured him in a hyper-partisan political stunt this summer under the personal threat of Donald Trump.

A California Republican congressman even introduced legislation to limit the campaign contributions Adam needs to help fight back against the GOP money machine in this U.S. Senate race.

We need to be prepared for any attempts by the GOP to elect another inexperienced, celebrity politician in California. Been there, done that. Several times in fact. And it has never worked out well.

We can’t put any dirty tricks past the GOP. We can’t discount any Republican candidate. We need all hands on deck now.

[With Adam running in 4 elections between over 30 declared candidates spanning every political party, we need all the help we can get to win this race. Can you chip in a split donation of $15 between Defeat Republicans and Adam’s campaign to help us respond to the GOP advancement in the polls and continue our efforts to reach every single voter in the Golden State?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73742515/439482074/1444887750?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_231121_1_1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc4YzhiZGY2LTdmODgtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nfLB9hb6-OqdTqMEGQU6NqLLjqbo11_zn0EyUzAznxg=)

name: Ben Wikler, Chair of WisDems
subject: the margin of victory in 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
The work we do this month...
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T27efb103-be3b-40aa-a4e6-89271a494a56/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._

|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Hi, Peter. It’s Ben Wikler — Chair of the Democratic Party of Wisconsin. This month, we mark 365 days out from Election Day 2024. I asked Blue Amp Action if I could share with you some thoughts on this critical inflection point. Right now, Republicans are making big moves in the Badger State to win in 2024 and impose their far-right, extremist ideology on Wisconsinites and the country. From hosting their first primary debate in Milwaukee to implementing a new GOP early vote program, they could win next November. We can’t let that happen, Peter . That’s why the WisDems and Blue Amp Action start this work early. **Every cycle since 2017, WisDems uses the one-year-out moment to knock doors, update our data, energize our volunteers statewide, and find the new voters we’ll need to win the following November.** We call this One Year to Win — a WisDems tradition. But Peter , it takes a lot of resources to make something like this successful and our grassroots funds are starting to run low. Our work over the next month could provide the margin of victory for 2024, which is what makes One Year To Win so important. _If we don't hit our fundraising goals, we'd have to significantly cut our capacity at this critical time and sacrifice that margin of victory._ [**That's why I'm asking you to make a $20.24 One Year to Win split donation between WisDems and Blue Amp Action. Your support will make a noticeable difference just one year out and could be the donation we need to knock that final set of doors and win in 2024 >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfb45e6dd-fb06-475c-8b64-cdb3dd527014/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

Technically, our VIP contest for my year-end reception ended the other night...
---
_..._ __But when I look at our movement’s millions and millions of incredible supporters, how could I only pick just one VIP?__

---
**So, I’ve decided to host BACK-TO-BACK receptions next month to continue the celebration of our absolute DOMINATION of Crooked Joe**** _(we’re already leading by double digits!)_**

---
And just like the first, I’ll fly one lucky winner (plus a guest of your choice) out to Florida for __FREE__ for this December 6 reception.
---
I’ll cover your hotel, you’ll get to enjoy hors d'oeuvres and refreshments on me, and we’ll even take a photo together so that you can remember this special night forever!

---

body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1185%2E552475%2EEi-tqw)
Hi Peter! It’s Gaby, Bob’s Digital Director, and I have some really exciting news...
**[The official Bob Casey for Senate merch store is OPEN!! Woohoo!](https://www.bobcasey.store/?utm_source=email)**
From ‘got maps?’ stickers to bottle openers (to open an ice-cold Yuengling – duh), we’ve got everything you need to show your support for our favorite map-lovin’ Senator, Bob Casey.
[](https://www.bobcasey.store/?utm_source=email)
_100% of Bob Casey Merchandise is proudly union-made._

body:
| Peter,

Did you see our survey? We still need to hear from you. MAGA Republicans continue to pursue the destruction of reproductive rights. The GOP will push an abortion ban as priority #1 if they increase their majority in Congress.

That’s why advocates across the country are pushing for abortion rights to be put in the hands of the American people, not politicians.

**[Do you support abortion rights being decided by voters? Show us you’re ready to join the fight by answering before midnight:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73743500/439485292/630819285?refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20231121_SV_1.2_0_3MO_campaign_NA_NA_election&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTRhNjYxMS04MTg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yjEiqHRJyRwEcoFLIyvMkMHbjijMNVl3CgMU0Jt5CHo=&emci=0a09d62d-8985-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=de4a6611-8188-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=5260669)** | | ****_******[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73743501/439485294/630819285?refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20231121_SV_1.2_0_3MO_campaign_NA_NA_election&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTRhNjYxMS04MTg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yjEiqHRJyRwEcoFLIyvMkMHbjijMNVl3CgMU0Jt5CHo=&emci=0a09d62d-8985-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=de4a6611-8188-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=5260669)******_****
---
* * *
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73743502/439485295/630819285?refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20231121_SV_1.2_0_3MO_campaign_NA_NA_election&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTRhNjYxMS04MTg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yjEiqHRJyRwEcoFLIyvMkMHbjijMNVl3CgMU0Jt5CHo=&emci=0a09d62d-8985-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=de4a6611-8188-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=5260669)
Peter, we saw monumental victories earlier this month in Ohio, Kentucky and Virginia. The voters have spoken and they overwhelmingly want reproductive freedom.

Right now, groups in Arizona, Florida, Nevada, Colorado and South Dakota are already preparing to put abortion rights measures on the ballot next year with renewed energy after the 2023 victories.

Politicians who are more interested in getting rich than serving the interests of the American people. **That's the system we need to break away from.** Republicans or Democrats, male or female, corruption cuts across all lines and we need to call it out wherever it exists.

[**Fellow American, help me defeat this broken system.**](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=fb59415ccdb240beade76196615dca27&_e=O8h2eSWKxFVoAh-NBxv798sZ5cWhO9jWlhLNK9oj6LOj_znQV1ab4saYRZLOdc2KbDghLStKEu1eEGJBB5DFYrcntzVtWYRBqJMREwVroAAi1zFRJgMFFyh9LbdzvpuXcluwQv5Pyc3GRBfseKMjiLNdPp8a-C7erMNgLUi6MCsG9PyUFAq8Ehju9CwuOP1G0d2zapGUDfMaZgstodQ8gH0u7jQS9g7yUwqB_3EvGEvXkC_zO_WvrHca90sj-icbyg1pWhCh1KKo6yzlh6FYW5LXv1PEhdyc4ybsfurCXnugUL5I1tDqY6N9ex_V66d5wefB5AXlx1l-jNofU8BvklwEQxPVP7Rzf5pH9ycI1B6TMRalwUdZ1BHzvy_DBzyk)

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=fb59415ccdb240beade76196615dca27&_e=O8h2eSWKxFVoAh-NBxv798sZ5cWhO9jWlhLNK9oj6LOj_znQV1ab4saYRZLOdc2KbDghLStKEu1eEGJBB5DFYrcntzVtWYRBqJMREwVroAAi1zFRJgMFFyh9LbdzvpuXcluwQv5Pyc3GRBfseKMjiLNdPp8a-C7erMNgLUi6MCsG9PyUFAq8Ehju9CwuOP1G0d2zapGUDfMaZgstodQ8gH0u7jQS9g7yUwqB_3EvGEsBodsMWeeHGOagCyMqoS7IpH7SQecrzkdTTUx593A1A9Z9AMPyr40GLjxQQOwX5GoHgYSknEJwIYRJmpcWX6KdQ0xCU4gEDJ_ZylbId_Ymz7QG2L9CYXDyAmAVI1h5lK0HuKqEP7vtGSU4fmsedUMb)

_This is a campaign email from Dr. Andrew Horne, Arizona orthodontist and candidate for Congress in 2024. The support of folks like you is critical to building our campaign from the ground up, but we understand if you’d rather not receive our emails. Click here to** _[unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/IHLqMXSB-0modpci13BoAg2?unsubscribedata=qlBg1DoR3xH12zatbiP6MDo3gLjf4v1cnmz1LH0Grb7Knte3IjDHE6BxfV8H4del5k9ZagmOF%2FlMsL97mIPwgOd%2Bu9M6xt9u%2BcGRfT9h3pKJEWkUatOYtyaHmjasXn77WioVbM9tibyIdD9%2BFdI9NCz2u8A1To%2Fsp441FTcxPh%2BSkrfd1eV7vuqGxD6yB9OFmVH9djh%2B2VFu6J4TU%2BxLA67uBhzmnKC4COWNbnWs5Z4B2tlsCEQlyVjPsEnNmMOwsIAFtql6eaNUNNFrXueVOeEU0jXeI5DcVn3P96Ir3l%2BWtYHhWpUYbTTcZ4Kj%2ByfrmIkA0oNnzIgYNNL9U9%2B2eoC8RKVPEGVtxdazNR7J%2FWT779dOPVcj4%2Bf83Gki0MH1Y61oPsCewvgYVenEQA2SLuXHt70G8lADsWjb%2FqebeoCd7qHeo0%2Br0jBwNi%2FzX5FM)._**_
* * *
Hi there, it’s Dr. Andrew Horne.

As a native Arizonan, born and raised right here in Maricopa County, I know exactly what makes AZ-01 so special.

That’s why I’m officially running to represent the district in Congress because we deserve a leader who will work to deliver real solutions for our community. That’s something our current representative refuses to do—instead he spends his time focused on extremist priorities.

**_[Our campaign is for and by the people. And it is powered by grassroots supporters like you. A graduate of Arizona public schools, I have my Doctorate and MBA from the University of Michigan, a Masters of Sciences from the University of Colorado, and am a small business owner.

My commitment to Arizona is what brought me back home to raise my daughter here.

I know and love this district—it’s my community. I am confident that by working together in Congress, we can bring about positive change and shape a better future for all.

My campaign is centered around equitable access to health care, combating the climate crisis, and making sure every child has access to a high quality education—free from the threat of book bans or gun violence.

It will take all of us coming together to make it happen—our district is one of the most competitive in the entire country for 2024.

**_[Every bit of support is essential, so please chip in now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73743893/439486390/-735366563?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_AH_20230812_SV_WelcomeSeries_0_1DNTL_AndrewHorne_na_na_recurring&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3MTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODdkMzdkODctODE4OC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xS2hH--3rda2bqP0RyA4qws5z-38aVdVHgpe35pfVYU=)_**

Together, I know we can continue to make this district thrive.

Thank you for your support,

clean_body: | | This is a campaign email from Dr. Andrew Horne, Arizona orthodontist and candidate for Congress in 2024. The support of folks like you is critical to building our campaign from the ground up, but we understand if you’d rather not receive our emails. Click here to . Hi there, it’s Dr. Andrew Horne. As a native Arizonan, born and raised right here in Maricopa County, I know exactly what makes AZ-01 so special. That’s why I’m officially running to represent the district in Congress because we deserve a leader who will work to deliver real solutions for our community. That’s something our current representative refuses to do—instead he spends his time focused on extremist priorities. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = A graduate of Arizona public schools, I have my Doctorate and MBA from the University of Michigan, a Masters of Sciences from the University of Colorado, and am a small business owner. My commitment to Arizona is what brought me back home to raise my daughter here. I know and love this district—it’s my community. I am confident that by working together in Congress, we can bring about positive change and shape a better future for all. My campaign is centered around equitable access to health care, combating the climate crisis, and making sure every child has access to a high quality education—free from the threat of book bans or gun violence. It will take all of us coming together to make it happen—our district is one of the most competitive in the entire country for 2024. = Together, I know we can continue to make this district thrive. Thank you for your support, Dr. Andrew Horne | = PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF ANDREW HORNE Friends of Andrew Horne 611 Pennsylvania Ave SE #192 Washington, DC, DC 20003 United States If you need to you can unsubscribe here: You can also =.

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Thank You!
body:
Our members’ support of our work underpins all we do to fight for the rule of law and against public corruption.

| | |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

I want to wish you and all those close to you a very happy and blessed Thanksgiving...
...and and I want to thank you for your interest in Judicial Watch!
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65919&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

Our members’ support of our work underpins all we do to fight for the rule of law and against public corruption.

And our work is more [urgently needed](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65919&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580) today than ever before.

_Because of our members’ support,_ Judicial Watch is America's indispensable, independent watchdog in Washington.

_Because of our members’ support,_ we continue to lead the legal charge uncovering massive Biden family corruption, and we will keep doing so whatever Congress does or does not do regarding impeachment...

_Because of our members’ support_ , we have _successfully settled_ voter-roll related lawsuits with **Colorado** , **Illinois** and **Pennsylvania** this year, and we have recently issued "warnings" to **California** and the **District of Columbia** ...

_Because of our members’ support_ , we are _exposing_ the widespread weaponization of federal agencies and the misuse of prosecutorial power by the Biden administration targeting conservatives and other political opponents...

...while every day we are also doing the vital work of using the legal system and the courts to force the release of public documents that "we the people" have a right to see!

**_In short, thanks to our members we are fighting every day for the rule of law and for accountability in government_****!**

Our members’ support is what makes it all possible.

And I would be very grateful if you would join our family of members today with [a special gift](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65919&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580) so we can keep fighting for America...and for you!

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65919&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

Please accept best wishes from our entire Judicial Watch team...we hope you have a wonderful Thanksgiving holiday...

**AND THANK YOU IN ADVANCE FOR JOINING OUR TEAM!**

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65919&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)

body:
Peter, This week, I’m especially thankful for all you do for this campaign and the entire State of Minnesota. From enacting universal school meals to codifying abortion rights into state law to putting Minnesota on the path to 100% clean energy

Peter,
This week, I’m especially thankful for all you do for this campaign and the entire State of Minnesota.
From enacting universal school meals to codifying abortion rights into state law to putting Minnesota on the path to 100% clean energy — none of our historic accomplishments this year would have been possible without you.
The special interests that spent millions of dollars to defeat us last year haven’t gone anywhere. Republicans are more motivated than ever to retake power, and every dollar you give helps us fight back.
We have less than one year to defend our DFL trifecta and save ourselves from four years of Donald Trump or any other extreme GOP candidate in the White House.
With so much at stake, we can’t afford to miss a single fundraising goal, and I was just informed that we’re trailing behind our budget target for the month.
[**Peter, with our end-of-month deadline coming up next week, I’m hoping to get caught up before folks log off for the holiday. clean_body: Peter, This week, I’m especially thankful for all you do for this campaign and the entire State of Minnesota. From enacting universal school meals to codifying abortion rights into state law to putting Minnesota on the path to 100% clean energy | = Peter, This week, I’m especially thankful for all you do for this campaign and the entire State of Minnesota. From enacting universal school meals to codifying abortion rights into state law to putting Minnesota on the path to 100% clean energy — none of our historic accomplishments this year would have been possible without you. The special interests that spent millions of dollars to defeat us last year haven’t gone anywhere. Republicans are more motivated than ever to retake power, and every dollar you give helps us fight back. We have less than one year to defend our DFL trifecta and save ourselves from four years of Donald Trump or any other extreme GOP candidate in the White House. With so much at stake, we can’t afford to miss a single fundraising goal, and I was just informed that we’re trailing behind our budget target for the month. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I want you to know I am deeply grateful for your support. Tim Walz ********=******

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/QRdmkwvv_DCsmKUVmqzBrA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnP2IGP0RmaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMTImYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBHODUxMTAxMjNfUk1fVUNOXzIwMjMxMTIxVwNzcGNCCmVVqNBcZUBVYQFSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/QRdmkwvv_DCsmKUVmqzBrA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnP2IGP0RmaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMTImYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBHODUxMTAxMjNfUk1fVUNOXzIwMjMxMTIxVwNzcGNCCmVVqNBcZUBVYQFSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/QRdmkwvv_DCsmKUVmqzBrA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnP2IGP0RmaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMTImYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBHODUxMTAxMjNfUk1fVUNOXzIwMjMxMTIxVwNzcGNCCmVVqNBcZUBVYQFSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/QRdmkwvv_DCsmKUVmqzBrA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnP2IGP0RmaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMTImYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBHODUxMTAxMjNfUk1fVUNOXzIwMjMxMTIxVwNzcGNCCmVVqNBcZUBVYQFSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

name: Debbie
subject: I'm hoping you'll let me tell you a story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
doughnuts and the American Dream 🍩
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73746772/439496118/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk360-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTM2MGFjYjItODU4OC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=m1kMdoIpvhAFcpgdu10PR0Cg88vZ3MTWV63OzjRr83Y=)
Hi there, friend, it's Debbie. If you don't know me already, I'm the Democrat running to defeat Sen. Rick Scott in Florida.
I'm about to ask you to make a donation to support my grassroots campaign. But first, I'm hoping you'll let me tell you a story about doughnuts and the American Dream. [**(If you're short on time and ready to chip in, you can click here to help me flip Florida blue!)**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73746773/439496119/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk360-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTM2MGFjYjItODU4OC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=m1kMdoIpvhAFcpgdu10PR0Cg88vZ3MTWV63OzjRr83Y=)
When I was 14 years old, my mother, my sisters, and I left our home in Ecuador in the hope of achieving our American Dream. As I adjusted to life and high school in a new country, my mom worked double shifts to support our family. But even still, it was a struggle to pay the bills and afford rent for our small, one room apartment.
When I turned 15, I got a job at a local doughnut shop. **It was hard work, but it's what my family needed to make ends meet.**
I'm not the only one who got their start in the doughnut business. When he was a young man, my opponent, Rick Scott, **_bought_** two doughnut shops.

While I was a teen making minimum wage to help keep the lights on at home, Rick Scott was an owner.

**For me, the doughnuts represent a lifeline that helped my family afford rent. ****For Rick Scott, they represent the beginning of his private corporate career.**
I went on to graduate college and become the first South American immigrant ever elected to Congress. Rick Scott went on to oversee the largest Medicare fraud in the nation’s history, amass a fortune of hundreds of millions, and buy a Senate seat.

If you ask me, our differing stories in the doughnut business make the differences between us pretty clear.
**I know we can win — and new polling data shows this race is already tied! But Rick Scott spent $64 million to buy this seat in 2018 and has already written _six-figure_ personal checks to his campaign this time around.** **[I can't win this race without your help. So please, if you have anything to spare, will you rush $5 now to defeat Rick Scott and give Floridians the leadership they deserve?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73746774/439496120/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk360-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTM2MGFjYjItODU4OC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=m1kMdoIpvhAFcpgdu10PR0Cg88vZ3MTWV63OzjRr83Y=)**

clean_body: doughnuts and the American Dream 🍩 | | | = Hi there, friend, it's Debbie. If you don't know me already, I'm the Democrat running to defeat Sen. Rick Scott in Florida. I'm about to ask you to make a donation to support my grassroots campaign. But first, I'm hoping you'll let me tell you a story about doughnuts and the American Dream. = When I was 14 years old, my mother, my sisters, and I left our home in Ecuador in the hope of achieving our American Dream. As I adjusted to life and high school in a new country, my mom worked double shifts to support our family. But even still, it was a struggle to pay the bills and afford rent for our small, one room apartment. When I turned 15, I got a job at a local doughnut shop. It was hard work, but it's what my family needed to make ends meet. I'm not the only one who got their start in the doughnut business. When he was a young man, my opponent, Rick Scott, bought two doughnut shops. While I was a teen making minimum wage to help keep the lights on at home, Rick Scott was an owner. For me, the doughnuts represent a lifeline that helped my family afford rent. For Rick Scott, they represent the beginning of his private corporate career. I went on to graduate college and become the first South American immigrant ever elected to Congress. Rick Scott went on to oversee the largest Medicare fraud in the nation’s history, amass a fortune of hundreds of millions, and buy a Senate seat. If you ask me, our differing stories in the doughnut business make the differences between us pretty clear. I know we can win — and new polling data shows this race is already tied! But Rick Scott spent $64 million to buy this seat in 2018 and has already written six-figure personal checks to his campaign this time around. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for taking the time to read this email and for all that you do to power my grassroots campaign. With gratitude and love, Debbie | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter — In case you missed it, there was a HUGE development in Louisiana: A federal appeals court set a deadline on January 15th to draw a new majority-Black Congressional district in the state. That means that the path to re-taking the House — and electing another Black member of Congress — goes straight through Louisiana this cycle. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | We can’t take this opportunity for granted. The Louisiana GOP, led by Governor-elect Jeff Landry, has a long and ruthless history of voter suppression. That’s why it’s CRITICAL that we gear up for this fight now. The path to a House majority goes straight through Louisiana. We know that Jeff Landry and the Louisiana Republicans will do everything they can to stop us, but our grassroots team mobilizing Black voters is unstoppable with you in our corner. name: Alison Esposito
subject: Liberals are just scared
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Esposito for Congress
body:
I am fighting for New York

| [ ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=30d4f9d34d074d29a97bf0c1dbbab9a9&_e=IAMVCMm5ZU1-QlzIc0Zb9Wb3Fd1y1le5l-JHrnh439Sg_fMj56DX7OJ5Ph0aGIi9R9JQ6DUjT2axVtzZLqo6TjPGPCZSwrjS7GLQ2QVItHGsVhW4300LgHw4nEZxbo5btoas1_K_ZB8MgbZa6COZdluq2-MsRlOWRJ63CR0IibHpGwI9eeKgE9497257dAqZTUXGHZG3W8Gx2sxLICZ3bRgslGS6x7YOSV3WZmH__nQVajz53Cu8YvmGiXZrAZm8qnyBJQCooTyNKB00lZ8vaz7oRlSjq7T8ypy_TjJ3kmT9m4TTZRI2rEdygYCFLsZTiBpRMlKo6MdcpPMFg3hckMz4X4Op026GHsv06aupD171KCyof7G4JAjLJEK-PG98xmRXK21RrTSfyXSlGGIoJA%3D%3D)
---
Friend, Friend, Friend,

My liberal opponent, Pat Ryan, has been shaking in his boots ever since I launched my campaign to run against him in New York's 18th Congressional District.

Did you see his recent Twitter ad calling me a MAGA extremist and asking for $5? **_Sounds like he is worried because he knows we have what it takes to beat him and flip his seat RED._** | [ **BRING THE RED WAVE** ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=30d4f9d34d074d29a97bf0c1dbbab9a9&_e=IAMVCMm5ZU1-QlzIc0Zb9Wb3Fd1y1le5l-JHrnh439Sg_fMj56DX7OJ5Ph0aGIi9R9JQ6DUjT2axVtzZLqo6TjPGPCZSwrjS7GLQ2QVItHGsVhW4300LgHw4nEZxbo5btoas1_K_ZB8MgbZa6COZdluq2-MsRlOWRJ63CR0IibHpGwI9eeKgE9497257dAqZTUXGHZG3W8Gx2sxLICZ3bVi4mg0wtaUSNnyLI0NuueXbLF84G82mjqGDzMLCzBrxj1pkkDHjtq9GVqusYIY541a49_W0RQEHH8AeHOt1JjmEa9We85dWvlsN79ALwwnfOmvSIC5TDgjhm17rvg08gaHKXkE27sIYLZoJLeUyP69iyTQ6WkWcMjDdQeJk1ncLNk7Hb4ABfjEbOXT_ufVQgQ%3D%3D)
---

I know it'll be an uphill battle, but bringing common sense to D.C. is worth fighting for. As you may have gathered, I'm not one to back down or scare easily. I've seen the worst of the worst as a cop for the NYPD, so this definitely won't stop me.

With that being said, I do need your support if we want to beat my opponent. Will you help send the message to Pat Ryan that he doesn't stand a chance because we have the momentum to win in 2024? [**If so, chip in $10 today to join the fight >>**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=30d4f9d34d074d29a97bf0c1dbbab9a9&_e=IAMVCMm5ZU1-QlzIc0Zb9Wb3Fd1y1le5l-JHrnh439Sg_fMj56DX7OJ5Ph0aGIi9R9JQ6DUjT2axVtzZLqo6TjPGPCZSwrjS7GLQ2QVItHGsVhW4300LgHw4nEZxbo5btoas1_K_ZB8MgbZa6COZdluq2-MsRlOWRJ63CR0IibHpGwI9eeKgE9497257dAqZTUXGHZG3W8Gx2sxLICZ3bRzAOHkrl--FnaJEhp_kcs6sSnIUM10mI1NFymZ41YQmZ5j7vbX9mB9u1kczzH-zUM6g15awk1_e5pHzQwmb-hmdIj9wh3WH6PY1P5g4yE_pAZViCi7U7BudRJtXEpx7lSXpotWM8L9J5bTY7YsU3amsSOu-kcS7Uk8IEJwcBcF07i3VV108mXkpdJbV7pQKdw%3D%3D)

clean_body: I am fighting for New York | Friend, Friend, Friend, My liberal opponent, Pat Ryan, has been shaking in his boots ever since I launched my campaign to run against him in New York's 18th Congressional District. Did you see his recent Twitter ad calling me a MAGA extremist and asking for $5? Sounds like he is worried because he knows we have what it takes to beat him and flip his seat RED. | I know it'll be an uphill battle, but bringing common sense to D.C. is worth fighting for. As you may have gathered, I'm not one to back down or scare easily. I've seen the worst of the worst as a cop for the NYPD, so this definitely won't stop me. With that being said, I do need your support if we want to beat my opponent. Will you help send the message to Pat Ryan that he doesn't stand a chance because we have the momentum to win in 2024? \- Alison Esposito Paid for by Esposito for Congress Copyright (C) 2023 Esposito for Congress, All rights reserved.

Friend,
Now that we are entering a MAJOR election year, I’m assembling an elite team of my top supporters – my Senate Rescue Team (SRT).
And I’m inviting you to join,**** Friend.
In fact, this is so important that I’m requesting a list of all supporters who claim their Senate Rescue Team (SRT) Membership by MIDNIGHT tonight.
Your Membership is absolutely critical to ensuring that we’re able to retake the Senate 2024 – and it could even determine the fate of our nation.

clean_body: | | | | This is our chance... Friend, Now that we are entering a MAJOR election year, I’m assembling an elite team of my top supporters – my Senate Rescue Team (SRT). And I’m inviting you to join,** Friend. In fact, this is so important that I’m requesting a list of all supporters who claim their Senate Rescue Team (SRT) Membership by MIDNIGHT tonight. Your Membership is absolutely critical to ensuring that we’re able to retake the Senate 2024 – and it could even determine the fate of our nation. Because without common sense conservatives who love this country, and the Constitution it was founded on – our country will never be the same.. This is your chance to save our great country, Friend. | We are entering one of the most critical election years of our lifetime. It’s up to us to ensure we have a strong start, that will carry us through the many challenges that we will no doubt face. But a strong start isn’t possible without your support,** Friend. So, can I count on you? | | Bill Cassidy United States Senator, Louisiana | Senator Bill Cassidy PO Box 80505, Baton Rouge, LA \-

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: CTA Nov. 21: Get ready for Thanksgiving & Christmas gift ideas
body:
| | |
---
| | It’s Thanksgiving week! I know that, like me, you’re trying to get ready for Thanksgiving. I encourage you to take it easy this week so that you can refresh and recharge for the battles ahead. Our “call to action” this week is simply a reminder about some of our good friends’ new books that we can recommend as **[Christmas gifts](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-1snH_v7g).** I’d also ask that those of you who sell products or services to **[fill out this form](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2NTY0JmlkPVQxN1VOVHNmWkp0d2tTeVRUQyJ9/Wlbkx4hh-KV7XNJIgfB3DQ).** If the items are appropriate for us to share, we will share a list and link to these products/services in an email in early December to help people shop for Christmas gifts and support fellow conservatives at the same time. That’s it for the call to action this week! Relax and enjoy family and our nation! God Bless America, Jenny Beth Martin P.S. If you do have a few extra minutes this week, please look through our petitions and make sure you’ve signed them all: **[Stand with Israel](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)** , **[Stand with Trump](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)** , and [**Commit to Vote**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.).
---
| | |
---
[CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)

|

| | Next week is **Giving Tuesday** —and this year, we're making it _**electric!**_ ⚡ If you're following Evergreen, you already know that **clean electricity is the linchpin of a decarbonized future** , and we're saying it loud and clear with our brand new sticker.

| | Next week is **Giving Tuesday** —and this year, we're making it _**electric!**_ ⚡ If you’re following Evergreen, you already know that **clean electricity is the linchpin of a decarbonized future** , and we're saying it loud and clear with our brand new sticker.

[](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5072?t=4&akid=13850%2E53494%2Epn1gpm)

| | Thanks to your help, we've had some incredible clean energy wins this year. To name just a few:
* A 100 percent clean energy standard by 2040 for Michigan
* A transmission interconnection rule that puts more clean energy on the grid
* Power sector rules in the works to reduce pollution from power plants

And we're going to keep pushing for bold policies that electrify our future. If you give between now and Giving Tuesday to support this critical work, we'll send you a limited edition **"The Future is Electric"** sticker so you can show off your support for this vision. **[CHIP IN TODAY TO GET ONE!](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5069?t=5&akid=13850%2E53494%2Epn1gpm)** Let's be real, Friend. I know your inbox is about to get pummeled with emails asking you to contribute on one of the biggest fundraising days of the year. We want to show our gratitude for your attention by offering an exclusive gift as a thank you for supporting our work to build a better future!

**[Make a contribution of $9 or more today to help grow Evergreen's movement, and we'll send you a free sticker as a thank you.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5069?t=6&akid=13850%2E53494%2Epn1gpm)**

name: Wes Moore
subject: Will you join me and support Angela Alsobrooks?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
The world needs America’s leadership now more than ever, the country needs Maryland’s leadership now more than ever, and that leader is Angela.

| Peter, I’m proud to announce my endorsement of Angela Alsobrooks for Senate right here in Maryland.
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73749376/439504851/643920936?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2023-11-21_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFhZDY1YzViLTg4ODgtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9iuMBsTiShgkMwVq4G7-jmJsQf98bkiXaccdmSjruE4=)
The world needs America’s leadership now more than ever, the country needs Maryland’s leadership now more than ever, and that leader is Angela.

For Angela, this work isn’t political. It’s personal. Angela loves Maryland because she’s lived here her whole life. Angela fights for working families because she grew up in a working family.

Angela wants every young Marylander to achieve success because she’s a working mom who would do anything for the success of her daughter.

**As Angela runs statewide for the first time, it’ll take a lot of resources early on to set the foundation to win.[_Join me today in supporting Angela for the Senate by making a split contribution toward her campaign and Fight for Progress right now._](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73749377/439504852/643920936?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2023-11-21_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFhZDY1YzViLTg4ODgtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9iuMBsTiShgkMwVq4G7-jmJsQf98bkiXaccdmSjruE4=)**
| [DONATE ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73749378/439504854/643920936?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2023-11-21_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFhZDY1YzViLTg4ODgtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9iuMBsTiShgkMwVq4G7-jmJsQf98bkiXaccdmSjruE4=)
---
When Angela puts her mind to something, she gets results, and she has the track record to prove it. This is exactly the type of senator we need in Maryland.

Angela is someone who sets out to make her community, and the whole state, a better place to live and work. Maryland deserves a senator who will work day in and day out for fair wages, affordable health care, the right to choose, and quality education for every single child in Maryland.

I am proud to endorse Angela because I know she is the best person to represent the Old Line state. I am honored to support my friend in her race for the Senate. **I am supporting her because of what she would mean for the Senate, and splitting a contribution right now between her campaign and Fight for Progress is the best way to show her Maryland is on her side.[_Your contribution will make a big difference for Angela’s campaign — split a donation between Angela and Fight for Progress today._](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73749379/439504855/643920936?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2023-11-21_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFhZDY1YzViLTg4ODgtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9iuMBsTiShgkMwVq4G7-jmJsQf98bkiXaccdmSjruE4=)**
| [DONATE ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73749380/439504856/643920936?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2023-11-21_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFhZDY1YzViLTg4ODgtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9iuMBsTiShgkMwVq4G7-jmJsQf98bkiXaccdmSjruE4=)

Elevate,
Wes Moore

clean_body: The world needs America’s leadership now more than ever, the country needs Maryland’s leadership now more than ever, and that leader is Angela. | Peter, I’m proud to announce my endorsement of Angela Alsobrooks for Senate right here in Maryland. = The world needs America’s leadership now more than ever, the country needs Maryland’s leadership now more than ever, and that leader is Angela. For Angela, this work isn’t political. It’s personal. Angela loves Maryland because she’s lived here her whole life. Angela fights for working families because she grew up in a working family. Angela wants every young Marylander to achieve success because she’s a working mom who would do anything for the success of her daughter. As Angela runs statewide for the first time, it’ll take a lot of resources early on to set the foundation to win.= | = When Angela puts her mind to something, she gets results, and she has the track record to prove it. This is exactly the type of senator we need in Maryland. Angela is someone who sets out to make her community, and the whole state, a better place to live and work. Maryland deserves a senator who will work day in and day out for fair wages, affordable health care, the right to choose, and quality education for every single child in Maryland. I am proud to endorse Angela because I know she is the best person to represent the Old Line state. I am honored to support my friend in her race for the Senate. I am supporting her because of what she would mean for the Senate, and splitting a contribution right now between her campaign and Fight for Progress is the best way to show her Maryland is on her side.= | = Elevate, Wes Moore * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. name: Ronna McDaniel
subject: My personal request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
I’m pleading for your help. And need your response immediately >>>

Friend, I have a personal favor to ask of you.

November is notoriously a hard month to fundraise. We're already starting to see our numbers dip. If our fundraising numbers fall anymore this month, we won't be able to hit our November fundraising objective.

**As we dug further, it became clear that if we miss November 's deadline we won't have the resources to defeat Joe Biden and the Democrats in 2024.** I'll be straight with you, we can't afford to have a slow November. We need to start planning and building the infrastructure necessary to back up our Republican candidates.

That's why I'm coming to you, Friend, with an urgent personal request. **[We've gone through the numbers and if just 104 patriots like you step up with a small contribution of $5 or $10 by our mid-month fundraising deadline, we'll get back on track to hitting our November fundraising target.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=43c2e9d97642402e9e3002f5c4836130&_e=1UKbVd4kkwyAIl1LwXH3578W9ES-FpNFgCDgT5yvJCXw0PvlAySHYpzMIaMaYL8azMw-03OpC17MZxpofxA34yTXBmNpq0tCxBmZ2ah5q-JN-mkftKUbK1ZuCcmEzC15h83TCmouuJD11qDe6MZo9o40ZfE8lSPxAnSr97dCNzCr1phvtXT80O7AvYnUzcragtu0Q7V2YPAXsG1DCGcji-7jF8e8W2JLwSc7c2ZvLKg8f_BjivV2AfBNn2tUp9uPM_uZo4fE0hFPGc9BjvX6APHE6t55KHFoPyc2zJkkZiJgbXrnFVVDgfqIwiOzZyKHgNJ0K0fYgc6kYE4qo8UuHa-YKi0n_I6m9IxqERHcV8kN0-qdHeBAYxdLaXl-w0M9Cldoii8HVlax6nWEUxk-iVlUjTXKqaR_DUn4J6QcEeh-h1aTv9Q2RVJPVo-BjGxMS5NMDTfRAgB5asjvqViGXrNFCURVRHpUDHvvB0LnBucSRdV2vM3E7o8BA43AmwqxyxCzX89PjL75EflAU1_uXw%3D%3D)**
