clean_body: I’m pleading for your help. And need your response immediately >>> Friend, I have a personal favor to ask of you. November is notoriously a hard month to fundraise. We're already starting to see our numbers dip. If our fundraising numbers fall anymore this month, we won't be able to hit our November fundraising objective. As we dug further, it became clear that if we miss November 's deadline we won't have the resources to defeat Joe Biden and the Democrats in 2024. I'll be straight with you, we can't afford to have a slow November. We need to start planning and building the infrastructure necessary to back up our Republican candidates. That's why I'm coming to you, Friend, with an urgent personal request. I can't emphasize enough how important hitting our mid-month fundraising is. Polls show we have a 50-50 chance to retake the White House in 2024. If we come up short right now, we're giving the Democrats a significant advantage in that fight. We've set an aggressive target, but that's only because the Democrats have an endless bank account to pump dark money into key battleground states. Thank you and God bless you, Ronna McDaniel Chairwoman, Republican National Committee Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: The ceasefire movement is only growing
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

When Justice Democrats candidates Cori Bush and Rashida Tlaib first
introduced a resolution in Congress calling for a ceasefire and release of
all hostages in Israel and Palestine, only 16 other House members had the
courage to join them.

Every member of the Squad — all people of color and mostly women — called
for a ceasefire from the very beginning, and each of them was attacked for
it. From hateful vitriol spewed by colleagues on both sides of the aisle,
to a formal censure against Rashida, to opposition ads against Summer and
Jamaal, to AIPAC announcing their plans to spend $100 million to unseat
the Squad in 2024 — the attacks were swift and ruthless.

But after weeks of growing public pressure, including ongoing marches and
peaceful protests across the country, as well as multiple polls showing an
overwhelming majority of Democratic voters in favor of a ceasefire, the
tide is turning.

Today, 41 members of Congress from all walks of life support a ceasefire,
and that list is only growing by the day. Despite the Democratic
establishment’s resistance to listen to the people they were elected to
serve and fight for the human rights of all, more and more Democratic
leaders are finding the courage to stand up to AIPAC and stand on the
right side of history in order to save innocent lives.

This is progress, but we will never forget who led and continues to lead
this fight for peace: progressive, working-class women of color.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231121.u3HPwy&refcode=em20231121-31963&amount=3&t=1001&akid=31963%2E1203867%2EFy__SV ]Justice Democrats is committed to supporting and re-electing Squad
members like Cori, Rashida, Ilhan, Summer, AOC, and Ayanna next year so
they can continue to lead the way, but we count on grassroots support from
folks like you to do it. Pitch in $3 or whatever you can to
help us defend them now and in 2024 →

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231121.u3HPwy&refcode=em20231121-31963&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=31963%2E1203867%2EFy__SV ]Contribute $3

Who knows where we would be right now without the leadership of the Squad.
Let’s do everything we can to keep them in Congress and keep making
progress.

— Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1021&akid=31963%2E1203867%2EFy__SV ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1022&akid=31963%2E1203867%2EFy__SV ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20231121-31963-footer&t=1023&refcode2=31963_1203867_Fy__SV&akid=31963%2E1203867%2EFy__SV

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=31963%2E1203867%2EFy__SV

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

# [Idaho RINOS Purge Conservatives](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=139018959&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM5MDE4OTU5LCJpYXQiOjE3MDA1ODM0ODYsImV4cCI6MTcwMzE3NTQ4NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.xCXlqGaFFxxFcF7dgAcpWHpf4W6THEbYYK9yK-gg3OI)
### Freedom Caucus members get removed from committees
| | [Andy Roth](https://substack.com/redirect/04df20a9-f2a7-4acf-bd90-754106d3e1c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| Nov 21
---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/04df20a9-f2a7-4acf-bd90-754106d3e1c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=139018959&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM5MDE4OTU5LCJpYXQiOjE3MDA1ODM0ODYsImV4cCI6MTcwMzE3NTQ4NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.xCXlqGaFFxxFcF7dgAcpWHpf4W6THEbYYK9yK-gg3OI)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZmNuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wL2lkYWhvLXJpbm9zLXB1cmdlLWNvbnNlcnZhdGl2ZXM_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1zdWJzdGFjayZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJmFjdGlvbj1yZXN0YWNrLWNvbW1lbnQmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWVtYWlsLXJlc3RhY2stY29tbWVudCZyPTFodnI2MCIsInAiOjEzOTAxODk1OSwicyI6MTQyNDYwMiwiZiI6dHJ1ZSwidSI6OTA1MDExOTIsImlhdCI6MTcwMDU4MzQ4NiwiZXhwIjoxNzAzMTc1NDg2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMCIsInN1YiI6ImxpbmstcmVkaXJlY3QifQ._pftc6at6merz4GnaHrRHy-ftOZCZY7oTrhGv1uOF9M?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/sfcn/p/idaho-rinos-purge-conservatives?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store)
---
Friends,
If there's one thing establishment Republicans hate, it's when members of their own party actually fight for limited government and Freedom Caucuses all over America have been successful in doing just that. They are so good at it, in fact, that there are several states in which our members have been kicked out of the entire Republican caucus for daring to stand up to members of their own party.
In South Carolina, members of the SC Freedom Caucus were booted from the Republican caucus for opposing a "loyalty" pledge their leadership tried to force them to sign preventing them from criticizing fellow Republicans.
In Georgia, our GAFC Vice Chairman State Senator Colton Moore got booted out of the Senate GOP caucus simply for calling for a special session of the legislature to hold Fulton County DA Fani Willis accountable for weaponizing her office against President Trump.
And now, it is happening again, this time in the state of Idaho.
Last week, two Idaho Freedom Caucus members in the Senate got removed from leadership positions on committees for criticizing RINO Senator Pro Tempore Chuck Winder.
It started nearly a month ago, when IDFC member Sen. Glenneda Zuiderveld [published](https://substack.com/redirect/10d4195f-3128-4901-9c4a-01b5fcf16780?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) a newsletter on her Substack in which she took a critical look at the corrosive power that special interests have over Idaho politicians like Winder, while also criticizing the state's spending increases and reliance on federal debt spending. It included this meme of Winder as a RINO while carrying water for the state's corporate interests.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8341ac18-50d0-46a1-97cb-01e0bf103766?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
As a result of that newsletter, Winder sent a letter to Zuiderveld telling her that she had been unilaterally stripped of her position as Vice Chair of the Health and Welfare Committee. He additionally sent a second letter to fellow Freedom Caucus member State Sen. Scott Herndon for [writing](https://substack.com/redirect/3666789e-473e-4e6c-968c-c1b02307ba55?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) a similar newsletter of his own, threatening both of them with ethics complaints if they continued to criticize him.
But it didn't end there. Freedom Caucus criticisms of Winder must have really gotten under his skin because he also sent another letter to IDFC member Sen. Brian Lenney, letting him know that he was removing him as Vice Chair of the Commerce and Human Resources Committee.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c1575dde-b714-48ab-8caa-e19c9f2d5bb8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
For the record, the three ID Freedom Caucus members are not backing down.
"Let's be clear: Senator Winder is neither my boss nor my dad. I serve the people, not Senator Winder. I remain committed to standing up for conservative principles and opposing any power play that seeks to silence and control me or my votes in the Senate," Lenney said in response.
"Regardless of what actions the leadership takes, I do not work for them; I work for the people. I will not allow intimidation to silence me," Zuiderveld said.
"I wrote an article about Idaho's state spending. Senator Chuck Winder then attempted to reprimand me for my speech. I would never apologize for this. However, Senator Winder should apologize to me for his defamatory and degrading comments." said Scott Herndon.
This is what happens in every single state where Freedom Caucuses are challenging the establishment in both parties. The status quo is so used to getting its way that the slightest hint of pushback causes them to retaliate. People like Chuck Winder couldn't care less about the people he is supposed to represent.
All they care about is power.
[Read more on the Idaho Freedom Caucus Substack.](https://substack.com/redirect/15e745ee-6575-454e-a714-0aa45811ce09?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**Illinois Democrats kill school choice.**
In our last email, I wrote about how Democrats in Illinois are allowing the state's only school choice program to expire at the end of the legislative session. Despite a valiant effort from the Illinois Freedom Caucus, the IL legislature adjourned for the rest of the year without the "Invest in Kids" program being renewed.
It truly shows just how beholden Democrat politicians are to the teachers' unions. The kids wanted their scholarships to continue but the unions didn't, therefore the Democrats doomed thousands of families to a life of failing public education with no opportunity to find something more suitable.
[Read more in the DailyWire.](https://substack.com/redirect/dc01b97a-a6ba-48cb-b089-3943c8be0f52?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**Wyoming Governor rejects Forum on green energy**
Another topic from our last email concerned Wyoming Gov. Mark Gordon going to an event at Harvard University, the bastion of leftism in our nation, and [explained](https://substack.com/redirect/e6d9faf0-cdea-4041-9699-2cd3d59a8996?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) how he wanted to make Wyoming "carbon negative."
Obviously that should be a non-starter in a state with one of the largest oil and gas industries in the country so it led to a blistering response from the Wyoming Freedom Caucus and several votes of no confidence in local Wyoming GOP committees.
Something the WYFC also did was [propose](https://substack.com/redirect/1f15bee2-9a64-4daf-9d0a-82dab44d0f80?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) a public forum so Gov. Gordon could explain to the people of Wyoming's oil industry how he wants to take away their jobs.
Naturally, he ran away from the scrutiny because that's what RINOs do, issuing a letter rejecting the offer.
**Happy Thanksgiving**
From all of us at the State Freedom Caucus Network, we hope you have a wonderful Thanksgiving with your families. We are certainly thankful for the support that we have received for our work from patriots all over America. Our supporters are the reason we get to do what we do every single day and our whole organization couldn't be more grateful for it.
**Keep fighting,**

**Andy Roth**
_President
State Freedom Caucus Network_
[DONATE](https://substack.com/redirect/2e085c7d-ab5d-4d30-ac65-17c341b9088e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation's state capitols and in your home state. clean_body: Freedom Caucus members get removed from committees | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Freedom Caucus members get removed from committees | | | Nov 21 | | | | | | | | Friends, If there's one thing establishment Republicans hate, it's when members of their own party actually fight for limited government and Freedom Caucuses all over America have been successful in doing just that. They are so good at it, in fact, that there are several states in which our members have been kicked out of the entire Republican caucus for daring to stand up to members of their own party. In South Carolina, members of the SC Freedom Caucus were booted from the Republican caucus for opposing a "loyalty" pledge their leadership tried to force them to sign preventing them from criticizing fellow Republicans. In Georgia, our GAFC Vice Chairman State Senator Colton Moore got booted out of the Senate GOP caucus simply for calling for a special session of the legislature to hold Fulton County DA Fani Willis accountable for weaponizing her office against President Trump. And now, it is happening again, this time in the state of Idaho. Last week, two Idaho Freedom Caucus members in the Senate got removed from leadership positions on committees for criticizing RINO Senator Pro Tempore Chuck Winder. It started nearly a month ago, when IDFC member Sen. Glenneda Zuiderveld a newsletter on her Substack in which she took a critical look at the corrosive power that special interests have over Idaho politicians like Winder, while also criticizing the state's spending increases and reliance on federal debt spending. It included this meme of Winder as a RINO while carrying water for the state's corporate interests. | | ---|---|--- As a result of that newsletter, Winder sent a letter to Zuiderveld telling her that she had been unilaterally stripped of her position as Vice Chair of the Health and Welfare Committee. Scott Herndon for a similar newsletter of his own, threatening both of them with ethics complaints if they continued to criticize him. But it didn't end there. Every crocked-up QAnon conspiracy and Trump-amplified lie that ultimately led to the Jan. 6 insurrection now has the green light to be run as an ad. This is happening on the biggest social media platform in the country - that 75%+ of Americans use!

| | As we approach Thanksgiving, I'm thankful for all the work we've done together this year to defend our democracy, tackle the climate crisis, and protect workers' rights and reproductive rights. Democrats are working hard to deliver for the American people – **and we can keep making progress with your support by holding the Senate Majority next year.** **Thanksgiving is about community, showing generosity, and putting aside our differences to spend time with family, friends, and loved ones.** Something we can all be thankful for is that Republicans don't control the White House or the Senate, but 2024 is right around the corner, and **everything could change next November. There's so much at stake next year that we need to mobilize and organize now to hold the Senate and the White House.** We have little room for error in the fight to keep the Senate Majority and the White House. Democrats have 23 seats to protect, and SEVEN are swing seats,_while Republicans only have 10 seats to defend, and NONE are swing seats_. We have to win SEVEN out of SEVEN swing seats just to hold FIFTY seats. [**So, before gathering around the table, let's come together and join the Blue Wave Project in electing Democrats in competitive Senate seats across the country.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73751566/439513087/-641752998?refcode=2023-11-21-bwp&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=bf3af86b-8b88-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjNhZjg2Yi04Yjg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tWTpD0gDTq4E_od3xc4awKGa3BVrdcan8VgdoZi5wis=) [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73751569/439513090/-641752998?refcode=2023-11-21-bwp&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=bf3af86b-8b88-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjNhZjg2Yi04Yjg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tWTpD0gDTq4E_od3xc4awKGa3BVrdcan8VgdoZi5wis=) Onward! _Jeff_ **** | **Express Donate:** **If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:**

name: House Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: It’s all coordinated. And it’s all preplanned.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.
My fellow Americans – this is Mike Johnson.
| |

---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=585370b6af4f48b6915167436093b999&_t=4nwj5mztlvKc6MMcek-opVWYmOLGbN_RwG1JAeVeUGnZS2FGV6gBsnWyH_tP6keck647LD7-3slpOhRjo1fu8dzrkmPneBJjVciJ68uo_GQ%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=585370b6af4f48b6915167436093b999&_t=4nwj5mztlvKc6MMcek-opVWYmOLGbN_RwG1JAeVeUGnZS2FGV6gBsnWyH_tP6keck647LD7-3slpOhRjo1fu8dzrkmPneBJjVciJ68uo_GQ%3D)

| My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

_**[This is a longer email but I'm humbly asking you to read it start to finish.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=585370b6af4f48b6915167436093b999&_e=al9PVviim6a9LW684u6bSk2QmItBsNVFlXK9pZPGqqiiua9WPphUXjQI9_xpZ0Ws-KSSnIxvo8-WEst1pEeLrjS08x46WwOFZv3lW9cWLFHnTC94-nxvJZiCAPix0hHuI4YLE5QZWrx8z3ugxTtPx4x3KD3yfl0dxFPXvE6jkIzxuaVqXopeYbwm5n4jdb4wxO6T988mpSn5YdGXVCfccKzz9XEUUfO_P_pzq3a4rtjuLXLMoxa1kK6Z4Z9PLo70Iz_h-WKM-N48AyoW5NXJrTCj5T2mIJNwT61qZd2Hxqjp33rjFWmCd4d59KoPvy9tnxzYvXB4DGXU7EWiNz2kl4tQE1Cztn6sWB0k--npPRpjGmSjk3LdTTmi8fIRBJtr4FzflbMHoj0cJLCUohmXyueAy9NDMbZAuitIn5qwBZI%3D "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.")**_

Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me.
* The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC.
* Politico fired off this headline: _" Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson."_
* And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports.

Look:

These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. _But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not _really_ the goal..._

The _real_ goal of this political ambush is two-fold: **1)** smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and **2)** scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats.

**It 's about power and money. Nothing else.**

That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. _**[So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I'm teaming up with my fellow Louisianian - Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=585370b6af4f48b6915167436093b999&_e=al9PVviim6a9LW684u6bSk2QmItBsNVFlXK9pZPGqqiiua9WPphUXjQI9_xpZ0Ws-KSSnIxvo8-WEst1pEeLrjS08x46WwOFZv3lW9cWLFHnTC94-nxvJZiCAPix0hHuI4YLE5QZWrx8z3ugxTtPx4x3KD3yfl0dxFPXvE6jkIzxuaVqXopeYbwm5n4jdb4wxO6T988mpSn5YdGXVCfccKzz9XEUUfO_P_pzq3a4rtjuLXLMoxa1kK6Z4Z9PLo70YcaWWviQ5TakAPzM6yTzU5nfnk78yxIbZ9Gkm38m5XRNdIB2BpOrOkzhV6IfcZCF6UEwwi0nSANQ9WYmFlw-2Mf7pOLIzmDTD3sSz-Abswk2i6_gKAOBDs_GyM5Zk6HUIXLQPSiimxMvMjcCN8ZGLBhKecMwxjhJ9icUUC60_fw%3D "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.")**_

It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country.

**If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority.**

So here's my final pitch to you:

We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now.

The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this.

Let me make myself perfectly clear:

_I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative._

_**[The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=585370b6af4f48b6915167436093b999&_e=al9PVviim6a9LW684u6bSk2QmItBsNVFlXK9pZPGqqiiua9WPphUXjQI9_xpZ0Ws-KSSnIxvo8-WEst1pEeLrjS08x46WwOFZv3lW9cWLFHnTC94-nxvJZiCAPix0hHuI4YLE5QZWrx8z3ugxTtPx4x3KD3yfl0dxFPXvE6jkIzxuaVqXopeYbwm5n4jdb4wxO6T988mpSn5YdGXVCfccKzz9XEUUfO_P_pzq3a4rtjuLXLMoxa1kK6Z4Z9PLo70M4eHTFNDWR9HZu0oS_h0Eko3vyBWvsp_LEs_hqmM0PbOOLeADJPCESVt204d5MFUu6aZ99p-uPt2SQsPJqSGDLf2NRP8DEqaojzM_4iBAZrj57f6zhEivDFmViFYd8G2hkITD2YCQVK3oOqVKGhFIrpkNbV2_YDN5FY5YoCAxOs%3D "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.")**_

That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in?

clean_body: This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish. My fellow Americans – this is Mike Johnson. | | | | | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson. "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish." Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me. The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC. Politico fired off this headline: " Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson." And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports. Look: These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not really the goal... The real goal of this political ambush is two-fold: 1) smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and 2) scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats. It 's about power and money. Nothing else. That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month." It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country. If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority. So here's my final pitch to you: We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now. The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this. Let me make myself perfectly clear: I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative. "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING." That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in? Thanks for all you do. In liberty, Speaker Mike Johnson | "Speaker Mike Johnson" | | | "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!" This is Steve Scalise. >From introducing the ceasefire resolution in Congress to joining veterans for ceasefire to praying with Rabbis For Ceasefire, Cori is walking the walk with this growing movement. clean_body: While AIPAC continues its cynical ploy to silence and punish Cori, her advocacy for peace will not waiver. | | Peter, Why is AIPAC is gearing up to spend over $100 MILLION to knock Cori and the rest of the squad out of Congress in 2024? It’s simple: AIPAC and their right-wing billionaire donors are attempting to punish Cori and anyone else who speaks up for a ceasefire, a position an overwhelming majority of young voters and Democratic voters hold, but we can’t let them. From introducing the ceasefire resolution in Congress to joining veterans for ceasefire to praying with Rabbis For Ceasefire, Cori is walking the walk with this growing movement. She is pushing for peace in the Halls of Congress and in the streets because our movement requires both. Together we can beat this money. That is the power of the people. AIPAC and their Republican billionaire donors know their claims are baseless and their words are hollow, yet they will continue to spend $100,000,000 on these tactics because they fear the power of our pro-peace, pro humanity movement. Each and every day, more people are taking to the streets to demand a ceasefire and an end to this bloodshed. Instead of listening to the people’s cries for an end to the violence, AIPAC is spending endless amounts of money in an attempt to silence the majority of Americans who believe in the sacredness of every human life. Cori will not be silenced. While AIPAC continues its cynical ploy to punish Cori and the movement for ceasefire, her advocacy for peace will not waiver. She will continue to do what she has always done: push for a pro-peace, pro-humanity agenda. Cori will always advocate for our tax dollars to go towards ending homelessness, guaranteeing health care, and fully funding our public schools, not towards endless wars. clean_body: = | | Hi Peter, it's the entire Michael B. Moore team reaching out. 👋 🌴 We ask that you please read this urgent email. Our campaign has had some bad news these past few days, and we can't leave you in the dark about it. First, we had to decrease projections for November due to the holiday weekend negatively impacting our fundraising more than we anticipated. Second, Nancy Mace's team has gone on offense and is doubling down on their messaging and fundraising across the district. We need to keep up. Now, we're in a full-on sprint to reach our weekly goal. Even with our lowered projections, we haven't seen the level of grassroots support that we usually do. It's thanks to you that we've been able to scare the socks off of the GOP establishment. They're terrified that Michael B. Moore will win this seat. We know he has what it takes to defeat Nancy Mace, but he can’t win alone. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you for helping us turn things around. body:
Manchin tries to STEAL votes from Biden!?!..
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=20434%2E4449941%2Edt7p2E)
---
**⬇Did you see this!?!⬇** [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/manchin-run-president/?source=FFR_20231121_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=20434%2E4449941%2Edt7p2E) **Due to this unexpected development, we’re conducting an emergency poll for top Democrats:**
* * *
**[_Do you think Joe Manchin should run for President as a third party candidate?_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/manchin-run-president/?source=FFR_20231121_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=20434%2E4449941%2Edt7p2E)** [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/manchin-run-president/?source=FFR_20231121_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=20434%2E4449941%2Edt7p2E) | **[NO, I DO NOT! »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/manchin-run-president/?source=FFR_20231121_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=20434%2E4449941%2Edt7p2E)**
---
**[YES, I DO! »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/manchin-run-president/?source=FFR_20231121_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=11&akid=20434%2E4449941%2Edt7p2E)**
**[UNSURE »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/manchin-run-president/?source=FFR_20231121_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=12&akid=20434%2E4449941%2Edt7p2E)**
* * *
Listen, in an election year where everything is on the line for Americans, Joe Manchin is making it all about himself!

He’s dangling the possibility of running as a third-party candidate. And rumor has it he's cozying up with the Dark Money group No Labels, he could rake in millions!

_Manchin’s run would steal votes from President Biden as he goes head-to-head with Donald Trump and his MAGA army!_
Manchin is playing with FIRE, so we’re watching the situation closely and conducting an EMERGENCY poll to gauge support for a Manchin third-party run:
**[_Do you think Joe Manchin should run for President as a third party candidate?_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/manchin-run-president/?source=FFR_20231121_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=13&akid=20434%2E4449941%2Edt7p2E)**
[ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/manchin-run-president/?source=FFR_20231121_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=14&akid=20434%2E4449941%2Edt7p2E)
**[NO, I DO NOT! »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/manchin-run-president/?source=FFR_20231121_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=15&akid=20434%2E4449941%2Edt7p2E)**
---
**[YES, I DO! »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/manchin-run-president/?source=FFR_20231121_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=16&akid=20434%2E4449941%2Edt7p2E)**
**[UNSURE »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/manchin-run-president/?source=FFR_20231121_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=17&akid=20434%2E4449941%2Edt7p2E)**
Thank you for being an active member of our democracy,
FFR

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Tommy Tuberville
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| As a former chair of the House Intelligence Committee, I often received classified briefings about intelligence that would put those who swore an oath to defend our Constitution in uniform in harm’s way.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4531%2E5257348%2EoHN4aZ)
Derek —
In case you haven’t been following, Republican Senator Tommy Tuberville from Alabama has single-handedly blocked _hundreds_ of military promotions — for _months._
He’s sacrificing our country’s defense — all for a partisan stunt.
Tuberville is blocking well-earned, normally nonpartisan promotions of officers across all branches of our military in protest of the Department of Defense’s policy about abortion.
**Derek, as a former chair of the House Intelligence Committee, I often received classified briefings about intelligence that would put those who swore an oath to defend our Constitution in uniform in harm’s way.**
The brave servicemembers who put their lives on the line in service of our country should not be pawns in Tuberville’s partisan stunt.
It’s a disgrace, and it’s time to hold him accountable.
Democrats in the Senate are taking action to lift Tuberville’s hold on these promotions — and I would proudly vote to do the same.
[**Tommy Tuberville should be ashamed that he is jeopardizing our country’s security and denigrating our servicemembers. If you support Senate Democrats (and some Republicans, too!) changing the rules to end this stunt, add your name today.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202311-tuberville-petition.WnFIaW&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20231121_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4531%2E5257348%2EoHN4aZ)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202311-tuberville-petition.WnFIaW&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20231121_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=4531%2E5257348%2EoHN4aZ)
---
Under no circumstances should a single member of Congress impede our country’s defenses, and put our national security at risk.
Thank you for speaking out,
Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3227?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20231121_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=4531%2E5257348%2EoHN4aZ)

name: Tina Smith
subject: What I learned knocking on doors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I laced up my sneakers, loaded my kids into their stroller, and started knocking on doors in my community for local candidates for public office. |
#
Folks — Can I tell you a story? When I first moved to Minnesota with my husband Archie, I wasn’t involved in politics. I was working for General Mills and raising our two young sons, Sam and Mason. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73753342/439519054/-1565639837?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC60_20231121_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzJjYmRlZS04ZTg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qrkAiXDe4F14TuXHGX5DZwPAcgwSCQFv1HB_xVOOOmM=) _Don’t you miss the fashion of this era!_ But when our local elected leaders in Minnesota were ignoring the issues my neighbors and I were facing, I had to get more involved. So I laced up my sneakers, loaded my kids into their stroller, and started knocking on doors in my community for local candidates for public office. **I learned the true value of organizing and meeting people where they are to talk about what matters to them. Our politicians were ignoring our needs, so I decided to speak up and raise our collective voices.** Once I got the bug of community organizing, I couldn’t stop. I started to get more involved in local politics while I was starting my own small business. Later, I worked at Planned Parenthood and used grassroots organizing to empower women to speak out about reproductive rights. **I’ve served at the local, state, and now federal levels of government, but I’ve never forgotten my roots as a community organizer, knocking on doors with my kids in tow.** As a U.S. Senator, I still believe in listening to the voices of the community to hear what matters to them. I like to say that the people who are closest to the problem will know best what will fix those problems — and I take that lesson with me every single day in the Senate. **[If you believe in this mission and want to support my work organizing and connecting with the community, please chip in a few dollars to my campaign today so I can keep up the good fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73753343/439519055/-1565639837?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC60_20231121_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzJjYmRlZS04ZTg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qrkAiXDe4F14TuXHGX5DZwPAcgwSCQFv1HB_xVOOOmM=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73753344/439519056/-1565639837?express_lane=true&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC60_20231121_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzJjYmRlZS04ZTg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qrkAiXDe4F14TuXHGX5DZwPAcgwSCQFv1HB_xVOOOmM=)
---

clean_body: I laced up my sneakers, loaded my kids into their stroller, and started knocking on doors in my community for local candidates for public office. | Folks — Can I tell you a story? When I first moved to Minnesota with my husband Archie, I wasn’t involved in politics. I was working for General Mills and raising our two young sons, Sam and Mason. = Don’t you miss the fashion of this era! But when our local elected leaders in Minnesota were ignoring the issues my neighbors and I were facing, I had to get more involved. So I laced up my sneakers, loaded my kids into their stroller, and started knocking on doors in my community for local candidates for public office. I learned the true value of organizing and meeting people where they are to talk about what matters to them. Our politicians were ignoring our needs, so I decided to speak up and raise our collective voices. Once I got the bug of community organizing, I couldn’t stop. I started to get more involved in local politics while I was starting my own small business. Later, I worked at Planned Parenthood and used grassroots organizing to empower women to speak out about reproductive rights. I’ve served at the local, state, and now federal levels of government, but I’ve never forgotten my roots as a community organizer, knocking on doors with my kids in tow. As a U.S. Senator, I still believe in listening to the voices of the community to hear what matters to them. I like to say that the people who are closest to the problem will know best what will fix those problems — and I take that lesson with me every single day in the Senate. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for reading this longer note — and I hope to see you out knocking on doors soon! — Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: a lot to be thankful for
body:
Friend, it really has been a rollercoaster since we launched this campaign for the U.S. Senate. But I’ve got to say, I’ve been really feeling the love out on the campaign trail.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20231121-1?refcode=em20231121 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20231121-1?refcode=em20231121]

Since day one, this campaign has been about Marylanders and their families, and if I’ve said it once, I’ve said it a hundred times:

The best part of campaigning is meeting folks and talking to them about the issues that matter most to them, their families, and their pocketbooks.

It’s times like these that I feel especially blessed, friend, and knowing I’ve got your support is a huge part of that.
I’d love it if we could make November even bigger, which is why I’m asking for your help right now: Would you please consider chipping a donation of $25 (or whatever you can) before midnight to help my team ramp up our outreach efforts so I can talk to even more Marylanders? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20231121-1?refcode=em20231121]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through for Angela Alsobrooks immediately:

Thank you!
—Angela

clean_body: Friend, it really has been a rollercoaster since we launched this campaign for the U.S. Senate. But I’ve got to say, I’ve been really feeling the love out on the campaign trail. [] Since day one, this campaign has been about Marylanders and their families, and if I’ve said it once, I’ve said it a hundred times: The best part of campaigning is meeting folks and talking to them about the issues that matter most to them, their families, and their pocketbooks. It’s times like these that I feel especially blessed, friend, and knowing I’ve got your support is a huge part of that. I’d love it if we could make November even bigger, which is why I’m asking for your help right now: Would you please consider chipping a donation of $25 (or whatever you can) before midnight to help my team ramp up our outreach efforts so I can talk to even more Marylanders? [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through for Angela Alsobrooks immediately: Donate $10 [] Donate $25 [] Donate $50 [] Donate $75 [] Donate $100 [] Other Amount [] Thank you! —Angela

Jimmie Gardner, the brother-in-law of Stacey Abrams, was arrested Friday on human trafficking charges related to sexual assault and battery of a minor. Gardner is married to Stacey Abrams’ sister, Leslie Abrams-Gardner, a federal judge in Georgia. Abrams-Gardner was on Biden’s shortlist for the United States Supreme Court. President Trump highlighted that Abrams-Gardner played a significant role in the Georgia election cases following the 2020 election.

# BREAKING: FED Certifies 57 New Banks for Biden's Digital Money Executive Order. Crypto-Cash Payment System ‘FedNow’ A Reality.
* * *
**"there is a fourth function of (Digital) money: as a means of social control."** -William Michael Cunningham Economist & Author
* * *
My Fellow American, **There is a growing movement to do away with paper money.** The _government wants to_ implement a centralized digital currency that allows them to _monitor all your financial transactions_. Senate Bill 3571 describes these as "FED accounts", and it’s only a matter of time until this sinister plan is implemented. Our Representatives have this to say about Biden's Digital Money. Majority Whip Tom Emmer said Digital Money (CBDCs) _**"strips Americans of their right to financial privacy" and is "a dangerous surveillance tool."**_**** Congressman Byron Donalds says, "**_CBDCs pose a clear threat to Americans’ financial independence."_** With this program, the government can track everything you do. Every single purchase, transaction, and dollar that comes in and leaves your account. Congress, the Feds, and the IRS can see your transactions. Congressman Mike Flood says, **_"The Chinese Communist Party’s move to use government-run digital currency to impose further control on its people and its economy is a cautionary tale that America must avoid."_** Congressman Barry Loudermilk says, _"The Federal Reserve’s push to develop a central bank digital currency**would allow the Fed to track an individual’s transactions indefinitely.** "_ **Get your Free[Protection Guide](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8z7-S0zAQBvCnWXfyaFeJ5BQu4DShYLgCCoaKWf2JI7Ain2wTwtMz9txd-30_aXc5T2O6PHowH4HomsIMRKA-ANHLj3uu66_8-ZOQf6140c_5uJX0BETLY4rv8vWTNmZO45Ya24ReXYI8NLFHI-WxM9R1zbXvDDst2Z-OJ3IRj56VOqFBd3BopFFN6kmSQiREQ0iqlfoSuWNtnPZBSwUHuc9pOceaPOO83LnWUnLrS27G_ros07wvdgY656HN5RYXro-hjGGoZZ02CHSenUAUhBtU53XJP10tv2MFZb8tXF3hGoD0VkyrA2W_cxVfy_Z2D-eyVh9BWRvfnOc8cRpuoOxz-SMIBak3nf7tNg3iS7m9hjmGtGZQ9qncsKl9mO5pHNOsDRzksJ_pS_4fAAD__yH3gqM) here.** With these FED accounts the government has total control over your life. They can turn your bank account on or off at will.

What’s more, they can greatly curtail how you spend your money. For example:
* if you’re overweight, the government will simply restrict your ability to buy certain items.
* Need ammo? You won’t be able to get it.
* Any business deemed non-essential will be shut down.
* Any individual who goes against the party line will be frozen out of the system.

**You simply won’t be able to get access to your hard-earned money.** As you can imagine this will have a dramatic effect on the lives of ordinary Americans. Especially freedom-loving Americans who dare to speak out against left-wing ideology.

Don’t believe in climate change or vaccines?

Bye, bye bank account. And this isn’t some conspiracy. This isn’t a crackpot fringe theory. **Grab a Complimentary[Protection Guide](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8z8FypCAQBuCnaW9Y0DigBw-7Q7mHrZ3D5pDKKYWADomIg5rJ5OlTWjO5_v8H3a3DNPjuVoP8DYhnb2dABP4LEC8v15DWt_D3D6GfilzEKRy2Eo-AuNwm9yPvn-QuaD9sqVSZrXlnaZG5mklKD6XEsszOdVFqhx3lrUVbuaqtqKEVNaIo2UGWkma-RoqcMWRMIkOeU9E5XWohW2GsoBwKus_JdXDJG83m5apTijHkJoZsqM_LMs37Yg1gE_o8xNEtOt36ONg-xXXaIGAzt4QxgmyDvFmX8Nqm-O4ScPW06NRGnSyg2IppbYGrZ53I_7i93cM5rsk44Eq5hzM6TNr3I3B1ih8EGUH-0P5rt74n_-J4D4Ozfg3A1TGOmKXaTlc_DH4WEgra72eaGL4DAAD__zdcgrQ) here.** In fact, it’s already happening. This is all already in the works. **The ball is already rolling.** For example.
* Then Speaker of the House, Nancy Pelosi tried to sneak these Digital Federal Reserve accounts or digital wallets into the $2 trillion pandemic stimulus bill but silently pulled it out at the last minute.
* Now Senator Sherrod Brown has stepped up and proposed a new pro-digital dollar draft. S.3571 - Banking for All Act.
* Back in 2020, The FEDS teamed up with the Massachusetts Institute of Technology to work on Fedcoin blockchain technology.

And don't forget, Joe and his democrat cronies want total control over your lives and your finances.
* Remember back in October 2021, Biden asked Congress **to authorize new bank surveillance measures of Americans to the IRS** for accounts with as little as $600, but banks and depositors in large numbers pushed back.

**If you're concerned about the direction America is taking and think it's the wrong way, grab this Complimentary[Protection Guide.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8z7GSmzAQBuCnWTox0gpLuKBIrCFFJi6SIpMqI5DAumMRFnA-39PfwNjX_v8n7a6laQjdvQL9HRAvwc2ACPIbIF7_3SitL_TzB-Pvhl3VmQ5biSdAXO6T_5KPT3JPNgxbqk3mKtk5XmS-EprzQ6mxLLNLJQ6oi457dfQcG85lKZQ_to3zlvOiK7JQIUcpBAqhUaDMueq8La3SjWqd4hIKvs_JLfkUWivm5WZTipHyNlI2VJdlmeZ9sRqwpj6nOPrFpnsfB9enuE4bBKznhgnBUGxQ1utC_5sUX30Caf4sNjXRJgeotmJaG5Dmr03sd9ze7uEc19R6kMb4p2stTTb0I0hzjm8MBUP51OFjt6Fnv-L4CMm7sBJIc4qjzFLlplsYhjArDQXv9zPbSJ8BAAD__0dfgtA)** **The worst thing is that Joe Biden claims that this is in our best interests** According to a 2022 released Federal Reserve white paper, these digital wallets...

"**Promote** consumer protection and community development through **_consumer focused supervision and examination_** "

When our government tells us there is nothing to worry about, nothing could be further from the truth!

These bureaucrats want to monitor every single thing you do...

...and transform American freedom into a system of bureaucratic authoritarianism called socialism/communism. And if we’re not careful things are going to get a lot, lot, worse.

But there’s also another reason why politicians are so keen to implement these digital wallets

You see, the truth is that politicians HATE cash.

Paper cash gives you (WE THE PEOPLE) the freedom to spend and earn however you like.

name: GIFFORDS PAC
subject: Why GIFFORDS?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends -
We know that you get a lot of asks from different organizations—especially at this time of year.
We know you can’t always contribute to everyone, and we never expect you to give every time we ask. But today, if you’re able, we hope you’ll choose to [**make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov23.H_pglF&refcode=em231121-1-15&t=1&akid=6922%2E3935704%2E7Hrh2_)
When you make a donation to GIFFORDS PAC, just know that it helps us continue fighting for lifesaving gun safety legislation at the federal level and in every state nationwide.
It fuels our work to elect gun safety champions up and down the ballot.
And it sends a strong message to the gun lobby that we will **never** back down in the fight to keep our communities safe from gun violence.
We couldn’t do our lifesaving work without grassroots supporters chipping in what they can, whenever they can.
[**So will you please use this link to make your first online contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today? Join the community of hundreds of thousands of others who have contributed to GIFFORDS PAC in the past decade since our founding.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/23246?c0=giffords-em-nov23.8MlRz0&refcode=em231121-1-15&t=11&akid=6922%2E3935704%2E7Hrh2_)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $5](https://go.giffords.org/go/46177?c0=giffords-em-nov23.nyBXp4&refcode=em231121-1-15&t=12&akid=6922%2E3935704%2E7Hrh2_)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-nov23.ka8v8M&refcode=em231121-1-15&t=13&akid=6922%2E3935704%2E7Hrh2_)**
---
****
Thank you,
The team at GIFFORDS PAC

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=6922%2E3935704%2E7Hrh2_) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

Voters in CA-30 are starting to think about who will fight for them in Congress heading into 2025. **And our team is**** _ready_****.** Here at the Melvoin campaign, we have been hard at work for months building a strategy to win in 2024. It includes more community events, digital ads, on-the-ground organizing, and more to ensure our message reaches voters and we send a focused problem-solver like Nick to Congress. name: Diane Sare
subject: Statewide Meeting in Syracuse area and on Zoom Dec 3
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sare for Senate
body:
| | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231203_petitioners_2&n=1)
---
Friend
### **_Sunday December 3, 3:00-6:00 pm, Statewide Meeting in Syracuse Area_**
Tomorrow, November 22, will be the 60th anniversary of the murder of President John F. Kennedy, from which our nation has not recovered. (My Friday Symposium will address this matter in a special Thanksgiving presentation.) This campaign is dedicated to restoring the goodness of our republic by upholding the principles upon which we were founded. Join me and my team in the Syracuse area on December 3, from 3-6pm as we fortify our spirits for the new year ahead, with music, food, and intense planning to once again meet the outrageous petitioning requirements of the state. (If you can't make it in person, part of the meeting will be on Zoom from 4-6pm.) We have chartered a bus from Manhattan, which will make a stop in Maywood, NJ (lots of parking there) on its way up. It departs at 9:30 am from behind Port Authority. Cost is $70 per seat, but full and partial sponsorships are available for students and unemployed people. Please call 646-328-1932 for bus details and to reserve your seat. | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/dec_3_peitioners_in_person?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231203_petitioners_2&n=2 "RSVP for Syracuse in person") [RSVP for Syracuse in person](https://www.sareforsenate.com/dec_3_peitioners_in_person?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231203_petitioners_2&n=2)

[](https://www.sareforsenate.com/dec_3_petitioners_zoom?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231203_petitioners_2&n=3 "RSVP for Dec 3 Zoom Link") [RSVP for Dec 3 Zoom Link](https://www.sareforsenate.com/dec_3_petitioners_zoom?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231203_petitioners_2&n=3)
---
**_My campaign is building up its warchest for the coming year. In 2022, we spent $80,000 just to get on the ballot! We need 1,000 people to send $80 each, or 2,000 people to send $40 each, or 24.24 of you to donate the legally allowed FEC limit of $3300 (through April1, 2024)! Send what you can! Thanks for being a part of this fight!_**

clean_body: | | Friend Sunday December 3, 3:00-6:00 pm, Statewide Meeting in Syracuse Area Tomorrow, November 22, will be the 60th anniversary of the murder of President John F. Kennedy, from which our nation has not recovered. (My Friday Symposium will address this matter in a special Thanksgiving presentation.) This campaign is dedicated to restoring the goodness of our republic by upholding the principles upon which we were founded. Join me and my team in the Syracuse area on December 3, from 3-6pm as we fortify our spirits for the new year ahead, with music, food, and intense planning to once again meet the outrageous petitioning requirements of the state. (If you can't make it in person, part of the meeting will be on Zoom from 4-6pm.) We have chartered a bus from Manhattan, which will make a stop in Maywood, NJ (lots of parking there) on its way up. It departs at 9:30 am from behind Port Authority. Cost is $70 per seat, but full and partial sponsorships are available for students and unemployed people. Please call 646-328-1932 for bus details and to reserve your seat. | "RSVP for Syracuse in person" "RSVP for Dec 3 Zoom Link" My campaign is building up its warchest for the coming year. In 2022, we spent $80,000 just to get on the ballot! We need 1,000 people to send $80 each, or 2,000 people to send $40 each, or 24.24 of you to donate the legally allowed FEC limit of $3300 (through April1, 2024)! Send what you can! Thanks for being a part of this fight! "DONATE" \--Diane * | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Sare for Senate

|

Peter, Marjorie Taylor Greene has a new book out today, “MTG”: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73758489/439532881/195084756?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231121_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTU1ZTkyM2YtOTU4OC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lAmEcjwl0nugKvLUBgsyPQ9KZGm560JgH9kRo2_2_uQ=) The publisher description claims Marjorie is “known for her humor and honesty,” which is hilarious on its own, because from Jewish space lasers to 2020 election denial, we don’t think she’s said an honest or funny thing once in her life. MTG is charging a whopping $30 for her new “tell-all” book — and we can think of a much better use for that $30 than lining her pockets and supporting her far-right campaign. [_**Will you take that $30 and instead use it to support women running for office — the kind who actually believe in facts, advocate for women’s rights and not Trump’s bidding, and have the drive necessary to create lasting change?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73758497/439532884/195084756?amount=30&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231121_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTU1ZTkyM2YtOTU4OC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lAmEcjwl0nugKvLUBgsyPQ9KZGm560JgH9kRo2_2_uQ=) | [DONATE $30](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73758503/439532886/195084756?amount=30&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231121_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTU1ZTkyM2YtOTU4OC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lAmEcjwl0nugKvLUBgsyPQ9KZGm560JgH9kRo2_2_uQ=)

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: re: My former student Katie Porter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Funding our campaigns this way makes a powerfully important difference.
Hey, it's Elizabeth Warren.
**Derek, I don't take any money from federal lobbyists or corporate PACs — and neither does Katie Porter.**
Funding our campaigns that way makes a powerfully important difference.
It’s part of how we put Washington to work for working people, not just powerful interests that can write ginormous checks.
It’s part of how we make real change that touches families’ lives.
But it also makes fundraising emails like this one even more critical — because we’re counting on grassroots donors.
[**So I have to ask: If it makes sense for you right now, will you split a donation of any amount between Katie Porter and me?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231121-1?refcode=EMAN23_1_EWS_20231121_V1_F&refcode2=33498_3422442_mu7-R3&akid=33498%2E3422442%2Emu7-R3)
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231121-1?refcode=EMAN23_1_EWS_20231121_V1_F&refcode2=33498_3422442_mu7-R3&akid=33498%2E3422442%2Emu7-R3)
**Each contribution, no matter how big or small, adds up to help decide who has power in Washington — whether billionaire CEOs will get to run the table, or whether working people will have a fighting chance.**
Katie Porter will always, always, always fight for the families who most need our government on their side.
You know, I used to have her as a law student. As I got to know her, I saw her bone-deep commitment to making a difference in people’s lives.
Years later, I recommended her for a position overseeing big banks’ settlement with California families, and boy did she deliver.
When she first ran for Congress, I jumped in to support her — knowing she’d bring an understanding of the real experiences that working families face, and the courage to stand up to big corporations and special interests.
And now I’m very happy to support her campaign for U.S. Senate. She’s smart. She isn’t afraid. She stands up to Wall Street and Big Pharma, she holds fossil fuel companies accountable, and she fights to protect our basic freedoms.
**Katie Porter doesn’t take money from federal lobbyists or corporate PACs, so you’ll always know she’s in your corner — not answering to the highest bidder. Now let’s have her back so she can be California’s next U.S. Senator.**
[**If you can, please split a donation between Katie Porter and my re-election campaign.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231121-1?refcode=EMAN23_1_EWS_20231121_V1_F&refcode2=33498_3422442_mu7-R3&akid=33498%2E3422442%2Emu7-R3)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231121-1?refcode=EMAN23_1_EWS_20231121_V1_F&t=1&refcode2=33498_3422442_mu7-R3&akid=33498%2E3422442%2Emu7-R3)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=2&akid=33498%2E3422442%2Emu7-R3)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=33498%2E3422442%2Emu7-R3)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

body:
Peter, sorry to bother you again, but it looks like you still haven’t taken my November 2023 Priorities Survey.
---
When I first called on this powerful community to help guide my work for the next half of 2023, the initial response was overwhelming. I received responses from thousands of supporters across the nation, but I never saw yours come through.
**That’s why I've decided to reopen this survey to give you one more chance to make your voice heard – but the survey will _only_ remain open until 11:59 p.m. tonight. **
**So please, will you take 60 seconds now to respond to my November 2023 Priorities Survey? Here’s the best link to access the form:[http://surveys.signforgood.com/LJ4NY23-november-priorities](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73760210/439534688/551962380?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1262-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjU3ZTY3NS05Njg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mJnf6I5LjtqEYZ5EC8ZbsLL2XGOg7r1cCPub-ri3T0o=&emci=25808ef5-b787-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=a657e675-9688-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)**
Thank you.
Letitia James
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Letitia James**
Date: Sat, Nov 18, 2023
Subject: Can you fill this out by 11:59 p.m. tonight?
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73760211/439534689/-1997846888?code=jtk1262-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjU3ZTY3NS05Njg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mJnf6I5LjtqEYZ5EC8ZbsLL2XGOg7r1cCPub-ri3T0o=)
---
Peter, this Election Day, people from all around the nation came together to declare that our rights are _not_ up for negotiation.
In Virginia, Democrats swept the state legislature – proving to far-right lawmakers who were campaigning on anti-abortion promises that our reproductive freedoms are something we will _fight_ for. The same resounding message was heard in Ohio – where voters enshrined reproductive rights into their state constitution.
Peter, I'm incredibly encouraged by this year's election results – but the truth of the matter is that our fight for progress is _never_ over, especially with the 2024 election right around the corner.

**[That's why I'm counting on _you_ and [500] other Fearless Fighters to share how your priorities have shifted after Election Day. Your response will help me continue my fight for you into the new year, so please: Will you take my priorities survey before midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73760212/439534690/74714267?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1262-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjU3ZTY3NS05Njg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mJnf6I5LjtqEYZ5EC8ZbsLL2XGOg7r1cCPub-ri3T0o=&emci=25808ef5-b787-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=a657e675-9688-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)**
| | **November PRIORITIES SURVEY**
---

EMAIL: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73760213/439534691/74714267?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1262-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjU3ZTY3NS05Njg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mJnf6I5LjtqEYZ5EC8ZbsLL2XGOg7r1cCPub-ri3T0o=&emci=25808ef5-b787-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=a657e675-9688-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)
STATUS: INCOMPLETE
Please record your response before 11:59 p.m. to make your voice heard.
---
| | [TAKE MY SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73760215/439534692/74714267?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1262-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjU3ZTY3NS05Njg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mJnf6I5LjtqEYZ5EC8ZbsLL2XGOg7r1cCPub-ri3T0o=&emci=25808ef5-b787-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=a657e675-9688-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)
---
Peter, highlighting and uplifting the voices of everyday, working Americans is a _key_ part of my work – and I wanted to share more about why your response is so important to me.

I didn’t grow up with power or privilege.
I was born and raised in a working-class family in one of Brooklyn’s many diverse neighborhoods. Throughout my entire childhood and into my young adulthood, I had no real platform to voice my opinions or speak out against the decisions that were _directly_ affecting me and my family.
So when I made history in 2018 by becoming the first Black lawmaker ever to serve as New York’s attorney general, I vowed that – _no matter what_ – I would be a voice for the voiceless and speak for those who had been silenced for so long.
**I’m proud to say that so far, I’ve kept that promise – and this Priorities Survey is a key part of keeping it to this day. So please:**
**[Will you take 60 seconds now to share your top priorities with me and my team so I can continue to fight for the things that matter most to you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73760216/439534693/74714267?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1262-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjU3ZTY3NS05Njg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mJnf6I5LjtqEYZ5EC8ZbsLL2XGOg7r1cCPub-ri3T0o=&emci=25808ef5-b787-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=a657e675-9688-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)**
| | [TAKE MY SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73760217/439534694/74714267?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1262-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjU3ZTY3NS05Njg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mJnf6I5LjtqEYZ5EC8ZbsLL2XGOg7r1cCPub-ri3T0o=&emci=25808ef5-b787-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=a657e675-9688-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)
---
Thank you for making your voice heard.

Letitia
| With so many tough and crucial fights ahead, I am counting on people like you to fuel my fight for justice, progress, and true equality. Will you make a monthly donation to make sure I can continue using the full power of the Attorney General's office to make a difference for everyday people and families?

Fellow Conservative,

My opponent recently debuted his first general election campaign ad, backed by over $500,000, thus beginning the "Tester two-step."

You might be wondering what the "Tester two-step" is, so let me explain.

It's a delicate balance that some do better than others. Unfortunately, this song and dance has become all too common in our era of polarized politics. **[Career politicians like Jon Tester say one thing and then do another.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7f57973fa4e04a20b87827b6fd508959&_e=sE8J_SmgrIG6hvtA9tgmACpi2FC-7ZHSxw2A16sJZGS__cCMPkPEqmTlHKVG_scUaXGMxEa0Yqb5R6I1zw-kCuLVEnFL_PSizXfYwtGXL7s2yrFwG1VGZKWPaEOmqIAbsqiMi7j-w2z7l4ElkAXNxUKpHav2B1PcA_5lfr9GSwAMaTofct65kOBp4SJ_k7Dlq3nNBFZ4kP3uV7KdmF6hc2l7C-yYsozQi2kpsIjH4A92ObXPxS1dHU_PgMKe4xqG-g4eDEDoWPdZIs4twjYBuDh2yUbr6PcU8STNI_yFxMJ60NjjmWygzLkXiIU5tLdWGvY0M5HYB0jsKEOmSZ4lZfp0Klix3oTvsAayxbNm3wxpREu7UPBH0gHyaIhkqHbQQk-z4TbwFfI4ID2A6C5jwejtIKkZvJgPJmLCMSCXnZI%3D) **

**Tester only pretends to be a moderate when he's running for election; the other five/six years he's a dyed-in-the-wool liberal who votes 91% of the time with Joe Biden. **

I'm asking for your help because what we have in front of us is the opportunity to defeat one of Biden's most loyal foot soldiers. body:
| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ddb0a24630644ada80c69284bce69c25&_e=YYPxplGy031UJWzQvxZRyei4iiWSvECgBhatYfp8fyvLEwFqLhUQFqR4MXS2BaaEDdh3tn5xb5VJvrT36OuO6TtcNOd1opqPpUNjUaVy4m6SM3M235XBARar595dJpd79diSgr-HezGzJlp_oydvTXAJshiEM2op_bbYZhOm24fNZ4P8vaSBjuJIdhxsvN9a_AqAhScJ6GylSJjo9Z0ev3XQdSqgDkoYONq2ZINPdjltRv8gUumZjm5xQu740oD0q9i31oQ6SLSBTye_0X5eQdapjrMrV6PhOipV6Vbsgrh-HZaqXbXCYwgZOZZL5m0ZT3CG7va7KISZBl6AdjUymjkdu_tRlINrnIv2yyjWihDMtvI6Gq8Xwld9TVCFiRqNQ0rrTWzIsI94FCP1NaNOK9n_Oy-n-7NfGdkglFMmbKVg-qxxjAEKsmSLQ8IJGpeYthSzwdH5OMqDszE0kaiW2vxsl8QHaybCdMMsSW25L_ePGZT5ic98tHI0i6Q6-MI9ntPLhuOf64uvNWUrrx2lzvbRtvkwAbMc_mOIlQY_GnZQ43xmfGJT4fyKmzsQoVqb)
---

Friend,

Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America's future.

Now, I want to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ddb0a24630644ada80c69284bce69c25&_e=YYPxplGy031UJWzQvxZRyei4iiWSvECgBhatYfp8fyvLEwFqLhUQFqR4MXS2BaaEDdh3tn5xb5VJvrT36OuO6TtcNOd1opqPpUNjUaVy4m6SM3M235XBARar595dJpd79diSgr-HezGzJlp_oydvTXAJshiEM2op_bbYZhOm24fNZ4P8vaSBjuJIdhxsvN9a_AqAhScJ6GylSJjo9Z0ev3XQdSqgDkoYONq2ZINPdjltRv8gUumZjm5xQu740oD0q9i31oQ6SLSBTye_0X5eQdapjrMrV6PhOipV6Vbsgrh-HZaqXbXCYwgZOZZL5m0ZT3CG7va7KISZBl6AdjUymjkdu_tRlINrnIv2yyjWihDMtvI6Gq8Xwld9TVCFiRqNQ0rrTWzIsI94FCP1NaNOK9n_Oy-n-7NfGdkglFMmbKX0uBg634WocKjKKE_2m3JgmwCrwuT4bRRavrmof0YFR1WP-pRuFm5qZNZ6W1sSu6mRapQBjTBvALAm-BA7HrYoGfoTFMt08-G3OiKOmMQFVBAlq6N_vQxY7Pg8SK2qKBG_zhzqpikWUKqyrHDb3enT "Once you’ve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
---
| | | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ddb0a24630644ada80c69284bce69c25&_e=YYPxplGy031UJWzQvxZRyei4iiWSvECgBhatYfp8fyvLEwFqLhUQFqR4MXS2BaaEDdh3tn5xb5VJvrT36OuO6TtcNOd1opqPpUNjUaVy4m6SM3M235XBARar595dJpd79diSgr-HezGzJlp_oydvTXAJshiEM2op_bbYZhOm24fNZ4P8vaSBjuJIdhxsvN9a_AqAhScJ6GylSJjo9Z0ev3XQdSqgDkoYONq2ZINPdjltRv8gUumZjm5xQu740oD0q9i31oQ6SLSBTye_0X5eQdapjrMrV6PhOipV6Vbsgrh-HZaqXbXCYwgZOZZL5m0ZT3CG7va7KISZBl6AdjUymjkdu_tRlINrnIv2yyjWihDMtvI6Gq8Xwld9TVCFiRqNQ0rrTWzIsI94FCP1NaNOK9n_Oy-n-7NfGdkglFMmbKXBWaOCWFO_2wV9A1h0yU_FKkHSpEEd4HqAPsH7lqUP9J9A_No6uxJPjVeBVf3We9lRqU6Xn2GtTrr7_82_JAgKxm0UOwcUVjcJey1oF95cFt-pPskGVdb-vI2tHgcri76x1EhCVJoq89KtkIBe8Q_z)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---
After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _
---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and hardly anyone thought I had a chance. I was polling at 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️**
---
| | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ddb0a24630644ada80c69284bce69c25&_e=YYPxplGy031UJWzQvxZRyei4iiWSvECgBhatYfp8fyvLEwFqLhUQFqR4MXS2BaaEDdh3tn5xb5VJvrT36OuO6TtcNOd1opqPpUNjUaVy4m6SM3M235XBARar595dJpd79diSgr-HezGzJlp_oydvTXAJshiEM2op_bbYZhOm24fNZ4P8vaSBjuJIdhxsvN9a_AqAhScJ6GylSJjo9Z0ev3XQdSqgDkoYONq2ZINPdjltRv8gUumZjm5xQu740oD0q9i31oQ6SLSBTye_0X5eQdapjrMrV6PhOipV6Vbsgrh-HZaqXbXCYwgZOZZL5m0ZT3CG7va7KISZBl6AdjUymjkdu_tRlINrnIv2yyjWihDMtvI6Gq8Xwld9TVCFiRqNQ0rrTWzIsI94FCP1NaNOK9n_Oy-n-7NfGdkglFMmbKUDScmbBx_3KLn4gE-jy9IWZMunXAaUP70ZnqCfJpgryXTb2rx1-8RTdmlIq-HhDysE1P8kGfQ2-QBHDCVVWnom0OU6ZvVUldDuH1tl5CgJZ8fxQBV-0_vefpYZHjW8lrpgrNaImKfFblDc6KoIcK67)
---
It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

Now, I'm running for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class.

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.
