clean_body: | | | | | | Friend, Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America's future. Now, I want to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. "Once you’ve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!" Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it. After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: " Don't complain. Do something about it." | | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and hardly anyone thought I had a chance. I was polling at 15 percent a week before the primary. But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️ | | It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor. When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy. When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them. Now, I'm running for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class. "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this today could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG! >>" Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days. "Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today to show the of OUR movement?" | | Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, "I need your help – starting right now. " Your contribution is what keeps this movement alive and thriving, so thank you for standing with me. My very best, | - Nikki Haley | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. and . You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. . . Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals. Our mailing address is: 186 Seven Farms Drive, Ste F-401 Daniel Island, SC 29492

name: BetoORourke.com
subject: The women fighting Texas’ abortion ban
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

As of last week, there are now 22 women challenging Texas’ deadly abortion
laws in court, sharing testimony about how our state leaders forced them
to carry dangerous, nonviable pregnancies that could have killed them.

I hope you’ll read their stories and then join us in the work to overcome
these extreme laws.

At 18 weeks – just four months – into her pregnancy, Amanda Zurawski’s
water broke. The amniotic fluid that her baby depended upon was leaking
out.

“My doctor said, ‘Well, right now we just have to wait, because we can’t
induce labor, even though you’re 100% for sure going to lose your baby,’”
Amanda said. “[The doctors] were unable to do their own jobs because of
the way that the laws are written in Texas.”

Three days after her water broke, Amanda found herself shivering in the
Texas heat. “I think it was 105 degrees that day, and I was freezing cold,
and I was shaking, my teeth were chattering. I was trying to tell Josh
that I didn’t feel good,” she said.

Josh rushed his wife to the hospital. Her temperature was 102 degrees.

About 12 hours after her pregnancy was terminated, doctors and nurses
flooded her room. “There’s a lot of commotion, and I said, ‘What’s going
on?’ and they said, ‘We're moving you to the ICU, you’re developing
symptoms of sepsis.’”

Doctors inserted an intravenous line near her heart to deliver antibiotics
and medication to stabilize her blood pressure. Finally, Amanda turned the
corner and survived. But her medical ordeal isn’t over. Amanda’s uterus
suffered scarring from the infection, and she may not be able to have more
children.

— CNN

When Samantha Casiano learned her fetus had anencephaly, a fetal anomaly
that prevented the skull and brainstem from developing fully, she thought
maybe she could have surgery to fix it. Her doctor explained the diagnosis
was “incompatible with life” — her baby wouldn’t survive outside the womb.

Casiano considered traveling out of state, but with a job, persistent car
trouble and other children waiting for her at home, she couldn’t figure
out a way to make the long trip in a hurry. So she carried the pregnancy
for an additional 13 weeks before eventually going into labor.

Casiano described the day she held her baby daughter, Halo, and watched
her gasp out her first and final breaths. Over the course of four hours,
Halo went from pink to red to purple, from being warm to cold.

“I was so sorry that I couldn’t help her or release her going to heaven
sooner rather than later. I felt so bad. She had no mercy. There was no
mercy there for her, and I couldn’t do anything.”

As Casiano described the experience to the court, she began to cry, then
she began to cough, then she threw up in her hands, as her husband and a
bailiff rushed to the witness stand with wastebaskets.

— The Texas Tribune

When Ashley Brandt learned that one of the twins she was carrying had a
lethal fetal anomaly called acrania, she was devastated. That devastation
only grew when she learned that the longer she continued her pregnancy
with both twins, the greater the risk to herself and the other fetus,
which was developing properly.

She needed to terminate one fetus for the other to survive, but her
doctors in Texas said the state’s new abortion laws prevented them from
helping her until her condition worsened. She and her husband scrambled
together money and childcare to get to Colorado, where the procedure took
mere minutes.

When she returned, she experienced bleeding. But she was hesitant to go to
the doctor, she said, because she felt like a criminal. “I knew I needed,
just for peace of mind, to be checked,” she said, choking out the words
between sobs. “But because I had gone out of state for an illegal
procedure, I was kind of worried about explaining it to the doctors there.
... I didn't want anyone to get in trouble and I didn't want to get in
trouble.”

— The Texas Tribune

While I’m hopeful that these courageous women will win their case and
force Texas to allow abortion in cases of life-threatening emergencies, I
know that full victory and true justice will only come when we overturn
this abortion ban in its entirety and fire the Republicans who passed it.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231121.mAojj5&refcode=ema20231121-235214&t=1001&akid=235214%2E444211%2EkzJmYi ]Can you chip in $3 to Powered by People today to help us
reach, register, and organize the voters we need to elect pro-choice
leaders in Texas?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231121.mAojj5&refcode=ema20231121-235214&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=235214%2E444211%2EkzJmYi ]DONATE $3

Thank you for having the backs of Amanda, Samantha, Ashley, and every
other Texas woman denied her freedom to make her own decisions about her
own body.

— Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1021&akid=235214%2E444211%2EkzJmYi

name: EMILYs List
subject: Peter, do you approve of the Supreme Court?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
Republicans were hoping these cases would reach the Supreme Court |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73763301/439539540/-1844614781?sourceid=1052348&refcode=20231121_SCOTUSSurveyRS_DON&refcode2=WTENEK44&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjA5NWFkNi05Nzg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J9QpAIwXg2F8gq_f0f8LR_osu51sPVLWiSmUHsrtHNs=&emci=6954fac6-8084-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=9b095ad6-9788-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=5177934) Peter,

The Supreme Court's 2023-2024 session is underway and their docket is _full_ of high-stakes cases that will impact the future of civil rights and democracy in America.

Republicans rushed to pack the Supreme Court with conservative justices who would sanction unethical and discriminatory practices that align with their party's greed and bigotry. **So it comes as no surprise that ethics scandals and disastrous decisions have defined this iteration of the Court.**

This year, voting rights, the dissemination of disinformation on social platforms, and the FDA's approval of mifepristone, a medication used in some abortions, will all be on the docket.

_To put it plainly, Peter, millions of Americans' fundamental rights depend on the whims of a court they did not elect and do not trust._ And we know exactly who to blame for this: A Republican Party who stole the Court and handpicked justices with the intent of taking this country back into the dark ages.

****We're asking pro-choice activists across the country to speak out against the ultra-conservative Supreme Court majority and we want YOU to be a part of it, Peter. Make your voice heard by taking our short survey now >>**** **Do you approve of the Supreme Court?** | [YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73763302/439539541/-1844614781?sourceid=1052348&refcode=20231121_SCOTUSSurveyRS_DON&refcode2=WTENEK44&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjA5NWFkNi05Nzg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J9QpAIwXg2F8gq_f0f8LR_osu51sPVLWiSmUHsrtHNs=&emci=6954fac6-8084-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=9b095ad6-9788-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=5177934) | **[NO](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73763305/439539542/-1844614781?sourceid=1052348&refcode=20231121_SCOTUSSurveyRS_DON&refcode2=WTENEK44&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjA5NWFkNi05Nzg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J9QpAIwXg2F8gq_f0f8LR_osu51sPVLWiSmUHsrtHNs=&emci=6954fac6-8084-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=9b095ad6-9788-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)**

name: Sarah Longwell
subject: A damn good deal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY REPUBLICAN ACCOUNTABILITY PROJECT, A PROJECT OF DEFENDING DEMOCRACY TOGETHER
body:
We’ve spent only 5% of our annual defense budget arming Ukraine, and with it, they’ve destroyed more than half of Putin’s forces.
|
---
Friend, Tonight on Fox News, Republicans for Ukraine is taking over the airways with [one of our videos](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VVyfZ27_xSKGW3Rp2Kl7sz_92W1CR289567yDqMLtlV43m2ndW6N1vHY6lZ3lTW7_Wbfh5xRfzGW9fGM8l2shx43W5BQ4r98Cqh62W4sYQ1832JHbgW4p6MG73-VHKdW11vTCz2k_pKlW5t0WyW8DFcLDW71jbYQ6VN7cTW31Bvvw1lby6GW1MtHBk8J_6mqW7_xDSy9cgMCZW6hw_X_73dCmsW7bVkL23VLFcWVbn89w9kJ2zgW5Fg65s31C1C7W3nD5_V1l6xD8W2MCBxp8P7bjdW55MMb_604ZDSW4kbRMP5tJqBdW2_90Qy1npZTxN560Hf8pG1V8W3n1FBv1zlC6Xf2-b6w604), and you won’t want to miss it. Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky is giving an exclusive interview to Fox, and we’re reminding Republicans to protect freedom, stand up to Putin, and support Ukraine. [Watch The Ad Here](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VVyfZ27_xSKGW3Rp2Kl7sz_92W1CR289567yDqMLtlV43m2ndW6N1vHY6lZ3kWW80bc568bpzWPW4trBDx7lx3--W62Qcn68hcXvGW7rSvgn2qSqKwW2V51C85ylh22W8GFNGq8LWrfcN2kH03bDTm3BN1lmRKqc_cdFW4SLBvm1_92s8W5gF6T73P9y18N2kF0JLQ229cW10rrLM2y86LmW3tNhdk4xvhcQW9hf5gZ4NNGRdW2N3HrG8Gv9kRW8dBcSl51K-W8W53pDwz8jQP0hN58Tl_2pCTFgW9926Lz2H56r0W981wRJ1Km88SW13D6zv8y9tzrW4D39QP1B8_xvf8h92tP04)

[ ](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VVyfZ27_xSKGW3Rp2Kl7sz_92W1CR289567yDqMLtlV43m2ndW6N1vHY6lZ3pnW816XbZ1F5htpW7pZFNY4W87VQW5Q_vc17SBsJNN62NFlc3mjPWW9ck2RN6jz2Q4W1m6sR68Mv_53W2Kmdmc2R-bV6W4qyJFK7vm_5PW8Rg-nP5cWg75W4BM1gx1Krd-nW1qvrKs1hYfbLN5bZdw3KV-PrW3xRhQW4ZQTkGN4r_Sw44XdwMW2BHqRW8XYM5mW6CdLm43KhW6ZN1mGlT2Xk6sLW8sqt922MLTzhW1lStgG1BP2hrW3brz263sNdbzW3DzC7P41P6dsW5x79lg7Dg-sBf1RjCwT04)
---
Republican lawmakers need to realize: We’ve spent only 5% of our annual defense budget arming Ukraine, and with it, they’ve destroyed more than half of Putin’s forces. **That is a damn good deal.** Remember that Putin's aggression isn't just a threat to Ukraine—it's a challenge to our leadership in the world and a test of America's resolve. America’s support for Ukraine sends a strong message to adversaries worldwide that we will unite against evil. [It’s all laid out here, and I urge you to watch it.](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VVyfZ27_xSKGW3Rp2Kl7sz_92W1CR289567yDqMLtlV43m2ndW6N1vHY6lZ3lnW2QY4nD19xcv3W427CYK67vTw4N3JrY9mtXWjdW2nqd0c2ZCv-rW83wdg38zQK55W5RwDQ41v834_Vfh5PZ1Hq7SSW6JMKnv4fR7_2W8lkC-f7XX6nBN77X8f440m8CW5-Nnzz21hgB0W9bKkhR31vtb5W92mNc1501HkVVp_8BH29XNWpW52SQkQ5D1_bJV_1g678RRC44W603qnc7XNDxYW3YhKn45QbsCFW1gfdHP45LMxbVcCLBX1f1zMKW4zSlZ36t64DtW2Ym9sz3N8rf5f4mccVl04) The GOP needs to stop fighting amongst itself and start doing what it takes to stop our enemies abroad. I hope you’re with us. Sarah Longwell
---

body:
our fundraising goals aren't numbers picked out of a hat
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=747%2E791427%2E8Uo0Bg)

Friends, it's Team Ilhan.
We know we've been reaching out a lot lately, and with Thanksgiving quickly approaching, you probably have a lot more on your mind than Ilhan's monthly fundraising goals.
We completely understand that, and our hope is you don't take these emails as an annoyance, but a sign of just how important your support is to our movement.
Let us explain why:
Each month our team sets a series of internal goals for the number of grassroots contributions we need to raise in the weeks and months ahead.
**These goals are not arbitrary.** We don't pick them out of a hat, or throw darts at the wall. They're carefully-calculated benchmarks we need to hit in order to fund this campaign and have the resources required to win in 2024.
The truth is, with Ilhan already one of the right wing's top targets in Congress, hitting these goals each and every month can make the difference between so much in this campaign.
Getting on the air with one more TV ad... or not.
Opening field offices across the district... or not.
Fully funding our voter outreach efforts and GOTV operations in the days before Election Day... or not.
Put simply? _Winning..._ or not.
When it comes to fundraising, it's so important that we're all in this together. Because Ilhan doesn't have super PACs behind her, or billionaire mega-donors propping up this campaign — she has us. So please:
**[Can Ilhan count on you to chip in $3 or anything you can to help ensure we have what it takes to win this race? Your support means everything to this movement.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-nov23.oBEWmx&refcode=em231121-1-t3&t=2&akid=747%2E791427%2E8Uo0Bg)

name: Kim Nguyen-Penaloza
subject: grateful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kim Nguyen for Congress
body:
We’re coming up on Thanksgiving and I just want to say how thankful I am for you .

With your support over the last several months, we successfully united the movement to flip CA-45 blue and kick MAGA extremists like Michelle Steel out of Congress in 2024.

Labor leaders like SEIU , the National Union of Healthcare Workers , and the Orange County Labor Federation know that I will always fight alongside workers to make sure corporate executives are held accountable and no one is allowed to put profits over people.

Federal leaders like Reps. Katie Porter , Lou Correa , Linda Sanchez , and Jill Tokuda support our campaign because I’m committed to the families and communities across Southern California who currently do not have a voice in Congress with Michelle Steel representing them.

As a Vietxican daughter of a Mexican immigrant and a Vietnamese refugee, I have the support of organizations like ASPIRE PAC , BOLD PAC , and PODER PAC because they know I will work hard on behalf of marginalized communities in Orange County.

I couldn’t be more excited and proud to be heading into the Primary Election with the endorsement of the California Democratic Party and the support of Democrats everywhere.

But Thanksgiving and the holiday season also remind me of why I’m in this race in the first place. From gas to go visit family to groceries for a Thanksgiving feast, rising costs make everything harder for working people to afford, including the holidays.

I’m grateful to my family and my supporters for making this campaign possible – but I know that our work is just getting started.

For now, from my family to yours, have a happy and restful Thanksgiving. You’ll hear more from us after the holiday!

– Kim

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kbn-footer?amount=25]

clean_body: We’re coming up on Thanksgiving and I just want to say how thankful I am for you . With your support over the last several months, we successfully united the movement to flip CA-45 blue and kick MAGA extremists like Michelle Steel out of Congress in 2024. Labor leaders like SEIU , the National Union of Healthcare Workers , and the Orange County Labor Federation know that I will always fight alongside workers to make sure corporate executives are held accountable and no one is allowed to put profits over people. Federal leaders like Reps. Katie Porter , Lou Correa , Linda Sanchez , and Jill Tokuda support our campaign because I’m committed to the families and communities across Southern California who currently do not have a voice in Congress with Michelle Steel representing them. As a Vietxican daughter of a Mexican immigrant and a Vietnamese refugee, I have the support of organizations like ASPIRE PAC , BOLD PAC , and PODER PAC because they know I will work hard on behalf of marginalized communities in Orange County. I couldn’t be more excited and proud to be heading into the Primary Election with the endorsement of the California Democratic Party and the support of Democrats everywhere. But Thanksgiving and the holiday season also remind me of why I’m in this race in the first place. From gas to go visit family to groceries for a Thanksgiving feast, rising costs make everything harder for working people to afford, including the holidays. I’m grateful to my family and my supporters for making this campaign possible – but I know that our work is just getting started. For now, from my family to yours, have a happy and restful Thanksgiving. You’ll hear more from us after the holiday! – Kim DONATE [] Democrat Kim Nguyen-Penaloza is running for Congress in CA-45, one of the most competitive districts in the entire nation. name: Casey4Congress
subject: The latest news for you
body:
Hmong New Years 2023
| | | |
---
| Hmong New Years 2023
Join Mike Casey this Saturday, November 25th, at the Hmong New Year celebration amidst the vibrant and loving Hmong community at the River Center in St. Paul. While the event runs from 9 AM to 9 PM, Mike will be present from 11 AM to 1 PM. He will be connecting with the brave Hmong veterans who have honorably served, acknowledging their sacrifices. Mike is committed to advocating for policies that recognize Hmong veterans as U.S. veterans and ensuring they receive the benefits they deserve. He is also looking forward to engaging with the steadfast families of the Hmong community and local small business owners, discussing the significant changes he plans to implement. These efforts aim to benefit not only Congressional District 4 but also to extend beyond, as Mike is dedicated to preserving the American dream for everyone.

Location: River Center, 175 Kellogg Blvd, St Paul, MN 55102
Time: 9 AM - 9 PM. Mike will be present from 11AM - 1PM

We look forward to seeing you all there!
Help Mike Casey Retire Betty!

name: Adam Schiff
subject: I need you to contribute to Josh Riley’s campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-riley [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-riley]
Friends,
Hey, it’s Adam Schiff. I’m reaching out to you personally because I want you to join me in supporting Democrat Josh Riley and Serve America. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-riley]
If you have been following my work, then you know that I am deeply concerned about the future of our Democracy and our country. We cannot allow right-wing extremists to hijack our Democracy, and undermine the values and ideals that make us who we are as Americans. We just can’t.
That’s why electing pro-Democracy, pro-Rule of Law candidates like Josh Riley to maintain our House Democratic Majority is so critical.
Friend, Josh’s race in Upstate New York is among the most competitive in the entire country. The Hill has named it one of seven races that could determine control of the House, and the Cook Political Report is naming it a TOSS-UP.
This is a monumental opportunity for Josh’s people-powered movement to prove its strength before the election. Can I count on you to split $25 between Josh’s campaign and Serve America today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-riley]
Thank you for stepping up at this critical moment,
Congressman Adam Schiff

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: The potential for fair maps is here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
Today is a big day for Wisconsin. The Wisconsin Supreme Court will begin hearing oral arguments on a lawsuit challenging Wisconsin’s heavily gerrymandered legislative maps.
This case could strike down one of the most aggressively gerrymandered maps in the country. Fair maps and competitive races could return to Wisconsin in 2024.
**With fair maps, we’ll finally have the opportunity to win a legislative majority and undo the damage Republicans have caused across Wisconsin.**
[**So please, can you contribute $3 to our special fund dedicated to flipping the legislative majority in Wisconsin? Your contribution will help us turn Wisconsin blue up and down the ballot.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-nov23.S9Wq-Z&refcode=em231121-1-t2&t=1&akid=5014%2E196590%2Epnhw_T)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Express Donate: $3](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1271?c0=longrunpac-em-nov23.Wd934-&amount=3&refcode=em231121-1-t2&t=20&akid=5014%2E196590%2Epnhw_T)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=longrunpac-em-nov23.CgSNiL&refcode=em231121-1-t2&t=21&akid=5014%2E196590%2Epnhw_T)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=longrunpac-em-nov23.gIT6a7&refcode=em231121-1-t2&t=22&akid=5014%2E196590%2Epnhw_T)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-nov23.NckzPg&refcode=em231121-1-t2&t=23&akid=5014%2E196590%2Epnhw_T)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-nov23.h_CoRO&refcode=em231121-1-t2&t=24&akid=5014%2E196590%2Epnhw_T)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-nov23.S9Wq-Z&refcode=em231121-1-t2&t=25&akid=5014%2E196590%2Epnhw_T)
This is huge. And it's possible because YOU helped elect Justice Janet Protasiewicz in April, bringing a liberal majority to the Supreme Court for the first time in over a decade.
For 12 years, Republicans in the Wisconsin State Legislature have abused their power to silence the voice of Wisconsinites.
They’ve forced through voter suppression laws, attacks on unions and collective bargaining, and kept in place Wisconsin’s draconian 1849 ban on abortion.
Now is our chance to unseat those Republicans and turn Wisconsin blue up and down the ballot.
[**If you can, please contribute $3, or whatever you can afford, to our fund to win Wisconsin and take back the legislative majority.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-nov23.S9Wq-Z&refcode=em231121-1-t2&t=26&akid=5014%2E196590%2Epnhw_T)
Our fight for Wisconsin continues, and I hope you will stand by my side.
\- Mandela Barnes

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. name: Bob Casey via Alex-Padilla.com
subject: New GOP opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
#

_Hi friend, it’s Alex. Before you log off to spend time with your family this Thanksgiving, I wanted to reach out and share this note from my friend Bob Casey of Pennsylvania. Thanksgiving is historically one of the slowest fundraising periods of the whole year, and with his new GOP opponent, I’m sure he’d really appreciate[**any support we can throw his way._](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-november23-casey.0TmxzN&refcode=em231121-1-30L&t=1&akid=1608%2E159979%2E7Y84rt)**
_Thanks and happy Thanksgiving! -- Alex_
* * *
Big news, friend: **Mitch McConnell’s hand-picked candidate just launched his campaign for Pennsylvania’s Senate seat.**
McConnell has already said he’s targeting Pennsylvania, and this entrance to the race all but ensures that national Republicans are going to flood our state with an unprecedented amount of outside money to run attack ads against me.
**In fact, Mitch McConnell already promised this candidate super PAC support.**
**Republicans are committed to doing in 2024 what they almost did in 2022 and 2020 – flip Pennsylvania. Senate control could come down to our race, so we need to respond right away.**
[**This is a make-or-break moment, and we need all hands on deck to fight back. We need to raise $75,000 to prepare for the incoming attacks – can I count on you to split a donation between Alex Padilla and my campaign now?](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-november23-casey.0TmxzN&refcode=em231121-1-30L&t=2&akid=1608%2E159979%2E7Y84rt)**
_If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between Alex Padilla and Bob Casey instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $5](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/2337?c0=ap-em-november23-casey.FhiZ85&refcode=em231121-1-30L&amount=5&t=3&akid=1608%2E159979%2E7Y84rt)**
---
| **[DONATE OTHER](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/2337?c0=ap-em-november23-casey.FhiZ85&refcode=em231121-1-30L&t=4&akid=1608%2E159979%2E7Y84rt)**
---
With the presidential race at the top of the ticket in 2024, Pennsylvania will be a key battleground and could see more political spending than any other state. Plus, we know this opponent could self-fund this race and outspend us – on top of the immense super PAC and national Republican establishment support Mitch McConnell has promised him.
[**If you’ve been waiting for the right time to support our campaign, this is it. We can’t let ourselves be outspent, so will you chip in whatever you can to Alex Padilla and my campaign to help us raise early resources and compete?](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-november23-casey.0TmxzN&refcode=em231121-1-30L&t=5&akid=1608%2E159979%2E7Y84rt)**
Thank you for being on our team,
Bob Casey

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=6&akid=1608%2E159979%2E7Y84rt)

subject: Happy Thanksgiving!

body:
With Thanksgiving just around the corner, I want to wish everyone a happy and safe holiday. I hope you will join me in taking a few moments to reflect on the blessings of life and how lucky we are to live in the United States. |
---
[](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=3a9ddc98362e42ee99fed45fefac675c&_e=E8vOLU53fr3vtoIIbWXeuqMf4tyq3D9mJs-gT_6Uo1HJWtZhdR6fmvpe9ietZ2z2CMEEG4FWDpfnaem9ucdYoXTko5_vG672uhxr0NFriSyIHwmITlITn7wQ5l0de0-zmsKCi-MAOZIyyE8MVqIL9GGj8pTnBY3hdqLCbGih8kqxSAXZcqCIwWX3wJXyJZvciOTjZ3AaJC1beAHYiyCKy4-0IZEfd0lqbhMyDFfqYM04rU99kkpSRP21uo2vgZ8eHuzUXJgXJYd2sxtxQt041jNCnAf6j0hECciPG8dSPiWroVBgsvxjflxP8Um8yE7UajDz_emfjRSeJNpu39AEtBtDcJcmCkdFBELL7W1XX2uE8-qVO4Lf_zyX_bE8y_uNZvOlOZNBH6R3MZMSZKShRjZPxgMCroZcT6-TZYRpEz8%3D)

_**The Mackenzie Minute**_

* * *
Peter,

With Thanksgiving just around the corner, I want to wish everyone a happy and safe holiday. I hope you will join me in taking a few moments to reflect on the blessings of life and how lucky we are to live in the United States.

I spent most of the past week serving my constituents in Harrisburg and around my district, but that didn’t stop our campaign from continuing to build momentum.

• Northampton County Councilman Tom Giovanni Endorsement
• Upper Macungie Township Supervisor Kathy Rader Endorsement
• Upcoming Breakfast Fundraiser, Friday, Dec. 15th

As always, if you need to get in contact with my campaign, please feel free to reach out at (484) 347-8777.

All the Best,
[](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=3a9ddc98362e42ee99fed45fefac675c&_e=E8vOLU53fr3vtoIIbWXeuqMf4tyq3D9mJs-gT_6Uo1HJWtZhdR6fmvpe9ietZ2z2CMEEG4FWDpfnaem9ucdYoXTko5_vG672uhxr0NFriSyIHwmITlITn7wQ5l0de0-zmsKCi-MAOZIyyE8MVqIL9GGj8pTnBY3hdqLCbGih8kqxSAXZcqCIwWX3wJXyJZvciOTjZ3AaJC1beAHYiyCKy4-0IZEfd0lqbhMyDFfqYM04rU99kkpSRP21uo2vgZ8eHuzUXJgXJYd2sxtxQt041qexBAjpozjGDojqKazmBdyqaq-87UaM2FC-sy76T8Qek1dtdehu-PYa7AG7NoLjSpR6NIk8Nw699AhWUsLBaagJSOSv4J6pnPTTAw5K8FEv-kEGdMf1AUSOVTSxgMTS7YcJe4DJxsVfBvY0uclHd-o%3D)

* * *
**NEWS**
* * *
**Northampton County Councilman Tom Giovanni Endorsement**
Joining an already long list of local leaders in endorsing our campaign is Northampton County Councilman Tom Giovanni. The Councilman said simply “Ryan Mackenzie is the best choice to fight for Northampton County, and our nation, in Congress.”

* * *
**Upper Macungie Township Supervisor Kathy Rader Endorsement**
Thank you also to Upper Macungie Township Supervisor Kathy Rader for her endorsement and continued trust in me! Kathy said, “I have known Ryan for over 10 years and he always works hard to serve his constituents and community. He has my full endorsement and support”

* * *
**Upcoming Breakfast Fundraiser, Friday, Dec. 15th**
Please join me on Friday, December 15th for my Breakfast Fundraiser.

Location: Saucon Valley Country Club: 2050 Saucon Valley Rd. Bethlehem, PA 18015

Date/Time: Friday, December 15th, 8:00 A.M. to 9:30 A.M.

Kindly RSVP to Andres Weller P: 484-347-8777 or info@mackenzieforcongress.com

* * *
If you would like to be part of our team, please reach out at info@mackenzieforcongress.com or (484) 347-8777.

name: Congressman Chris Deluzio
subject: Fighting for our Common Good means putting people first.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
body:
Working folks have been left behind for far too long
| | |
---
Hi Derek,

I’m about to tell you what fighting for our Common Good means to me, but before I do, I have to ask if there is anything you can **[contribute to Chrissy Houlahan and my campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73767645/439549862/1582103613?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk920-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjQ2YWVkNy05ZTg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iOOumzQ8xrhRKeSJWQapKHKxfYZbYqi2cLYnoacFUaQ=)** I'm facing a GOP that is hell-bent on growing their right-wing House majority in 2024 – no matter who they have to make promises to.
**[The current GOP field against me? Pro-Trumpers with Koch-funded support. Can you help support my reelection in this top targeted swing district?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73767646/439549887/1582103613?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk920-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjQ2YWVkNy05ZTg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iOOumzQ8xrhRKeSJWQapKHKxfYZbYqi2cLYnoacFUaQ=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73767647/439549907/1582103613?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk920-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjQ2YWVkNy05ZTg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iOOumzQ8xrhRKeSJWQapKHKxfYZbYqi2cLYnoacFUaQ=)
---
I’m in Congress to fight for our Common Good. To me, that means putting people first.

It means having a government that builds the best infrastructure in the world, and having our union brothers and sisters building it.

It means fighting for women and all people to have the freedom to make their own decisions about their bodies and health care.

It means protecting hard-earned veterans benefits, Social Security, and Medicare. It means taking on the corporate jagoffs and their unchecked power that’s devastated our communities, hurt workers, and crushed small businesses.

National Republicans and the radical right are happy to leave working folks behind because they care more about power and profit than **about us here in Western PA.**
**[We must defeat the radical right across the country, and right here in Beaver and Allegheny Counties. With you on our team, I know that we can do it. If there’s anything you can chip in to help Chrissy Houlahan and me win in the fight for our Common Good, I would appreciate it.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73767648/439549917/1582103613?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk920-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjQ2YWVkNy05ZTg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iOOumzQ8xrhRKeSJWQapKHKxfYZbYqi2cLYnoacFUaQ=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73767649/439549920/1582103613?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk920-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjQ2YWVkNy05ZTg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iOOumzQ8xrhRKeSJWQapKHKxfYZbYqi2cLYnoacFUaQ=)

Thank you, as always, for your support.

Congressman Chris Deluzio
| Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
P.O. Box 222
Devon, PA 19333

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: A quick message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress
body:
Thank you so much for being part of our movement, friend. We couldn't do it without you.
Hi there,
I know this is a busy time, so this will be a quick message. I'm reaching out because we just passed the halfway point of our final fundraising quarter of the year.
**It's critical that we end 2023 strong so that we can keep fighting for good wages, affordable healthcare, a cleaner Great Lakes ecosystem, and a stronger Heartland.**
If you can chip in even $5 to support that mission, it would mean so much to me and everyone on our team. To show you how much we appreciate your support, friend, I had my team make you a personal contribution link:

subject: I’ll let you in on a secret:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.
My fellow Americans – this is Mike Johnson.
| |

---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=d0bfb784403f4c889f7ff689e8df4ab0&_t=DmHsthtCfmSZhgHP-6slyWhWZ1GQo0Xw8vaRt4wK_yAfdc4gpwD9AQ1ll2_cau7IGs42Nr1W34LeGfhS5zJtCbua-PX-R9aTNMFMqBTzmmU%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=d0bfb784403f4c889f7ff689e8df4ab0&_t=DmHsthtCfmSZhgHP-6slyWhWZ1GQo0Xw8vaRt4wK_yAfdc4gpwD9AQ1ll2_cau7IGs42Nr1W34LeGfhS5zJtCbua-PX-R9aTNMFMqBTzmmU%3D)

| My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

_**[This is a longer email but I'm humbly asking you to read it start to finish.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d0bfb784403f4c889f7ff689e8df4ab0&_e=IuvW5UyIov0lupCn4ns7SvBV7Ts6HzWi2FZhNGA__2aMQDzD6_DNcyRmnbYhLtbKQTtdQVYqqsBYRr61LPlGv3E4_pH_qsbLyKtuffDjh_wsEIY1s2VcUd4pWHUnUAY6QleebmoksJEvim7Pj8dF8NA-Qr0yMQEpeAEqRvsn7aScBqWm2MhFxS4HfBc5H_sY6jn3DCmIdg11sW43TvmSm8VM7REmQqbn9zCDElkJx4ODdr89xVlWaMXmi_RIhNiPTMV2iaEo6CAaGu2hsNqI0vtKdiHLJMc5T44fI5wb5wEzJQKSHlWPSlBy9d_tagZvd2zQ_1IBJfTn2jEz0gi4rKiCKO0boarTuXH0IZtB1a1_aqFs7f-mUMD5jNUf52isNx8_YWdmVumwz3f2n6L3U3xeAiZm1Gs4pQwoYMzmvb4%3D "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.")**_

Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me.
* The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC.
* Politico fired off this headline: _" Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson."_
* And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports.

Look:

These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. _But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not _really_ the goal..._

The _real_ goal of this political ambush is two-fold: **1)** smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and **2)** scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats.

**It 's about power and money. Nothing else.**

That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. _**[So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I'm teaming up with my fellow Louisianian - Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d0bfb784403f4c889f7ff689e8df4ab0&_e=IuvW5UyIov0lupCn4ns7SvBV7Ts6HzWi2FZhNGA__2aMQDzD6_DNcyRmnbYhLtbKQTtdQVYqqsBYRr61LPlGv3E4_pH_qsbLyKtuffDjh_wsEIY1s2VcUd4pWHUnUAY6QleebmoksJEvim7Pj8dF8NA-Qr0yMQEpeAEqRvsn7aScBqWm2MhFxS4HfBc5H_sY6jn3DCmIdg11sW43TvmSm8VM7REmQqbn9zCDElkJx4ODdr89xVlWaMXmi_RIhNiPvxPURpsvQ6ryfkTO6FS_ePH1_zVEACe6-AmjAwpjMOozErJx1NPrzCNCNo-YbTjKzeVkRkwM_S5M7Ro81gk5WF-XbF-MZkr65dR_qRuKFrJnbncE1qCjhA8R-Pn-E_J_7sw2uheF51FXxD7Iq0uwatTeee8ABsdUFCXmxG0ryXs%3D "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.")**_

It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country.

**If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority.**

So here's my final pitch to you:

We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now.

The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this.

Let me make myself perfectly clear:

_I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative._

_**[The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d0bfb784403f4c889f7ff689e8df4ab0&_e=IuvW5UyIov0lupCn4ns7SvBV7Ts6HzWi2FZhNGA__2aMQDzD6_DNcyRmnbYhLtbKQTtdQVYqqsBYRr61LPlGv3E4_pH_qsbLyKtuffDjh_wsEIY1s2VcUd4pWHUnUAY6QleebmoksJEvim7Pj8dF8NA-Qr0yMQEpeAEqRvsn7aScBqWm2MhFxS4HfBc5H_sY6jn3DCmIdg11sW43TvmSm8VM7REmQqbn9zCDElkJx4ODdr89xVlWaMXmi_RIhNiPzvRBq0bU2bnmLM7euBobx0kYm2zveAG7eoA53RBjEZp0BOnWm4rAMNk8r81pbRbhRnp3GfbuZGPDYwzUf2FRXxIu35_9KRidjffT4eNxd1rhdYRAmT8KR3EPG-mureSMHA4yYAa7qqIkxJAPyYTNuCBXM8LndehGlzdFjtbWevc%3D "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.")**_

That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in?
---

clean_body: This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish. My fellow Americans – this is Mike Johnson. | | | | | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson. "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish." Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me. The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC. Politico fired off this headline: " Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson." And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports. Look: These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not really the goal... The real goal of this political ambush is two-fold: 1) smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and 2) scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats. It 's about power and money. Nothing else. That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month." It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country. If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority. So here's my final pitch to you: We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now. The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this. Let me make myself perfectly clear: I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative. "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING." That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in? Thanks for all you do. In liberty, Speaker Mike Johnson | "Speaker Mike Johnson" | | | "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!" This is Steve Scalise. As your Majority Leader, I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY" at your earliest convenience. It's important. This is urgent, Peter.

Yesterday, a federal appeals court ruled that private citizens or civil rights groups aren’t allowed to sue under a key section of the Voting Rights Act.

**Quick Explainer:** Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act prohibits laws and maps that discriminate against voters based on race. _This new ruling would stop enforcement of the Voting Rights Act._

Friend,
A Democrat in Congress – who takes credit for impeaching me – just declared on national TV that _**“[President Trump] has to be ELIMINATED.”**_
He’s now trying to walk back the statement, claiming that he misspoke.
But it wasn’t a mistake. His only mistake was letting the TRUTH slip on live TV.
Every single Washington Democrat is panicking over our incredible polling numbers. They know I’d dominate Crooked Joe in a LANDSLIDE... _barring some illegal act of Election Interference._
And after an FBI raid, 4 wrongful arrests and indictments, and even a mugshot failed to break us, they will now take DRASTIC MEASURES to try and “eliminate” me.
So far, we have prevailed against every single attack that’s come our way and emerged stronger than ever before – and I owe it all to our grassroots donors like YOU who have peacefully defended our movement.
From the bottom of my heart, I want to THANK YOU for defending our movement.
But truth be told, our _NATION_ thanks you... Because you aren’t just defending our movement. You are defending the very fabric of our Republic that is being ripped to pieces by the Radical Left.
And now, our nation needs you once again as Democrats accidentally revealed that they’re plotting to “ELIMINATE” the leading candidate for the White House and the leading voice of the hardworking patriots of our country.

clean_body: | | | Friend, A Democrat in Congress – who takes credit for impeaching me – just declared on national TV that “[President Trump] has to be ELIMINATED.” He’s now trying to walk back the statement, claiming that he misspoke. But it wasn’t a mistake. His only mistake was letting the TRUTH slip on live TV. Every single Washington Democrat is panicking over our incredible polling numbers. They know I’d dominate Crooked Joe in a LANDSLIDE... barring some illegal act of Election Interference. And after an FBI raid, 4 wrongful arrests and indictments, and even a mugshot failed to break us, they will now take DRASTIC MEASURES to try and “eliminate” me. So far, we have prevailed against every single attack that’s come our way and emerged stronger than ever before – and I owe it all to our grassroots donors like YOU who have peacefully defended our movement. From the bottom of my heart, I want to THANK YOU for defending our movement. But truth be told, our NATION thanks you... Because you aren’t just defending our movement. You are defending the very fabric of our Republic that is being ripped to pieces by the Radical Left. And now, our nation needs you once again as Democrats accidentally revealed that they’re plotting to “ELIMINATE” the leading candidate for the White House and the leading voice of the hardworking patriots of our country. | Thank you, | Donald J. body:
This is why I’m in the fight.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73769749/439555641/-849459103?refcode=ea.332c6af0-a088-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ms=ea.332c6af0-a088-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzJjNmFmMC1hMDg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZO8g2Rzd8fYU2BIlZhLFBmOUgAD-qEpM0JQaw5KjGo0=&emci=cfd5eedc-ee87-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=332c6af0-a088-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=46764483)
---
**_[_I don’t want to take up too much of your time. I just need two minutes right now to explain why I’m in this Senate race. Then, I have to ask you and Democrats everywhere to step up to invest in our success._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73769750/439555642/209297649?refcode=ea.332c6af0-a088-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ms=ea.332c6af0-a088-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzJjNmFmMC1hMDg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZO8g2Rzd8fYU2BIlZhLFBmOUgAD-qEpM0JQaw5KjGo0=)_** I’ve heard from so many of my constituents who fear for their future because of politicians with an extremist, dangerous agenda. _I’m in this race for them._ Tennesseans are scared because Senators like Marsha Blackburn brazenly vote to take away their rights or to strip funding from life-saving programs that help Americans build a good life. But our fight to defeat Marsha won’t be easy. Just last year, outside groups spent over $1 BILLION to elect extreme Republican Senators. We know they’ll spend big again in next year’s elections. Republican Attorney General Ken Paxton of Texas announced a fraud
probe into Media Matters for America Monday night. Paxton launched the
probe into the left-wing media non-profit after it released a report
Thursday claiming that advertisements for major companies regularly
showed up next to posts from neo-Nazis and white supremacists,
according to a release. Apple, Disney, IBM and [...]

LARRY ELDER: Gavin Newsom Conveniently Cleans Up San Francisco Before
Rolling Out Red Carpet For Xi

At least California Gov. Gavin Newsom, the former mayor of San
Francisco, admits it. On the eve of a visit to San Francisco by
China’s Xi Jinping, the city somehow, someway cleared out downtown
homeless encampments. Newsom flat-out cops to the reason why. The

_**The Corrupt Democrats.**_

From the moment Donald Trump came down the golden escalator in 2016, they have been determined to stop him - no matter what it takes. They haven't stopped trying to end the America First Movement since, and they are raising money to attack us head-on. We must be doing something right.

We are calling an emergency meeting tonight to discuss our plan to WIN in 2024. That means DEFENDING the House Majority, FLIPPING the Senate, and TAKING back the White House.

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: NEWSWEEK: The Left's Attacks on Mike Johnson Can Only Backfire
body:
| | | |
---
[](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=8bc9ced6042047b78a96230257dd6e05&_e=VMpd6CZoEmII2OnQcP14Hxr2ELL4Z26MRwygM5QDomCkshxAJK2zk4PAPunBW5v7u8hX2NBr5B7i1-X9yOLZFmBKPpm3Zm70wDTAcK8vr_ufR6FzjPxyl2BQnsmWVJN34T1m2lQ1bajlSs5RlkYfCM4gGiKOzyf4Z2xRqqINOnOh0q5WiIqYnsU363svzypcxC_Pz6VxrtJAhERN6febag%3D%3D)
---
_**The Left's Attacks on Mike Johnson Can Only Backfire**_ By Bobby Jindal
---
Liberal Democrats and their allies in the media are beside themselves. The new U.S. House speaker, Mike Johnson (R-La.), must be ridiculed because he simply does not fit into refined Washington culture. He supports Donald Trump, an absolute no-no. He thinks Democrats cheat on elections, tsk-tsk. He is a barbarian who thinks it honorable to protect innocent human life, including unborn babies. He is a Neanderthal who believes in the Second Amendment. Worst of all, he believes in... wait for it... God! Oh, the horror! _The Daily Beast_ described Mike as "a far-right, election-denying, anti-abortion, anti-gay marriage, pro-gun, ultra-religious Republican." This guy must be from a different age, or maybe from flyover country. The press reports with bated breath that he attends church and actually admits to believing in Jesus. What kind of nutjob are we talking about here? Bill Maher mocked Mike's faith by comparing him to the Maine shooter, suggesting the former's devotion was not that different from the latter's "hearing voices." [**FINISH READING ON NEWSWEEK.COM**](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=8bc9ced6042047b78a96230257dd6e05&_e=VMpd6CZoEmII2OnQcP14H5KOvBAiK5d4Lfax3kDyyo5LupAhv9hHfQixNqdX4rrmvuwu_RKzW7H7GJP5kUoHxYyNLLZWTjpgcWRx9egJ0DITnkp_8jQXPHQ5mfkhOICC2_y4fwJ6mX8pNVrEVbZwpREEIG3SKPNnUVmPlnMLOZorJfdRwDt_QwyOU1blK3vynh4Gnyn42dfPbwBNtQJ-JKpUWly0u7Efd0RbrXwlf539UuDBE4-z3GZT5GihD4jd8zYmy3O6xLptqqsmNpgoBZf7D2WKqNwkgJ-y136X6No%3D)

name: Vasquez HQ
subject: We agree with… Chip Roy?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress

We can’t believe we’re saying this, but... **we actually agree with him!** Republicans have gotten NOTHING done since they took over the House majority.

If Democrats had the majority, they would be working together to lower costs for working families and protect reproductive rights. **But all Republicans have managed to do is fight amongst themselves and play petty political games.**

name: Our Revolution
subject: Join Barbara Lee and call for a ceasefire >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Rep. Barbara Lee is the only candidate for U.S. Senate in California calling for a ceasefire in Gaza.

She’s the most progressive candidate in the race, and we need her voice in the Senate more than ever.

Barbara stood alone as the sole vote against a blank check for war in Afghanistan. She received hate mail and threats for her courageous stand, but was vindicated by history. Now she’s the lone candidate in this Senate race demanding a ceasefire and she needs us by her side.

We need leaders like Barbara Lee who stand up for peace over war. Will you add your name to stand with Barbara Lee and show that our progressive movement has her back? (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12488?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231121_PT_leeceasefireRS_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_leeceasefire&t=1011&akid=4924%2E5885482%2ECYhYJr)

ADD YOUR NAME (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12488?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231121_PT_leeceasefireRS_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_leeceasefire&t=1012&akid=4924%2E5885482%2ECYhYJr)

While 66% of Americans (and 80% of Democrats!) support a ceasefire in Gaza, only 4% of our Congress members have called for one. Lawmakers’ choices should reflect the will of the people they represent, especially on an issue as consequential as war.

When we have a Peace Candidate like Barbara Lee, it’s critical that we support them.

Peter Willis, add your name to show you stand with Barbara Lee and show her that our Progressive movement has her back! (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12488?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231121_PT_leeceasefireRS_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_leeceasefire&t=1013&akid=4924%2E5885482%2ECYhYJr)

When we organize, we win!

Our Revolution

name: Team Tuberville
subject: As we prepare for Thanksgiving...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
Share your thoughts >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/9a55e81e1ebdbfe23947229f28c3afba/44889cf694bc81c6c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Peter,

Thanksgiving is coming up fast this Thursday. I’m sure most folks reading this have done their grocery shopping for their holiday meal or are planning to do so soon.

Unfortunately, this trip to the store will serve as yet another sobering reminder...

Bidenflation is out of control and so many families are struggling these days – the cost of groceries are _13 PERCENT HIGHER_ than just a year ago!

Today, we want to hear from you on this: **Are you feeling the pain of Bidenflation at the grocery store?**

[**Take a moment now to let us know >>>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/9a55e81e1ebdbfe23947229f28c3afba/cfee17f052855dcec3d6b838967d376c/33013)

name: Andy Kim
subject: My boys
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
As we approach Thanksgiving, one thing is top of mind for me and many New Jerseyans.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73771761/439562932/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGM2OTcxNi1hNzg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UxF189hzcly3fKAB3Fi7Q_KG5Rd6VcZ0D5qGDW4z5I4=&emci=f1497852-8b88-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=e0c69716-a788-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=26261389)
---

| | As we approach Thanksgiving, one thing is top of mind for me and many New Jerseyans: **Our families.** There are a lot of reasons I ran for office, things like the power of good governance and belief in our democracy. **But for me what it really boils down to is two Jersey boys – a six-year-old and an eight-year-old – my boys.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73771762/439562933/-1197072038?refcode=2023-11-21-family&recurring=&amount=15&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=e0c69716-a788-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGM2OTcxNi1hNzg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UxF189hzcly3fKAB3Fi7Q_KG5Rd6VcZ0D5qGDW4z5I4=) In 2017, Republicans were trying to gut preexisting condition protections and make it harder for my family to get healthcare, so I got in the fight and ran for Congress. **Now I'm running because the indictment of Bob Menendez and our broken politics is eroding trust in our democracy.** I want our kids to grow up in a world where our leaders fight for the people who elected them, where corruption isn't tolerated, and where our democracy thrives. [**Our kids, and our families, deserve better than a broken America, and I'm willing to put in the work to get us there. name: Lucas Kunce for U.S. Senate
subject: The most competitive + affordable chance to flip a GOP-held U.S. Senate seat in 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Five reasons why your investment today in Missouri’s U.S. Senate race makes such a big impact:
#
Peter,
When you chip in toward our campaign to defeat Josh Hawley and elect Lucas Kunce, you’re not just helping us build a record-breaking grassroots movement — **you’re investing in the most competitive and affordable chance to flip a GOP-held U.S. Senate seat in 2024.**
**[CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39349?refcode=em20231121-4231&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4231%2E614464%2EcYrR84)**
Here’s what you need to know:
1. **Josh Hawley is seriously vulnerable.** In 2018, he won his Senate seat with only 51% of the vote — and after he exposed himself to be a fraud and a coward on January 6, his approval ratings became the worst of any GOP Senator running for re-election in 2024.
2. **Lucas Kunce is already in a _statistical tie_ with Hawley.** Multiple polls put Lucas and Hawley in a margin-of-error race for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat.
3. **Missourians have a history of taking back their power at the ballot box.** Since his last election, voters have broken with Hawley to approve measures that raised the minimum wage, expanded healthcare, and legalized weed with huge margins of victory. And after major recent wins for red state Democrats in Kentucky and Ohio, Missouri is next.
4. **Every $1 in Missouri can go nearly five times as far compared to states like Texas and Florida.** Our state has small media markets, which means we’ll be able to reach Missourians with Lucas’ message early and often — on TV, online, and on the ground.
5. **The stakes have never been higher.** With abortion rights and control of the U.S. Senate on the line next year, we can’t afford to let this opportunity here in Missouri go to waste.

**[ELECT LUCAS KUNCE: CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39349?refcode=em20231121-4231&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4231%2E614464%2EcYrR84)**
Lucas Kunce is working hard to build the record-breaking, worker-led coalition that can take advantage of this moment and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat next year.
**But with GOP insiders already spending millions of dollars to attack Lucas and prop up Hawley’s campaign, we need your help to do it, Peter.**
Missouri’s election-winning labor movement has started to unite behind Lucas — along with elected officials, community leaders, national organizations, and everyday people all across the state. But winning this race will be determined by our ability to keep up this grassroots momentum. So please:
**[Will you add a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford toward our campaign to replace Josh Hawley and elect Lucas Kunce to Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat? Our campaign doesn’t accept a penny from corporate PACs, so your early support really does make a big difference.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39349?refcode=em20231121-4231&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4231%2E614464%2EcYrR84)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39350?refcode=em20231121-4231&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=4231%2E614464%2EcYrR84) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39350?refcode=em20231121-4231&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=4231%2E614464%2EcYrR84) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39350?refcode=em20231121-4231&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=4231%2E614464%2EcYrR84) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39350?refcode=em20231121-4231&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=4231%2E614464%2EcYrR84) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39350?refcode=em20231121-4231&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=4231%2E614464%2EcYrR84) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39350?refcode=em20231121-4231&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=4231%2E614464%2EcYrR84) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39349?refcode=em20231121-4231&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=4231%2E614464%2EcYrR84)
---
Thanks for being part of our movement,
Team Lucas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20231121-4231-footer&t=11&refcode2=4231_614464_cYrR84&akid=4231%2E614464%2EcYrR84)**

body:
Monica’s extreme agenda is hurting TX-15 | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/tTBUZwcBH_2q13Ow12s-jc-9PHkp7BkSZ-MbOY7TNqbHMZZ7e6z8fxUUbQYxgrxk6a2v4Aw9Ux80o37VicMJ_2RUROn59OUiTeeVHLXdV7VQ6UP0B003zvnUXl-_g03doRjDnZY4lECJymg5GdE-dIbq4V__W2GHZrszcv928Y2-KlQGWOxMRVgkboUXG3N1wlKIFq10OO0Zrp1tQqfebKgyQI9qoGGLEnwAoXrYwONH-YVU8hfFCzHwqGhcCac2/41h/XfIF45kKSO-tec678eoynA/h0/QCBPD3BfpgdsTjJjKWUgNv-1oFn1TttbTaMQn28ZRPg)
---
Peter, can I have a few minutes of your time to share something with you? South Texas has been holding the short end of the stick for way too long because of Monica De La Cruz’s policies. **It’s not until you put our policies side-by-side that you're able to see the stark difference and see clearly why I’m the right leader to represent you in Washington.** Take a look at this: [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_nWWOg4TQbxiv2vvf5v-qeylD6dbCDni1Ksy2_XRzFmr5_HG_B24ZhWLxdjPQC3XaR-1uOLE9LL5Uop67AVK5dqnoYC306qa5E9nqa3t7spsID04gIvCveCYL5q3TNjE0d0QT9cDmr8qOeTncY4zZdeCOSJ-EYNeEOxMdDPeaLw3JtMLTOLNP_PXXT_K-3s-j7VFpkCcOkOa_0tHdpWl8kMP_CARkfptaCdCvv8dO94Hq1-83Yh-cTQIzySx1NGzc6I5fz6A70OR-gx7UlZ1kk6m7xd07wk6vHbUaIzlf59o/41h/XfIF45kKSO-tec678eoynA/h1/TMcBbp_uSspxZwPcwp3DxZez2_SGJXShBSPEdY5DB40)
Imagine for a moment. That could be your tia, mother, or beloved sister who is stripped of critical reproductive care. That could be your abuelos and abuelas or a family member with a disability who loses access to medication that keeps them alive. clean_body: Monica’s extreme agenda is hurting TX-15 | | | Peter, can I have a few minutes of your time to share something with you? South Texas has been holding the short end of the stick for way too long because of Monica De La Cruz’s policies. It’s not until you put our policies side-by-side that you're able to see the stark difference and see clearly why I’m the right leader to represent you in Washington. Take a look at this: Imagine for a moment. That could be your tia, mother, or beloved sister who is stripped of critical reproductive care. That could be your abuelos and abuelas or a family member with a disability who loses access to medication that keeps them alive. That could be the breadwinners in your family struggling long to make ends meet while billionaires enjoy more tax cuts. Peter, this race isn’t about me — it’s about you, the working people of TX-15 who wake up every day to earn a living and chase the American Dream. No politician, and certainly not Monica De La Cruz, has the right to deny you that. She should have to answer for her extreme agenda! Peter,

I am very excited to share this news with you: **The California Democratic Party has officially endorsed our campaign for the 27th Congressional District.**

This is a big honor and a big responsibility. I’m energized to continue campaigning hard for working families, and everyone in our district, to bring about positive change, and ultimately, unseat Mike Garcia in 2024.

**[It’s going to take all of us to unseat Garcia and give CA-27 the representation it deserves. clean_body: | = Peter, I am very excited to share this news with you: The California Democratic Party has officially endorsed our campaign for the 27th Congressional District. This is a big honor and a big responsibility. I’m energized to continue campaigning hard for working families, and everyone in our district, to bring about positive change, and ultimately, unseat Mike Garcia in 2024. = | **= It’s a huge opportunity that we can now focus our energy toward the head-to-head matchup with Mike Garcia. He has never been more vulnerable, and experts at the Cook Political Report have ranked this seat as “one of the most competitive and likely to flip” in 2024. We’re starting the hard work early here on Team Whitesides. But ramping up our on-the-ground operations to knock on more doors, make more phone calls, and reach every voter in CA-27 takes resources. That’s where supporters like you come in: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, George | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. name: =?utf-8?Q?Kevin=20Dellicker?=
subject: Dellicker Campaign Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEVIN DELLICKER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Happy Thanksgiving |
---
| | [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=3bfa3902f1&e=1090c5c412)
---
|
---
| | Happy Thanksgiving!

We are entering the Christmas season, a time for fellowship, good cheer, and gratitude for the abundant blessings we all share. I truly hope you get to relax and enjoy some quality time with friends and family.

Our campaign won’t slow down during the holidays, and we’ll keep talking about our plans for safe communities, good jobs, and strong families. But while people are in the Christmas Spirit, we want to remind everyone what public service is all about- helping our neighbors, especially those in need.

This December, the Dellicker for Congress campaign will host a series of charity fundraising receptions for three special organizations that are helping our neighbors across Pennsylvania’s 7th District every day.

The [Allentown Rescue Mission](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=25a3956f40&e=1090c5c412) is a faith-based non-profit that is rescuing, rehabilitating, and restoring homeless men. Our campaign will be collecting bed linens, t-shirts, and personal care items for their clients at a holiday meet-and-greet at [Korny’s Tavern](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=7beefef5a9&e=1090c5c412) in Coplay on Thursday, Dec. 14th from 6-8 PM.

The [Victory House of Lehigh Valley](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=1a54171071&e=1090c5c412) is a Bethlehem-based charity that provides homeless veterans with mental health care, transitional housing, and recovery assistance. We’ll be collecting bedsheets, socks, and other personal care items at the [Original Doughboy’s Pizza and Family Restaurant](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=a9095cc772&e=1090c5c412) in Wind Gap on Saturday, Dec. 16th at noon.

[Care Net](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=4e189ee6b3&e=1090c5c412) is a Lehighton-based pregnancy support center that provides free maternity care and assistance to women facing unplanned pregnancies. We will be receiving baby items and household supplies at a holiday reception at the [Batter’s Box](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=5609ff8474&e=1090c5c412) in Summit Hill on Monday, Dec. 18th from 6-8 PM.

All these holiday receptions are free and open to the public. We simply ask that you bring an item or gift card to donate to the charity as your admission ticket. Details about the receptions and items are available [here](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=716f75b616&e=1090c5c412). We’ll provide more information as we get closer on the [events](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=930b59e99e&e=1090c5c412) page of the campaign website, including drop-box locations for donated items if you can’t attend the events.

To RSVP for all three receptions, please email Michelle Jarrouj-Weaver at [Michelle@DellickerforCongress.com](mailto:Michelle@DellickerforCongress.com). My team could use your help organizing these events and spreading the word. We want to help these wonderful organizations and the men and women they serve as best we can. I hope you can attend. Thank you and God Bless.

**Keep America Free.**

_Kevin Dellicker is a husband and father who has lived in the Lehigh Valley for 40 years. He's the founder of a successful technology company and a 28-year veteran of the U.S. Armed Forces. Kevin's not running for Congress because he needs a job. He's running because he's got the experience, vision, and courage to defend our American way of life. _
---
|
---
| Get involved with Kevin Dellicker for Congress and help Keep America Free!

**Please consider volunteering and/or making a campaign donation.**
---
| [DONATE](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=048f9baecf&e=1090c5c412 "DONATE")
---
| [VOLUNTEER](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=c7e6b5774d&e=1090c5c412 "VOLUNTEER")
---
| If you wish to contribute by check, please mail it to Kevin Dellicker for Congress, P.O. Box 86, Germansville, PA 18053. Please write your employer and profession on the check to comply with federal campaign finance laws.

**Learn more about Kevin's campaign at[www.dellickerforcongress.com](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=94aeca8f09&e=1090c5c412). **

Thank you!
---
|
---
| The picture is from a meet-and-greet at Emmaus High School last week with students and staff interested in civic affairs. I take every opportunity to meet with young people, who have so much to offer our country and community.
---
|
---
|
---
| **UPCOMING EVENTS**
* **Reception with Lou Barletta** | Tue., Nov. 21 at 5 PM | Hazleton
* **Holiday Reception for Allentown Rescue Mission** | Thu., Dec. 14 from 6-8 PM | Korny's Tavern in Coplay
* **Holiday Reception for Victory House LV** | Sat., Dec. 16 at noon | Original Doughboy's Pizza in Wind Gap
* **Holiday Reception for Care Net** | Mon., Dec. 18 from 6-8 PM | The Batter's Box in Summit Hill

For additional information about upcoming events, please check the campaign [website](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=0a0fe41ef5&e=1090c5c412) or email [michelle@dellickerforcongress.com](mailto:https://www.pavoterservices.pa.gov/Pages/PollingPlaceInfo.aspx?subject=Events).

Follow us on Facebook: [https://www.facebook.com/KevinDellickerforCongress](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=c21fe23001&e=1090c5c412)
---
|
---
| Last week, I attended a reception for the Northwestern Lehigh Educational Foundation at Ridgeview Farm in New Tripoli. Then, I met with Lehigh University students and supporters at Seven Sirens brewery in Bethlehem and had a wonderful meet-and-greet in Fogelsville. We had our first Facebook Live event on Mon. at 7 PM. Plus all three of our sons came home for Thanksgiving!
---

name: Tim Sheehy, Navy SEAL
subject: Here we go shifting to the center again
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
Here we go again | [Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=87e399d35d88411cb697b5d9d9730eaa&_t=ntVfy3YXnJt1-6OHn1zOy86e4olmveGfmN8NRRIoyJLxdmVOiUeAix40frXQtvKPjEJjhJzG8JmNgUhpS5i9b20J5KIQufSjdnzRdCDjWlo%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=87e399d35d88411cb697b5d9d9730eaa&_t=ntVfy3YXnJt1-6OHn1zOy86e4olmveGfmN8NRRIoyJLxdmVOiUeAix40frXQtvKPjEJjhJzG8JmNgUhpS5i9b20J5KIQufSjdnzRdCDjWlo%3D)
