[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=87e399d35d88411cb697b5d9d9730eaa&_e=kKIsk2CBVLQLxbzkoZw47jO72qvL93dbbWKXlomki5BmkBnRrAbQes3gONQ92TV6sxJsvZTrPb_ODZ_4wSB5knXvXMs4Nyv0KFwm7bUAj9gIXkxszdSNLVGupoAcUCDac6QXsELd3FdEesd7-7KmF1wgjiWQdm9GkIWhRspbsFepMBM16rECcpkbz2SFtdL6mWGUZ6rbjNSubbCdNlo7kXbbi3ug-pMHZheUMzIKcvDbHIrMC83XnG1UZM2zMlBNfTXK84QRBTK9ehYpIo3ArzdVNUBuxverw5OahnC0aK4wIcRCV2yZOUhT-SUizPAB5KzPAGxcbY4fEqsPq_AgPYpSUl0SdWNjPb3L-iYeTfbcRFHckOmd-Dm4M3uQkIuksnnQO8MdrYIu7sCIeF2u-IGRV1-1jsAuIzfnnP94qnU%3D)

**_"It doesn't matter if you're Republican or Democrat. If you want commonsense policies, you want a balanced budget, you want a stronger economy, you want unleashed American energy, a secure border and commonsense foreign policy, then you better care about this race"_**
Peter,

My opponent recently debuted his first general election campaign ad, backed by over $500,000, thus beginning the "Tester two-step."

You might be wondering what the "Tester two-step" is, so let me explain.

Democrats from purple/red states often cannot win with Democrat support alone, so they must track toward the center to gain support from enough Republicans/independents to come out on top. It's a delicate balance that some do better than others. Unfortunately, this song and dance has become all too common in our era of polarized politics. **[Career politicians like Jon Tester say one thing and then do another.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=87e399d35d88411cb697b5d9d9730eaa&_e=kKIsk2CBVLQLxbzkoZw47jO72qvL93dbbWKXlomki5BmkBnRrAbQes3gONQ92TV6sxJsvZTrPb_ODZ_4wSB5knXvXMs4Nyv0KFwm7bUAj9gIXkxszdSNLVGupoAcUCDac6QXsELd3FdEesd7-7KmF1wgjiWQdm9GkIWhRspbsFepMBM16rECcpkbz2SFtdL6mWGUZ6rbjNSubbCdNlo7kXbbi3ug-pMHZheUMzIKcvDbHIrMC83XnG1UZM2zMlBNfTXK84QRBTK9ehYpIo3Ar1pg5GTh8jKpmrWRD8x4VguQac_OaxLpOEj5I42sw4h3edleTKt2n_Rx9F3NIWQDQ0wSt7QP5Hls_awJQh6wjkRGvCSKAiZc7FRzxOCVWb-Pm-qzxMU38cSyTKa5McI1E7Je3aU5P8VppQ4uQ7OtJgE%3D) **

Jon Tester loves nothing more than to pretend he's a moderate. He's used a familiar playbook to win some tough elections. But my team and I are ready to expose him for what he is: a two-faced fraud.

**Tester only pretends to be a moderate when he's running for election; the other five/six years he's a dyed-in-the-wool liberal who votes 91% of the time with Joe Biden. **

I'm asking for your help because what we have in front of us is the opportunity to defeat one of Biden's most loyal foot soldiers. I am prepared to give this race everything I've got, but I cannot do it alone. **[Whether you can spare $1 or $100, every penny raised will be spent in the most efficient possible way.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=87e399d35d88411cb697b5d9d9730eaa&_e=kKIsk2CBVLQLxbzkoZw47jO72qvL93dbbWKXlomki5BmkBnRrAbQes3gONQ92TV6sxJsvZTrPb_ODZ_4wSB5knXvXMs4Nyv0KFwm7bUAj9gIXkxszdSNLVGupoAcUCDac6QXsELd3FdEesd7-7KmF1wgjiWQdm9GkIWhRspbsFepMBM16rECcpkbz2SFtdL6mWGUZ6rbjNSubbCdNlo7kXbbi3ug-pMHZheUMzIKcvDbHIrMC83XnG1UZM2zMlBNfTXK84QRBTK9ehYpIo3Ar-876GYbGEHKrwjM2c4DQV83_QfdT14NOrZxnWMvIfft8C6G38Kb9JeW6QgzDNi8j1kK1G7dmKKeptTu_k60e5NXijM0We2fcEk6pM5gt2D05OpPUNsSOv8WK_c_Ij2fSGqwPG8Srfs0lxgrlXGmvog%3D)**

[**DEFEAT A BIDEN FOOT SOLDIER ->** ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=87e399d35d88411cb697b5d9d9730eaa&_e=kKIsk2CBVLQLxbzkoZw47jO72qvL93dbbWKXlomki5BmkBnRrAbQes3gONQ92TV6sxJsvZTrPb_ODZ_4wSB5knXvXMs4Nyv0KFwm7bUAj9gIXkxszdSNLVGupoAcUCDac6QXsELd3FdEesd7-7KmF1wgjiWQdm9GkIWhRspbsFepMBM16rECcpkbz2SFtdL6mWGUZ6rbjNSubbCdNlo7kXbbi3ug-pMHZheUMzIKcvDbHIrMC83XnG1UZM2zMlBNfTXK84QRBTK9ehYpIo3Ar06Ri0xLC9VJN9kTW92HUupEA2cCoGSB6RCzjCp7q5T88SXblUoYaEc3SkKjRSmVZpHje4DqVSCAhxaQQ1s9c8Tw5tnzzvioazxk6P60k8PGX4DzWMGFTLvM0bl3ytr7rQ4p7fK2bvdBUpdtrszkkMI%3D)

Tester's first ad of the 2024 campaign is an ode to ads he released during his previous campaigns. Unfortunately for Republicans in Montana, he's been able to lie his way to reelection twice with the same playbook. This time, however, **I will personally spoil his plans for another term.**

**If there is one thing I can't stand it's a liar. Voters deserve someone who will give it to them straight and represent their interests with integrity.**

If you agree, **[please help me defeat two-faced Tester by contributing any amount today.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=87e399d35d88411cb697b5d9d9730eaa&_e=kKIsk2CBVLQLxbzkoZw47jO72qvL93dbbWKXlomki5BmkBnRrAbQes3gONQ92TV6sxJsvZTrPb_ODZ_4wSB5knXvXMs4Nyv0KFwm7bUAj9gIXkxszdSNLVGupoAcUCDac6QXsELd3FdEesd7-7KmF1wgjiWQdm9GkIWhRspbsFepMBM16rECcpkbz2SFtdL6mWGUZ6rbjNSubbCdNlo7kXbbi3ug-pMHZheUMzIKcvDbHIrMC83XnG1UZM2zMlBNfTXK84QRBTK9ehYpIo3Ar9oHf7herf5lGzN6lRvX-hUHPcvIxcJw8-GQr0S0JpDEiAuCE_toV6A2I_cv-r8WSgL89p3qQ2xZ8i7Ko-ZXvAVwYHipC_916-gtTlFxvr0lLhTpp_oIrhjxT8_yr_A5JEMO2vms_0OEC0uGxL0lAHQ%3D)** Even if you can spare just a dollar, consider chipping in to help me ensure there is one less liar present in the Senate come January 2025.

clean_body: Here we go again | | "It doesn't matter if you're Republican or Democrat. If you want commonsense policies, you want a balanced budget, you want a stronger economy, you want unleashed American energy, a secure border and commonsense foreign policy, then you better care about this race" Peter, My opponent recently debuted his first general election campaign ad, backed by over $500,000, thus beginning the "Tester two-step." You might be wondering what the "Tester two-step" is, so let me explain. Democrats from purple/red states often cannot win with Democrat support alone, so they must track toward the center to gain support from enough Republicans/independents to come out on top. It's a delicate balance that some do better than others. Unfortunately, this song and dance has become all too common in our era of polarized politics. Jon Tester loves nothing more than to pretend he's a moderate. He's used a familiar playbook to win some tough elections. But my team and I are ready to expose him for what he is: a two-faced fraud. Tester only pretends to be a moderate when he's running for election; the other five/six years he's a dyed-in-the-wool liberal who votes 91% of the time with Joe Biden. I'm asking for your help because what we have in front of us is the opportunity to defeat one of Biden's most loyal foot soldiers. I am prepared to give this race everything I've got, but I cannot do it alone. Tester's first ad of the 2024 campaign is an ode to ads he released during his previous campaigns. name: CtrlAltRightDelete (via COURIER)
subject: MAGA’s long-term plan to seize power — explained
body:
Incitement to violence has become the far-right’s rallying cry.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73772193/439564930/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTE0YzVhOWYtYTg4OC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-HP3Duj1UzIuTh770Ci9OVV-35ZGs-Tm8lOXnsh9NJU=&emci=7bebc7ea-8188-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=e14c5a9f-a888-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=14016711)
Over a year ago, Paul Pelosi, the husband of Nancy Pelosi, was brutally attacked by David DePape in the Pelosi’s San Francisco home.
DePape’s trial was last week. While both DePape and Paul Pelosi testified, DePape made news because he detailed his horrifying path from developing an obsession with online conspiracy theories to his violent attack on Pelosi.
The jury convicted DePape. **But that's not where this story ends, Peter.**
Last year’s attack on Paul Pelosi isn’t an isolated incident. Increasingly, **Republicans and right-wing media are showing a disturbing willingness to incite violence for political gain.**
**[We'll explain more in a moment, but if you're ready to support honest journalism that won't whitewash the GOP's extremism, can you chip in $5 or anything you can afford today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73772194/439564938/-924895373?refcode=em20231121&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTE0YzVhOWYtYTg4OC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-HP3Duj1UzIuTh770Ci9OVV-35ZGs-Tm8lOXnsh9NJU=)**
**Make no mistake: Incitement to violence has become a staple tactic of today's Republican Party.**
Moreover, it's become increasingly clear that many Americans have developed a _dangerously high tolerance_ for living with this reality.
But this isn't surprising, Peter. Far-right misinformation machines like Donald Trump and his allies in right-wing media like Fox News and OAN have been slowly desensitizing viewers to extreme, dehumanizing rhetoric about political opponents for years.
**The use of violence has been key to the MAGA movement's long-term endgame of seizing power and destroying our democracy.**
In the last week alone, after Trump allies **leaked plans** for what is nothing short of the _complete dismantling of our democracy_ , Trump doubled down on this rhetoric in a Veterans Day speech, referring to his political opponents as **"vermin"** and promising to **"root them out"** — echoing the same language used by European fascists.
As the 2024 election approaches, all indications are that Trump isn't going to ratchet this language down. **But we won't be sitting on the sidelines.**
Our talented team of journalists at COURIER are working hard day in and day out to provide the accessible, intentional reporting and journalism that Americans deserve. **[Can you pitch in $5 or anything that makes sense for you today to support our extraordinary slate of journalists?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73772195/439564943/-924895373?refcode=em20231121&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTE0YzVhOWYtYTg4OC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-HP3Duj1UzIuTh770Ci9OVV-35ZGs-Tm8lOXnsh9NJU=)**
[Contribute ➡️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73772196/439564944/-924895373?refcode=em20231121&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTE0YzVhOWYtYTg4OC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-HP3Duj1UzIuTh770Ci9OVV-35ZGs-Tm8lOXnsh9NJU=)
Thanks so much!
More to come,
— COURIER

body:

It’s official—Lizzie will be on the ballot again in 2024! Lizzie filed the paperwork to run for re-election, visiting the Harris County Democratic Party and Fort Bend County Democratic Party headquarters and checking in with Dem leaders at home.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231121wu?refcode=lpfe231121wu [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231121wu?refcode=lpfe231121wu]
Our primary election is in 15 weeks, and we will be back on the campaign trail in the days ahead! So far, three candidates have announced that they intend to put their names on the ballot, too. As we ramp up our campaign, we’re growing #TeamLizzie to ensure we have a strong show of support on our side and we’re hoping you’ll be part of it! Add your name here and we’ll add you to a public list of #TeamLizzie supporters. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/QIiNuwnGsEuMQ1AHz7BriA2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/QIiNuwnGsEuMQ1AHz7BriA2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/QIiNuwnGsEuMQ1AHz7BriA2]
With less than four months until the Texas primary, and less than a year until the general election, we’re going to need a strong group of volunteers once again to support our field operation and get our message out to voters across the district. The more volunteers we have on board, the more ground we can cover!
https://secure.ngpvan.com/Ln8e8kjn2Euuh3daVlmozQ2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Ln8e8kjn2Euuh3daVlmozQ2]
So dig your most comfortable walking shoes out of your closet, grab your favorite writing pens, and sign up here to be a #TeamLizzie volunteer. We’ll contact you about volunteer opportunities as they’re scheduled. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Ln8e8kjn2Euuh3daVlmozQ2]
Thanks for being part of the team,
Team Lizzie
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231121wu?refcode=lpfe231121wu]

# Argentina elects outsider PLUS Open AI employees stand by CEO...
Big news day and Trish Regan broke it all down. Political outsider, Javier Milei was elected in Argentina to “Make Argentina Great Again.” The media likens him to Donald Trump, and Trump weighs in on Truth Social. Trish explains the financial implications as OpenAI outs their CEO and 70% of their workforce follows him out, the advertising boycott of X and why it won't work, Miss Universe going broke and more.
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=e56e5ca89b&e=f6564bbe3b)
| [Watch NOW](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=1484c61940&e=f6564bbe3b)

name: Josh Shapiro
subject: With so much on the line, we need to have Bob’s back
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Your donation, no matter how big or small, will help keep Bob in the Senate.
Hi there, Peter -- it’s Governor Josh Shapiro with a really quick ask:
**[Can you chip in $10 or $25 to my friend Bob Casey’s campaign today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231121-2?refcode=em20231121-2&refcode2=1190_552475_OZeLuI&akid=1190%2E552475%2EOZeLuI)**
**[Donate $10 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231121-2?refcode=em20231121-2&amount=10&refcode2=1190_552475_OZeLuI&akid=1190%2E552475%2EOZeLuI)**
**[Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231121-2?refcode=em20231121-2&amount=25&refcode2=1190_552475_OZeLuI&akid=1190%2E552475%2EOZeLuI)**
Bob is running against Mitch McConnell’s hand-picked candidate -- a mega-millionaire who wants to overturn a woman’s freedom to choose.
This won’t be an easy race. Extremist Republicans are ready to spend millions to replace Bob, retake the Senate majority, and pave the way for McConnell’s right-wing agenda.
With so much on the line, we need to have Bob’s back -- just like he had mine.
**[Extremist Republicans are targeting this seat, so please, chip in whatever you can right now to keep my good friend Bob fighting for our great Commonwealth in the Senate.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231121-2?refcode=em20231121-2&refcode2=1190_552475_OZeLuI&akid=1190%2E552475%2EOZeLuI)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231121-2?refcode=em20231121-2&refcode2=1190_552475_OZeLuI&akid=1190%2E552475%2EOZeLuI)**
Your donation, no matter how big or small, will help keep Bob in the Senate, fighting for Pennsylvanians at the federal level.
With gratitude,
Josh Shapiro

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=1190%2E552475%2EOZeLuI)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=1190%2E552475%2EOZeLuI)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

name: Andrea Salinas

body:
I want to make sure you saw the news: I just officially filed for the ballot in 2024! Last year, our election was decided by only 7,000 votes – and we expect it to be even more competitive this year. I need your support now more than ever, team.
I want to make sure you saw the news: **I just officially filed for the ballot in 2024!**

As my team wrote yesterday, I’m running for re-election because there is more work to be done – and I’ll never stop fighting for a stronger future for my daughter, her generation, and every family in Oregon.

**Last year, our election was decided by only 7,000 votes – and we expect it to be even more competitive this year.** I need your support now more than ever, team.

[**It would mean the world to have you in this fight with me. Can I count on your support?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73773106/439568156/809151987?refcode=em_fr_2023.11.21_b1_as_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTZjYjhkZi1hOTg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EXVABfIICgrb2SunUdCIm6E_VRiB3phuExfubcvNOEs=)

Last year, Andrea ran for Congress to fight for a stronger future for Oregon. And in her first nine months in Congress, she’s fought to expand access to healthcare, end the epidemic of gun violence, safeguard reproductive freedoms, bring jobs back to OR-06, and so much more.

But there’s still more work to be done.

Especially in a moment where extreme Republicans are trying to undermine our freedoms, gut our benefits, and cater only to wealthy special interests, we need a leader who knows how to fight hard for progress and deliver wins for working families.

**Oregon deserves leaders who will work hard every day to make life better for the folks here at home.** That’s why it couldn’t be more important to re-elect Andrea next November.

clean_body: I want to make sure you saw the news: I just officially filed for the ballot in 2024! Last year, our election was decided by only 7,000 votes – and we expect it to be even more competitive this year. I need your support now more than ever, team. I want to make sure you saw the news: I just officially filed for the ballot in 2024! As my team wrote yesterday, I’m running for re-election because there is more work to be done – and I’ll never stop fighting for a stronger future for my daughter, her generation, and every family in Oregon. Last year, our election was decided by only 7,000 votes – and we expect it to be even more competitive this year. I need your support now more than ever, team. = Thank you so much, Andrea On Monday Nov 20, 2023 Salinas HQ wrote: = Huge news, team: = | = Last year, Andrea ran for Congress to fight for a stronger future for Oregon. And in her first nine months in Congress, she’s fought to expand access to healthcare, end the epidemic of gun violence, safeguard reproductive freedoms, bring jobs back to OR-06, and so much more. But there’s still more work to be done. Especially in a moment where extreme Republicans are trying to undermine our freedoms, gut our benefits, and cater only to wealthy special interests, we need a leader who knows how to fight hard for progress and deliver wins for working families. Oregon deserves leaders who will work hard every day to make life better for the folks here at home. That’s why it couldn’t be more important to re-elect Andrea next November. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Thank you for your support! name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Before the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
I’m writing today because if we’re going to hold onto our slim majority, we must start now. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=02521c24f79e49209720eaa6c1fb7332&_t=O-S80hac7jOuDohKH6TdhUE37wL-bCrQnJQRjOF8NhkZb6s7R1gxsPeeCUsPyfZCGIFtlH7oAcUoLl7D80dafm7gRmg77V6urkfCtDZk8Sc%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=02521c24f79e49209720eaa6c1fb7332&_t=O-S80hac7jOuDohKH6TdhUE37wL-bCrQnJQRjOF8NhkZb6s7R1gxsPeeCUsPyfZCGIFtlH7oAcUoLl7D80dafm7gRmg77V6urkfCtDZk8Sc%3D)
[ ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=02521c24f79e49209720eaa6c1fb7332&_e=pVW_9eX6-Yw3uZ53zTDhI9Gjg1vBG33ZpwoV4mAbRpjOQ2f9iSvLV8yOg9pdej0yhgZidnczRdG6ZePJDAtQyssvA2AIURFWXnd5seq7C3HkowQYQb_R1-wvgd6OjOtp1rZ2W9M0eAqvADZtXOwEAaIFqxOxL3YNTC4dcia02oJRs5ngCZULb8rY-mUV9IZOYgjrScqgvTvYcrE9aavIw3Bjgem7kjMIzXhJUPDu0ey9K5X_RGPGMXvKKrvJM-kjIntuJsr75kHY921OArFrY_MxUDUHQVHxmvVQsmJ6u6afqEJcwEe2iTEYP4ye9roPrO4KqLuTZTjxk5sEEhuMdR1gilYBNs_D0tK8pHCFaA4FWqbWM8rRCeTh4dgYxRNjIPGlBsNzYPf902JovR6kYA%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American - when I became Speaker of the House on October 25th, I knew one of the first things we needed to do was build out our team of supporters online.

So, we got to work immediately and [**set a goal of finding 100,000 conservatives to join Team Johnson by the time Thanksgiving rolled around.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=02521c24f79e49209720eaa6c1fb7332&_e=pVW_9eX6-Yw3uZ53zTDhI9Gjg1vBG33ZpwoV4mAbRpjOQ2f9iSvLV8yOg9pdej0yhgZidnczRdG6ZePJDAtQyssvA2AIURFWXnd5seq7C3HkowQYQb_R1-wvgd6OjOtp1rZ2W9M0eAqvADZtXOwEAaIFqxOxL3YNTC4dcia02oJRs5ngCZULb8rY-mUV9IZOYgjrScqgvTvYcrE9aavIw3Bjgem7kjMIzXhJUPDu0ey9K5X_RGPGMXvKKrvJM-kjYKw4_rHUj_5OqQUBTDwz4vtGTs4WdirGlYLb1GjwX50Gdbl6GjoIR2st1C68ZAWnkxOPS8AajvZo6DRL6n9vELPWuvrnnaLMmt99clZWtj1t5JZRKeCyPEeimy2bxCSsn27BOpokgldI6x9X-G1Emg%3D%3D)

body:
How is this possible?

| | |
**[Peter, did you get our invite to our Ceasefire Now Phone Bank happening tomorrow, November 22 at 3 PM ET/ 12 PM PT?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDN_AKdF4M0u5pGQ87M_sP-cGYGWrDFVb05z_d7bYwkuqX2sL7b8tFgQYs6rNH_iHX3h12womL-rWANIQELos8u41V45XsggNsA6yJydTOJqLd9O-rlIO2ZaWmI_eG__jU6lZEauNII0gxsxMgNYHxziRGEfPdur_gKaX5fn7SKiO0TzCt0JKhfrf_Ua1yRytPnkEHnbGGGgMCG6FZvUvETJb64uvzW36sZXIyvCxmiU8IEnj3wVGw8qWpNQdt3ArxWqFTr0hUyFc25HQljecJoVj-IdZWtgMGFIrFvsdinAu/41h/CB9BGWCqTtS8qg1LjO-pHQ/h0/o3JdrhChThfX1QFiKMK7A8dtwtmMJM41dLb_daS56O4)** In the last week since we sent it, 17 new members of Congress have called for a ceasefire in Gaza, including the first Jewish lawmaker, WFP champion Becca Balint. This momentum is a _direct_ result of the pressure everyday people like us are putting on members of Congress, and we can't let up now. **[Join the Ceasefire Now Phone Bank](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDN_AKdF4M0u5pGQ87M_sP-cGYGWrDFVb05z_d7bYwkuqX2sL7b8tFgQYs6rNH_iHX3h12womL-rWANIQELos8u41V45XsggNsA6yJydTOJqL_PVYePBP7GOdOJx9Cp4muAKhylxYniY4FboSCEG3QPQ8Lx2-AumlLaCUwXDBFxDKe7N_3sYM8pdKVdIYAb7qq1_IqR0ZDcs0GBN1oEnHYFLRBiYFV4P8Tl8LRbDvuGalCe6twJ0G2nIRHaOjY-DI7UnLGqtSpY82Y1Vk6S5do4EpAtGFFBpUnysgmEih4maG/41h/CB9BGWCqTtS8qg1LjO-pHQ/h1/4Ajr0pj8pMGEdbSQY0y_VEj_4ubnibvHGmiz4GR3JDg)** — Team WFP

From: **Working Families Party**
Date: Sat, Nov 11, 2023
Subject: “The calls and letters are making a difference” Check out this headline from _HuffPost,_ Peter: [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDN_AKdF4M0u5pGQ87M_sP-cGYGWrDFVb05z_d7bYwkuqX2sL7b8tFgQYs6rNH_iHX3h12womL-rWANIQELos8u57yNWDFlguQhboiXHdWUEXIEONMHjSf-60JEZuAZc4X-pl7sDARQUYA1xkIirJx6eiPwm0eGDrH08rVwCqiE1Y3DVQXAZrcmJD7U7JoaeP-L4AnbrfVxjGOfhK9tm0-1wS7cJjiWQWKC4w7AC1avMY4ior2oTUG6g84DvhEuty2YzG-5HAjtah-eVRw5aAs395C7dUhF_QToAs3kgdvfP7/41h/CB9BGWCqTtS8qg1LjO-pHQ/h2/dU4C1H0M-S1gfpoYnrYs1YK85lpkcz1eZybC49I665g) Over the last month, thousands of WFP members like you have joined the movement for a ceasefire in Gaza, calling your congressional offices, emailing your representatives, and joining phone banks to encourage others to do the same. And Congress has been forced to take notice. **Dozens of members of Congress have now joined the call for a ceasefire, and the pressure is growing every day. But we can’t let up the pressure now.** The four-hour “tactical local pauses” agreed to by the Israeli government is not enough — not while the people of Gaza remain under siege the other 20 hours of each day. **[So Wednesday, November 22 at 3 PM ET/12 PM PT, we’re holding another Ceasefire Now Phone Bank to help people around the country demand that their representatives support a ceasefire and humanitarian assistance for Gaza. Can you join us?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDN_AKdF4M0u5pGQ87M_sP-cGYGWrDFVb05z_d7bYwkuqX2sL7b8tFgQYs6rNH_iHX3h12womL-rWANIQELos8u41V45XsggNsA6yJydTOJqLx5HkCjY2Zwnpv_hzb7RdnWhNt8NFvoHnE5WGjbf0T_cSnU6-1MZFitoykWCtEQ5r6YSNTgrdeeEex1IBQ0O-DEyx2QNNUU2ZN231pabShlVViZc-CZt82NO0o0_fHlY8lV-M24kQasAkh_HvLDdH7pONrWa0hvYN6jUlXVT48UXac0xPP2_srIwBFG77ascx/41h/CB9BGWCqTtS8qg1LjO-pHQ/h3/cGPnQCi_ebZ6jTCp8ErudCDgkigtCEdQRkDRnkC3ZV8)** **[Join the Ceasefire Now Phone Bank](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDN_AKdF4M0u5pGQ87M_sP-cGYGWrDFVb05z_d7bYwkuqX2sL7b8tFgQYs6rNH_iHX3h12womL-rWANIQELos8u41V45XsggNsA6yJydTOJqLxgwE0I0meEzL5x7ytECQ2NI2AddbcnFzW41j7CSaCQ1IfflYCfG6g8T8SBQDcG2Mkqik17tB_TUuSvB0YsLO3F0Uy1zQ0R8AuPM47Jr8Ue29u_dF6LFOf43vNLIxf9XFDIj35XVVUwH-pnXS8Bf39r07VxdmWm3baF3qOnCjABYySHwHh4oXh96uZNnIig3T/41h/CB9BGWCqTtS8qg1LjO-pHQ/h4/g655o8rsC9WHL53IBWCZGriG8mCGi-5_2wVpkApnjDQ)** As we head into the 2024 elections, we know members of Congress are hearing us. A congressional staffer told _HuffPost:_ **“It’s cold comfort, but even if members are not speaking up for a cease-fire, the calls and the letters are making a difference... they’re changing the calculations of how far some members are willing to go to support Israel.” 1** If we keep up the fight, we have a real chance to get the U.S. government to press for a ceasefire in Gaza, prevent the escalation of this conflict into a regional war, and save the lives of thousands of Palestinians and Israelis alike. But we need your help. **[Join the Ceasefire Now Phone Bank Wednesday, November 22 at 3 PM ET/12 PM PT to grow the movement to end the violence in Gaza. Every call makes a difference.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDN_AKdF4M0u5pGQ87M_sP-cGYGWrDFVb05z_d7bYwkuqX2sL7b8tFgQYs6rNH_iHX3h12womL-rWANIQELos8u41V45XsggNsA6yJydTOJqLDdmf1z5iOllnm8usEGSrKnv7KKUwVBdyFl1t4SaLK1H5ycRgJV_AhaLK5mh_ugzXe2nnQ90EFg04cmJ_5SfdoB-CFX-U2vgdD3mBFF65OLU3x0JbQ6N9hWZ638FGlg-qZUJv2AUHeRclSMDAYPh_bf9Y2aZUoZ9dkt65LNwW89PCSfk3U9C0fKzIn6ChIJ9V/41h/CB9BGWCqTtS8qg1LjO-pHQ/h5/hVXPbx8pEzY2oLNmawaQS5SdYAKsmDXz2Jb9nZMzi2E)** **[Join the Ceasefire Now Phone Bank](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDN_AKdF4M0u5pGQ87M_sP-cGYGWrDFVb05z_d7bYwkuqX2sL7b8tFgQYs6rNH_iHX3h12womL-rWANIQELos8u41V45XsggNsA6yJydTOJqLkYII1x98-JMyYnoUaVJ_Wq4GJ9ksxzOn2VgVyeDtJBRiJjkUbcZtnEKF9kbq6FnYzsRGkjSLmcGYZigTjbV9Pbsjvtp-wpnh4H_PCc87hlCQXRzwmmaziFHuNwl3MbfsnFjVh3a-M6oX_cBYCfIl_L7QZ3Wco7q9Hp8rtXenfQsAHY7D2WvBnDp8vz61rcGC/41h/CB9BGWCqTtS8qg1LjO-pHQ/h6/qS9KN48qJMXztcpP_DqsP4VhPEZRyZ0CdRkVHsDbEyo)** In solidarity, Working Families Party P.S. clean_body: | | | In the last week since we sent it, 17 new members of Congress have called for a ceasefire in Gaza, including the first Jewish lawmaker, WFP champion Becca Balint. This momentum is a direct result of the pressure everyday people like us are putting on members of Congress, and we can't let up now. — Team WFP \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Working Families Party Date: Sat, Nov 11, 2023 Subject: “The calls and letters are making a difference” Check out this headline from HuffPost, Peter: Over the last month, thousands of WFP members like you have joined the movement for a ceasefire in Gaza, calling your congressional offices, emailing your representatives, and joining phone banks to encourage others to do the same. And Congress has been forced to take notice. Dozens of members of Congress have now joined the call for a ceasefire, and the pressure is growing every day. But we can’t let up the pressure now. The four-hour “tactical local pauses” agreed to by the Israeli government is not enough — not while the people of Gaza remain under siege the other 20 hours of each day. As we head into the 2024 elections, we know members of Congress are hearing us. A congressional staffer told HuffPost: “It’s cold comfort, but even if members are not speaking up for a cease-fire, the calls and the letters are making a difference... they’re changing the calculations of how far some members are willing to go to support Israel.” 1 If we keep up the fight, we have a real chance to get the U.S. government to press for a ceasefire in Gaza, prevent the escalation of this conflict into a regional war, and save the lives of thousands of Palestinians and Israelis alike. But we need your help. In solidarity, Working Families Party P.S. Have you reached out to your representative yet? Text CEASEFIRE to 30403 to call your congressional office, or Source: 1\. , HuffPost, November 9, 2023 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. ** Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . subject: An Evening to Remember with Trey Taylor!
body:
Peacocks, Zebras, Music, Dinner and Cocktails!

DATE NIGHT AMONG THE PEACOCKS AND ZEBRAS AT SAFARI TEXAS!
THIS BEAUTIFUL EVENING SUPPORTS AMERICA-FIRST, CONSTITUTIONAL CONSERVATIVE
CANDIDATE FOR CD 7, CAROLINE KANE!

HOLIDAY DINNER & CONCERT DECEMBER 1, 2023
* VIP Reception 6:00-6:45 pm: Meatballs, Caprese, and Cocktails as well as one-on-one time with Country Music Sensation, Trey Taylor and Candidate Caroline Kane
* Gold Member Admission Doors Open at 6:45 with cocktails
* Dinner served 7:15 pm Champagne Chicken & Filet Mignon w/ Accoutrements
* GREAT COUNTRY LIVE MUSIC w/ a SIDE of POLITICS

Trey hand-selects a limited number of causes to aid throughout the year and we are very blessed to have had him choose Caroline's run for Congress in TX CD 7.

Stop illegal immigration, close the border and reign in this bloated,
weaponized government, and its spending!
Help Caroline DEFEAT Lizzie Fletcher!

SCAN the QR Code below or use this link to buy your tickets TODAY!

subject: We can’t elect another extreme anti-abortion Republican
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zSJ2-Su0o8Ni7LeDh2MrPP4UMuwuVRNqveCSx_C8Tr_WxqvRITVpicMjAc_gyJEIM3DdDCQrY-1raRGt_p4TJHZtX6Y9dNqCn77JTlF1e1AN6NtqZpBzZshWA0CI5V_8hYLSn98o8Nr36utAVJHLpUXbi8m4knV4eDv5Vatnfx0uPZqTQLoWUtZdbnX5iwrcEEqj9iXfAEW55YjBQsmi3HyZSTRNuSy3RbF1j26KjCR8ABtZUmndr8G-2dLMwLPKdusmo_mBsrM3C5sNgqad1jnDrwuQcKkIPA6W4f5gTEwiJGbhmKrnCx8McvA4ZLfkwkWYpTt1cv5aSa2YH9ygvB/41h/mJGn8bAVRl2tdVtQxvWRmQ/h0/RRyOO0E1UN1KRHSJ-OC22uSOnapqaf9HULMoKnTZ5-s)

Peter, At a time when people overwhelmingly want a choice, extremist Republicans in Congress have made denying a woman’s right to her body’s decisions their mission. Undoing _Roe v. Wade_ was horrific, and with Mike Johnson and our likely Republican opponent Joe McGraw leading us, it can get much, much worse.
[**We’re holding the line to ensure these attacks on our rights end in IL-17. If you can, donate $5 to build our resistance at this critical time.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zSJ2-Su0o8Ni7LeDh2MrPPNYjaSf0HiRB1luFcP1Zl2RJyzkx0VJstjUnbHyZOeg14VvX98dNG3Q8P58varMILfeWN8MpCKfNPDlIXXWt1NFTGZYorhb_csHFZQyy4ZVKSkX2DNIByls_tQzQuODorH3YZtqPmUkPlzUBVt7rMn_uaLn1OQg2VVrcpXChoUn8EvWX6TGnnmdUBk8Xndqp9puua4T77a96WfFXxT6vLR6682ZA2bGt6bC23GZERzf6t81P3gzpGkmmJlqgE5PWWTfxMDF4DVLHRLKNHGny7qUjm5v0Uj4nJOlOhwo1x_YnmU3Fom2VGiQTY0nsq5h80bl1Q7Q7TzhN0Jbky9acXb-PVT2DuEOEoSAkCX5dQeorfR5YTunoRLRDXXSe49xMKoXtlNrFdLYgLWJwWabDUnQ/41h/mJGn8bAVRl2tdVtQxvWRmQ/h1/_4sara3NbAnx7dEsKe_V2lEFtJ2lLB41JAwVmLgLW_8)
Even after _Roe_ , Johnson – the most anti-reproductive rights Speaker in history – and his extreme colleagues are still working to impose restrictions on reproductive access – including through a national abortion ban. In fact, Johnson has called abortion “genocide”, and compared it to the Holocaust. Meanwhile the national Republicans’ hand-picked candidate for our race, Joe McGraw, has made his views quite clear that he’ll be a pass-through for Johnson’s agenda:
* Joe McGraw has vocalized support for states having the ability to ban abortion.

* Joe McGraw has even attended anti-choice events in his spare time, joining so-called pro-life activists in a "hike for life."

* But knowing how overwhelmingly popular leaving people’s choices to themselves are, Joe McGraw is attempting to hide his support for states banning abortion with framing that doesn’t match his record.

National Republicans have promised to spend enormous sums boosting their preferred candidate and on attacks against Eric. We can’t let them buy an end to reproductive rights in the midwest. [**Can you send an $5 donation to our campaign to safeguard the right for everyone to make their own body’s decisions? Defending this seat will go a longer way than you think to help ensure the anti-reproductive rights movement stops here.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zSJ2-Su0o8Ni7LeDh2MrPPNYjaSf0HiRB1luFcP1Zl2RJyzkx0VJstjUnbHyZOeg14VvX98dNG3Q8P58varMILfeWN8MpCKfNPDlIXXWt1NFTGZYorhb_csHFZQyy4ZVL-6xI8eRqj5PyQQLJW71LyZpsw3eUK5xCN90EVJOd6jG5wOM137gMqnvEGHNWiEi0u4N2yW3WTz05LfKi4NfviOM2V1ilhf6vj-nFLjC07V_amPsdWskEfe1ejOGwy16S-ieGJ5OPbnWPvOrKWwofPw37oKEap2CUoYg3KFYn0X3RlrOZ8HOySGRHnHr_h3DQyGzFIoeBXtCnYH0eoqFBZLGl4abx3edv_nuZ-2FaGQcvPcpXTJtIz5GFNEbfwPXrYAVM3eVC0N6a2VDiAz6V5eKANHMO-iY56lprnmcj9Ew/41h/mJGn8bAVRl2tdVtQxvWRmQ/h2/hne6n75MGzhM67hUgFxWE7L_ViQ7by7SDzEggVko5Co) \- Eric Sorensen HQ

We can’t let them buy an end to reproductive rights in the midwest. \- Eric Sorensen HQ | | Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. To support Eric, P.O. Box 1172 Moline, IL 61265 United States | | Sent via . name: Emily Busch
subject: (survey) What are you thankful for, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Busch for Congress
body:
I'll share my big three ➡️
---
|
---
| [ ](https://emily4mi.com/l/XxRXTDrsc9Jj)
---
Hi Peter, Thanksgiving is a great time of year to eat a good meal, catch up with family, watch the Lions win, but most importantly, give thanks. Ahead of the holiday, I wanted to reach out personally and share just a few of the things I'm grateful for this year.
---
| [ ](https://emily4mi.com/l/NcAaEi37wTFa)
---
1️⃣ **My family.** They're the only people who can put a smile on my face after a long day, and I wouldn’t be able to do this without their love and support. 2️⃣ **My team.** They are the ones keeping my campaign pushing, and I am grateful to work with such passionate and hardworking people. 3️⃣ **Folks like you, Peter!** Knowing people around the district are in my corner means the world to me. I am so thankful to have a strong base of support as I work to fight for common-sense gun laws, to protect our rights, and to be a strong voice for Michigan's working families.
---
**From the bottom of my heart, thank you for the time, energy and generosity you've extended toward me and our campaign.**
---
**[I have a lot to be grateful for, but this Thanksgiving, I want to hear from you! Will you take our survey and share what you're grateful for?](https://emily4mi.com/l/Mo9fNapbPHbq)**
---
[ **TAKE OUR SURVEY** ](https://emily4mi.com/l/x9YGTXcCyu9h)
---
Thank you,
Emily Busch
---
|
---
| | | [](https://emily4mi.com/l/h4PE1mlEF19s)

Emily first learned the importance of community and helping others from her mom, a nurse, and dad, a manufacturing representative, while growing up in a tight-knit, middle-class Midwestern family.

The proud product of public schools, Emily worked hard in and out of the classroom, balancing her studies and interest in performing arts with an after-school job as a cashier at Ace Hardware. She went on to earn her B.A. in Biology from Indiana University and Masters from Michigan State University.

Now, Emily is running for Congress in Michigan’s 10th District to keep our kids safe, protect our rights, and lower costs for Michigan families.

Emily chose to move to Oakland County two decades ago because it was the place she wanted to raise her family – a place with friendly neighbors, good schools, and safe neighborhoods.

She and her husband, a retired firefighter and Marine, enjoy camping, fishing, and visiting national parks in their free time.

**Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to**

**Emily Busch for Congress**
PO Box 80744
Rochester, MI 48308
---
[ **JOIN OUR TEAM** ](https://emily4mi.com/l/bgmuDrVOPz3K)
---
| | Paid for by Emily Busch for Congress
---
To unsubscribe from future communications, please click [here](https://emily4mi.com/l/TIKTQ6MTfjBW)
---

subject: Inside Look: My Interview on the David Webb Radio Show
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conservatives for Julie Clark]( "Paid for by Conservatives for Julie Clark")
body:
Stop Tony Gonzales and secure our border! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/8f9d9f994072/im-announcing-my-run-for-congress-12663817?e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=9052dc3fd2&e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| | Peter,
Tony Gonzales is _**once again _failing to take action to secure our border. _**_

**Gonzales continues to ignore the issue of Border Security, but sure has time to fly around on private jets and take selfies with celebrities. **

It makes you wonder... _**does he even care about the American people?**_

Our people are tired of the inaction and want a REAL leader who will fight to protect our country!

Last week, I was on the _**David Webb Radio Show**_ to talk about my plan to **_secure our border_** , _**fight the drug cartels**_ , and _**stop the flow of illegal immigrants**_ into our country. **Unlike Tony the RINO,_I am taking action to secure our border!_**

I support President Trump’s plan to _**build the wall, stop catch-and-release,**_ and _**fight back against the drug cartels**_ that are poisoning our country. **I will fight to secure our border on DAY ONE!**

The American people are tired of lazy Tony and Sleepy Joe and want our border secured NOW! **I am fighting to secure our border and protect our country, but I need YOUR help. **

Peter, join me in rejecting the career politicians who have turned their backs on the American people. Lazy Tony and Sleepy Joe are destroying our country! **I am asking you to _STAND WITH ME _in my run for Congress**

[_When you take a stand with me by chipping in ANY amount, I can show the likes of Tony Gonzales and Sleepy Joe that their days of failing the American people are over._](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=13ce6d2104&e=c982eb7ad4)

subject: We have a huge election TODAY.

body:
Today, November 21st, we have a chance to defend our 4-seat Majority by winning the Special Election in Utah, but the Democrats are going ALL IN on taking this seat. To help counter the Democrat dark money, House GOP leadership has activated a 15X match on all donations made in the next 24 hours! |

body:
My name is Celeste Maloy and I am a strong Conservative running for Congress in Utah’s special election this November. I’m not a wealthy politician. I grew up in a small town, went to a small high school, and know what it’s like to live paycheck to paycheck. |

My name is Celeste Maloy and I am a strong Conservative running for Congress in Utah's special election this November.**I 'm not a wealthy politician. I grew up in a small town, went to a small high school, _and know what it 's like to live paycheck to paycheck._**

name: Team ECU/LAV Action
subject: Tell the Supreme Court their ethics code is a joke
disclaimer_text: paid for by mega-donors, accepting undisclosed gifts, and buddying up with conservative billionaires like the Koch brothers
body:
I’m sure you have heard by now that the Supreme Court adopted their first ever ethics code. And it’s a joke.| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73774582/439573019/444630146?refcode=11_21_23&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU3Nzc2OWM2LWFkODgtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aNRjWoTUPxxXYFr3tJLWWL4GPEaEoMB-Pr6dA387iak=)
---
| | Friend, I’m sure you have heard by now that the Supreme Court adopted their first ever ethics code. And it’s a joke. This may look good at first glance, but it has absolutely no teeth and has no consequences for the Justices who have already engaged in egregiously unethical behavior. When Clarence Thomas faces no consequences for jet-setting across the world on a conservative billionaire megadonor’s dime, we know it’s a sham attempt at ethics. **[**Can you chip in $25 to support our work as we fight for an ethics standard so that the Court remains an independent entity free of influence from partisan politics and the super-wealthy?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73774583/439573020/444630146?refcode=11_21_23&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU3Nzc2OWM2LWFkODgtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aNRjWoTUPxxXYFr3tJLWWL4GPEaEoMB-Pr6dA387iak=)** This new ethics code does not lay out any enforcement mechanism for ensuring rules are followed, what the consequences for engaging in unethical behavior will be, or who is in charge of monitoring the Court’s behavior. This is NOT enough with the Court’s horrible track record of having travel paid for by mega-donors, accepting undisclosed gifts, and buddying up with conservative billionaires like the Koch brothers. **[**If you also believe that the Supreme Court should have a stronger code of ethics than this empty shell of a document, please contribute $25 so we can continue to fight for an independent, unbiased judiciary.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73774592/439573024/444630146?refcode=11_21_23&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU3Nzc2OWM2LWFkODgtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aNRjWoTUPxxXYFr3tJLWWL4GPEaEoMB-Pr6dA387iak=)** We’re counting on everybody to pitch in and help show the Court that the people want a stronger code of ethics for the Justices. **[So please, chip in $25 to show the Court that you’re on board.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73774601/439573034/444630146?refcode=11_21_23&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU3Nzc2OWM2LWFkODgtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aNRjWoTUPxxXYFr3tJLWWL4GPEaEoMB-Pr6dA387iak=)** Thank you.— Team ECU/LAV Action

name: Georgia House Democrats
subject: The Voting Rights Act Under Assault
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgia Blue PAC
body:
The Voting Rights Act Under Assault

Peter,

Well, GOP-appointed judges have done it - they’ve gone where we never thought they’d go. The conservative 8th Circuit Court of Appeals ruled this week that private individuals and groups such as the NAACP do not have the right to sue to enforce the Voting Rights Act, contradicting decades of precedent.

This may sound confusing and arcane, but it’s not: It’s an all-out assault on the Voting Rights Act, which has already been weakened by a conservative Supreme Court, threatening the voting rights of millions of Americans.

Georgians are especially proud of our heritage with great leaders such as Dr. Martin Luther King and John Lewis, who dedicated their lives to equality for all citizens. The radical GOP’s attempts to rip it all down show us just how fragile those freedoms can be.

So it’s more important than ever that we elect Democrats in Georgia and restore our Majority in the state House.

Give Today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gahouse-grassroots2?refcode=112123_VRAB_button1]

Defending our Constitutional right to vote is at the core of the Georgia House Democrats’ agenda. In contrast, the radical GOP would seem to want to return us to a world of literacy tests, poll taxes and voter intimidation. Fight back, and help us elect Democrats today.

Give $25 Today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gahouse-grassroots2?refcode=112123_VRAB_button2]

Give $50 Today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gahouse-grassroots2?refcode=112123_VRAB_button3]

Give $100 Today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gahouse-grassroots2?refcode=112123_VRAB_button4]

Onwards,

Georgia House Democrats

OUR AGENDA

Every day, we're fighting for a better Georgia for hard-working families like yours. To learn more, visit us here [https://gahousedems.com/agenda/?refcode=email-footer-agenda] .

HEALTHCARE: We must expand Medicaid to keep our hospitals open and ensure every Georgian can see a doctor when they're sick.
GUN VIOLENCE: We can save lives by passing universal background checks, safe storage laws, and waiting periods.
CHOICE: We're fighting to overturn Georgia's six-week abortion ban and restore reproductive freedom to all Georgians.
EQUITY IN EDUCATION: We must invest in Georgia's teachers and fully fund every public school, regardless of zip code.

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gahouse-grassroots2?refcode=email-footer-cta]

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/GAHouseDems?refcode=footer-facebook [https://www.facebook.com/GAHouseDems?refcode=footer-facebook]
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/gahousedems/?refcode=footer-instagram [https://www.instagram.com/gahousedems/?refcode=footer-instagram]
Twitter: https://twitter.com/GAHouseDems?refcode=footer-twitterX [https://twitter.com/GAHouseDems?refcode=footer-twitterX]

name: Natalie Silver
subject: (no subject)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont
body:
hey Peter, it’s Natalie

Hey Peter, Natalie here, Becca’s campaign manager.
Here on Team Becca, we send emails to communicate with our supporters and to raise money. I know that emails that ask for money can be bothersome. But I want you to know that it is because of our grassroots supporters like you that Becca can focus on her work for Vermonters, and not on raising money on the phone.
But I am here to say that we are giving you a break from fundraising emails during the holidays. This means that you won’t hear a peep from us starting Thursday through Saturday, except to wish you a happy Thanksgiving, while you spend time with family and friends.
This is a huge priority for us, but it certainly comes at a cost. Missing three days of fundraising may not sound like a lot, but it can make a _big_ dent in our fundraising for the month. So in order to make sure that we can give our supporters a break from fundraising requests AND stay on track, I’ve set a goal of raising $5,000 via email starting now through tomorrow night.
Hitting this goal is critically important, so I’m asking: Will you donate $27 or whatever you can swing to Becca’s re-election campaign?
Here’s the ActBlue link: [_**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/BBVT-ALL-Email-Nov2023-FR-November**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73775007/439574430/1349087437?refcode=E5087-20231121-PreThanksgiving1-SL-Holiday&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjY2ZDgyNi1hZjg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iyxlVfRxNUcOqDeYHP_SacwOuPVyD1ORKNV-oUHj-po=)
Thanks for reading this,
Natalie Silver (Becca’s campaign manager)

clean_body: hey Peter, it’s Natalie Hey Peter, Natalie here, Becca’s campaign manager. Here on Team Becca, we send emails to communicate with our supporters and to raise money. I know that emails that ask for money can be bothersome. But I want you to know that it is because of our grassroots supporters like you that Becca can focus on her work for Vermonters, and not on raising money on the phone. But I am here to say that we are giving you a break from fundraising emails during the holidays. This means that you won’t hear a peep from us starting Thursday through Saturday, except to wish you a happy Thanksgiving, while you spend time with family and friends. This is a huge priority for us, but it certainly comes at a cost. Missing three days of fundraising may not sound like a lot, but it can make a big dent in our fundraising for the month. So in order to make sure that we can give our supporters a break from fundraising requests AND stay on track, I’ve set a goal of raising $5,000 via email starting now through tomorrow night. Hitting this goal is critically important, so I’m asking: Will you donate $27 or whatever you can swing to Becca’s re-election campaign? Here’s the ActBlue link: = Thanks for reading this, Natalie Silver (Becca’s campaign manager) Sent from my iPhone_ Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . Peter,
Thanksgiving is a day for family, food, and gratitude. It’s about spending time together — around the dinner table, in the kitchen, or falling into the couch.
We don’t want to spend the holiday asking you for money; we know you probably don’t want to hear it. But we’re falling behind on our November fundraising goal — and this race is too important to let that happen.
So here’s our pitch: if you donate $1 or more to this email, you won’t hear from us again for the rest of November. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_112123_Deal_act&amount=1]

Kirsten’s opponent is an anti-abortion MAGA extremist, moonlighting as a moderate.
Last year, Kirsten lost to him by one percentage point.
If you chip in now, you can help us defeat him next November — and we won’t ask for another dime until this month is over. Even $1 helps, so we must ask: will you chip in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_112123_Deal_act&amount=1]

[] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer. She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District. In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? [] [] [] [] [] Paid for by Engel for Arizona Engel for Arizona PO Box 40721 Tucson, AZ 85717 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Give thanks to bees by saving them from EXTINCTION
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2136506?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Friend, toxic pesticides are KILLING vulnerable pollinators and putting our food system at risk![Act Now! >>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2136507?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) ** This holiday, you can thank bees and other pollinators for the wide variety of food you may find on your table. **These insects pollinate one in three bites of food we eat** \-- from apple pie to squash casserole, your table would look bare without bees. Even delicious holiday spices like nutmeg and cinnamon depend on pollination. But bees are dying off at an alarming rate -- putting future feasts at risk. A key driver in their decline is bee-killing pesticides called neonics, which have made agriculture nearly**48 TIMES MORE TOXIC** to bees in the past two decades. Recent studies have shown that widespread use of neonics can be harmful to humans -- especially children -- **even being linked to cancer!** _**And the EPA plans to APPROVE bee-killing neonics for another 15 YEARS.**_ **[Please, sign your name NOW and tell the EPA to STOP the use of these pesticides before it’s too late for bees!!>>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2136508?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2136509?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The widespread use of neonics **threatens many wild pollinators with extinction.** Over the last two decades alone, _**the Western Bumblebee has dropped 93% and the American bumblebee has declined by 89%.**_ We can’t let neonics continue to harm these vulnerable pollinators.
If the EPA approves neonics for another 15 years, it will be putting Big Ag’s profits above our pollinators and ecosystems and **threatening our food supply in the process.** We need to ACT NOW to save vulnerable pollinators. **[Please, Friend, will you sign your name immediately to stop neonics from KILLING bees, harming human health, and our planet?>>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2136510?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2136509?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for taking urgent action to save bees!
Friends of the Earth**

name: Jerrad Christian
subject: My sister was addicted to heroin
body:
Our story is all too common in rural America.

| | | | | [](https://sptr.eomail6.com/f/a/feH0OdjvJHBt-kdj0TuJlw~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRnP57LP0UgMzIxOTIyMzg3YzkzOWVhZWFmYTQ4Zjc3NTg4OGUzNmNELmh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLmFjdGJsdWUuY29tL2RvbmF0ZS9qZXJyYWQtZW1haWxXBXNwY2V1QgplVMsZXWX_ZoGnUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAABtDA~~)
---
| | ,
The opioid epidemic has decimated thousands of families across Appalachian Ohio, where our campaign is based, and millions of people across the nation. My own family is no exception: **my sister Morgan battled through the darkness of heroin addiction,** which saw her life hanging in the balance not once, but twice because of overdose. Hers is a harrowing tale of resilience and strength.
Because we lived in separate households growing up, Morgan and I would bond during holidays and special occasions; we connected almost immediately, but didn't really become close until she was in her early 20s. Around that time, we started to talk more and found out we had a lot in common. This was when we really started to understand and care for each other more, becoming good friends who shared their thoughts and feelings and helped each other during tough times.
When she was still a young woman, Morgan moved out of Ohio and her life took a challenging turn. She began experimenting with prescription drugs, influenced by her then-boyfriend. This marked the start of a troubling phase in her life, which eventually led her to heroin. Morgan faced many serious and life-altering struggles that altered the course of her life, and deeply affected our relationship.
During the worst of her struggle with addiction, she vanished from our lives, cutting off all contact. This sickening feeling is something that many of us supporting loved ones who are fighting addiction have experienced. It was a time of immense worry and uncertainty, never knowing where Morgan was or how she was doing.
Her first overdose was a shock to us all, and a painful reminder of the dangers she was facing and the demons she was fighting. It brought the severity of her situation into stark reality. Then, after a brief period of recovery, she relapsed and overdosed again. These incidents were not only terrifying, but also heartbreaking—highlighting the tragic and chaotic nature of addiction.
When she finally realized what her life had become, my sister had had enough. She began her road to recovery by contacting loved ones and rebuilding her life.
When she was ready, myself and our family were waiting with open arms and loving hearts. I love my sister, and even through the hardest and most uncertain times tried my best to be her biggest supporter, in the hopes that she would be able to turn things around and come back to us.
After years of sobriety, Morgan is now married and lovingly taking care of two children, building a life that she can be proud of.

_Morgan on her wedding day. I am so proud of how far she’s come. _

I wish this story were unique. My cousin Bobby lost his life to overdose, as have so many other good people. All the while, behind the scenes, Big Pharma played a key role in causing the opioid crisis, promoting overly-aggressive marketing strategies and spreading misleading and false information about the risks of widespread use of opioid painkillers.

As Morgan’s story makes plain, this ever-worsening crisis has left us desperately in need of leaders who will prioritize the well-being of our loved ones over everything else. However, my opponent, Congressman Troy Balderson (R-OH) has a legislative track record that reflects the agenda of the big pharmaceutical companies that bankroll his campaign—**this year alone, Balderson’s campaign has received a staggering $37,500 from political action committees (PACs) affiliated with Big Pharma and health insurance companies.**

While folks in our communities battle the opioid epidemic every day, Troy Balderson blithely fills his campaign coffers with massive contributions from some of the very people who helped create the crisis in the first place.

Unlike Troy Balderson, I know the personal toll this crisis takes on real people. In Congress, I will work tirelessly on policies that support evidence-based treatment options, enhance recovery services, and hold Big Pharma accountable. When elected, I will work to expand access to life-saving drugs like naloxone, improve prescription drug monitoring programs to prevent abuse, and invest in community-based recovery services that provide holistic care and support for families.[](https://sptr.eomail6.com/f/a/tjLeM3k_6kk18KXJWNyiLA~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRnP57LP0UgNzJjNTE5YTlmNDFmNWJhNDk5YzE0MGRiYWZmNzZkODNETGh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLmFjdGJsdWUuY29tL2RvbmF0ZS9qZXJyYWQtZW1haWw_cmVmY29kZT1hZGRpY3Rpb25FTyZhbW91bnQ9MTBXBXNwY2V1QgplVMsZXWX_ZoGnUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAABtDA~~)

subject: 🚨I just signed the Reproductive Health Act

body:
This is the power of what we can do when we fight like hell for our values |
#
---
Team, I’ve got some great news: I just signed the _Reproductive Health Act_! This bill goes a long way toward expanding access to abortion care, and ends politically motivated laws that make it harder for women to access healthcare. It’s a remarkable achievement — in roughly 18 months, we’ve gone from a state where abortion was illegal to now _expanding_ access to reproductive health care for Michiganders who need it. That’s the power of what we can do when we fight like hell for our values. **But our fight’s not over.[Will you chip in today to help us take our fight for fundamental rights and freedoms beyond Michigan’s borders?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73775257/439575320/432809736?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231121_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmM1OTc0ZGQtYjA4OC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LItZQgctuvoUhnXOuNxdGP8B8fCnuxqeQI7NZ-d-pgg=)** | ** ** | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73775258/439575321/432809736?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231121_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmM1OTc0ZGQtYjA4OC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LItZQgctuvoUhnXOuNxdGP8B8fCnuxqeQI7NZ-d-pgg=)**

**In Michigan, we’re fighting like hell to protect and expand abortion access.**
Since the right-wing Supreme Court’s extreme decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ , we’ve:
✅ **Voted** to make abortion rights a part of our state constitution
✅ **Elected** pro-choice Democrats up and down the ballot
✅ **Repealed** an extreme law that banned abortions without exceptions for rape or incest
✅ **Passed** the _Reproductive Health Act_ into law to further protect our fundamental freedoms
Now, it’s time to take our fight further and defend our fundamental freedoms across the country.
MAGA extremists have already signaled that they could sign an extreme national abortion ban if they win the White House and gain full control of Congress.
That’s why we must **re-elect** President Biden and Vice President Harris, **protect** our Senate majority and **retake** the House, and **elect** pro-choice Democrats to governor’s mansions and statehouses nationwide.
**[Donate to our campaign today so that we can elect pro-choice champions across the country who will fight like hell to protect and expand access to abortion — just like we’ve done in Michigan>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73775259/439575322/432809736?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231121_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmM1OTc0ZGQtYjA4OC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LItZQgctuvoUhnXOuNxdGP8B8fCnuxqeQI7NZ-d-pgg=)**

clean_body: This is the power of what we can do when we fight like hell for our values | Team, I’ve got some great news: I just signed the Reproductive Health Act! This bill goes a long way toward expanding access to abortion care, and ends politically motivated laws that make it harder for women to access healthcare. It’s a remarkable achievement — in roughly 18 months, we’ve gone from a state where abortion was illegal to now expanding access to reproductive health care for Michiganders who need it. That’s the power of what we can do when we fight like hell for our values. But our fight’s not over.= | | = In Michigan, we’re fighting like hell to protect and expand abortion access. Since the right-wing Supreme Court’s extreme decision to overturn Roe v. Wade , we’ve: ✅ Voted to make abortion rights a part of our state constitution ✅ Elected pro-choice Democrats up and down the ballot ✅ Repealed an extreme law that banned abortions without exceptions for rape or incest ✅ Passed the Reproductive Health Act into law to further protect our fundamental freedoms Now, it’s time to take our fight further and defend our fundamental freedoms across the country. MAGA extremists have already signaled that they could sign an extreme national abortion ban if they win the White House and gain full control of Congress. That’s why we must re-elect President Biden and Vice President Harris, protect our Senate majority and retake the House, and elect pro-choice Democrats to governor’s mansions and statehouses nationwide. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Gretchen Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC

Peter, I’m fighting to secure our nation's borders and protect American lives.

I've recently introduced the Border Security and Terrorism Prevention Act in Congress.

This proposed legislation aims to address the growing challenges at our southern border and ensure that our nation is safe from potential threats.

The bill seeks to halt immigration functions at our southern border until the Department of Homeland Security can confirm that [__**zero**__](https://u32713940.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=QaFdQdrHVXbreAiZFK-2FZpoYXAnXuShHmfoKNlT2uNWWOK78rkMnXNr7-2FL-2FOCNu2ZO0ILWwZsrAMDRFAXsbj1gwmLVSQokmBHyHJtfVKSfyIbVsnJGrSH2s1x3OxmPYZ6rJxDQOqAV8nIPNeQDK9bCoJgmQd-2FuPHj6B8sLXD9NtAshS3vYMNXDubdsoeXJEspHQDwyYSj83qkP2qXvzqgaCQ-2FCMCspYXxZRnzenJzei4eu6HU2VBHIXoETs8jSjpn4Hl0IjHV9nilw-2BSgKYiT-2F7okDXQpoQjQNhoYVXAytJx-2FOf3aF1x-2ByCERmzsyTOkh6ntT_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdkLMmWeLnwK0KfPGgXzXHvoIGcfoQrAuI0Zkzwvv9dkHghc1ZFPh4s2VPIB-2BUJPR1ce1MwXOgEsQtpD9Vs-2BDtc-2Fitufx1y444cbj1xH3PBW2j46vBJ-2F-2FlyahZiQGhcnLlSmPLy1J9wHWkugBk1vPXAU31e6pAeI8-2BZHjZOncYVB20vocpvXBT5BXQ14MHcHbcCKxMODlC-2FDREWQfV-2FXSLIfLun53pCuDUDCq-2F6iz7Trv1uGeAXvQ04blFHI6AUnHxj-2FJQWoc16RiiQrjnjCjqSAdoQY5rgHDYplTKSSnwjM8984hNX-2BvYTvz9LWtTctj4D33S-2BFKBX84zJyRnrEbjM4g6qDGepBtebgS00MIpcDXcjnXAS7tc09Mx678ypNjPLoQK-2BtU-2FbjycGq9bg7gpZxNE-2FRWMtA35buv05YcMs8xOTLMg6bVH1DCVaJqfrPTh68ZqJawyBtoPRGtt4KaZIphaQ8VHVTsISnGvo5KHTCxJP7Q9kVwOI-2BaRaVg4vcYDDLquI6-2Fo5E0oKmUvHwFLMVlSq-2Bod08E0nSMTUi8Mi122g7PzelkuCsBH4iuAGhOTWdhra-2FOqmljdf6soxmFGE3dUg8o-2FS-2B26PvmWJbw2aCncKTaIGK-2F2kjaWY4Eu26CFzf2opqjkcsg4FqMUYXffYj2vm-2FnH54CL0HuWmZggPg1UAbbDD6y-2BikILKpCZmRJy7lAG-2B0Zi59YDyj9FRfuQ3QTF3jye50YseA-2FX7NNeRlrySrDrMxc6xneRUoqWd6tAaTZufh5QgeouWpzKd1K-2FOR-2Bw5BvEF3ZP8-2BjVqSGgnHY-2FXXsjQzXW7M-2FOIgVlKH98gkR5JKH3DkEk9cN4i7zn8XUridUEHkDTj4vdNwFwzu6WaDJ-2F4wTwaZWkTSpRd6TYXUpAnZOwLfwAEgavokGho3Sg0CWhFojEt8eDg9fFCysyLkS83assoWZlvu0Q-2Bl0F8RBNV0S1fQe7oOqUSn7seQ6-2FELsSYvHBQg9P9m01EGE-3D) individuals on the terrorist watchlist can enter the United States.

In recent years, we have witnessed an explosion in encounters with individuals on the terrorist watchlist at the southern border. Our nation's security is of paramount importance, and we cannot afford to ignore these alarming trends.

My proposal offers a clear and essential solution to ensure that our border remains secure and that the safety of American citizens is our top priority.

I believe that it is our duty to protect our nation from any potential threats and secure our borders for the well-being of all Americans.

However, to effectively push this legislation forward and make a real difference, I urgently need your support.

Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors.

clean_body: | | | | I need your input... Peter, I’m fighting to secure our nation's borders and protect American lives. I've recently introduced the Border Security and Terrorism Prevention Act in Congress. This proposed legislation aims to address the growing challenges at our southern border and ensure that our nation is safe from potential threats. The bill seeks to halt immigration functions at our southern border until the Department of Homeland Security can confirm that individuals on the terrorist watchlist can enter the United States. In recent years, we have witnessed an explosion in encounters with individuals on the terrorist watchlist at the southern border. Our nation's security is of paramount importance, and we cannot afford to ignore these alarming trends. My proposal offers a clear and essential solution to ensure that our border remains secure and that the safety of American citizens is our top priority. I believe that it is our duty to protect our nation from any potential threats and secure our borders for the well-being of all Americans. However, to effectively push this legislation forward and make a real difference, I urgently need your support. | Your contribution, no matter the size, will make a significant impact on our efforts to safeguard our nation. Together, we can ensure that our border remains secure and that we protect American lives. | Thank you for your unwavering support. Let's work together to strengthen our national security and preserve the safety of our great nation. Rep. Roger Williams TX-25 | | Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors. | "Facebook" | "Twitter" ---|--- | | ⬇DONATE BY CHECK⬇ ROGER WILLIAMS FOR U.S. CONGRESS 10 N. CADDO ST. PMB #174 CLEBURNE, TX 76031 Stay connected with our campaign and be part of the movement. Follow Roger on social media for updates, volunteer to support the cause, or reach out to him directly. By joining Team Williams, you will make a difference in your community. | A Note For You, From Roger My commitment to our great state and country is unwavering, and I am grateful to have my wife Patty, our two daughters, and YOU standing beside me on this journey. | From the Desk of Roger Williams 10 N. Caddo St, PMB #174, Cleburne, TX 76031 ==

name: Janelle Bynum
subject: What my parents taught me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JANELLE BYNUM FOR CONGRESS
body:
My parents taught me a lot of things over the years: Treat others the way you want to be treated; Learn from your mistakes; Never give up; Etc. However, there’s one lesson that has come to stand above the rest. A lesson that’s guided my entire time in public office. Education is key to a better, safer world.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73775731/439577157/476240636?refcode=em_fr_2023.11.21_b1_jb_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2Y4ZDM5NmEtYjE4OC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KRep0oUTWC4rbVpOzsaqw6QmoOH3-fjm0notmIPvWCU=)
My parents taught me a lot of things over the years: Treat others the way you want to be treated; Learn from your mistakes; Never give up; Etc.

However, there’s one lesson that has come to stand above the rest. A lesson that’s guided my entire time in public office.**Education is key to a better, safer world.**
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73775732/439577158/476240636?refcode=em_fr_2023.11.21_b1_jb_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2Y4ZDM5NmEtYjE4OC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KRep0oUTWC4rbVpOzsaqw6QmoOH3-fjm0notmIPvWCU=)**
_My fifth-grade school picture._
My parents, who were both teachers, instilled in me the importance of education from a very young age. I spent my afternoons reading and my weekends attending engineering classes designed to help minority students pursue careers in engineering.

And with that, I was able to earn scholarships and put myself through school, earning a Bachelor’s degree in Electrical Engineering and a Master’s degree in Business Administration.

I know, firsthand, the importance of educational opportunity.**But these days, access to quality, affordable education feels out of reach for so many families across the country.**

The cost of higher education is skyrocketing. Student loan debt is out of control. Teachers and students don’t have the resources they need to succeed inside and outside the classroom. **If educational opportunity is essential to creating a better America, Congress needs to act like it.**

So that’s why I’m running. I’ll be proud to put my parents’ teachings into practice in Congress to deliver for our kids. But I need your help to do so.

[**If you’re able, will you make a donation to my campaign to help me fight for quality, accessible education for all in Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73775733/439577159/476240636?refcode=em_fr_2023.11.21_b1_jb_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2Y4ZDM5NmEtYjE4OC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KRep0oUTWC4rbVpOzsaqw6QmoOH3-fjm0notmIPvWCU=)
| [**DONATE**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73775734/439577160/-440309746?refcode=em_fr_2023.11.21_b1_jb_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2Y4ZDM5NmEtYjE4OC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KRep0oUTWC4rbVpOzsaqw6QmoOH3-fjm0notmIPvWCU=)
---

Thank you so much,

Janelle

**Janelle Bynum is running to represent Oregon's Fifth Congressional District. With a reputation as a tireless champion for real progress, Janelle has worked in the State Legislature to safeguard our rights, lower costs, and create pathways to success for the next generation.

Oregon's 5th District is one of the most competitive – and most flippable – seats in the country. Janelle has what it takes to win, but she can't do it without you. subject: Is there anything I can say?

body:
I just checked the numbers
| | |
---
Hi there, it's Stefanie, Kirsten's finance director. I just checked the numbers, and **we're on track to fall short of our last weekly goal before our end-of-month deadline._Is there anything I can say to convince you to[ _donate right now?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73775930/439577904/-2054302023?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4586-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjNiNjNiMS1iMTg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MDp3A37KjU1emDY2KY67Ghf5MfXRk54uG6Vc0hm2qCo=)_**
What if I told you that our narrow 51-49 Senate majority is hanging on by just a thread?
What if I told you that Kirsten's seat is one of 23 Democratic seats up for grabs in 2024 — and Republicans could retake power if they win just one?

name: Team Shapiro
subject: It’s time to raise the minimum wage
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
Pennsylvania’s minimum wage is one of the lowest in the nation, at just $7.25 an hour.

Derek, Pennsylvania’s minimum wage is one of the lowest in the nation, at just $7.25 an hour. **That’s not a livable wage — and it sure isn’t enough to support a family.** That’s why Josh Shapiro is leading the fight to raise Pennsylvania’s minimum wage. We need to increase the minimum wage in Pennsylvania to $15 an hour — [_**if you agree, will you sign your name and join our call to raise the minimum wage?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73776044/439578396/725128617?refcode=email_112123_minimum-wage&source=email_112123_minimum-wage&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODY5YmJmYy1iMTg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vj5GfPcJcZmUokMELK-TRFZmfC-lLh4kJ0-pFEgxjqo=&emci=5a579fb0-7a88-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=d869bbfc-b188-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=21962291) | | [Sign Your Name →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73776045/439578397/548268412?refcode=email_112123_minimum-wage&source=email_112123_minimum-wage&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODY5YmJmYy1iMTg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vj5GfPcJcZmUokMELK-TRFZmfC-lLh4kJ0-pFEgxjqo=&emci=5a579fb0-7a88-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=d869bbfc-b188-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=21962291)

Josh Shapiro believes every Pennsylvanian worker deserves a living wage. But right now, our minimum wage is lower than that of _thirty_ other states including that of our neighbors — Democrats and Republicans.
And that doesn’t just hurt PA workers — it harms our entire commonwealth by forcing many Pennsylvanians to work out of state in order to take home a decent wage and support their families.
It’s never been more clear: **$7.25 just isn’t enough for hard-working Pennsylvanians.**
[_**Josh Shapiro is working every day to raise the minimum wage and support Pennsylvania’s workers.
