name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Min=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Laborers Endorse Dave Min for Congress
body:
Min Campaign Announces Another Major Endorsement | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/132187d86927/laborers-endorse-dave-min-for-congress-15665756?e=7017cc100e)
---
| |
---
| | **For immediate release:** November 21, 2023
**Contact:**[press@davemin.com](mailto:press@davemin.com)
**Laborers Endorse Dave Min for Congress**
_Min Campaign Announces Another Major Endorsement_
**IRVINE, CA** — Dave Min for Congress announced today that the 500,000 members—including more than 70,000 Californians—of the Laborers International Union of North America (LiUNA) have chosen to endorse his campaign. Following Sunday’s formal endorsement of Dave Min by the [California Democratic Party](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=9e3b84219e&e=7017cc100e), it is clear he is the Democrat to beat going into next November’s general election.

**“I am humbled by the support of the Laborers,”** said Senator Min. **“These are the highly skilled workers who build our infrastructure—our roads, our bridges, our solar plants and wind farms. As we seek to transition to a 21 st century economy, we need to make sure that the workers who build these critical infrastructure projects are not being left behind. I’m proud to stand with the 500,000 strong members of LiUNA, and look forward to advocating for more strong investments in our green infrastructure in Congress.”**

This endorsement builds on the massive groundswell of support from working people who are backing Min’s Congressional campaign. State Senator Min has also been recommended for the AFL-CIO’s endorsement by the [Orange County Labor Federation](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=a744714cf4&e=7017cc100e), and is the unanimous choice of labor. In the past few months, he has been the only Democrat in this race to receive new endorsements from important organizations. Recently, Min has announced major endorsements from [Equality CA](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=70baec9b25&e=7017cc100e), the Southern California Armenian Democrats [(SCAD)](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=c03559d4d4&e=7017cc100e), the California School Employees Association [(CSEA)](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=4c3d30a0f2&e=7017cc100e), [NeverAgainCA](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=7580f44be0&e=7017cc100e), the [Communication Workers of America](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=dc3be2ebd9&e=7017cc100e), the National Union of Healthcare Workers [(NUHW)](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=b5d2936032&e=7017cc100e), the Orange County Employees Association [(OCEA)](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=4bb3ce0000&e=7017cc100e), the Association of Los Angeles Deputy Sheriffs [(ALADS)](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=f9ff211a3a&e=7017cc100e), and many others. A full endorsement list is available [here](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=b5626102a3&e=7017cc100e).

**“We appreciate your devotion to the cause of our members, their families and of all working people,”** said Ernesto J. Ordonez, Vice President and Pacific Southwest Regional Manager for LiUNA. **“We trust that you will represent the public with integrity, passion and an unwavering commitment to act in the best interest of our communities. We look forward to assisting your campaign to ensure your election.”**

LiUNA is a longstanding institution in American labor, with its roots going back to the early 1800s. Today, LiUNA represents roughly half a million skilled and trained union workers in the construction and energy industries as well as a wide array of public employee jobs. ###

_California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 5.15% in this area. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country. _
---
| | **Our mailing address is:**
PO Box 5959, Irvine, CA 92616
---

| This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[_why did I get this?_](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/about?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=700e70ffe1&e=7017cc100e&c=2f3b994458) [unsubscribe from this list](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=700e70ffe1&e=7017cc100e&c=2f3b994458) [update subscription preferences](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/profile?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=700e70ffe1&e=7017cc100e&c=2f3b994458)
Dave Min For Senate * PO Box 5959 * Irvine, CA 92616-5959 * USA

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73776592/439580402/-99283247?amount=15&refcode2=78d79dd0-b488-ee11-8925-00224832e811&refcode=ss_em_fr_30DO_231121&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzhkNzlkZDAtYjQ4OC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_fKlOQfnzjtjck8RA1SP-A0ebPVu58vN7nEzviW8KFg=) I'm reaching out with urgent concerns about the escalating rhetoric from former President Donald Trump as he intensifies his political activities. _**In a recent speech in New Hampshire, Trump used the term "vermin" to describe political opponents - whom he claimed “lie and steal and cheat on elections.”**_ This choice of language is alarming, irresponsible, and dangerous. It’s a historically charged term, used in the past by authoritarian leaders who encouraged the view that their opponents were rodents worthy of extermination. _We can’t take this lightly. It isn’t just playful trash-talking. It’s a potential incitement to violence, and it not only risks the safety of real people, but it undermines the principles of democracy._ As Secretary of State, I feel a responsibility to address this issue directly. [**Will you join me in standing against dangerous rhetoric and working to safeguard our democratic values? clean_body: | = I'm reaching out with urgent concerns about the escalating rhetoric from former President Donald Trump as he intensifies his political activities. In a recent speech in New Hampshire, Trump used the term "vermin" to describe political opponents - whom he claimed “lie and steal and cheat on elections.” This choice of language is alarming, irresponsible, and dangerous. It’s a historically charged term, used in the past by authoritarian leaders who encouraged the view that their opponents were rodents worthy of extermination. We can’t take this lightly. It isn’t just playful trash-talking. It’s a potential incitement to violence, and it not only risks the safety of real people, but it undermines the principles of democracy. As Secretary of State, I feel a responsibility to address this issue directly. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for your commitment to a respectful and inclusive democracy. Sincerely, Steve Simon Minnesota Secretary of State | = | = With Steve’s leadership, Minnesota has led the nation in voter turnout for the past three out of four elections. His top priorities are defending our democracy, strengthening the freedom to vote for all eligible Minnesotans, pushing back against dangerous disinformation about our elections, providing support for small businesses, and enhancing security protections for our most vulnerable. = Prepared and paid for by Simon for Secretary of State Committee Simon for Secretary of State Committee P.O. Will you trust one to help save it? | [Unsubscribe](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=7b1532ee9a104d6396d807978239b822&_t=Ba_HlZ74ozHK5MREI0-fOaOBaqXa67kV587GA-bx7vTSMx3YMeJA7gnGnn5cSHxaP_hr8X5r8NvW3LNbkv9r5nFrVKRtDu1NDIbVbNbbRxk%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=7b1532ee9a104d6396d807978239b822&_t=Ba_HlZ74ozHK5MREI0-fOaOBaqXa67kV587GA-bx7vTSMx3YMeJA7gnGnn5cSHxaP_hr8X5r8NvW3LNbkv9r5nFrVKRtDu1NDIbVbNbbRxk%3D)

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7b1532ee9a104d6396d807978239b822&_e=92Wpt8mQp4Wv1Zwtj0LJQumvVCsGAmVqV73L-q9ir2I8TfPAi4zBO6OHiAcHn33eqWRNli4tCC0rDt3gE3D8S4_4nX04ZnebOfTm-x9Yrvwqe2_OkK-toCWfO7Dy_cKP4NBDCF3c04rH5gO66qqKZFoGocrIXG9KsQcABAGmsgQzq92YEZsj1g9KT8QqHm1Gjb2hmwFkAC1w1-H9csM8dVGYQ-ACyguNZbt2WdlNw4-4qqoh-lDY-AQOY8vO3DeXPHrljM-rL2IwdjVLM51A13ihL05wNorU8pHzxXYzJbWvd2_B_8LPTDF7wr7MLJbrGYRXXvn0yX6pSF8Uw515Fp-26I5ViqB9Z9uTUwVT1tuqEbw_O8v_xpqOePjkwmXC)
Peter,

If you’re fortunate enough to know a Marine, you know we carry our identity as a Marine with us to the grave.

My service in the United States Marine Corps was a life-changing commitment, and it has continued to shape mine as I have returned to civilian life.

**Even now, as I’m fighting to win a seat in the United States Congress, I’m doing so with Honor, Courage and Commitment.**

I don’t back down from a fight, and when there is a fight, I make sure I’m there first.

When I saw my city suffering from economic hardship and rampant crime due to poor leadership, I took on an entrenched & well-funded incumbent and won election as Mayor.

Now, I see the country that I served to protect suffering from the exact same crises _and worse_ , [**so I’m jumping into the fight to fix it.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7b1532ee9a104d6396d807978239b822&_e=92Wpt8mQp4Wv1Zwtj0LJQumvVCsGAmVqV73L-q9ir2I8TfPAi4zBO6OHiAcHn33eqWRNli4tCC0rDt3gE3D8S4_4nX04ZnebOfTm-x9Yrvwqe2_OkK-toCWfO7Dy_cKP4NBDCF3c04rH5gO66qqKZFoGocrIXG9KsQcABAGmsgQzq92YEZsj1g9KT8QqHm1Gjb2hmwFkAC1w1-H9csM8dVGYQ-ACyguNZbt2WdlNw4-GMrnoLPz-6wP04wvzVVB6oBU5IevwWY4lnYKri6i_PS_dLciTwISOD2tMMxlf0ZXrrSj37biNNSbDY5aJ9vLZXUrQLe_pRZiqL4UyZDCGpQDhyf_rBs0AlAp3wFQn0i2pXrvhs9-9nN_nG74zeFcu)

[ ** SEND A MARINE TO CONGRESS ➞ **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7b1532ee9a104d6396d807978239b822&_e=92Wpt8mQp4Wv1Zwtj0LJQumvVCsGAmVqV73L-q9ir2I8TfPAi4zBO6OHiAcHn33eqWRNli4tCC0rDt3gE3D8S4_4nX04ZnebOfTm-x9Yrvwqe2_OkK-toCWfO7Dy_cKP4NBDCF3c04rH5gO66qqKZFoGocrIXG9KsQcABAGmsgQzq92YEZsj1g9KT8QqHm1Gjb2hmwFkAC1w1-H9csM8dVGYQ-ACyguNZbt2WdlNw4_c6mLh8z35af4mihS566d-5kAtSlk3hznR5Afa9Q0lM0FD9YBaMDncUh3_Y56AosprXBnWxo3MUQ2M6GDkAKbcMS6tqsunk1ziyomCSkoi0g58c0_VW-HYylGnVAD_3qjIpEtI1qRcrj0LYGKtYNsZ)
**But no Marine goes into battle alone** , which is why I need your support in my fight to win one of the most competitive Congressional seats on the ballot in 2024 – California’s 9th District.

[**Will you send a Marine and conservative patriot to Congress by chipping in anything you can to my campaign today?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7b1532ee9a104d6396d807978239b822&_e=92Wpt8mQp4Wv1Zwtj0LJQumvVCsGAmVqV73L-q9ir2I8TfPAi4zBO6OHiAcHn33eqWRNli4tCC0rDt3gE3D8S4_4nX04ZnebOfTm-x9Yrvwqe2_OkK-toCWfO7Dy_cKP4NBDCF3c04rH5gO66qqKZFoGocrIXG9KsQcABAGmsgQzq92YEZsj1g9KT8QqHm1Gjb2hmwFkAC1w1-H9csM8dVGYQ-ACyguNZbt2WdlNw4_nP3wbI7Xzb0-yRegld0mgMYMdeJ-WDcAFhpn41BFrsyBEzNNrmPYu9ndb2LS3A-4-pWQDeZoQ_1W7BjDOFF08hrA71ikJ5EL5ktEwaVLO3Lwpd8XOYY1qiekJAlM4_qVF_NVECymLxUqW_HU6sO6w)

Our current leadership has failed to secure our borders and compromised our national security; they’ve allowed drugs & crime to take over our communities; they’ve been reckless spenders – driving up our national debt and burdening families with out-of-control inflation; they’ve abandoned our military & veterans; and they’ve made our nation weaker.

**It’s the work of politicians, and it’s time we relieved them of their duties.**

I need your help to win this seat so we have leaders in Washington who will serve our country and our people, instead of their own agendas.

You trust our Marines to protect our nation. _Will you trust one to help save it?_ [**Please join my campaign today with a contribution of any amount, and let’s take our country back!**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7b1532ee9a104d6396d807978239b822&_e=92Wpt8mQp4Wv1Zwtj0LJQumvVCsGAmVqV73L-q9ir2I8TfPAi4zBO6OHiAcHn33eqWRNli4tCC0rDt3gE3D8S4_4nX04ZnebOfTm-x9Yrvwqe2_OkK-toCWfO7Dy_cKP4NBDCF3c04rH5gO66qqKZFoGocrIXG9KsQcABAGmsgQzq92YEZsj1g9KT8QqHm1Gjb2hmwFkAC1w1-H9csM8dVGYQ-ACyguNZbt2WdlNw48znsc1j0TYRCStEqpB9qX3CIvdORdPuEBwaA705bPpCon-xWsof8acHXGtB9ogObkesnkO-Sp418-13-4SmU-n5SVZt6r_M97WOaDtSlPdsx7jaiRXzwhDt8I-Un-NGz3iKDnmtNaKXDO_Zwin185n)

Semper Fi!

Kevin Lincoln
Veteran, USMC
Republican for Congress

[ ** SEND A MARINE TO CONGRESS ➞ **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7b1532ee9a104d6396d807978239b822&_e=92Wpt8mQp4Wv1Zwtj0LJQumvVCsGAmVqV73L-q9ir2I8TfPAi4zBO6OHiAcHn33eqWRNli4tCC0rDt3gE3D8S4_4nX04ZnebOfTm-x9Yrvwqe2_OkK-toCWfO7Dy_cKP4NBDCF3c04rH5gO66qqKZFoGocrIXG9KsQcABAGmsgQzq92YEZsj1g9KT8QqHm1Gjb2hmwFkAC1w1-H9csM8dVGYQ-ACyguNZbt2WdlNw48EeE6XQTcHmA1wQU6QjxdcoguqzV7fZJ5Yb3k7DMnj1y9FTHdugl-x-MrqZv3nP0JpyrrkI0Nj--T83kQtekj95Hga6kwwtVWE7Eir0ie2Ysy4iHMJFP2RfTatsywOLi-2p2qrFdpTYUZlFSin8V50)

| **Meet Kevin Lincoln
**
My name is Kevin Lincoln, and my story, is the Valley’s story. I am a 3rd generation Stocktonian, raising a 4th generation in the city I love. I’m the grandson of Mexican immigrants, and my stepfather is an Army veteran.

Like many Stocktonians, my family has overcome economic setbacks. My own father struggled to survive on these streets, and was at one time, homeless. But I never let adversity define me. I joined the Marines and served in the White House Military Office, assigned to Marine One. I graduated college while working full-time and raising a family. I’ve worked in corporate America and served our community as a pastor, and as a non-profit leader.

I’m blessed with a beautiful wife, Bonnie, and two amazing children. I’ve lived a life of service, but the greatest honor of my life has been giving back to my community, through serving as Mayor of my hometown, Stockton.

Hi Peter**,** Save the date for December 12th in Nashville! I will be in town for a very special event supporting my campaign for US Senate, and I promise you do not want to miss this one. I'm excited to share the news that music legend Emmylou Harris will be joining us at the home of Brooks and Bert Mathews! **[See more details and RSVP here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73776791/439581150/-240353708?refcode=ea.aca32c2f-b588-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ms=ea.aca32c2f-b588-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2EzMmMyZi1iNTg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FDEMvHJBC0TT7J5rAGv-0eAk6oVdNLCwwYjj0QEszh0=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73776792/439581151/-917839890?refcode=ea.aca32c2f-b588-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ms=ea.aca32c2f-b588-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2EzMmMyZi1iNTg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FDEMvHJBC0TT7J5rAGv-0eAk6oVdNLCwwYjj0QEszh0=) It means the world to me to earn the support of folks across the state as we continue our efforts to reach voters in every corner of Tennessee. It will take a widespread, multigenerational movement to defeat Marsha Blackburn in 2024 - and that is exactly what we are building. **[Join our movement today by joining the host committee for this event!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73776793/439581152/-240353708?refcode=ea.aca32c2f-b588-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ms=ea.aca32c2f-b588-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2EzMmMyZi1iNTg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FDEMvHJBC0TT7J5rAGv-0eAk6oVdNLCwwYjj0QEszh0=)****** I look forward to every opportunity to meet with fellow Tennesseans during my travels across the state, but I have to admit - I am especially excited for this one! RSVP today and join me on Tuesday, December 12th. | [**RSVP NOW**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73776794/439581153/-917839890?refcode=ea.aca32c2f-b588-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ms=ea.aca32c2f-b588-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2EzMmMyZi1iNTg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FDEMvHJBC0TT7J5rAGv-0eAk6oVdNLCwwYjj0QEszh0=)

Rep. Gloria Johnson

| Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care.

For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors.

Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights.

subject: Dunce
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
Friend,
Like a schoolyard bully, Rep. Bergman just announced his 57th doomed-to-fail bill, proposing the destruction of elementary and secondary education in America.
In light of his war on education, here's a math lesson:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/War%20on%20Education%20%281%29.png]
➤ SAVE THE DEPT. OF EDUCATION ➤ [actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
We're hopeful his bill ends up in the garbage can, just like 95% of everything he's ever proposed, but , we need to stop this disruptive class clown, and [actblue.com/donate/about-bob] [actblue.com/donate/about-bob] [actblue.com/donate/about-bob] [actblue.com/donate/about-bob] your generosity helps Bob Lorinser send Bergman home [actblue.com/donate/about-bob] in 2024.
actblue.com/donate/about-bob [actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Friend,
Bergman wants to eliminate the Office of Elementary and Secondary Education, which was established in 1965 by Congress as part of the War on Poverty.
Bob Lorinser's opponent wants to destroy a program that gives special attention to disadvantaged children from low-income families, children with disabilities or developmental delays, Native Americans, migrants, homeless students, and foster children.
He stated, “God placed parents in charge of children, not the government.”
Bob argues that God also created educators and medical providers to help parents care for their children.
We need a representative who supports parents, educators, and students. Dr. Bob believes in collective efforts to develop good citizens, prepare them for the workforce, and enrich their lives.
"Education is power. Education is freedom. Shame on Bergman for attacking our dedicated educators." - Bob Lorinser
Your donation helps Doc stand up to schoolyard bullies like Rep. Bergman.
Thank you,
Friends of Dr. Bob

Marquette, MI 49855

name: Ruben Gallego for Senate
subject: Kyrsten Sinema’s “middle finger” to President Biden and you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Thumbs down for raising the minimum wage. A middle finger for Joe Biden’s White House. Open arms for Republican donors.
#

Peter -
An important reminder about Kyrsten Sinema as we work to win in Arizona for Ruben:
Senator Sinema: Thumbs down for raising the minimum wage. A middle finger for Joe Biden’s White House. Open arms for Republican donors.
From Politico:
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov23.azuTO_&refcode=em231121-2-30&t=1&akid=1474%2E734936%2EWUTZw2)
Ruben Gallego needs you. Today. Our fundraising will fall off a cliff starting tomorrow, ahead of Thanksgiving. But Kyrsten Sinema doesn’t need to worry about that, because her big money donors can airdrop pallets of cash at a moment's notice.
[**Please contribute $3 or whatever you can afford today to Ruben Gallego’s campaign for Senate. We’ve got to get ahead of our goals before Thanksgiving. We would not ask if this were not so terribly important.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov23.azuTO_&refcode=em231121-2-30&t=2&akid=1474%2E734936%2EWUTZw2)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1045?c0=ruben-em-nov23.aZOhHW&refcode=em231121-2-30&t=21&akid=1474%2E734936%2EWUTZw2)**

name: Angela
subject: thankful for a lot this year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=684%2E52803%2EssHqfn)

| | Hi Peter! This week, I’m thinking about just how thankful I am to have the unwavering support of my family throughout this campaign. Along with you, they’re the foundation for Team Alsobrooks, and I wouldn’t be in this race without them. **[I’d like to tell you more about how my family lifts up this campaign, but before I get into it _(or if you don’t have time to read this email all the way through)_ , will you chip in $10 to make sure we don’t fall behind on fundraising over the Thanksgiving holiday? ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/8032?t=10&amount=10&akid=684%2E52803%2EssHqfn)** | | | [Donate $10](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/8032?t=11&amount=10&akid=684%2E52803%2EssHqfn)
---
**[](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/8031?t=7&akid=684%2E52803%2EssHqfn)**
**My mom** comes from a very long line of awe-inspiring women, so it’s no surprise she became the incredible lady she is. She taught my sister and me to give back to our community in big and small ways – a lesson that helped guide me towards public service.
While raising two kids and working full-time as a receptionist, my mom always made time to chat with neighbors, care for family, and show up for friends. It wasn’t easy, and her example inspires me every day.
**My dad** taught us important lessons, too. He taught us to listen more than we talk; to always be willing to learn; and to follow up our words with action. He prepared me for the toughest parts of public service, even if he didn’t know it at the time.
**And of course, my amazing sister, Kim,** who’s my rock and supports me in all that I do. When I was deciding to run for Senate, she gave me the push I needed. I can always trust her to tell me the honest truth.
I know I’ve said a lot here, Peter, so thank you for reading it all the way through. I’m proud to fight for a better Maryland for my family and for yours.
**[Before you go: Will you chip in $10 to keep up our historic momentum through the holiday season? I can’t tell you just how much I value your support.](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/8032?t=12&amount=10&akid=684%2E52803%2EssHqfn)**
| | [Donate $10](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/8032?t=13&amount=10&akid=684%2E52803%2EssHqfn)
---
Yours,
Angela

| | [ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/89?t=2&akid=684%2E52803%2EssHqfn)
---

name: Finance Team, Tammy Baldwin for Senate
subject: Our fundraising is lagging
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| POLITICO recently reported that grassroots fundraising is down across the board.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1576%2E35263%2EdBnxfZ)
Peter — _POLITICO_ recently reported that grassroots fundraising is down across the board, and we’ll be honest with you, we’re feeling the impact here at Tammy Baldwin for Senate. Just look at where our fundraising for November stands in comparison to recent months — _with just days left in the month to catch up:_ [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-nov23.TOAtRC&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231121_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1576%2E35263%2EdBnxfZ) With one of the very last monthly deadlines of the year coming up, this is one of the worst possible times for us to slip behind. That’s because, even though our fundraising is already lagging, we’re about to enter one of the slowest fundraising periods of the year through Thanksgiving week. **But our campaign’s work isn’t slowing down for a second.** Tammy could be facing off against up to TWO Republican opponents with massive personal fortunes. While they’ll be able to fund their campaigns by simply writing a check, Tammy depends on grassroots support to defend this seat and our Senate majority. **[With so much on the line, will you rush a donation today to help make up for the slowdown in our grassroots fundraising? Any amount you can spare will help us prepare to keep Wisconsin blue.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-nov23.TOAtRC&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231121_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1576%2E35263%2EdBnxfZ)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-nov23.gM21RB&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231121_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=1576%2E35263%2EdBnxfZ)

name: Team Kennedy
subject: RFK Jr. is surging in polls – some interesting numbers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
The polls tell the real story of his support base and what it means.

| [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=november_21_fundraiser_non_do3&n=1)
---
Dear Peter, In the one month since RFK Jr. declared as an Independent candidate for President, his poll numbers continue to rise across numerous demographics:
* A Quinnipiac poll shows Bobby WINNING 38% among registered voters 18-34, compared to Biden's 32% and Trump’s 27%.

* The Bloomberg News/Morning Consult poll of swing state voters found Bobby surging to 28% of Black voters.

body:
This will be the MOST EXPENSIVE election cycle ever.

| |
---
| | | Friend, this is my last resort...

**Spending on political ads will exceed $10 billion this cycle.** My jaw DROPPED when I saw that figure.
**Hands down: This will be the MOST EXPENSIVE election cycle ever.**
We need a rapid response before our slim GOP Majority gets EVISCERATED by all that cash.
**This is our FINAL chance to turn the tide.**
I realize times are tough right now. If you can give, even if it's just $1, I promise you, **it will make all the difference in the world to our candidates who are out there fighting day in and day out.**

I proudly raised my three sons right here in Kitsap County for more than 20 years – while starting my career as an attorney and serving on the Bainbridge Island City Council.

Now, after serving as our state lands chief for the last seven years, I'm stepping up to run for Washington's 6th Congressional District. I'm stepping up to run for Congress because I personally understand the impact of extremist Republicans' attacks on reproductive rights and women’s healthcare.

If elected, I'll be the first woman to serve the 6th Congressional District. I'll proudly fight for Washington's pro-worker, pro-family, pro-choice, pro-environment values in Congress.

**Families across the 6th Congressional District are struggling.** _They need jobs that pay living wages, housing that is affordable for middle-class families, and so much more._

As commissioner of public lands, I used Washington's natural resources to create new jobs, bolster the housing market, and even provide extra funding for our rural schools. body:
Peter, Trump Wins in Colorado! Join Our Fight Against the Radical Left | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jrforohio/jr-majewski-officially-announces-campaign-to-represent-ohios-9th-district-in-congress-8303194?e=0426928d91)
---
[](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=ef62acc916&e=0426928d91)
Trump Prevails in Colorado, Now It's Our Turn!
Peter,
Against all odds and the dirty tricks of the radical left, **President Trump has secured his rightful place on the Colorado 2024 primary ballot.** This isn't just a win; it's a slap in the face of the corrupt Deep State trying to stifle our voices.
But the battle is far from over. Like President Trump, I'm in the crosshairs of the left's relentless onslaught. They're scared of our message, scared of our power, scared of what we represent — the unyielding spirit of true American patriots.

| [STAND WITH THE AMERICA FIRST MOVEMENT](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=dbffc51180&e=0426928d91)
---
President Trump's victory is a clear signal that we can beat the odds. Now, it's our turn to step up. The left is coming at us with everything they've got because they know we're a threat to their agenda.
That's why I need your help right now. Your support for my campaign is crucial. We're fighting the same battles, against the same underhanded tactics. clean_body: Peter, Trump Wins in Colorado! Join Our Fight Against the Radical Left | | | | | Trump Prevails in Colorado, Now It's Our Turn! Peter, Against all odds and the dirty tricks of the radical left, President Trump has secured his rightful place on the Colorado 2024 primary ballot. This isn't just a win; it's a slap in the face of the corrupt Deep State trying to stifle our voices. But the battle is far from over. Like President Trump, I'm in the crosshairs of the left's relentless onslaught. They're scared of our message, scared of our power, scared of what we represent — the unyielding spirit of true American patriots. | President Trump's victory is a clear signal that we can beat the odds. Now, it's our turn to step up. The left is coming at us with everything they've got because they know we're a threat to their agenda. That's why I need your help right now. Your support for my campaign is crucial. We're fighting the same battles, against the same underhanded tactics. Every contribution you make is a stand against their intimidation and a push towards our shared goal to Make America Great Again. Chip in today and let's take this fight to the next level! | WEEKLY NEWSLETTERNovember 21st, 2023
---
|
---
| | **A Note from CAPT Hung Cao USN (Ret)** Over the last week, Joe Biden met with President Xi Jinping in San Francisco, and he left the meeting with disastrous agreements that will only hurt America. More specifically, if you look at the Green Energy agreement, it will actually increase China’s global and economic power, while hurting and crippling the American economy. We cannot continue bowing down to China! We need a strong legislative branch that will stand up to Biden’s disastrous policies. As Virginia’s next U.S. Senator, I will restore strength and fight for the American people, not give China more power. \- CAPT Hung Cao USN (Ret)
---
|
---

**[Hung Cao: “We Need Leaders Who Will Check Their Egos at the Door”](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=96af711deb32469ba6c63618738d7966&_e=QXVYPYXujL3u0vc0GcdW_h0g8FWP8PwmqFb3sDJtgA4Q-BE1CGPJrIKravd8pGtrGMk14wzQCfWkDzZ1qM0Pi1_Bhu5sY8q1kz5_seC-bg5hCK0m2icSPhyt4UZvRhDpoTEcVfUx62yxeAHHqruT977nA3CRM5nsLS9CGaMtFh-1Od2HcBKaGwC5dcrVOgskQMas3u8yUSm-bBFpJYn2TQOOZcud0fO9tVYWmhSUgOqKadJJ12GMrUjU5W6K4Pg14lF8X3JXEY0TGXruBYC6WXnshK6XcqafsqhEH76mC8InNOs1ywmW-e1FG_7w3KFw-HCEufYVi0zHEkYlztiSnFlvyoTSVrYVF2UF9nb6dNmoDVW2t1jsN_DC_K9hDahBXvMcd3G1m1Za7WLdpBabIz4w0hy0cUcOydbw9oXTGLsc2PRKWU_Ipak_Wu0QR6F7)** Townhall recently published Hung Cao’s opinion piece in light of budget negotiations on Capitol Hill. clean_body: | | | | | | WEEKLY NEWSLETTERNovember 21st, 2023 | | | A Note from CAPT Hung Cao USN (Ret) Over the last week, Joe Biden met with President Xi Jinping in San Francisco, and he left the meeting with disastrous agreements that will only hurt America. More specifically, if you look at the Green Energy agreement, it will actually increase China’s global and economic power, while hurting and crippling the American economy. We cannot continue bowing down to China! We need a strong legislative branch that will stand up to Biden’s disastrous policies. As Virginia’s next U.S. Senator, I will restore strength and fight for the American people, not give China more power. \- CAPT Hung Cao USN (Ret) | In Case You Missed It Hung Cao shared with Newsmax listeners how Biden’s weakness ultimately gives Xi Jinping and China an upper hand. Joe Biden has made America so weak that China no longer sees us as a threat. Be sure to check it out! | | | Townhall recently published Hung Cao’s opinion piece in light of budget negotiations on Capitol Hill. In his piece, Hung shares why it’s time for us to hold Congress accountable and why many career politicians and bureaucrats have no loyalty except to their wallets and the special interest groups that stuff them. | For the first time since announcing his race for U.S. Senate, Hung Cao joined John Reid on Richmond’s Morning News to discuss why he is running for the United States Senate and how he will bring change to America. He also shared his view on the state of the race and explained how he can defeat Tim Kaine in 2024. | Store If you haven't picked up your Hung Cao gear yet, check out our online store! | Social Media to Share Here are a few of our top posts from social media this week. Be sure to like and share, and when you tweet at Hung remember to use #TeamCao! | | | | | | That's it for this week, thank you for reading and see you on the campaign trail! Be sure to follow Hung Cao on social media! | | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Hung Cao for Virginia PO Box 652 Purcellville VA 20134

Governor Sununu's Introduction Chris Sununu touted that Chris Christie has been all around the state talking with voters and really cares about the individual. name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: New poll: Elissa has a slight lead in the Michigan Senate race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=839%2E135344%2E_Rqfrh)

We just got big news in the Michigan Senate race, team: A new poll shows that our general election race is a DEAD HEAT against two of our Republican opponents.
**Elissa Slotkin** : 39%
**Mike Rogers** : 37%

**Elissa Slotkin** : 40%
**James Craig** : 38%
We have a slight edge, but this poll makes it clear that no matter who our Republican opponent is, there is a lot of work to do in order to take Elissa’s positive, affirmative message to undecided voters across the state next year. [**Will you chip in to help us make the important investments we’ll need to win this race?](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-nov23.RK33_Y&refcode=em231121-1-tt&t=2&akid=839%2E135344%2E_Rqfrh)**
**[DONATE NOW](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-nov23.RK33_Y&refcode=em231121-1-tt&t=3&akid=839%2E135344%2E_Rqfrh)**
With the retirement of Joe Manchin in West Virginia, we know that Michigan’s open Senate seat will be even more critical in determining whether or not Democrats maintain control of the Senate next year. And this poll makes it clear that, as a swing state, nothing in Michigan is ever guaranteed.
The Detroit Free Press said:_”But it's such a small lead — well within the margin of error — that it could indicate trouble for Democrats in retaining the seat...Such large numbers of undecided voters make it clear that all of the candidates still have a lot of ground to make up in introducing themselves to voters.”_
So, what does this mean? The big takeaways for our race in this open seat are that while this is a two-point margin, over 20% of voters are undecided. We’ve been doing everything we can to take our message directly to voters early by visiting cities and towns all over Michigan and meeting with folks to talk about the issues that matter to them. In addition, we know that millions of dollars from Republican mega-donors and conservative Super PACs are on the way to prop up our eventual opponent.
Elissa is a data nerd, so this kind of poll really does guide our decisions about TV ads, digital outreach, hiring staff early, and building a ground-game that meets folks where they are. That’s why the most important time to donate is now. **Contributions a year from now, when we’re in the home stretch are helpful. But everything we raise now will help us be strategic and intentional about how -- and when -- we’re reaching voters.**
[**That’s why we’re asking for your support: Will you chip in now to help us continue reaching undecided voters, expand our lead in this race, and protect Michigan’s Senate seat for Democrats?](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-nov23.RK33_Y&refcode=em231121-1-tt&t=4&akid=839%2E135344%2E_Rqfrh)**

name: Josh Stein
subject: My opponent is a conspiracy theorist.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
He’s too dangerous to be the next Governor of North Carolina.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73779095/439589228/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWY2NWZiMi1iZTg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CJHljNOfyDykcb5V-78N-1kPqB8Cz8x7as3VFKnr3Qs=&emci=d7bbce08-8a88-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=fef65fb2-be88-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=43566853)

| | Here’s the _truth,_ Peter: The frontrunner for the GOP nomination for Governor of North Carolina, Mark Robinson, is a self-described conspiracy theorist.

He has accused school shooting survivors of being “crisis actors.” He referred to the Holocaust as “hogwash.” He agreed with claims that Jewish bankers are working with China, Islamic leaders, and the CIA to “control the world.”

My opponent’s lies aren’t just outrageous, Peter. **They’re dangerous.** | [SPLIT A DONATION TO SUPPORT THE GA DEMS AND DEFEAT MARK ROBINSON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73779096/439589229/1536759036?refcode=20231121.2_JS_11AD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWY2NWZiMi1iZTg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CJHljNOfyDykcb5V-78N-1kPqB8Cz8x7as3VFKnr3Qs=)
---
If Mark Robinson can’t recognize the truth when it comes to something as clear-cut as school shootings or the Holocaust, then he cannot be trusted to lead our state.

But despite my opponent’s extremism, our race is too close for comfort. The polls show us in a _statistical tie_ — and I can only overcome it with your help.

Mark Robinson is too extreme for North Carolina — and we deserve better.

[**_Peter, I’m making an important request: Please, could you split a donation between my campaign and the GA Dems to invest in our success? name: Mazie Hirono
subject: An outright attack on women
body:
|
#
Peter, Amid all the awful and racist actions and rhetoric that came out of the Trump administration, I began speaking out in a way that struck people as new. People told me that I had “found my voice.” **No, I chose to use my voice.** Since then, I have not stopped speaking out. But as the only immigrant woman currently serving in the Senate, that often attracts criticism and vitriol from the far-right. **I’ll explain more in a moment, but first, will you chip in to support my re-election campaign and protect our razor-thin Senate majority? Here’s a personal link to give: ****[secure.actblue.com/donate/mkh-em-nov23/dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73779306/439589949/-2048798125?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20221121_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzc5NDJhYy1iZjg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=duzh9KhAERDmS8MhwZ4H8iGhW1LBE_nJsL9sBLRUIeI=)** Perhaps people are uncomfortable with me pointing out the truth in no uncertain terms. When I said that the MAGA Republican party was waging an outright attack against women in this country, I meant it. In response, Fox News shamefully distorted my record using misogynistic and anti-Asian tropes. **Nonetheless, I stand by what I said. Just take a look at the Republican Party today.** After more than six months, Senator Tommy Tuberville _still_ has not relented on his blanket hold of military nominees and promotions — all because he doesn’t like that our servicewomen can travel to receive life-saving reproductive care. In a display of stunning ignorance, he justified his reckless stunt by claiming that our servicewomen are seeking abortions “after birth.” _So not only does Tommy Tuberville think he is uniquely qualified to unilaterally determine how servicemembers make their health decisions — he is risking our national security over absurd, hateful misinformation._ And in the House, newly-elected Republican Speaker Mike Johnson’s anti-abortion record is as radical as it gets. He’s championed a nationwide abortion ban with no exceptions for rape, incest, or the life of the mother. He even once blamed abortion for school shootings — and no, he doesn’t support gun safety reform, either. **As I said, this Republican party is blazing an extremist, anti-woman agenda — full stop. I promise to continue speaking out and fighting for reproductive freedom, but I need your help.** [**Peter, please add a donation of $10 or any amount to show the extremist Republican party that we won’t stand by while they attack our rights, freedoms, and bodily autonomy.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73779307/439589951/840717225?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20221121_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzc5NDJhYy1iZjg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=duzh9KhAERDmS8MhwZ4H8iGhW1LBE_nJsL9sBLRUIeI=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | ****[Chip in $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73779308/439589952/-2048798125?express_lane=true&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20221121_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzc5NDJhYy1iZjg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=duzh9KhAERDmS8MhwZ4H8iGhW1LBE_nJsL9sBLRUIeI=)****

clean_body: | Peter, Amid all the awful and racist actions and rhetoric that came out of the Trump administration, I began speaking out in a way that struck people as new. People told me that I had “found my voice.” No, I chose to use my voice. Since then, I have not stopped speaking out. But as the only immigrant woman currently serving in the Senate, that often attracts criticism and vitriol from the far-right. I’ll explain more in a moment, but first, will you chip in to support my re-election campaign and protect our razor-thin Senate majority? Here’s a personal link to give: = Perhaps people are uncomfortable with me pointing out the truth in no uncertain terms. When I said that the MAGA Republican party was waging an outright attack against women in this country, I meant it. In response, Fox News shamefully distorted my record using misogynistic and anti-Asian tropes. Nonetheless, I stand by what I said. Just take a look at the Republican Party today. After more than six months, Senator Tommy Tuberville still has not relented on his blanket hold of military nominees and promotions — all because he doesn’t like that our servicewomen can travel to receive life-saving reproductive care. In a display of stunning ignorance, he justified his reckless stunt by claiming that our servicewomen are seeking abortions “after birth.” So not only does Tommy Tuberville think he is uniquely qualified to unilaterally determine how servicemembers make their health decisions — he is risking our national security over absurd, hateful misinformation. And in the House, newly-elected Republican Speaker Mike Johnson’s anti-abortion record is as radical as it gets. He’s championed a nationwide abortion ban with no exceptions for rape, incest, or the life of the mother. He even once blamed abortion for school shootings — and no, he doesn’t support gun safety reform, either. As I said, this Republican party is blazing an extremist, anti-woman agenda — full stop. I promise to continue speaking out and fighting for reproductive freedom, but I need your help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | **= ** | **= ** | | **= ** | **= ** | | **= ** | **= ** Thank you for standing with me, Mazie Our friends in Maui still need our support. If you would like to make a contribution to the Hawaii Community Foundation to support disaster relief and recovery efforts, you can click=. Thank you. Friends of Mazie Hirono Friends of Mazie Hirono 335 Merchant Street #677 Honolulu, HI 96809 United States

Peter, I had a lot of different jobs before I got to Congress. I was a barista, a theme park worker, and an Uber driver, so the fight for workers’ rights is personal to me.

We need and deserve representation that looks more like us and has struggled like us. We need fighters for working people in Congress.

**So as we fight to raise wages and protect the right to organize, I'm committed to a future that puts our workers first. But this year has made clear: Union busters are out and fighting, too, and they’ll do everything they can to break up our solidarity in Congress. I need your help to stay here and stay in the fight.**

name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: The environment is in serious jeopardy this Giving Tuesday. Read this today:
body:
Time sensitive

Peter - our Membership Drive deadline is a few days away, and we're reaching out because we haven't heard from you yet (renew your membership here and your contribution will be tripled https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_ywTdyX_ ).

The truth is your membership matters, and it's particularly critical right now.

Here's the situation: Earlier this month, Senator Joe Manchin backed away from a climate deal after months of negotiations, choosing to side with Big Oil and Republicans. It leaves the deal one vote short -- stalling any real action in Congress for now.

In response, we're redoubling our efforts on pushing the White House to act decisively on climate. The Biden administration has massive amounts of power to curb climate pollution - but that will only happen if the environmental movement makes it happen.

Right now, we're facing a critical test: the Biden administration is weighing a plan to block all new oil and gas drilling leases on public waters.

This could be huge -- and a decision is coming. Right now, we're organizing volunteers from all over the country to flood the administration with letters, pressuring Biden to hold to his promises.

Peter -- it's your membership support that makes victory possible here. But we have to do more. A group of donors has put together a fund to triple match every contribution before Sunday's membership deadline:

Can we count on your support? Claim your membership now - it only takes $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/6Lg6B~

The ban on new oil and gas leases is the first of many huge environmental decisions, Peter. And right now, we're pushing for serious action on so many fronts -- including:
Setting tight standards for power plants and other major emitters of climate pollution
Placing strict limits on air pollution to safeguard all communities Expediting requirements of 100% tailpipe pollution-free new cars by 2035 and trucks by 2040
Protecting communities from hazardous and super-polluting methane Conserving 30% of our public lands and waters by 2030 Declaring a climate emergency - and so much more. The best way you can help win each and every one of these fights right now is to claim your LCV membership - all it takes is a gift of $5 or more. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/z9e0fbk-

Thank you, thank you, thank you, Peter. This is such a critical moment for the environment, and we're so fortunate to have you on the team.

Onward,

Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=10258691&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg2MDQ0MzY5MQS2&spReportId=MTg2MDQ0MzY5MQS2. Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=10258691&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg2MDQ0MzY5MQS2&spReportId=MTg2MDQ0MzY5MQS2 from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 https://links.messages.lcv. https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=10258691&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg2MDQ0MzY5MQS2&spReportId=MTg2MDQ0MzY5MQS2

In January, the Federal Education Funding Task Force will release its recommendation to our state legislature.
We already know the right-wing extremists in leadership are looking to gut that funding from our schools because they would rather see our schools struggle than create the safe and affirming environments that our students deserve.
This unprecedented move would deprive our kids of over _$1 billion_ — funding that primarily supports Title I programs at low-income schools and services for students with disabilities.
[**Our most vulnerable students are at risk if the GOP rejects this funding. Will you sign your name right now to DEMAND that the legislature fully funds our schools?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73779543/439590807/-163407173?refcode=AU_TNDP_EG_GEN_PET_AC60_20231121_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDc4NzE4NC1jMTg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gKBkPKfWTu2SmUfGBE8iOZkOKrD_OhfFOq9VaPsLwlI=&emci=33787184-c188-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=3d787184-c188-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=6362892)

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Please add your name before Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
I’m writing today because if we’re going to hold onto our slim majority, we must start now. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=b2324864cd04426f935020654bf2a11e&_t=Qplmg25ntGCb1PLzpKnAB-ch8JLir9fUwWLlWa07wUfh-PjbGy5na12SppwJPYzpu_5eZ83AKCj9koKm5ieuPbcMPUk3jVBGvAcVqThp3Ww%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=b2324864cd04426f935020654bf2a11e&_t=Qplmg25ntGCb1PLzpKnAB-ch8JLir9fUwWLlWa07wUfh-PjbGy5na12SppwJPYzpu_5eZ83AKCj9koKm5ieuPbcMPUk3jVBGvAcVqThp3Ww%3D)
[ ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b2324864cd04426f935020654bf2a11e&_e=AJIxMzJWIsjjb0XJgMmHDmR07DI61YRmnC12gIJZ5ovPQfz0NKeUwZCkqEPmtTFYo5sy-j8TCfElxUqIz0ZKn8UTeb49k6iuHiE2J2Xile_l73UHqM1q0_GpuwZUfzb-wJyjuDoCUnVQVozz72J99O9y74t_Nf2gxH_Z_bPNVW8EIDtJZ1Xblr4k1gT4Cy11WuKoe2EQZ1mHhqenwH2pUIcSBJoh9IhMSv7Zbx4X_aXDul61_9jJflT5AA-i2KREgZ7g1u30ygNwmzdSRPd0a1td6hQxR5WRMD2BnR-TiRU6Y0YtwfqYViYlvGw55TrukJHrjtJye3SUPt89cbDDaJLUqaZJVKk8Ix0FWwnRg-zxH0jlezAhNNNIEi_7icNUPGqq_phucn0lvHyf6D7ttg%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American - when I became Speaker of the House on October 25th, I knew one of the first things we needed to do was build out our team of supporters online.

So, we got to work immediately and [**set a goal of finding 100,000 conservatives to join Team Johnson by the time Thanksgiving rolled around.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b2324864cd04426f935020654bf2a11e&_e=AJIxMzJWIsjjb0XJgMmHDmR07DI61YRmnC12gIJZ5ovPQfz0NKeUwZCkqEPmtTFYo5sy-j8TCfElxUqIz0ZKn8UTeb49k6iuHiE2J2Xile_l73UHqM1q0_GpuwZUfzb-wJyjuDoCUnVQVozz72J99O9y74t_Nf2gxH_Z_bPNVW8EIDtJZ1Xblr4k1gT4Cy11WuKoe2EQZ1mHhqenwH2pUIcSBJoh9IhMSv7Zbx4X_aXDul61_9jJflT5AA-i2KRE5DwT2ailRkqCyCk6Q7vD8DZ56LwWuyFXqTvx97zaz0S_8oFdoFDh_yFy6184AZGhVulu1w8CIgR0vyCmUZfvZhCG3cF92qvcM3SKPjWDFuXeuJP1MhVPqmHPYWzhD3N_EzDZOCam5N5prP0J3qKr8w%3D%3D)

To date, we have not hit our goal. With Thanksgiving just around the corner, we have a lot of work to do.

If you've already signaled your support for our team as we work to hold onto our thin majority heading into next year's election, _thank you._ If you haven't, [**please consider being one of the thousands of signatures I need to find before the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade begins on Thanksgiving morning.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b2324864cd04426f935020654bf2a11e&_e=AJIxMzJWIsjjb0XJgMmHDmR07DI61YRmnC12gIJZ5ovPQfz0NKeUwZCkqEPmtTFYo5sy-j8TCfElxUqIz0ZKn8UTeb49k6iuHiE2J2Xile_l73UHqM1q0_GpuwZUfzb-wJyjuDoCUnVQVozz72J99O9y74t_Nf2gxH_Z_bPNVW8EIDtJZ1Xblr4k1gT4Cy11WuKoe2EQZ1mHhqenwH2pUIcSBJoh9IhMSv7Zbx4X_aXDul61_9jJflT5AA-i2KREKlfjCOk2RmTHkoa3Hn0ze5xILOMUYQeqAY3DrYVqjxdRk2-3wCVLYKiM0B7PkqsXGElO1w6i0hQ-hbGHIBQVxTWBxU-QWvdUC_nTq3Q4oggvYXBc3nOMWXAMt3DKXBQfdYoUT9ROvC4BQ7Dlh31Gyw%3D%3D)

[ ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b2324864cd04426f935020654bf2a11e&_e=AJIxMzJWIsjjb0XJgMmHDmR07DI61YRmnC12gIJZ5ovPQfz0NKeUwZCkqEPmtTFYo5sy-j8TCfElxUqIz0ZKn8UTeb49k6iuHiE2J2Xile_l73UHqM1q0_GpuwZUfzb-wJyjuDoCUnVQVozz72J99O9y74t_Nf2gxH_Z_bPNVW8EIDtJZ1Xblr4k1gT4Cy11WuKoe2EQZ1mHhqenwH2pUIcSBJoh9IhMSv7Zbx4X_aXDul61_9jJflT5AA-i2KREmmu4SLFgBdA9NzvUuU5uTdPMS0N7nEXoYlZOxF2IvJ_fCKMvMl8rsjXHuQ3Wg5y-tVnKTQ1cal6Wve0zWXP5VbnfQU87dexC16Uuryo4EU5v4TP2vBI2ZDHTONsmU7dly5vHQ-cqy2ivIZooP7WTbw%3D%3D)
[**SIGN HERE ➞**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b2324864cd04426f935020654bf2a11e&_e=AJIxMzJWIsjjb0XJgMmHDmR07DI61YRmnC12gIJZ5ovPQfz0NKeUwZCkqEPmtTFYo5sy-j8TCfElxUqIz0ZKn8UTeb49k6iuHiE2J2Xile_l73UHqM1q0_GpuwZUfzb-wJyjuDoCUnVQVozz72J99O9y74t_Nf2gxH_Z_bPNVW8EIDtJZ1Xblr4k1gT4Cy11WuKoe2EQZ1mHhqenwH2pUIcSBJoh9IhMSv7Zbx4X_aXDul61_9jJflT5AA-i2KREAUj5jVmLgtkHydrwwx2lod6j2blhd04gTx4tNzSnyc0X-7yw3s1kKTQD3nuOX6euMMBpT0LGoW6HiIh2x4StNL3nNrW1dt-HwBz35vtoq70bvAYEpdTWiRZUY9kLOxpyDAW0jXmQcjgD2b_NarN4Ag%3D%3D)
Fellow American, Democrats have spent the last three years under President Biden trying to turn our great nation into a banana republic.

While voters don't seem to have much of an appetite for Joe Biden, Democrats in the House and Senate have done everything they can to prop up his failing presidency while undoing all the critical work President Trump and Congressional Republicans moved forward in recent years.

We're doing our best to continue providing conservative solutions to our nation's most vexing concerns. _Still, I must be honest - doing so would be infinitely easier if we had a more significant majority._ [**We only have a slim cushion right now, meaning there is ZERO room for error.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b2324864cd04426f935020654bf2a11e&_e=AJIxMzJWIsjjb0XJgMmHDmR07DI61YRmnC12gIJZ5ovPQfz0NKeUwZCkqEPmtTFYo5sy-j8TCfElxUqIz0ZKn8UTeb49k6iuHiE2J2Xile_l73UHqM1q0_GpuwZUfzb-wJyjuDoCUnVQVozz72J99O9y74t_Nf2gxH_Z_bPNVW8EIDtJZ1Xblr4k1gT4Cy11WuKoe2EQZ1mHhqenwH2pUIcSBJoh9IhMSv7Zbx4X_aXDul61_9jJflT5AA-i2KREpDgmjg3Q8HSSZQj2w7ZAIRLUWgz9Aw9wmQGK7r0zph7NmzOt02JzYq4rA46GsWJ5Gte1bOn_3mXcpUpC5RS6kVQmJSPm29FAwulgLIL_kaqG8YAgzpU3heC2ENQH8Q6M1wgHeH9MnWQMotTQ6IXsBA%3D%3D)

Our immediate goals for next year are two-fold:

1. Hold onto the House majority
2. Expand our House majority

**We've seen what happens when Democrats are in the majority: they'll add trillions more to the national debt and launch assaults on our Constitutional liberties.**

[ ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b2324864cd04426f935020654bf2a11e&_e=AJIxMzJWIsjjb0XJgMmHDmR07DI61YRmnC12gIJZ5ovPQfz0NKeUwZCkqEPmtTFYo5sy-j8TCfElxUqIz0ZKn8UTeb49k6iuHiE2J2Xile_l73UHqM1q0_GpuwZUfzb-wJyjuDoCUnVQVozz72J99O9y74t_Nf2gxH_Z_bPNVW8EIDtJZ1Xblr4k1gT4Cy11WuKoe2EQZ1mHhqenwH2pUIcSBJoh9IhMSv7Zbx4X_aXDul61_9jJflT5AA-i2KRElQ0JSU_Dqgr_aPgzLjZ3BfmowL2kTKTGd_dL09bhrqOevtZbCWB70EJ_7Cen5OPHhXoz3dstWPUUSOBpgrDsNpAlrufPVmloqaoWJXjxYGvQO4LicpgJHqOiN9r33b22ODj3ppSwAvbq4yGA-PasPA%3D%3D)

clean_body: I’m writing today because if we’re going to hold onto our slim majority, we must start now. | | Fellow American - when I became Speaker of the House on October 25th, I knew one of the first things we needed to do was build out our team of supporters online. So, we got to work immediately and To date, we have not hit our goal. With Thanksgiving just around the corner, we have a lot of work to do. If you've already signaled your support for our team as we work to hold onto our thin majority heading into next year's election, thank you. If you haven't, Fellow American, Democrats have spent the last three years under President Biden trying to turn our great nation into a banana republic. While voters don't seem to have much of an appetite for Joe Biden, Democrats in the House and Senate have done everything they can to prop up his failing presidency while undoing all the critical work President Trump and Congressional Republicans moved forward in recent years. We're doing our best to continue providing conservative solutions to our nation's most vexing concerns. Still, I must be honest - doing so would be infinitely easier if we had a more significant majority. Our immediate goals for next year are two-fold: 1. Hold onto the House majority 2. Expand our House majority We've seen what happens when Democrats are in the majority: they'll add trillions more to the national debt and launch assaults on our Constitutional liberties. I'm writing today because if we're going to hold onto our slim majority, we must start now. I hate sending emails like this. That's why I won't beg you to donate ahead of tonight's crucial midnight deadline, but I _will_ lay out the facts:

**My potential GOP opponent – Mitch McConnell's handpicked candidate – outraised me in the first week of his campaign launch. And shortly after, a shady billionaire poured $2 million into the race to help flip this seat red.**
McConnell and his allies flooded Nevada's last Senate race with over a staggering $55 million (only to come up less than a percentage point short of winning). And with TIME reporting that Nevada could deliver everything from the Senate to the White House to Republicans in 2024, we need all the support we can get if we're going to fend off their attacks.

But our midnight fundraising deadline is just hours away, and we're on track to fall short of our $20,000 goal. So please, without much time left, I have to ask:
_[**Will you chip in $5 or more to my campaign and Patty Murray’s – every dollar makes a difference – to help me fight back against the GOP, win in Nevada, and defend our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73780164/439592873/-393630507?refcode=jtk174-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWQ2Zjc3NC1jMjg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EjgpxaxA7YiueHQy6LOWd_MgRm7cwzwcVPMKI1UZLlw=)_

And with TIME reporting that Nevada could deliver everything from the Senate to the White House to Republicans in 2024, we need all the support we can get if we're going to fend off their attacks. But our midnight fundraising deadline is just hours away, and we're on track to fall short of our $20,000 goal. So please, without much time left, I have to ask: = ___If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express,your donation __split between Jacky Rosen and Patty Murray will go through immediately:____ | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Jacky Rosen | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. People for Patty Murray PO BOX 3662 Seattle, WA 98124 United States | | PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

Hi there...

I'm not quite sure how to phrase this, but I'm going to be honest with you, Patriot.

**These election results weren 't good news for Republicans.

I need to tell you about it, though, so you can choose for yourself whether to join the fight. You could change it all...**

My name is Brian Mast. If you aren't familiar with my background, I'm a combat veteran turned Congressman.

I lost both my legs and a finger in Afghanistan when a Taliban IED exploded beneath me. But, I survived. I returned home to my wife, Brianna, and our young son.

The terrifying truth is that there is a growing radical faction in Congress that apologizes for and even defends the same brand of monstrous terrorists that blew off my legs. I have been loud and clear in my opposition to their hate!

[That's why I'm reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f8d541ea0b024b83b74183e3bccbd1ac&_e=PU-NDQPnVlTMF6nU9lIOavQie1cdG7W_qan-ktFbENlscMwP3SbQ6NBVDI07nDLEQqpBXNDhr8XImW2cEcpPx-n7_babKpcqTCQGL1zLJaAnZOLiBtps69spnOA9gUXhYynijnBQ2PQrsXkRE8kSY4GxVjQr1yX40Y4wFPzvcTfqxGFFH37p3f7lrEZQFXv5X57qH-ln11JHRlNd9I2xpYVZmjZ7OixF_QeAtf8XcUJb3NEmIkz2f-oyuYnUFhIUWZZGt8xPwBYwUcw4aXLA941RmzZQMYAce4sdGNKulafK6kgrduGpWLDgVGEfLCD-HQOO0Z7uMN1E9c8pnpmLYEq_7kXbVsPKvlOX40WV7bZE7PB2EHROhKBaWem1hpE3)
The terrorist apologist Democrats have hatched a plan to stop my fight. They don't realize that I will never back down.

But, I also know this fight is not something I will win on my own.

I learned in the Army to rely on my fellow soldiers in my time of need, and now I am looking to you, Patriot.

**_So please, help me out this one time, Patriot:_**

As a private citizen, a soldier, a volunteer, and now a Congressman, I've always worked to put America First.

These election results weren't what Republicans were hoping for, so we need to act now to prevent the same result when the stakes are even higher next year. That's why I'm leading the fight for America First, protecting our conservative values, and standing against the Radicals working to destroy our country and our allies!

clean_body: | Brian Mast volunteering with the Israeli Defense Force Hi there... I'm not quite sure how to phrase this, but I'm going to be honest with you, Patriot. These election results weren 't good news for Republicans. I need to tell you about it, though, so you can choose for yourself whether to join the fight. You could change it all... My name is Brian Mast. If you aren't familiar with my background, I'm a combat veteran turned Congressman. I lost both my legs and a finger in Afghanistan when a Taliban IED exploded beneath me. But, I survived. I returned home to my wife, Brianna, and our young son. The terrifying truth is that there is a growing radical faction in Congress that apologizes for and even defends the same brand of monstrous terrorists that blew off my legs. I have been loud and clear in my opposition to their hate! The terrorist apologist Democrats have hatched a plan to stop my fight. They don't realize that I will never back down. But, I also know this fight is not something I will win on my own. I learned in the Army to rely on my fellow soldiers in my time of need, and now I am looking to you, Patriot. So please, help me out this one time, Patriot: | As a private citizen, a soldier, a volunteer, and now a Congressman, I've always worked to put America First. These election results weren't what Republicans were hoping for, so we need to act now to prevent the same result when the stakes are even higher next year. That's why I'm leading the fight for America First, protecting our conservative values, and standing against the Radicals working to destroy our country and our allies! I didn't back down when terrorists blew off my legs, so I certainly am not going to back down now. If you are willing to give your support, I give you my word I will not give up this fight. | | | God Bless, Brian Mast | | | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS Hon. Brian Mast is a retired member of the U.S. Army. subject: Pro-Hamas mob storms DNC, searches for Members of Congress

body:
Reps. Rashida Tlaib and Ilhan Omar are fanning the flames of chaos, encouraging pro-Hamas protestors in their mob violence. | Fellow American -

**A Pro-Hamas mob stormed the DNC, trying to break in and find any Member of Congress who stands with Israel for some horrendous retribution.**

Thankfully, Capitol Police stymied the mob and prevented them from breaking down the doors to gain entry to the building.

But the issue remains: these mobs are popping up on college campuses, city halls, and now at the DNC. Nobody is safe from the rage of the mob, and we must defeat the radical Democrats who are fanning the flames of chaos with their dangerous rhetoric.

**Ilhan Omar and Rashida Tlaib continuously make comments disparaging Israel and denying the right of the Israelis to defend themselves from this horrible terrorist aggression.** To make it worse, they echo terrorists' calls of “from the river to the sea,” which is a direct call for violence against Israelis that argues for the elimination of Israel altogether and the murder of all Jewish people therein.

We can’t sit idly by as two terrorist sympathizers remain in Congress. We must fight back before their dangerous rhetoric has dire consequences. Because this is not some aberration or mistake, neither of these two Members misspoke. They both have long histories of using the phrase “from the river to the sea” and similar expressions championed by blood-thirsty terrorists.

**So, we must hold them accountable and expose the truth about their records of violent rhetoric to the voters.** But we need your help to make it happen because it will be costly to get ads up on the radio waves, TV, and the web that hold these two dangerous Members accountable for their violent rhetoric.

subject: support Tony and Democrats across Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Derek, voters
across the country, including here in Wisconsin, have rejected
anti-abortion extremist candidates running for federal, state, and local
office. We need to keep that momentum going into 2024 to make sure Donald
Trump doesn’t win Wisconsin’s electoral votes in the presidential race.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2196?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20231121_FR_mmfr_0_3MO_TeamEvers_NA_NA_mmfr.1.5&t=1001&akid=6490%2E1827488%2E1VB_j9 ]Can you support Tony and Democrats across Wisconsin by donating to our
team today?

— Begin Forwarded Message —

Derek,

Republicans across the country have shown us that they will do whatever
they can to pass a nationwide abortion ban.

But voters have rejected extreme Republicans who want to ban abortion
because folks across the country agree that the government should not play
a role in personal health care decisions.

That’s why voters in Ohio overwhelmingly supported a ballot measure to
enshrine abortion rights in their state constitution, voters in Virginia
voted for Democratic majorities in their state legislature to protect
against abortion restrictions, and voters in Kentucky reelected Governor
Andy Beshear to another term.

And that’s why we won our race last year, and why Wisconsinites
overwhelmingly rejected an anti-abortion candidate running for the state
Supreme Court earlier this year.

Next year, we have what it takes to mobilize voters, beat Donald Trump,
and keep Wisconsin and the White House blue.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2196?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20231121_FR_mmfr_0_3MO_TeamEvers_NA_NA_mmfr.1.5&t=1002&akid=6490%2E1827488%2E1VB_j9 ]Can you help us make early investments across Wisconsin by donating to
our team today?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation

Hi friend!

Thanksgiving is about a lot of things, including family, food, and friends.

But most of all, it's about showing gratitude to the people we care about. And since our people-powered movement for justice and equity counts on our grassroots supporters, you bet we're grateful for you!

So we'd like to give you a little gift, but before we do, will you power our mission to fight for LGBTQ+ rights, fair wages and workers rights, reproductive rights, civil rights, affordable housing, climate action, and more in Congress with a donation of $3 or any amount today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=231121_team_macrecipe_l1]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately:

Now, without further ado, we'd like to present our free gift to show our appreciation *drumroll please* Sepi Shyne's tasty, cheesy, creamy, mouth-watering Truffle Macaroni and Cheese recipe!

Here's what you'll need:

Last step: Serve hot and dig in! It's really that simple. You can enjoy it alone, or show your appreciation for family and friends by serving it at your next get-together. (And for our lovely vegans out there, just swap in your favorite dairy-free cheese and enjoy!) 🧀

We hope you love Sepi's recipe, and make it a staple in your household as it is in hers. But before you get to cooking, will you add fuel to the fire of our people-powered movement for equity and justice with a donation today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=231121_team_macrecipe_l2]

Chip in [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=231121_team_macrecipe_b1]

Thanks! Hope you have a happy and yummy Thanksgiving!

Team Sepi
Mayor Sepi Shyne has taken on WeHo's biggest issues and delivered results. From raising the minimum wage to the highest in the nation to significantly reducing homelessness – she's running for Congress to fight for all of us. As the first out Iranian LGBTQ+ woman elected anywhere in the world, Sepi is committed to making the American dream a reality for everyone: For immigrants, the LGBTQ+ community, women, and anyone trying to make ends meet. It's our time to Shyne, make a donation today.
Will you join Sepi's team and support her for Congress?

name: Katie Porter
subject: I’m the only Democrat in our competitive U.S. Senate race who does this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Elizabeth has been a mentor to me ever since she was my law processor in the early 2000s, and this is what she taught me.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=1829%2E4032634%2ECk_L0a)
---
Hey, it's Katie Porter. You might know me as “the woman with the whiteboard.” I’m also the only Democrat in California’s competitive U.S. Senate race who has never taken a dime of corporate PAC money and refuses contributions from federal lobbyists. Here’s a story behind that pledge: A few years ago I attended a reception for newly elected Members in DC. A lobbyist came up to me and said “I guess you’re one of the Members we’ll never see.” I asked him what he meant. He said it was because I was one of the newly elected Members who was bucking tradition and refusing corporate PAC money. **Since that day, I’ve said clearly — if lobbyists want to see me, they can see me. But they better bring their good ideas, not their checkbooks.** For example, there are lobbyists for organizations like Planned Parenthood who I’m happy to work with and learn from. But no matter who they are lobbying for, I won’t be swayed by their checks. [**Elizabeth Warren and I are some of the very few Members who refuse lobbyist donations. In fact, there are just 11 of us in the U.S. House. That means we rely on your grassroots support to tackle corruption in Washington together. Can you split a donation between our grassroots-powered campaigns today?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/985?t=8&akid=1829%2E4032634%2ECk_L0a)

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---
| [DONATE NOW: $3](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/985?t=22&express_lane=true&amount=3&akid=1829%2E4032634%2ECk_L0a)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $15](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/985?t=24&express_lane=true&amount=15&akid=1829%2E4032634%2ECk_L0a)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $28](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/985?t=26&express_lane=true&amount=28&akid=1829%2E4032634%2ECk_L0a)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $50](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/985?t=28&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=1829%2E4032634%2ECk_L0a)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $100](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/985?t=18&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=1829%2E4032634%2ECk_L0a)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/985?t=20&express_lane=true&akid=1829%2E4032634%2ECk_L0a)
---

---
Americans deserve to know that their Senators work for them — not special interests. Whether it’s using my whiteboard to hold Wall Street CEOs accountable or passing legislation to prevent Big Pharma from price-gouging, I’m proud to fight for working people and reflect this principle in my campaign’s financing. In addition to rejecting federal lobbyist money, I also don’t accept a dime from corporate PACs, Big Oil, Big Pharma, and Big Bank CEOs. I’m running in a tough primary to serve as California’s next Senator, and Election Day for us is just over three months away. In moments like this when campaigning gets competitive, I don’t call up corporate interests who want to trade large checks for political favors. I send emails like this one to grassroots supporters like you. Elizabeth fundraises for her campaign the same way: Through grassroots support. She has been a mentor to me ever since she was my law processor in the early 2000s, and she taught me early on that nobody gets elected alone. [**So that’s why I’m reaching out. Are you able to split a donation to support my campaign for Senate and Elizabeth’s re-election campaign so we can fight together in the Senate?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/985?t=14&akid=1829%2E4032634%2ECk_L0a) Thanks for everything, Katie Porter
| | | |
---
| [DONATE](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/985?t=12&akid=1829%2E4032634%2ECk_L0a)
---
| [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/365?t=4&akid=1829%2E4032634%2ECk_L0a) | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/367?t=5&akid=1829%2E4032634%2ECk_L0a) | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/368?t=6&akid=1829%2E4032634%2ECk_L0a) | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/369?t=7&akid=1829%2E4032634%2ECk_L0a)
---|---|---|---
| Paid for by Warren for Senate
---
All content © 2023 Warren for Senate, All Rights Reserved
PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117
| | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com
---
We'll miss you, but you can always [unsubscribe](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=9&akid=1829%2E4032634%2ECk_L0a).

Friend,

We have achieved a great victory in the last election, securing a Republican majority in Congress. However, our work is far from over. Now, we must ensure that we flip the Senate in 2024. We must remain vigilant in defending our conservative values and stopping the Radical Left’s failed policies. With your help, we have what it takes to stop the Democrats’ woke ideology.
| [ **RUSH SUPPORT** ](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=c0579d9b365e425aa22e78fba77895d4&_e=iBd9fC6UfcFNScLB-HfYKKifXKoQ9D8EZAm1uSfII51bw3wSy6sXPojdLwaszThj2zV0KLkvIGue93PXWZhQ7yRT2zfo6ymhTVAaRXSqrgj52VUQFutuazAyKN1toO3xxQRFapNyWnJ0QoZjp7CxwIzjaMcDV4PmnF2LRMaK2AeqsmSP8QxNZrcR_xdboI9HNT7tSkQnoRtH7RqE6uPy9urWbBPxUtBso5_PfHAIIr7ZpICFaNFd-sSzw02lxw7GJurHfVTXqczvPbym_XxXUWg7MZqXF6hN12ecTi2wLfnjt20nJ8y46Z6rGMM7BPLhUnix0RDXS68rlX8-28Q5gtVSEiORlYowUd_6lqmYTUGB3nag9mr9vEtzRArVspRxcNCuxY9YV0YtrLZDQ-e_MU3xBdtWhIQrtzeoMyj2Ca-VNtYeNOdaYqCxtf6LExTa_xNFqUbQbZ67dEFnyS7EE7NT5m4-NtdEn26R0jBeA0-FegJ-2Mom_nK0NAesvSq9cMHXHDvIVZQrn97XdOHuXg%3D%3D)
---
