body:
No Marine goes into battle alone, which is why I need your support in my fight to win one of the most competitive Congressional seats on the ballot in 2024. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=d227e1fcddc54103b51c4534a18874cf&_t=uVW6odHPx1LQztgVbgugvuJwxpjjTjx7Simdrr7UVbi60BmzpGedg87XxXABRsmaPmltMyMBHO5_0HwwEGY4w8V082ANLnGdsIRHYHFGi60%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=d227e1fcddc54103b51c4534a18874cf&_t=uVW6odHPx1LQztgVbgugvuJwxpjjTjx7Simdrr7UVbi60BmzpGedg87XxXABRsmaPmltMyMBHO5_0HwwEGY4w8V082ANLnGdsIRHYHFGi60%3D)
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d227e1fcddc54103b51c4534a18874cf&_e=WehYUevhHsnbNTwl--pDrVvSgCqOP5Or52Ea_1BWCaPAtZzm94tZGaNPfxLkJhfiPowNXi2OEwP2tXUXJx3KaQ1slTa6GS4E1ZvUdwPc7iV0PzbT6jKUmkeUnKBAPHuKRD0PFz_yeZYOz0S15pvKldply4bKlnQHuZ6nd-vas22OUqI6wmQ6QCJA_JTm3DoaJeSj7OT-kc77S_x5U2Y7vemidVTD9sqK2qPSgszdENGcTgEXOW7lMN7edHN3hBmdnZDphRbJ9-gM_67jjarKt-9_ruJty1ZtigBM-A08v4Ee7fq7bOYjkLAQEVSgGb54_v0CyKoOxpDbby2axxz8auNLUas_a-U1YN4TWCkBQQ27J16ZGJbqd6vaVgrHcLmx)
Peter,

If you’re fortunate enough to know a Marine, you know we carry our identity as a Marine with us to the grave.

My service in the United States Marine Corps was a life-changing commitment, and it has continued to shape mine as I have returned to civilian life.

**Even now, as I’m fighting to win a seat in the United States Congress, I’m doing so with Honor, Courage and Commitment.**

I don’t back down from a fight, and when there is a fight, I make sure I’m there first.

When I saw my city suffering from economic hardship and rampant crime due to poor leadership, I took on an entrenched & well-funded incumbent and won election as Mayor.

Now, I see the country that I served to protect suffering from the exact same crises _and worse_ , [**so I’m jumping into the fight to fix it.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d227e1fcddc54103b51c4534a18874cf&_e=WehYUevhHsnbNTwl--pDrVvSgCqOP5Or52Ea_1BWCaPAtZzm94tZGaNPfxLkJhfiPowNXi2OEwP2tXUXJx3KaQ1slTa6GS4E1ZvUdwPc7iV0PzbT6jKUmkeUnKBAPHuKRD0PFz_yeZYOz0S15pvKldply4bKlnQHuZ6nd-vas22OUqI6wmQ6QCJA_JTm3DoaJeSj7OT-kc77S_x5U2Y7vemidVTD9sqK2qPSgszdENHXcPw0aFdqhluZowflunsEzeFwRn376mQu84BTdwdqXXYagRklxqv_jN3p_vmritA0liXwAR14ROzz4Q6jo9saOFaDjl2AgFdna_27o-3BUB2m-sonUP_Y9UJSuEBHOxAiDf8KI9DiCVhDu_EF15wc)

[ ** SEND A MARINE TO CONGRESS ➞ **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d227e1fcddc54103b51c4534a18874cf&_e=WehYUevhHsnbNTwl--pDrVvSgCqOP5Or52Ea_1BWCaPAtZzm94tZGaNPfxLkJhfiPowNXi2OEwP2tXUXJx3KaQ1slTa6GS4E1ZvUdwPc7iV0PzbT6jKUmkeUnKBAPHuKRD0PFz_yeZYOz0S15pvKldply4bKlnQHuZ6nd-vas22OUqI6wmQ6QCJA_JTm3DoaJeSj7OT-kc77S_x5U2Y7vemidVTD9sqK2qPSgszdENFlovOaICId1FA4wGxfsqWjsL8VfJboq5ZzwxBmVMEeW0zCOrIznIpYbr6cZt4Bn9MOz7VIT0zdaTgeQGIwXjJk2FznU4OvTfu3SAuk1BuKRf476e49-RCMhxAptjmEdndVy1Tydt-5SwU2hx6Ij46T)
**But no Marine goes into battle alone** , which is why I need your support in my fight to win one of the most competitive Congressional seats on the ballot in 2024 – California’s 9th District.

[**Will you send a Marine and conservative patriot to Congress by chipping in anything you can to my campaign today?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d227e1fcddc54103b51c4534a18874cf&_e=WehYUevhHsnbNTwl--pDrVvSgCqOP5Or52Ea_1BWCaPAtZzm94tZGaNPfxLkJhfiPowNXi2OEwP2tXUXJx3KaQ1slTa6GS4E1ZvUdwPc7iV0PzbT6jKUmkeUnKBAPHuKRD0PFz_yeZYOz0S15pvKldply4bKlnQHuZ6nd-vas22OUqI6wmQ6QCJA_JTm3DoaJeSj7OT-kc77S_x5U2Y7vemidVTD9sqK2qPSgszdENHiDSgtytSv-vRS3W60dyua8bXEqKxka5RpBlcg8QQ8YAG2YMPHDcpgLxori46JlfzWlTTnR0_ERVmrTNifk7xWBwf-Mxybb07JS9fUFql2OmMTyZwF271TguL5nLjA3ikeicMFuMemuZ1Pj2yvqCnu)

Our current leadership has failed to secure our borders and compromised our national security; they’ve allowed drugs & crime to take over our communities; they’ve been reckless spenders – driving up our national debt and burdening families with out-of-control inflation; they’ve abandoned our military & veterans; and they’ve made our nation weaker.

**It’s the work of politicians, and it’s time we relieved them of their duties.**

I need your help to win this seat so we have leaders in Washington who will serve our country and our people, instead of their own agendas.

You trust our Marines to protect our nation. _Will you trust one to help save it?_ [**Please join my campaign today with a contribution of any amount, and let’s take our country back!**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d227e1fcddc54103b51c4534a18874cf&_e=WehYUevhHsnbNTwl--pDrVvSgCqOP5Or52Ea_1BWCaPAtZzm94tZGaNPfxLkJhfiPowNXi2OEwP2tXUXJx3KaQ1slTa6GS4E1ZvUdwPc7iV0PzbT6jKUmkeUnKBAPHuKRD0PFz_yeZYOz0S15pvKldply4bKlnQHuZ6nd-vas22OUqI6wmQ6QCJA_JTm3DoaJeSj7OT-kc77S_x5U2Y7vemidVTD9sqK2qPSgszdENH0foIwpbIAC9BeW9JqdJmuuxnJTbXtUh3QpSTe2bMR2rupnSoWV_JI4VX7TFoOwG-va39kUELoMS0t8o_hRnxWKY5cwO7Abc5rhGGr4Cw4_D83heK3Q1D9hZKJIganKecbXaYf1l4M-6JSs3OeZJGT)

Semper Fi!

Kevin Lincoln
Veteran, USMC
Republican for Congress

[ ** SEND A MARINE TO CONGRESS ➞ **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d227e1fcddc54103b51c4534a18874cf&_e=WehYUevhHsnbNTwl--pDrVvSgCqOP5Or52Ea_1BWCaPAtZzm94tZGaNPfxLkJhfiPowNXi2OEwP2tXUXJx3KaQ1slTa6GS4E1ZvUdwPc7iV0PzbT6jKUmkeUnKBAPHuKRD0PFz_yeZYOz0S15pvKldply4bKlnQHuZ6nd-vas22OUqI6wmQ6QCJA_JTm3DoaJeSj7OT-kc77S_x5U2Y7vemidVTD9sqK2qPSgszdENHV9YJB2ceVqaeY03RwqV2oY-H6GBEZYqZCff0u-wDpA74d6U3EOefKuL8vTTG8G8CCfrZhGmKCACgD18l0HKUKpoA45JI7XUwa7LdHvKAf1E6BSx_5rSBM9Rjepg0FRiZXu7LL3Z0ZiPj3tRboItkx)

| **Meet Kevin Lincoln
**
My name is Kevin Lincoln, and my story, is the Valley’s story. I am a 3rd generation Stocktonian, raising a 4th generation in the city I love. I’m the grandson of Mexican immigrants, and my stepfather is an Army veteran.

Like many Stocktonians, my family has overcome economic setbacks. My own father struggled to survive on these streets, and was at one time, homeless. But I never let adversity define me. I joined the Marines and served in the White House Military Office, assigned to Marine One. I graduated college while working full-time and raising a family. I’ve worked in corporate America and served our community as a pastor, and as a non-profit leader.

I’m blessed with a beautiful wife, Bonnie, and two amazing children. I’ve lived a life of service, but the greatest honor of my life has been giving back to my community, through serving as Mayor of my hometown, Stockton.
[ ** SEND KEVIN TO CONGRESS ➞ **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d227e1fcddc54103b51c4534a18874cf&_e=WehYUevhHsnbNTwl--pDrVvSgCqOP5Or52Ea_1BWCaPAtZzm94tZGaNPfxLkJhfiPowNXi2OEwP2tXUXJx3KaQ1slTa6GS4E1ZvUdwPc7iV0PzbT6jKUmkeUnKBAPHuKRD0PFz_yeZYOz0S15pvKldply4bKlnQHuZ6nd-vas22OUqI6wmQ6QCJA_JTm3DoaJeSj7OT-kc77S_x5U2Y7vemidVTD9sqK2qPSgszdENEwgxowCvr24XAqjdlHFiveNC9JINyuSO-3qcFLy1vYr6frViiYZ3BxPkRACyMCS93LDr1oQgQuZgl7m4sEh_v-hSUcZwl_7Le6fmqWA2iGuvMuBPLfzDE8Pde7ZjH6a4BwuIu-ZpDx7OuvkAZL9xE2)

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: the GOP is out for revenge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
After Nevada's last Senate race came down to fewer than 8,000 votes, the GOP is out for revenge. |
#
Hi folks, this is Senator Jacky Rosen from Nevada. I'll keep this brief: I try not to put too much stock in political pundits or their predictions, but I just saw a _Washington Post_ article calling me one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection – and I'm worried. Take a look: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73780827/439595211/-1273059122?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20231121_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmJiYzYxYy1jNjg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gkbitlw1tDRl48fz5GNksFVNi44yUT3ZBIhxqU3Ur3k=) **After Nevada's last Senate race came down to fewer than 8,000 votes, the GOP is out for revenge.** Experts say Nevada could _once again_ decide Senate control, which means we can't afford a single misstep – especially not with Mitch McConnell and the GOP coming after me as a top target for defeat. **I’m ready to take them on, but I can't win this fight alone. clean_body: After Nevada's last Senate race came down to fewer than 8,000 votes, the GOP is out for revenge. | Hi folks, this is Senator Jacky Rosen from Nevada. I'll keep this brief: I try not to put too much stock in political pundits or their predictions, but I just saw a Washington Post article calling me one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection – and I'm worried. Take a look: = After Nevada's last Senate race came down to fewer than 8,000 votes, the GOP is out for revenge. Experts say Nevada could once again decide Senate control, which means we can't afford a single misstep – especially not with Mitch McConnell and the GOP coming after me as a top target for defeat. I’m ready to take them on, but I can't win this fight alone. That’s why I’ve set a goal to raise $100,000 before the end of the month – and I need your help to reach it.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Jacky Rosen and Tina Smith will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = In a battleground race like ours, every dollar matters. And, at the end of the day, it's always the fact that you're willing to give your support – not how much you give – that means the most. Thank you, Jacky Rosen Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

| Peter,

With extremist Mike Johnson at the helm as the Speaker of the House, our reproductive rights are on the ballot in the upcoming election.

Mike Johnson built his career working with anti-choice organizations to restrict access to birth control and reproductive care for people across the country. Enforcing a national abortion ban is also on his radar, and my opponent, **Anthony D’Esposito, said he would “probably” vote for a nationwide ban.**

**That’s why it’s crucial we retake the Democratic House majority and flip the 2nd most winnable district in the country blue. **IF** we expose Trump for what he truly is – _a threat to our government, national security, democracy, and country_ – then we can stop him in his tracks!

**BUT IF** we sit back and do nothing, Trump and the GOP will continue to lie about Trump’s dangerous reputation – _**ensuring another Trump Presidency.**_
[**_So we need to know that you agree with The Rachel Maddow Show: Add your name if you agree with the Rachel Maddow Show that Trump’s threats of revenge need to be taken seriously because the stakes are really high »_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/agree_maddow_show?source=FFR_20231121_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=9&akid=20436%2E4449941%2Eg4HpT4)

name: Team Schiff
subject: Not Good
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Friend— A new poll out of UC Berkeley and the _Los Angeles Times_ shows Republican candidate Steve Garvey _gaining ground among voters._

**This is exactly what the CA GOP has dreamed of — their multi-millionaire celebrity candidate is rising in the polls ahead of the all-party jungle primary, with early voting less than 100 days away.** [Rush in a split donation of $10 now between the Voter Protection Project and Adam’s campaign to help us respond »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57326?t=6&akid=11843%2E878179%2EH268nU)

Already, MAGA Republicans have thrown every possible roadblock in Adam’s way.

Kevin McCarthy removed him from his assignment on the House Intelligence Committee. The MAGA majority censured him in a hyper-partisan political stunt this summer under the personal threat of Donald Trump.

A California Republican congressman even introduced legislation to limit the campaign contributions Adam needs to help fight back against the GOP money machine in this U.S. Senate race.

We need to be prepared for any attempts by the GOP to elect another inexperienced, celebrity politician in California. Been there, done that. Several times in fact. And it has never worked out well.

We can’t put any dirty tricks past the GOP. We can’t discount any Republican candidate. We need all hands on deck _now._

[With Adam running in 4 elections between over 30 declared candidates spanning every political party, we need all the help we can get to win this race. Can you chip in a split donation of $10 between the Voter Protection Project and Adam’s campaign to help us respond to the GOP advancement in the polls and continue our efforts to reach every single voter in the Golden State? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57326?t=7&akid=11843%2E878179%2EH268nU) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57327?t=8&akid=11843%2E878179%2EH268nU)

A California Republican congressman even introduced legislation to limit the campaign contributions Adam needs to help fight back against the GOP money machine in this U.S. Senate race. We need to be prepared for any attempts by the GOP to elect another inexperienced, celebrity politician in California. Been there, done that. Several times in fact. And it has never worked out well. We can’t put any dirty tricks past the GOP. We can’t discount any Republican candidate. We need all hands on deck now. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps. Governor Sununu's Introduction Chris Sununu touted that Chris Christie has been all around the state talking with voters and really cares about the individual. Chris Christie is really putting the work in to make sure we as individuals and citizens will be heard! 2\. Congressman Bass' 5 Words and Endorsement In giving his endorsement to Chris Christie, former Congressman Bass gave a simple, yet powerful, 5 points on why this is the time to support Chris Christie for president. 3\. The Packed Hall So many people came to hear Chris Christie that it was standing room only, and people took notice. | | If last night proved anything, it is that Chris Christie has the momentum to win the key primary state of New Hampshire. name: Team Jayapal
subject: A bleak reality
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Every day, we have the opportunity to be champions for change by supporting progressive leaders who are not afraid to stand up to the status quo.
#
Peter,
It’s pretty simple. Poverty is a policy choice. Hunger is a policy choice. Extreme wealth inequality is a policy choice.
If we continue allowing our democracy to be corrupted by the same politicians who put profits over people, pander to billionaire donors, and take orders from corporate lobbyists, _this will be our reality for the foreseeable future._
That’s why we are dedicated and determined to support Pramila and our progressive campaign**— even in the midst of all of this GOP-led chaos.**
Every day, we have the opportunity to be champions for change by supporting progressive leaders who are not afraid to stand up to the status quo.
